Name: Koç Holding
Description: Koç Holding is Turkey’s leading investment holding company and Koç Group is Turkey's largest industrial and services group in terms of revenues, exports, number of employees, taxes paid and market capitalization on Borsa Istanbul. Being the only Turkish company to be ranked in Fortune Global 500 List and in Forbes World’s Best Employers List, Koç Holding has leading positions with strong competitive advantages in energy, automotive, consumer durables and finance sectors.

Name: RÖNESANS HOLDİNG
Description:
Merkezi, Ankara’da bulunan Rönesans Holding, dünyanın en büyük müteahhitlik şirketlerinin sıralandığı ENR listesinde dünyada 50. sırada yer alırken, Avrupa'nın ve Türkiye’nin en büyük uluslararası müteahhitlik şirketlerinden biridir. Türkiye ve Avrupa başta olmak üzere, Orta Asya ve Afrika'da 40'dan fazla ülkeye uzanan geniş bir coğrafyada 1993 yılından beri; inşaat, enerji, sağlık, gayrimenkul ve endüstriyel yatırımlar alanlarında ana müteahhit ve yatırımcı olarak faaliyet gösteren Rönesans Holding’in iştirakleri arasında Hollanda merkezli Ballast Nedam ve Almanya merkezli Heitkamp Industrial Solutions GmbH da bulunmaktadır.

Uluslararası deneyimini, ileri mühendislik bilgisi ve finansal gücü bir araya getiren Rönesans Holding; ortakları GIC, Meridiam Infrastructure, Sojitz, Samsung C&T, TotalEnergies, ve Dünya Bankası kuruluşu IFC (grubun azınlık hissedarlarından) ile birlikte Türkiye ve yurt dışındaki öncü projelere 8 milyar Euro’nun üzerinde yatırım yapmıştır.

Rönesans Holding, the conglomerate's leading investment entity headquartered in Ankara, is the 50th largest international contracting company globally and one of the largest in Europe. With operations spanning 40 countries across Europe, Central Asia, and Africa, including subsidiaries such as Ballast Nedam in the Netherlands and Heitkamp Industrial Solutions GmbH in Germany, Rönesans has been operating as the main contractor and investor successfully for more than 30 years in construction, real estate, concession, renewable energy and industrials. 

Under the leadership of its Honorary President, Erman Ilıcak, Rönesans, along with its partners GIC, Meridiam Infrastructure, Sojitz, Samsung C&T, TotalEnergies, and IFC of the World Bank Group (minority shareholder in the group), has invested more than EUR 8 billion into pioneering projects globally.

Name: Al Khayyat Investments (AKI)
Description:
Al Khayyat Investments (AKI) is a diversified, family-owned Emirati group established in the United Arab Emirates in 1965 by Dr. Saad Al Khayyat. What began with the founding of BinSina Pharmacy, now one of the region’s most established healthcare retail brands, has evolved over six decades into a pioneering group operating across nine industries in the Middle East. Today, AKI’s businesses span pharmaceuticals, medical equipment, retail, food and non-food consumer goods, fitness, automotive, environmental services, logistics, manufacturing and contracting.

AKI employs over 11,000 people and has a footprint across nine countries in the Middle East. Through decades of hands-on operating experience, the group has built a unique, integrated ecosystem that enables the sustainable growth of businesses, brands and services. This infrastructure allows AKI to build, scale and operate resilient businesses with long-term impact.

Positioned at the intersection of opportunity and growth for East and West, AKI acts as a catalyst for sustainable business expansion, turning global capability into regional execution and long-term value. The group enables meaningful partnerships and accelerates the growth of businesses and brands across its ecosystem.

Recognized for its leadership and contribution to the region’s economy, AKI was ranked among the Top 100 Arab Family Businesses of 2025 by Forbes. Born in the UAE, AKI continues to grow locally, regionally and internationally, anchored in its people, values and commitment to sustainable progress and impact.

Name: Al Ghurair
Description:
Al Ghurair is one of the largest diversified family business groups in the Middle East, with operations in five distinct strategic sectors: Foods, Development, Mobility, Infrastructure and Property Management. Established in 1960 as a trading business, Al Ghurair was one of the first pillars of industry and commerce in the emerging United Arab Emirates. From modest beginnings, and with a proud history of innovation and entrepreneurship, the Al Ghurair family name has become synonymous with the heritage, evolution, and vision of the prestigious country itself.

Headquartered in Dubai, the business’ diversified operations span more than 50 countries across the globe, employing approximately 28,000 people. Today, Al Ghurair continues to build on its enduring 60+ year legacy, guided by its purpose: ‘In pursuit of better’, as it strives to facilitate meaningful and sustainable change across the communities within which it operates. 

For more information, please visit: www.al-ghurair.com.

Name: Votorantim
Description:
We focus on transforming opportunities into businesses that generate value.

Votorantim is a permanently capitalized investment holding company with a long-term investment approach that seeks to deliver superior financial returns allied to positive social and environmental impacts.

With a 106-year history, we are present in 22 countries through a portfolio of relevant companies that operate in various industries: building materials, banking, renewable energy, base metals, orange juice, infrastructure, long steel, real estate, investments, pharma, and environmental services.

Our capital allocation decisions are tested against adverse scenarios and based on our ability to face challenges. This approach and our courage to invest in new projects have placed us among the few Brazilian companies with an investment grade rating by the three leading international rating agencies: S&P Global Ratings, Moody’s, and Fitch Ratings. 

We take a responsible approach to the way we operate and invest. Our identity reflects how we do business, in pursuit of the best opportunities inside and outside our portfolio. Always at the right time, the right way, and with the right people.

Votorantim – The future is our territory.

Name: Randoncorp
Description:
We are people working for people. With more than 5 years of history, our commitment is to generate solutions that make people's lives easier through mobility. We have achieved global presence and leadership in all of our operating segments. Our headquarters are in Caxias do Sul (RS), a city in the south of Brazil, and we have 31 industrial units present in more than 120 countries, always prioritizing proximity and trust with our audiences, valuing people and profit with sustainability .

Our purpose is to connect people and wealth, generating prosperity and we do this through the companies Randon, Fras-le Mobility, Castertech, Suspensys, Master, JOST Brasil, CTR – Centro Tecnológico Randon, NIONE, Auttom, Randon Ventures, Conexo, Randon Consórcios , Randon Corretora de Seguros, Banco Randon, Addiante and DB.

We are part of Level 1 of Corporate Governance at B3, ranking among the largest private Brazilian companies.

Name: Godrej Industries Group
Description:
Godrej was founded in 1897 by Ardeshir Godrej to help build India’s economic independence. A significant portion of our profits from our innovations was donated to India’s freedom movement. During the Spanish Flu pandemic of 1918, we made the first soap from vegetable oil with no animal fat. In 1951, we crafted the ballot boxes for India's first general election, giving both women and men the equal right to vote.
 
At the Godrej Industries Group (GIG), we are committed to growing this legacy. The revenue of the Group is USD 6.1Bn with a market capitalization of USD 27.5 Bn (as of 31 March 2024). By serving over 1.1 Bn consumers globally through are businesses with market leadership positions in consumer products, real estate, agriculture, financial services, and chemicals. 
 
Godrej Consumer Products is an FMCG leader in Home and Personal Care in Asia, Africa, and Latin America. Godrej Properties is India’s leading real estate developer by sales. Godrej Agrovet, including its production of compound feed and crude palm oil, addresses key challenges in Indian agriculture, improving productivity for farmers. Godrej Chemicals, our oldest business, services diverse industrial applications through one of India’s largest oleo-chemicals, derivatives, and specialty chemical portfolios. Godrej Fund Management is the real estate private equity arm, and Godrej Capital, the newest company, has a fast-growing financial services business.
 
We believe we are only as good as what we do next. We strive to continuously improve our business and impact on the world, shaping a more sustainable and responsible future by placing our planet and people alongside profit. Through Godrej Good & Green, we aim to create a more inclusive and greener planet, aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals and the needs of local communities. At the Godrej DEI Lab, we empower inclusion within the group, build DEI ecosystems and bring DEI-related ideas and innovation to the mainstream.

Name: Borusan Holding
Description:
Founded in 1944, Borusan Group has been one of the leading industrial conglomorates in Turkey. The group operates in the fields of steel, distributorships, logistics and energy. The group’s growth is propelled by innovation, R&D, digitalization and corporate enterpreneurship. Reshaping and revamping itself in line with the necessities of the industry 4.0, Borusan Group is embracing the future and maintaining its success in its sectors as well as expanding the range of services and products it has been offering.
 
The group is also at the forefront of arts and culture;  highly devoted to empowering women and giving back to the society as a staunch supporter of volunteerism.
 
Specialties: Energy, steel, distributorship, automative, logistics, industrial manufacturing, engineering, arts and culture

Name: Elite Group Holding
Description:
Headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Elite Group Holding is a UAE-based business conglomerate with a diverse portfolio spanning multiple industries. Our journey is rooted in a deep commitment to enhancing the quality of life within the communities we serve. We continuously seek avenues for fostering growth and strive to make a positive impact on both our community and the world. 
 
Founded on the principles of quality and dedication, we have grown into a dynamic conglomerate that touches various sectors, from Automotive, e-Commerce, Real Estate & Contracting to Investments. Our extensive experience and expertise enable us to provide cutting-edge solutions and services tailored to meet the unique needs of our partners and clients. 

We believe that excellence is the foundation of our success. Our team of highly skilled professionals brings a wealth of knowledge and passion to our every endeavor, ensuring that we consistently exceed expectations and set new industry standards. Moreover, our unwavering commitment to sustainability drives us to implement environmentally responsible practices across all our operations, reinforcing our dedication to both innovation and the well-being of our planet.

Name: John Keells Holdings PLC
Description: John Keells Holdings PLC (JKH) is the largest conglomerate listed on the Colombo Stock Exchange. With a heritage of over 150 years, through innovation and strategic partnerships, the John Keells Group of companies have become leaders in many key industry verticals, and the Group is a driver and an integral part of the Sri Lankan economy.

Name: Al Masaood
Description:
Al Masaood is a privately held and highly diversified Group, based in Abu Dhabi. Its companies and partnerships span activities and expertise in 18 different market segments. Its primary goal is growth through a deep understanding of its marketplace, the quality of its products and services and an uncompromising quest for customer satisfaction.

From its early foundations as a small trading house some 50 years ago, Al Masaood has become one of the largest integrated industrial, commercial and service organisations in the Middle East. The Al Masaood Company holds Abu Dhabi Chamber of Commerce registration number one.

With activities spanning most key economic sectors, the Al Masaood Group represents the collective business interests of the Al Masaood family.

Name: Ali & Sons Holding LLC
Description:
Ali & Sons Holding LLC (ASH) is a diversified conglomerate established in 1979 based in Abu Dhabi (United Arab Emirates).

Our multi-branded portfolio bridges the industrial, commercial and retail worlds. Exemplifying the diverse economy of the UAE, we operate in Contracting, Manufacturing, Oil & Gas, Marine Engineering and Commercial under our industrial segment.

Focusing on the retail or consumer segment, we operate in automotive, retail, property management, and tourism. Our products and services touch the lives of our people every day through well-known brand names. The group is aligned with some of the most prestigious and sought-after brands such as Porsche, Audi, Volkswagen, Skoda and MG. In addition, the company has built
several home-grown local brands of its own including Eurostar Rent A Car and Amwaj Jewellery.



Follow us on:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/alisonsholding
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AliandSonsHolding
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/c/AliandSonsHoldingLLC

Name: Koch
Description:
Based in Wichita, Kansas, Koch is one of the largest private companies in America. A diverse set of businesses and industries across the world, we work together to keep improving and exploring new ways to make life even better.

With a presence in more than 50 countries, Koch companies employ about 120,000 people worldwide, with nearly half of those in the United States. Koch offers abundant opportunities to improve life’s most necessary things – like food, clothing, water, transportation and technology.

Name: AW Rostamani Group
Description:
AW Rostamani Group is a multi-sector, multi-market group and one of the most progressive companies in the Middle East. With a legacy spanning over seven decades, AWR Group employs 3,000 individuals, serving a diverse customer base of over 155,000 individuals and 24,000 businesses. Our core verticals include automotive, real estate, logistics, lifestyle, lighting solutions, travel, agritech, and sustainable packaging. 

More than just serving the present, AWR Group embraces generation next. We build purposeful businesses to enrich the lives of every generation, striving to make a meaningful and enduring impact on business, people, and the world. Built on a bedrock of strong founding values, AWR Group continues to evolve with the times and ahead of them, at work for a planet that prospers.

Name: AW Rostamani Group
Description:
AW Rostamani Group is a multi-sector, multi-market group and one of the most progressive companies in the Middle East. With a legacy spanning over seven decades, AWR Group employs 3,000 individuals, serving a diverse customer base of over 155,000 individuals and 24,000 businesses. Its core verticals include mobility, real estate, logistics, lifestyle, lighting solutions, travel, agritech, and sustainable packaging. 

More than just serving the present, AWR Group embraces generation next. Built on a bedrock of strong founding values, AWR Group continues to evolve with the times and ahead of them, at work for a planet that prospers.

Name: Bolloré
Description: Le Groupe Bolloré, qui a fêté ses deux cents ans d’histoire en 2022, est contrôlé majoritairement par la famille Bolloré. La stabilité de son actionnariat lui permet de mener une politique d’investissement à long terme. Depuis son origine, le Groupe continue de se démarquer grâce à sa capacité d’adaptation vers des services et solutions innovantes, et à sa stratégie de diversification à l’international, tout en veillant à générer des impacts sociaux et environnementaux positifs.

Name: Limak Group of Companies
Description:
Limak Group is a fast-growing international company headquartered in Turkey operating according to best operational practices across multiple major sectors such as energy, tourism, food, construction, and infrastructure.

Limak Group of Companies has successfully operated in the following sectors for nearly half a century:

Construction: With global and ambitious construction operations, Limak Construction is Turkey’s second largest international contractor.

Energy: Limak Energy generates, distributes and supplies vital power across Turkey and internationally.

Tourism: Limak Group of Companies owns and operates one of Turkey’s largest hotel chains and is expanding its hospitality operations internationally.

Cement: Limak Cement operates in Turkey, Mozambique, Ivory Coast and Dubai with 11 cement plants, 27 ready-mixed concrete plants and 1 block BIMS facility. 

Infrastructure: Limak’s infrastructure investments business has a proven track record of developing and financing projects, with a diverse portfolio of markets and geographies.

Energy, Electrical and Mechanical Contracting:  We have expertise in technical contracting services across a range of projects, including residential and commercial buildings, hotels, hospitals, schools, shopping centres, electricity distribution networks and infrastructure projects.

Food & Beverage: Limak started operating within the food & beverage industry in 2008, producing tomato paste, fruit juice concentrate and fruit pulp at Limkon Fruit Juice Concentrate Facilities.

Technology: Limak is constantly expanding its service offering within in the fields of Technology, IT infrastructure, software, cyber security, 24/7 monitoring and hardware development.

Aviation: Limak Aviation provides a 24/7 air taxi service from Limak’s international, regional, and dedicated business aviation airports.

Name: Alphabet Inc.
Description:
Alphabet is a collection of companies, including Google, Verily Life Sciences, GV, Calico, and X.

In October 2015, Alphabet became the parent holding company of Google, with the companies far afield of our main internet products contained in Alphabet.

Name: Algihaz Holding
Description:
Algihaz Holding is a Saudi Arabian investment group that has emerged as a leading organization since 1975. Algihaz investment size exceeding 15 Billion SAR and have a combined industry experience of 49 years. They drive excellence and envision a brighter future powered by the Kingdom's unyielding spirit of progress.

Algihaz Holding has a diverse portfolio that empowers many pivotal industries. We are leading the transition in energy with both conventional and renewable solutions, building vital infrastructure to connect the world in communications, shaping communities with innovative projects in real estate, delivering customized solutions for diverse sectors in industrial manufacturing, ensuring safety and peace of mind in security services, and creating moments that inspire and connect in experiential projects. 
We harness global expertise through strategic partnerships to deliver integrated solutions that empower progress in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030.

Algihaz Holding's core strengths are innovation, diversity, and collaboration. We embrace cutting-edge technologies and foster a culture of creativity. We invest in a wider range of assets and projects, both nationally and internationally.

With a team of over 20,000 dedicated professionals, Algihaz Holding is on a mission to shape a sustainable future for the businesses it empowers.

Name: Rawabi Holding Group
Description:
We are dedicated to cultivating a culture of innovation, collaboration, and respect where each individual is valued and empowered to achieve their full potential.

As we embark on our next chapter of growth, we remain dedicated to inspiring, guiding, and supporting our people in overcoming challenges and achieving their goals, leading by example with integrity and professionalism.

At Rawabi Holding, we value our people as our greatest asset. Our leadership is rooted in recognizing that the dedication and talent of our team propel our success and growth.

Name: Calik Holding
Description:
1981 yılında Ahmet Çalık tarafından kurulan Çalık Holding enerji, inşaat, madencilik, tekstil, finans, telekomünikasyon ve dijital alanlarında faaliyet göstermektedir. Orta Asya, Balkanlar ve MENA bölgesi olmak üzere, 28 ülkede çalışmalarını sürdüren Grup, 15 bini aşkın kişiye istihdam sağlamaktadır. Dünyanın çeşitli bölgelerinde süregelen faaliyetleri çerçevesinde itibarı, güvenilirliği, güçlü finansal yapısı ve uluslararası şirketlerle yaptığı uzun süreli işbirlikleriyle tanınan Çalık Holding, inovatif iş modelleri geliştirmekte ve çalıştığı iş alanlarında sürdürülebilir büyüme sağlayarak ilerlemektedir. Faaliyette bulunduğu her coğrafyada kalıcı değerler oluşturma ilkesiyle hareket eden Çalık Holding, odağına aldığı Endüstri 4,0, Toplum 5.0 ve sürdürülebilirlik yaklaşımlarıyla geliştirdiği iş süreçleri, hizmetleri ve ürünleriyle, toplum ve iş dünyası için öncü projeleri hayata geçirmektedir.

Established by Ahmet Çalık in 1981, Çalık Holding operates in energy, construction, mining, textile, finance, telecommunications and digital sectors. With operations in 28 countries across Central Asia, Balkans and MENA, the Group employs more than 15,000 people.Throughout its operations across the world, Çalık Holding is known for its integrity, reliability, robust financial structure and long-term collaborations with international companies. It develops innovative business models and moves forward in its lines of business with sustainable growth. Dedicated to creating lasting value in every geography it operates, Çalık Holding realizes pioneering projects for society and business world through its corporate processes, services and products developed with Industry 4.0, Society 5.0 and sustainability approaches it has embraced.

Name: Al Mulla Group
Description:
Al Mulla Group is a leading diversified privately held business group based in the State of Kuwait. It employs over 15,000 people from over 35 nationalities, has affiliations with over 40 companies and subsidiaries, and represents over 200 internationally renowned brands.

It runs a diverse portfolio of businesses in numerous domains, including: 

•	Automotive distribution and servicing	
•	Engineering
•	Rental & Leasing of Vehicles
•	Insurance
•	Manufacturing
•	Consumer & Corporate Financing
•	Investments
•	Security Services	
•	Money Exchange 
•	Office Automation
•	Engineering Products Distribution
•	Healthcare
•	Real Estate
•	Education
•	Travel
•	Cargo Services

Starting as a small shop for electrical appliances in Kuwait City back in 1938, the Group today has operations in Kuwait, Iraq, Oman, the UAE, Qatar, India and Egypt, with further plans underway for expansion in other areas in the Middle East and beyond. 

The Group’s consistent commitment to top-quality products and services, and its adherence to international standards of governance have won it lasting partnerships with over 200 international companies from more than 30 countries. Consequently, the Group has built strong relationships with other businesses, governments, and NGOs across the Middle East over the last 9 decades.

Al Mulla Group’s primary goal is to create effective and far-reaching solutions that address a wide range of needs, starting from automotive, financial services, engineering, manufacturing, and trading, while at the same time identifying opportunities that would provide new avenues for business growth and better services and products to customers and communities.

This strategy has enabled Al Mulla Group to be a market leader in every sector it operates in.

Name: Modon
Description: Modon is an international holding company, headquartered in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, and listed on the Abu Dhabi Securities Exchange (ADX). We are at the forefront of urban innovation, creating iconic designs and experiences that continually surpass expectations. Our primary business sectors include real estate, hospitality, asset management, investments, events, and tourism. Our goal is to deliver long-term, sustainable value, laying the foundations for intelligent, connected living.

Name: Tamer Group
Description:
Tamer Group began as the First pharmacy in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, established by the late Dr Mohammed Said Tamer in 1922. Today Tamer Group is a leading healthcare, beauty care, prestige products, and fast moving consumer goods company responding to the growing needs of the Saudi and Middle East communities. The Group’s core activities are import, distribution, promotion, marketing and manufacturing.

Today, Tamer Group has established a special position in the Saudi marketplace, resulting from a unique approach to business, service and customer portfolio.

Headquartered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, Tamer Group serves many of the world’s leading companies through various agreements, partnerships, and joint ventures.

تعتبر مجموعة تمر من الشركات الرائدة في مجالات الأدويه والخدمات الصحية والتجميلية ومنتجات الرفاهية والعطور، والتي بدورها تلبي احتياجات المستهلك المتزايدة في المملكة العربية السعودية والشرق الأوسط، حيث تتمركز أنشطة المجموعة حول استيراد وتوزيع وترويج وتسويق وتصنيع باقة مختلفة من المنتجات والخدمات.
أخذت مجموعة تمر موقعاً متميزاً في السوق السعودي بسبب منهجها المستخدم في خدمة الشركات العالمية في مختلف المجالات من خلال اتفاقيات الشراكة والتحالفات الاستراتيجية المختلفة.
يقع المقر الرئيسي لمجموعة تمر في مدينة جدة في المملكة العربية السعودية ولها فروع متعددة في أرجاء المملكة.

Name: Alfardan Corporation
Description:
Alfardan Corporation has established itself as one of the leading family-owned conglomerates in the region for more than 70 years. A business enterprise built around traditional family values and an uncompromising commitment to integrity, premium service and social responsibility, Alfardan Corporation has created new benchmarks of excellence within its diverse portfolio which has grown to include ventures in jewellery, exchange, property development, automotive, hospitality, marine, investment, medical and agriculture.

The success of the Corporation is largely built upon the business acumen and strong personal values espoused by its founder, Ibrahim Alfardan, who established himself as a respected pearl trader. The advent of globalization and rise in the trade of cultured pearls led the Corporation to venture into new sectors to address the gap presented by the dynamic growth of the Qatar economy. Following the vision of its Chairman, Hussain Alfardan, Alfardan Corporation has established a strong presence in the market with its landmark projects. 

Read more http://www.alfardan.com.qa/corporate-profile/

Name: Anadolu Group
Description:
Anadolu Group operates with the vision of being “The star that links Anatolia to the world and the world to Anatolia” and maintains its activities in 8 industries (beer, soft drink, retail, agriculture, automotive, stationery, energy and health) and in 20 countries with more than 80 companies, more than 90 production facilities, 6 R&D centers and more than 100,000 employees. The Group, which was founded by Yazıcı and Özilhan families in 1950, is a driving force of Turkish economy with its financial assets, its strong production capacity and the projects it is involved with. It acts in accordance with its mission of being a multinational and entrepreneurial group through its partnerships with leading brands and companies of the world such as AB InBev, The Coca-Cola Company, Faber-Castell, Isuzu, Kia, Honda, Honda Marine, Kohler, Johns Hopkins Medicine.
---
Anadolu Grubu, “Anadolu’yu dünyaya, dünyayı Anadolu’ya bağlayan yıldız” olma vizyonuyla bugün 20 ülkede, 80’den fazla şirketi, 90’dan fazla üretim tesisi, 6 Ar-Ge merkezi ve 100.000’den fazla çalışanı ile faaliyetlerini bira, meşrubat, perakende, tarım, otomotiv, kırtasiye, enerji ve sağlık olmak üzere 8 sektörde sürdürüyor. 1950 yılında Yazıcı ve Özilhan aileleri tarafından kurulan Grup, hem rakamsal verileri ve üretim gücü hem de geliştirdiği ve içinde yer aldığı projelerle Türkiye ekonomisinin en büyük itici güçlerinden biri konumundadır. AB InBev, The Coca-Cola Company, Faber-Castell, Isuzu, Kia, Honda, Honda Marine, Kohler, Johns Hopkins Medicine gibi alanlarında dünyanın önde gelen isimleri olan markalarla ve şirketlerle kurduğu ortaklıklarla çok uluslu ve girişimci bir grup olma misyonu doğrultusunda hareket ediyor.

Name: Petrol Ofisi
Description:
The leader of the fuel and lubricant sectors in Turkey, Petrol Ofisi was founded as the first and national brand of Turkey on February 18, 1941 with a personnel consisting of 9 employees.

The World War II marked an era when the problems in the fuel sector peaked, and Turkey was completely dependent on outside resources; in this period, Petrol Ofisi claimed the duty and responsibility “to provide these needed products, to deliver them to all over Turkey, and to strengthen Turkey and carry the country into the future by supporting all sectors, and especially agriculture and industry.”

Owing to its successful and devoted endeavors since the first years of its foundation, Petrol Ofisi has an unparalleled storage capacity and infrastructure, through which it can operate even at the remotest place of Turkey. In addition to its network of stations, Petrol Ofisi has strong infrastructures, and under the PO Marine and POAIR brands, it is a company capable of providing all kinds of fuels for land, marine and air vehicles. Petrol Ofisi is also the traditional leader of the lubricants and chemicals market of Turkey, where it has been operating since it was first founded in 1941. 

Today, Petrol Ofisi has a strong and unparalleled infrastructure in Turkey, with about 2,700 stations, 9 fuel terminals, 18 airport supply units, 1 LPG terminal, fueling a quarter of a million aircraft annually, and a fuel storage capacity of 1.5 million cubic meters.

Petrol Ofisi traditionally maintains its titles as “the leader of fuel sector in Turkey”, “the market leader of lubricants and chemicals in Turkey”, and “one of the two biggest private companies of Turkey.”

Name: Power International Holding
Description:
Power International Holding (PIH) is a diversified business conglomerate with global reach, structured into six core groups:

Energy, Concessions & Construction
Industries & Services
Telecommunication & Technology
Agriculture & Food Industries
Real Estate
Lifestyle: Hospitality, Entertainment & Catering

Our commitment to sustainable growth is reinforced by a structured approach to resource allocation and centralized functional support, enabling agility and continuous development across sectors. Each group operates with focused specialization while contributing to PIH’s overarching strategy of delivering long-term value.

Through a culture of excellence and collaboration, PIH harnesses the collective strength of its leadership teams, ensuring that each business flourishes while advancing economies and communities. This synergistic model allows PIH to maintain its distinctiveness as a group while driving sustained impact on both a local and global scale.

Name: Cengiz Holding
Description:
Cengiz Holding is on an upward trajectory of success, making a name for itself with huge investments in highly competitive industries and becoming known as a preferred partner for powerful companies.

At the same time as making a significant contribution to the development of Turkey, Cengiz Holding is constantly adding to its portfolio of success with huge investments like the Black Sea Coastal Highway, Istanbul’s New Airport, the High-speed Railway project, dams, power generation and distribution, natural gas distribution, mining operations and metal manufacturing plants.

The Group has been investing in infrastructure projects since the foundation of Cengiz İnşaat in 1987. Its investments in the energy and mining industries, along with other corporate activities in these areas, have enabled it to grow into a huge family of 35 companies and affiliates with an annual revenue exceeding USD 5 billion.

Through the work of Cengiz İnşaat, Cengiz Holding is involved in construction-infrastructure projects including highways, bridges, tunnels, dams, seaports, railways, subway systems, airports, pipelines, power plants, and mining and industrial facilities.

 The Group has maintained its growth in the energy field since 2000 by investing in hydraulic and thermal power plants equipped with the latest
technological infrastructure and is currently active in power generation, power distribution, trade, sales and marketing, natural gas distribution and trade.

Cengiz Holding started investing in the mining industry by acquiring Eti Bakır A.Ş. and Eti Alüminyum A.Ş. within the scope of privatization. Eti Bakır A.Ş. was acquired by the Holding in 2004 and continues its mining operations with the Samsun Smelting Facility, the only plant in Turkey capable of producing cathode copper from ore, and the Eti Bakır A.Ş. Murgul Plant, which was acquired in 2006.

Name: POSCO HOLDINGS
Description:
POSCO GROUP is a leading provider of eco-friendly future materials that builds a greener and more sustainable future.

We are committed to gaining more ground as a formidable producer of future materials, thereby continuing our legacy as a trusted company that helps to advance national interests. This ambitious spirit is embodied in our new vision – ‘Materials for Tomorrow, Innovation for Excellence’

Name: Yinson
Description:
“Passionately delivering powerful solutions” 

Yinson Holdings Berhad (“Yinson”) is a global energy infrastructure company, listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia Securities Berhad. Through our businesses, we are supporting an inclusive energy transition towards a low carbon future. We are active in three businesses: 

- YinsonProduction is a leading independent owner and operator of floating production, storage, and offloading (FPSO) vessels worldwide, with an order book of over USD19billion until 2050. 

- Yinson Renewables is a global independent renewable power producer with 557MW of utility scale renewable generating assets in operation, a pipeline of over 0.9GW of projects in development and over 2.4GW of early-stage opportunities. 

- Yinson GreenTech is a green solutions provider that aims to electrify the transportation and logistics sectors across land and sea by delivering a clean, technology-enhanced and digitally-integrated zero-emissions ecosystem.

Name: SRG
Description:
Saeed Raddad Group (SRG) has had an influential and substantial presence in the commercial and business life of Saudi Arabia since 1982 with manpower of more than 34,000 employees. SRG companies operate in diversified business sectors having significant local & international operations. SRG is an investment holding powerhouse headquartered in Dammam, Saudi Arabia.
 
The Group, which has a diverse portfolio of market leading businesses across the Construction, Manufacturing, Oil & Gas, Travel & Tourism, Manpower, Pharmaceutical and Trading sectors, is the region’s preferred investment partner and employer of choice. 

SRG main subsidiaries are, SRACO group, UCC group, GTS, Dammam palace, Manifa, Napesco, TST, and Alrazi pharma.

Name: Viessmann Generations Group
Description:
Viessmann Generations Group is a purpose-driven family ecosystem, dedicated to deliver solutions to urgent global priorities: reducing greenhouse gases, improving air and water quality, securing food systems, advancing health and well-being, strengthening education and science, and upholding democratic values.

Imprint: https://www.viessmann.group/legal/imprint
Privacy: https://www.viessmann.group/legal/privacy-notice

Name: Abdulla Fouad Group
Description:
As one of Saudi Arabia’s earliest and most celebrated success stories, Abdulla Fouad Group (AFG) is a dynamic and diversified business group that continues to play a pivotal role in the Kingdom’s progress to this day.

AFG was established in 1948, as a service company in Ras Tanura, securing pipeline construction contracts from Arabian American Oil Company (Aramco) and the Trans Arabian Pipeline company (Tapline). From its beginning in construction, AFG’s first mover advantage saw it expand into new industries, pioneering many products and services along the way. It is well known for excellence across its business units, serving the Energy, Healthcare, Information Technology, Consumer & Real Estate, and Industrial & Construction sectors.

Headquartered in Dammam, AFG has regional offices in Riyadh, Jeddah, and several satellite offices across KSA & GCC. AFG has forged strong technical and commercial partnerships with renowned companies around the world, allowing it to provide its customers with world-class solutions and the highest level of customer service. AFG has long-standing relationships with a diverse client base across the region, including both public and private sector organizations.

Name: Ajlan & Bros Holding
Description:
Ajlan & Bros Holding is one of the largest private sector conglomerates in the Middle East region, employing over 20,000 people in more than 25 countries and across 75 companies. Established originally as a textile business in 1979 - a segment where it remains a dominant player in the Middle East region - the Holding has expanded speedily into real estate and is now one of the top real estate companies in the Kingdom. In line with the Vision 2030, the Holding has now embarked on a significant diversification program.

The Holding aims to become a leader in selected sectors by building businesses in partnership with international firms to achieve a dominant regional position, these sectors include: energy, infrastructure, minerals and mining, financial services, event management, facility management, logistics, beverages, textiles, entertainment, tourism, and healthcare.

We are committed to the Kingdom's 2030 Vision and have aligned our investments and strategies to enable Ajlan & Bros Holding to take a leading role in providing products, services and infrastructure to achieve the vision of His Majesty King Salman bin Abdulaziz Al-Saud and His Royal Highness Prince Mohammad bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al-Saud.

We believe in investing in the Kingdom not only to secure and build on the current accomplishments but to guarantee the prosperity, security and growth of future generations.

Our investments and continuing development across the globe will further allow us to bring products, skills and ideas to the Kingdom which will assist in growing the knowledge, opportunities and employment for the people.

Ajlan & Bros Holding commits to being a leader in the Kingdom working with its citizens to bring prosperity and opportunity to all.

Name: Estithmar Holding
Description: Estithmar Holding is a Qatari public listed company with a diverse portfolio of 51 companies operating in 4 strategic sectors. The company has a strong track record of growth and profitability, and is well-governed with a lean, optimized team that delivers quality in record time. With 91 nationalities and 30,000 employees, Estithmar Holding is committed to a customer-centric culture that makes it the go-to company in Qatar and beyond.
Location: The eighteen tower, Building No. 230, Street 303, Zone 69, Lusail City, Qatar

Name: Nesma United Industries
Description:
Nesma United Industries (NUI), established in 2004, Headquartered in Al-Khobar, Saudi Arabia, NUI delivers a broad range of specialized services and solutions through four key business divisions:

• Nesma Facility Management
• Nesma Landscaping & Irrigation
• Nesma Technical Systems
• Nesma Catering 

The company also manages SPACEMAKER, a leader in modular and off-site construction solutions tailored to diverse market needs.

With a strong commitment to service excellence, innovation, and sustainable development, NUI proudly contributes to the aspirations of Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

Name: Gulf Development Public Company Limited
Description:
GULF is a holding company that invests in a diverse portfolio of core businesses: energy, infrastructure and logistics business, and digital businesses.

Energy Business: includes gas-fired power generation, renewable energy, and gas-related activities, contributing to a sustainable and efficient energy future.

Port and Logistics Business: focuses on the development and management of essential public services, ensuring reliable and innovative solutions for communities.

Digital Business: encompasses telecommunications, digital asset exchanges, data centers, and cloud business, fostering innovation and technological advancements.

Name: Sanko Holding
Description:
SANKO Group, founded in 1904 by the Konukoğlu family, has evolved over its 120-year journey into one of Turkey's largest conglomerates.

With operations spanning 11 different sectors, a workforce exceeding 14,000 employees and a footprint in over 100 countries through exports, SANKO Group maintains its leadership position in key industries such as textiles, renewable energy, cement and packaging within Turkey and on the global stage.

Beyond its industrial endeavors, the conglomerate is deeply committed to supporting communities and giving back to society. #PositiveImpact: This is the core purpose of SANKO Group. To enable economic growth and societal progress, SANKO creates positive impact for its clients, investors, people, planet and communities. 
SANKO Group aims to contribute to social development through its investments in education, health and culture-arts, as well as social responsibility projects. 46 indelible works, including Schools, Universities, Hospitals, Mosques and Cultural Centers, have been brought into existence, and more than 30.000 students have received non-refundable scholarships so far by Sani Konukoğlu Foundation.

Name: Alarko Holding
Description:
70 yıllık geçmişimiz, 8 farklı faaliyet alanımız, biri yabancı ortaklı toplam 41 iştirakimiz ve 6000’e yakın çalışanımız ile Türkiye’nin önde gelen sanayi kuruluşlarından biriyiz. Ödün vermediğimiz kurumsal etik değerlerimiz, üstün kalite ilkemiz ve insana yatırım politikamız ile güvenin, saygınlığın simgesi oluyoruz. Alarko Şirketler Topluluğu olarak; yarattığımız lider markalar, farklı alanlardaki tecrübe ve bilgi birikimimiz, yüksek teknolojiye sahip AR-GE yatırımlarımız, üretim kapasitemiz, uluslararası projelerimiz, sürdürülebilirlik ve global rekabet hedeflerimizle değer yaratmaya devam ediyoruz.

TAAHHÜT: Alarko Taahhüt Grubu ile “Hizmette ve Üretimde Kalite” prensibiyle yurt içinde ve yurt dışında kamu özel ortaklığı, yap-işlet-devret ve anahtar teslimi projeler gerçekleştiriyor.
ENERJİ: Enerji Grubumuz; elektrik üretimi, dağıtımı, toptan ve perakende satış hizmeti veriyor. 1,500 MW’ın üzerindeki kurulu güçle Türkiye’nin günlük elektrik tüketimin %3’ünü karşılıyor.

SANAYİ VE TİCARET: Carrier ile %50-%50 ortak Sanayi ve Ticaret Grubumuz; Alarko Carrier markası ile ısıtma, soğutma, havalandırma ve su basınçlandırma alanlarında çalışıyor. 

TURİZM: Turizm Grubumuz, Hillside Beach Club, Hillside City Club - Etiler, Hillside City Club - İstinye, Cinecity Sinemaları ve Sanda Spa işletmeleriyle sektörde lider olmaya devam ediyor. 

ARAZİ GELİŞTİRME: Grubumuz, geliştirdiği konut, iş merkezi, otel ve tatil köyü projeleri; inşaat sektöründe yatırımlarıyla fark yaratma ilkesiyle çalışıyor. 

TARIM: Seralarda sürdürülebilir, topraksız tarım, tohum, mikro granül ve organomineral gübre üretimi, katkısız kurutulmuş meyve/sebze üretimi yatırımları gerçekleştiriyoruz. 

HAVACILIK: Havacılık sektöründe, geniş büyük gövdeli yolcu uçaklarını kargo uçağına dönüştürerek ekonomiye yeniden kazandırıyoruz. 

YATIRIM: Alarko Yatırım Grubumuz, orta-uzun vadeli yeni yatırım açılımlarıyla portföy çeşitlendirmesi yaparken uluslararası yatırım ağırlığını artırmayı planlıyor.

Name: Tatweer Education Holding Company | شركة تطوير التعليم القابضة
Description:
لتطوير التعليم القابضة دور فعّال في جوانب التعليم في المملكة حيث تتمثل بكونها الذراع المنفّذ لمشاريع وزارة التعليم ونسعى بكل جهد لتحقيق متطلبات رؤية السعودية ٢٠٣٠ 

رؤيتنا: نلتزم بترك بصمة مؤثرة للارتقاء بجودة التعليم في جميع مجالاته وتحقيق مستهدفات رؤية السعودية ٢٠٣٠

ركيزتنا الأساسية: هي التزامنا بتحقيق نقلة نوعية للتعليم المتطور في المملكة من خلال شركاتنا التابعة ومدننا ومراكرنا وبرامجنا المختلفة.

Name: Tosyalı Holding
Description:
3 kıtada yaklaşık 50 tesise ve 15.000 çalışana sahip, 70 yıllık tecrübesiyle TOSYALI; yıllık 15 milyon ton sıvı çelik üretimiyle Türkiye’nin global yeşil çelik üreticisidir. Dünya Çelik Üreticileri Birliği verilerine göre Tosyalı Holding 2024 yılında, ham çelik üretiminde 21 basamak birden atlayarak dünya sıralamasında 46’ncılığa yükselmiştir., 150 farklı kategoride otomotivden beyaz eşya, enerji ve inşaata kadar pek çok sektöre hitap eden geniş ürün yelpazesi sunmaktadır.

Yurtdışında Cezayir, Angola, Senegal, Libya ve İspanya’da yatırımları bulunan grup, Cezayir’deki TOSYALI Algérie ile hidrokarbon sektörü dışındaki en büyük sanayi kompleksi ve Akdeniz Çanağı’nın en büyük ikiz DRI tesislerine sahiptir. Hidrojenle üretim yapabilme kabiliyeti, global arenada bir ilk niteliği taşımaktadır. Ayrıca, uzun süredir Japon Toyo Kohan ve ABD’li Harsco gibi uluslararası firmalarla dört ayrı tesiste başarılı iş ortaklıkları yürütmektedir.

Sürdürülebilirlik alanında öncü olan TOSYALI, SKDM kapsamında paylaştığı değerler ve Çevresel Ürün Beyanları ile en düşük karbon ayak izine sahip üreticiler arasında yer almaktadır. Tüm yeşil yatırımlarını TOSYALI V-Green markası altında toplayan firma, fosil yakıtlara alternatif olarak güneş enerjisi ve hidrojen kullanımına yönelik çalışmalarını da sürdürmektedir. Tesislerinde başlattığı GES projesi ile 235 MWp kurulu güce ulaşarak dünyanın en büyük çatı üstü GES’ine sahip konumundadır.

2025 yılında TOSYALI V-Solar markası altında üreteceği güneş panelleriyle, Türkiye’nin 8 ilinde faaliyete geçecek santrallerle kurulu gücünü 1500 MWp seviyesine çıkarmayı hedeflemektedir. İskenderun ve Cezayir’deki liman işletmeleri ile Erzin’de planlanan yatırımları ve Afrika’daki özel ekonomik bölge projeleriyle, global yeşil çelik üreticileri arasında dünyanın en büyük 20 üreticisinden biri olma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Daha fazla bilgi için www.tosyaliholding.com.tr adresini ziyaret edebilirsiniz.

Name: Omran Group OM
Description:
OMRAN creates sustainable and authentic tourism assets, lifestyle communities and destinations that drive economic growth and contribute to the diversification of the economy. 
We achieve our mandate by acting alone or as a catalyst in bringing together the strength of Government with the entrepreneurship of the private sector. 
We work with all stakeholders, partners, SMEs and local communities to ensure a positive physical, social, economic contribution to both the environment and people’s lives while respecting the traditional culture and environmental values of Oman. 
We are inspired by Oman’s beauty, peace, and hospitality.

Name: Kazancı Holding A.Ş.
Description:
Temelleri 1950’li yıllarda atılan Kazancı Holding, enerji üretimi, doğal gaz dağıtımı, elektrik tedariki, dağıtımı ve satışı, jeneratör üretimi, solar ve şarj teknolojileri gibi enerjinin tüm alanlarındaki faaliyetleri ile Türkiye’nin en büyük global enerji şirketidir. Enerji sektöründeki faaliyetlerin yanı sıra tarım ve turizm alanlarında da faaliyet gösteren Kazancı Holding, 17.000’den fazla çalışanı ve yaptığı yatırımlar ile Türkiye ekonomisine önemli katkılar sağlamaktadır. 

Aksa Grup Şirketleri, kendi alanlarında göstermiş oldukları başarıları doğrultusunda faaliyet gösterdikleri sektörlerin öncüsü konumda yer almaktadır. 

-	Aksa Enerji, Türkiye’nin halka açık en büyük global enerji üreticisidir.  

-	Aksa Doğalgaz, 8,3 milyon abonesi ve 72.500 kilometreyi aşkın şebeke hattı ile Türkiye’nin en büyük özel doğal gaz dağıtım şirketidir.  

-	Aksa Elektrik, Türkiye enerji sektörünün en güçlü markalarından biri olarak tüm Türkiye geneline elektrik satış ve danışmanlık hizmeti verirken, Çoruh ve Fırat lisans bölgelerindeki 9 ilde ise görevli elektrik tedarik şirketi konumundadır.

-	Aksa Jeneratör, 3 ülkedeki üretim tesisleri ve 3 ticaret merkezi aracılığıyla bugüne kadar 180'den fazla ülkeye yaptığı satış ile Türkiye jeneratör pazarının lideri ve Türkiye’nin en büyük ihracatçı firmalarındandır. Şirket ayrıca dünyanın en büyük 5 jeneratör üreticisi arasında yer almaktadır.

-	Aksa Turizm, Antalya, Bodrum ve Kayseri’de bulunan otelleriyle yaz ve kış turizminde faaliyet göstermektedir. 

-	Aksa Tarım, 2005 yılından bu yana Türkiye et ve süt üretiminde ilk 10 çiftlikten biri konumundadır.

Name: Legend Holding Group
Description:
Legend Holding Group is a diversified enterprise headquartered in Dubai, operating across the Middle East, African region, Europe and the Americas. With a strong focus on sustainability and innovation, the group manages a growing portfolio of companies in automotive, trading, energy, Travel and Tourism and mobility services. 

Its subsidiaries include Legend Motors, Legend Logistics, Legend Green Energy,  Legend Travel and Tourism, Legend Rent a Car, Zul Energy by Legend holding, Legend motorcycles, Legend Investment and Funding, Legend X Robotics, serving as an exclusive importer of 212 and Kaiyi vehicles in the United Arab Emirates and ROX in Lebanon.

Rooted in Loyalty, Excellence, and Progress, we lead with innovation and technology to seamlessly connect the physical and digital worlds. Our goal is to become a leader in intelligent, data-driven solutions because Together We Grow.

Name: Al Faisal Holding
Description: Incorporated in 1964, Al Faisal Holding Company is one of Qatar’s largest privately held diversified industry groups, owned by His Excellency Sheikh Faisal Bin Qassim Al Thani. Al Faisal operates through its subsidiaries and associated companies in a variety of sectors, including real estate, hospitality, trading & distribution, construction and project management, education and services. Al Faisal’s investments include its interest in Aamal Company Q.P.S.C, one of Qatar’s largest and most diversified companies, in addition to investments in a range of sectors across Europe, MENA region and the United States of America.

Name: INNOVX
Description:
INNOVX catalyses sustainable growth and technological progress in Morocco, Africa and beyond by building next-generation industries. 

Our unique approach combines building and investing in businesses, while developing ecosystems that help high-performing technological businesses thrive. 

We are focused on three sectors where we believe we can have the most impact: Agriculture & Water, Energy and Chemicals.

Name: LOTIC Group
Description: We offer a variety of services such as asset management

Name: Grupo ROGGIO
Description:
Somos un grupo de empresas de origen argentino con experiencia y sólida trayectoria en negocios de Infraestructura y Servicios.  
Día a día llevamos adelante nuestros negocios sobre la base de la filosofía de trabajo y el compromiso con la gente, valores que se transmiten desde nuestros orígenes en 1908. 
Te invitamos a conocer lo que hacen los equipos de trabajo de  nuestras empresas en las áreas de Construcción, Gestión y Valorización de Residuos, Transporte, Distribución de Agua y Saneamiento, Desarrollo de Soluciones Tecnológicas y negocios relacionados al Entretenimiento y el Turismo.

Name: Volati AB
Description: Through an active acquisition strategy and its vision to be regarded as Sweden’s best owner of medium-sized companies, Volati has delivered strong and sustainable growth in profitability since the start in 2003. Volati primarily owns Nordic companies, predominantly in Sweden. The Group is divided into three business areas with a focus on value-adding add-on acquisitions of companies with longterm sustainable business models. Volati has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2016.

Name: MS GALLEON  Group
Description:
MS Galleon is a privately owned holding and management company with a portfolio of more than 30 businesses in sectors like industrial production, green energy, retail, biotechnology, disruptive technologies and many more. 
MS Galleon Group is a leading CEE capital group with more than 15.000 employees and sales in more than 100 countries around the world.

Name: OutMazed
Description:
OutMazed (www.outmazed.com) is a holding company and a commercial trading brand that is headquartered in the United Arab Emirates (UAE).

OutMazed is involved in operating multiple business models such as the following:

- OutMazed Tourism (www.outmazedtourism.com)

- OutMazed Design (www.outmazeddesign.com)

- OutMazed Retail (www.outmazedretail.com)

- OutMazed Services (www.outmazedservices.com)

OutMazed is a registered trademark of its investment holding company, with a vision to become a leading brand across its core sectors: Tourism, Design, Retail, and Services, particularly in the Middle East & Africa (MEA) region. Our ambition is to extend this reach globally, connecting our customers through the OutMazed brand.

Our company's name, OutMazed, has emerged from two of our core beliefs – Outperform and Amazing. We believe in outperforming expectations of our customers, partners and the industry by providing amazing and cutting-edge digital solutions to our customers for their everyday needs.

Name: The Group Vintage
Description:
The Group Vintage is a diversified UAE-based business group with interests spanning bullion trading, real estate investments, and hospitality. Built on a 20+ year legacy, we are driven by trust, long-term value creation, and strong global relationships.

Vintage Bullion, established in 2003, is our flagship trading company, specializing in precious metals and commodities. With a cumulative turnover exceeding USD 8 billion, we are one of the most trusted physical and exchange-based trading partners in the region.
We are proud members of the London Bullion Market Association (LBMA) and the Dubai Gold and Commodities Exchange (DGCX), with robust trade relationships across the UAE, India, Europe, and Africa.

Vintage Realty Investments is a privately funded investment firm focused on acquiring undervalued real estate assets and unlocking long-term value through enhancement, repositioning, or redevelopment. With no external debt and a strong capital base, we invest across residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors in Dubai and beyond.
With operations under various entities since 2006 (KMA, Cuffe Holdings, Vintage Foundation), the Vintage Realty Investments umbrella consolidates our vision of stable, strategic investing

The Luxe Getaways is our portfolio of fully serviced luxury holiday homes across Palm Jumeirah and other prime Dubai locations. Offering beachfront living with private beach access, resort amenities, and flexible stay options, we serve both short-term guests and long-term residents.

Vintage Grand Hotel is a 5-star hotel and apartment complex in Dubai Production City, featuring 360 hotel rooms and 350 serviced apartments. With a liquor license, family-friendly facilities, and close proximity to Dubai’s sporting and media hubs, it’s ideal for both leisure and extended corporate stays. The property is set to become the largest Marriott Executive Apartments & Hotel in Asia.

Interested in partnering, investing, or staying with us?
Message us.

Name: Zaren Group
Description: "Zaren Group is at the forefront of providing high-quality and innovative solutions in various sectors. With a primary focus on tourism, health, insurance, and investments, we are committed to delivering unmatched services tailored to our clients' unique needs. Through our extensive expertise and commitment to excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner for businesses and individuals alike. Connect with us to discover the Zaren Group difference. #ZarenGroup"

Name: TWH România
Description: TWH te lansează în carieră prin voluntariat. Te pregătim pentru mediul corporate, îmbinând experiența practică cu responsabilitatea reală, pentru a te apropia de jobul dorit.

Name: AVAREN Legacy Group
Description:
AVAREN Legacy Group is a family multi-generational investment and legacy platform built to solve one of Asia’s most pressing economic challenges: the succession crisis facing tens of millions of SME founders.

As a founder-led group, we acquire, scale, and transform high-performing businesses, preserving their legacy while unlocking future growth across borders and generations.

Our mission is to build the Berkshire Hathaway of Asia, rooted in deep respect for founders, family heritage, and cultural continuity. while deploying world-class strategies in capital markets, operational excellence, and value creation.

 WHAT WE DO
• SME & Mid-Market Acquisitions (Buyouts, Founder Exits, Succession)
• Strategic Integration & Transformation (Operations, Talent, Governance)
• Cross-Border Expansion (ASEAN, China GBA, Australia, UK)
• Public Market Strategies (Pre-IPO, Dual Listings, SPACs, RTOs)
• Legacy Continuity & Wealth Transfer Solutions

 WHO WE SERVE
• Founders seeking succession or retirement without selling to strangers
• Strategic investors & family offices aligned with long-term value
• Partners with intergenerational vision and operational expertise
• Governments and institutions supporting SME modernization

 WHY AVAREN
• Founder-first philosophy with cultural fluency across Asia-Pacific
• Operational & capital market readiness from day one
• Access to elite boardroom talent, M&A advisors, and global capital
• Vision to build a $100B+ conglomerate of enduring enterprises

AVAREN's name reflects both the legacy we inherited and the future we build for the next generation.

We stand at the intersection of tradition and transformation, where every acquisition becomes a story of renewal, growth, and legacy.

Let’s build lasting legacies, together.
 www.avary.group

Name: ODU'A Investment Company Limited
Description:
Odu’a Investment Company Limited is a strategy-led company responsible for strategic investment for the people of South-West Nigeria. 

We have subsidiaries in real estate (Wemabod), Power Solutions (E&O Power), Hospitality (Premier Hotel, Lagos Airport Hotel, Lafia Hotel), Financial Services (Glanvills Enthoven Insurance Brokers), Agriculture (SWAgco), Oil and Gas, among others. 

We also have significant interest in our associated companies like, Wema Bank, Nigerite.

Name: BOSQAR INVEST
Description:
BOSQAR INVEST (BOSQAR d.d., together with its subsidiaries) is a European leader that operates in multiple industries, including business process and technology outsourcing, information technology, employment services (HR), and Food.

With an innovative business model, BOSQAR INVEST accelerated its expansion on the market with intensive organic growth and an M&A platform. Through its buy-and-build strategy, it has acquired 84 companies since 2016. BOSQAR INVEST is focused on improving the profitability and operations of each of its acquired companies through its standardized operational models that result in significant organic growth of all companies inside the Group and the Group itself.

Today, BOSQAR INVEST operates through several business verticals: the BPTO business vertical (brand: Mplus), the HR business vertical (brands: Manpower and Workplace), and the Food business vertical (brand: Future Food). All business verticals are focused on shareholder value creation through a commitment to best practices in digitalization, structured key accounts management programs, rigorous focus on financial stability and results, and strong and dedicated management teams.

In its ownership structure, BOSQAR INVEST brings together pension funds, institutional investors, international private equity funds, development institutions, and private investors. The BOSQAR INVEST business community consists of over 15,000 employees, and the group`s companies operate from 20 countries around the world.

Name: Can Holding
Description: Can Holding, temeli Zamanhan Can tarafından Doğubayazıt’ta atılan ve hızla büyümekte olan, Can Holding’e bağlı şirketleri temsil eden ana şirkettir. Türkiye’nin 7 bölgesi ve 81 şehrinde faaliyet gösteren şirketleri, fabrikaları, akaryakıt istasyonları ve bayileri ile enerji, sanayi, turizm, elektronik, lojistik, sağlık ve eğitim gibi farklı sektörlerde faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir. Bugün bütün iş kolları ve bağlı ortaklıkları ile birlikte direkt ve dolaylı çalışan 15 bini aşan çalışanı ile büyük bir ailedir. Bu büyük ve köklü aile bugüne kadar yaptığı çalışmalarla Türkiye’nin en büyük gruplarından biridir.

Name: Icaro World
Description:
COSTRUIAMO IL FUTURO PER ARRIVARE PIÙ IN ALTO

Icaro World è la tua rete di supporto per la cura e la valorizzazione del patrimonio immobiliare, con una struttura capillare qualificata e dalle solide fondamenta.  

Oggi ampliamo i nostri orizzonti, ponendoci come player in ambito nazionale per offrire qualità, professionalità e una serie di servizi competitivi sviluppati con criteri diversi e più ampi rispetto al mercato. Tutto questo mettendo insieme tradizione ed innovazione, attraverso la digitalizzazione di tutti i processi operativi, con un approccio coinvolgente e dinamico. I risultati raggiunti sono il frutto della professionalità, della passione e dell’armonia nel team.  

Siamo una company con diverse divisioni, che spaziano dalla progettazione, la costruzione, la vendita degli immobili allo sviluppo di software e soluzioni tecnologiche o di percorsi formativi per aziende nel settore immobiliare. 

Il nostro è un mondo che offre tante possibilità per risparmiare tempo e costi nell’Edilizia, nella Progettazione e nel Real Estate, grazie a soluzioni e strategie all’avanguardia che nascono dalla conoscenza e dalla specializzazione. 

Siamo vicini ai clienti con affidabilità e trasparenza, supportandoli step by step con le nostre squadre di esperti pronti a risolvere ogni possibile problematica. Vogliamo costruire partnership e solide relazioni per crescere insieme. 

Icaro World: un mondo che ti eleva.

2021 yılıyla birlikte yeni projelere, yeni yatırımlara, yeni markalarıyla şirketler grubu yapısıyla yelken açtı.

Bir çok yenilikçi çözümünü, sektöre kazandırdığı yeni markaları ve yatırımlarıyla Atış Şirketler Grubu 2023 yılında gayrimenkul, alışveriş-perakende, entertainment, turizm, finans ve teknoloji sektörlerindeki yatırımlarını hayata geçirmeye devam ediyor.

Name: Aspen One
Description:
Aspen One renews the mind, body, and spirit with a portfolio that redefines luxury, adventure, and leisure. With world-class and innovative brands and businesses, including Aspen Skiing Company, Aspen Hospitality, and Aspen Ventures, Aspen One propels the expansion of the Aspen ethos globally.

Whether it’s Aspen Skiing Company providing unforgettable experiences at the confluence of nature, culture, and recreation across its four legendary mountains—Aspen Mountain, Snowmass, Aspen Highlands, and Buttermilk; or Aspen Hospitality elevating guest experiences in unforgettable ways by developing, owning, and operating a growing set of luxury and upper-scale hotels, private clubs, and branded residential properties in prime locations under The Nell and Limelight brands; Aspen One is deeply committed to providing unparalleled service, creative programming, community engagement, and unique opportunities for exploration. The company’s commitment to innovation is central to its evolution, including Aspen Ventures' amplification of the Aspen brand globally through new business lines that embody its values and heritage such as Aspen Collection.  

For more than 75 years, the Aspen brand and community has pointed its compass toward new paths, people, and possibilities—and today, as Aspen One, the future is limitless. The company is a leader in sustainability and advocacy, with a legacy of modeling leading-edge solutions and changing policy locally and globally. As a collection of brands driven by tightly held core values, Aspen One aims to inspire a better world. For more information, visit www.aspen.com.

Name: AVARY GROUP
Description:
AVARY GROUP is a family multi-generational investment and legacy platform built to solve one of Asia’s most pressing economic challenges: the succession crisis facing tens of millions of SME founders.

As a founder-led group, we acquire, scale, and transform high-performing businesses—preserving their legacy while unlocking future growth across borders and generations.

Our mission is to build the Berkshire Hathaway of Asia, rooted in deep respect for founders, family heritage, and cultural continuity—while deploying world-class strategies in capital markets, operational excellence, and value creation.

 WHAT WE DO
• SME & Mid-Market Acquisitions (Buyouts, Founder Exits, Succession)
• Strategic Integration & Transformation (Operations, Talent, Governance)
• Cross-Border Expansion (ASEAN, China GBA, Australia, UK)
• Public Market Strategies (Pre-IPO, Dual Listings, SPACs, RTOs)
• Legacy Continuity & Wealth Transfer Solutions

 WHO WE SERVE
• Founders seeking succession or retirement without selling to strangers
• Strategic investors & family offices aligned with long-term value
• Partners with intergenerational vision and operational expertise
• Governments and institutions supporting SME modernization

 WHY AVARY
• Founder-first philosophy with cultural fluency across Asia-Pacific
• Operational & capital market readiness from day one
• Access to elite boardroom talent, M&A advisors, and global capital
• Vision to build a $100B+ conglomerate of enduring enterprises

AVARY’s name reflects both the legacy we inherited and the future we build for the next generation.

We stand at the intersection of tradition and transformation — where every acquisition becomes a story of renewal, growth, and legacy.

Let’s build lasting legacies, together.
 www.avary.group

Name: Berghof Group
Description:
Die Berghof Gruppe (Stammsitz: Eningen bei Stuttgart) steht seit fast 60 Jahren für wertvolle Innovationen, mit denen wir unseren Kunden entscheidende Vorteile bieten. 

Dadurch haben wir uns mit unseren nachhaltigen Technologien weltweit in unseren strategischen Märkten erfolgreich positioniert. 

Um nur einige Beispiele zu nennen: Wir bereiten mit unseren Filtrationsprodukten weltweit industrielles Abwasser zu hochwertigem Prozesswasser auf, um wertvolles Trinkwasser zu sparen. Unsere Druckausgleichsmembranen stellen die zuverlässige Funktion von Fahrzeugbatterien sicher – deren Qualität viele namhafte Hersteller mit unseren Testsystemen prüfen. Unsere hoch präzise Lichtmesstechnik ermöglicht auf vielfältige Weise energiesparende LED-Technik. 

Was uns alle verbindet ist unsere gemeinsame Mission: Wir wollen unsere
Kunden zu Spitzenreitern in ihrem Bereich machen. 

Wechseln Sie jetzt mit uns auf die Überholspur – wir freuen uns auf Ihre Anfrage!

Name: KIC Ventures
Description:
KIC Ventures is a private healthtech investment firm specializing in innovative medical device technologies, particularly in spine surgery. Conceived in 2000 while Dr. Kingsley R. Chin was an orthopedic resident at Harvard Medical School, KIC LLC was officially registered in 2005 during his time at the University of Pennsylvania (UPenn). In 2013, KIC Ventures was established as the venture arm of KIC, accelerating innovation and commercialization in healthcare technology.

Our portfolio companies have generated over $300 million in revenue and grown to a combined value exceeding $1 billion. Notable successes include the sale of the MANTIS percutaneous spinal system to Stryker, a significant contributor to Stryker’s spine market success.

With a strong focus on spinal solutions, KIC Ventures has driven the growth of companies like Axiomed, known for its viscoelastic disc replacements, and NanoFuse, which uniquely combines 45S5 Bioglass synthetic biologics with demineralized bone matrix (DBM). NANISX, another key company, is leading the ambulatory surgery center (ASC) market, introducing differentiated technologies like InSpan, Sacrix, and FacetFuse within the Less Exposure Spine Surgery (LESS) portfolio.

Under the leadership of Dr. Kingsley R. Chin, a seasoned spine surgeon and Harvard-educated leader, KIC Ventures is committed to improving patient outcomes and setting new industry standards in spine surgery through strategic investments and innovative solutions.

Name: Başaran Yatırım Holding
Description:
Farklı sektörlerde başarılı projeleri hayata geçirerek büyüyen ve 25 yıldan bu yana birçok yatırıma imza atan Başaran Yatırım Holding, şu an üçüncü kuşak temsilcisi olan Hüseyin Başaran tarafından yönetilmektedir.

İlk olarak fındık ticareti ile faaliyete başlayan ‘Başaran Entegre’, kısa sürede Türkiye’nin önde gelen entegre fındık işleme tesisine sahip olmuştur. Günümüzde Gıda'nın yanı sıra Yatçılık, Finans, İnşaat, Turizm, Havacılık, Çimento ve Enerji olmak üzere farklı sektörlere de yatırımlarına devam eden Başaran Grup, yenilikçi ve vizyoner tavrıyla sektörün belirleyici isimlerinden olmuştur. 

Yatçılık sektöründe lüks mega yat üretiminde CMB Yachts ile önemli bir marka olan Başaran Yatırım Holding, inşaat alanında da Türkiye’nin en değerli lokasyonların da birçok projeyi hayata geçirmektedir.

Turizm alanında da varlığını sürdüren Başaran Yatırım Holding, Bodrum Ramada Resort ve Ramada Plaza Trabzon Hotel & Convention' ile bu alandaki yatırımlarına devam etmektedir.

Başaran Yatırım Holding'in kısa sürede sağladığı başarıların altında yatan prensipler aynı zamanda tüm sektörlerinde uyguladığı kalite politikalarının da temellerini inşa emektedir.
