Name: Next4 Group
Description:
Next4 Group è una holding di innovazione, un ecosistema integrato dove esperienze, competenze, tecnologie e persone si incontrano per costruire la crescita di chi sceglie di innovare.

Siamo una piattaforma che connette visione strategica, capitale e cultura imprenditoriale, accompagnando le imprese lungo l’intera filiera dello sviluppo — dalla pianificazione alla costruzione d’impresa, fino all’espansione internazionale.

Attraverso i nostri veicoli tematici e le nostre società — International, Tech, Greentech, Consulting e WDA — sosteniamo e promuoviamo la Digital Transformation unendo metodo, relazioni e competenze operative per creare valore concreto e duraturo.

La nostra forza risiede nel modello integrato: un modo di lavorare che unisce fiducia, collaborazione e visione comune. Costruiamo imprese solide e contesti in cui l’innovazione cresce come cultura condivisa, generando valore per le persone, per i territori e per il futuro che immaginiamo insieme.

Name: Smart Good Things
Description:
Chez Smart Good Things, nous sommes portés par une énergie puissante née de notre engagement pour une nouvelle vision de l’économie. Une vision qui place la protection au cœur de chaque acte et action de consommation. Nous développons nos idées novatrices grâce à nos investissements tout en accompagnant d'autres entrepreneurs qui partagent notre vision. Nous sommes surtout des inventeurs, des investisseurs et des entrepreneurs d’un genre totalement nouveau. 

Nos activités clés :
Smart Wallet : le portefeuille électronique qui protège.
Bleu Blanc Pay : la Garantie Anti-Inflation. 

Avec un écosystème puissant et une vision tournée vers l’avenir, SGTH œuvre chaque jour pour un nouveau modèle de consommation protecteur et innovant.

 SGTH, avec vous.

Name: Fakieh Group
Description: Fakieh Group was established half a century ago in Makkah by the businessman H.E. Sheikh Abdul Rahman Abdul Qader Fakieh. Due to its exceptional products and its reputation on the local and the global level, Fakieh Group is considered to be one of the biggest integral commercial group forming one of the basic support of the modern Saudi economy.

Name: CAFANI Holding Group
Description:
The Cafani Holding Group is a privately owned Saudi investment company headquartered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, and its diversified business scope is spread across the Middle East, Asia, Africa, Europe and America. The Cafani Group is based on a group of specialists to manage and operate the investments, projects and companies owned by it, led by its founder and Chairman of the Board of Directors, Lafi Aldhafeeri
The Cafani Holding Group is distinguished by its well-established business portfolio across its multiple sectors inside and outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The group’s business scope includes the construction and infrastructure sectors, the energy and electricity sectors, and the industrial sector, in addition to its wide activities in the real estate, property management, hospitality, tourism and hotel sectors. Cafani is proud of its investments in the central areas of the region, the most important of which is Makkah Al-Mukarramah. The Cafani Group has a strong and distinguished track record and global footprint in the acquisition, operation and development of quality hotel properties.

Name: Alesayi Better Life | العيسائي لحياة أفضل
Description:
Alesayi Better Life Co. Ltd. (ABL) is the strategic support arm of Mohamed Omar Alesayi Electronics Co. Ltd. (AEC), Group SEB Arabia for Home Appliances (GSEB) and FITHUB. providing essential services that enable seamless operations and elevate the overall customer and business experience.

Our mission is to empower the company’s business ecosystem through high-quality customer service and product maintenance, advanced supply chain management, efficient HR operations, reliable IT solutions, legal support, and tailored financing services.

At ABL, we believe that excellence behind the scenes is just as important as the products we offer. With a team of skilled professionals, innovative systems, and a customer-first approach, we ensure that every aspect of the business runs smoothly—from after-sales service to back-office operations.

By driving operational efficiency and customer satisfaction, ABL plays a key role in delivering the high standards of service and performance that define the company’s presence in the Saudi market.

شركة العيسائي لحياة أفضل (ABL) هي الذراع الداعمة والاستراتيجية لكل من شركة محمد عمر العيسائي للإلكترونيات  (AEC)و شركة مجموعة سيب العربية للاجهزة المنزلية (GSEB) وشركة فيت هب ، حيث تقدم مجموعة من الخدمات الأساسية التي تضمن سير العمليات بسلاسة وتُعزز تجربة العملاء والأعمال على حد سواء.

تتمثل رسالتنا في تمكين منظومة أعمال الشركات من خلال تقديم خدمات عالية الجودة تشمل: إدارة خدمات الصيانة ورضاء العملاء، إدارة سلسلة الإمداد، إدارة الموارد البشرية، إدارة تقنية المعلومات، إدارة الدعم القانوني، و إدارة الخدمات المالية.

في شركة ABL ، نؤمن بأن التميز في خلفية العمليات لا يقل أهمية عن جودة المنتجات. بفضل فريق عمل محترف، وأنظمة متطورة، ونهج يركز على العميل، نضمن انسيابية العمليات بدءًا من خدمات ما بعد البيع وصولًا إلى المهام الإدارية واللوجستية.

من خلال تحسين الكفاءة التشغيلية وتعزيز رضا العملاء، تلعب شركة العيسائي لحياة أفضل دورًا محوريًا في تقديم مستوى الخدمة والأداء الذي يميز الشركات في السوق السعودي.

Name: AAMERAH
Description: An AAMERAH Holding is a privately-owned, diversified holding group with a proven track record of value creation spanning over two decades. Established in 1999, the Group has evolved from its foundational business into a strategically assembled portfolio of subsidiaries and investments. Our core philosophy is to acquire, nurture, and scale businesses in synergistic sectors, leveraging centralized expertise while fostering entrepreneurial independence at the operational level.

Name: Viqa Investment DMCC
Description: Viqa Investment has been established to cater to the needs towards a circular economy in the UAE and across the entire Gulf Region. Our investments are related to our common goal for a Zero waste Society.

Name: ILUJIS Holding
Description:
ILUJIS Holding for Financial Investments, established in 2007 in Egypt, is a leading family-owned investment conglomerate with a vision of becoming a market leader and evolving into a robust financial conglomerate with diverse operations.

Over the years, we have expanded our presence to the UAE, solidifying our position as a prominent GCC-based company. Our diverse portfolio spans various industries, including Government Consultancy, Agriculture & Exporting, and Trading.

With a strong global footprint and over 17 years of experience, ILUJIS is renowned for innovation and industry leadership. By leveraging our extensive network, we continuously identify and capitalize on opportunities to unlock their full potential.

Name: OMNIBUY
Description:
Somos uma empresa dinâmica e multifacetada que oferece um conjunto abrangente de serviços para impulsionar o crescimento e o sucesso dos clientes. Com expertise em Viagens Corporativas, Publicidade e Marketing, Recuperação de Crédito e Comercial e Vendas B2B, destacamos como um parceiro estratégico para empresas de diversos setores.

Viagens Corporativas: Entendemos que cada viagem de negócios é única. Por isso, oferecemos soluções personalizadas e eficientes, garantindo qualidade, confiabilidade e superando as expectativas dos clientes.

Publicidade e Marketing: Impulsionamos as vendas dos clientes através de estratégias de marketing inovadoras e eficazes, tanto na publicidade tradicional quanto na digital. Com escritórios em Belo Horizonte, São Paulo e Nova York, oferecemos um alcance global e um profundo conhecimento do mercado.

Cobrança e Recuperação de Crédito: Auxiliamos empresas na cobrança e recuperação de créditos de forma eficiente e respeitosa, evitando constrangimentos aos clientes. Com foco na prevenção e negociação, contamos com uma equipe especializada em identificar as melhores medidas para maximizar a recuperação de crédito.

Comercial e Vendas B2B: Impulsionamos o sucesso dos nossos clientes em todo o ciclo de vendas, desde a prospecção até o fechamento. Com tecnologia de ponta, equipe experiente e atendimento personalizado, a oferecemos soluções sob medida para cada cliente.

Muito mais do que uma empresa de serviços. Somos a parceira estratégica que oferece soluções completas e personalizadas para impulsionar o sucesso dos clientes em todas as áreas de atuação. Com foco em resultados, inovação e atendimento de excelência, consolidamos como uma referência no mercado. Se você busca um parceiro confiável para impulsionar o seu negócio, a Omnibuy é a escolha certa.

Name: Triple A Holding WLL
Description: A 100% Qatari owned organization that is committed to excellence. We specialize in identifying great opportunities that align and benefit the vision and growth of the country.

Name: Ascent Industries Co
Description:
NASDAQ: ACNT

Ascent Industries Co. is a partnership of U.S.-based specialty chemical companies dedicated to developing innovative formulations and delivering high-quality chemical solutions for diverse industries.

Our business encompasses custom manufacturing, toll processing, and proprietary chemical products, serving customers in sectors including HI&I, Oil & Gas, Coatings, Mining, Water Treatment, Pulp & Paper, Textiles, and many more.

Operating formerly as Synalloy Corporation (previously Blackman Uhler Industries) since 1967, Ascent Industries Co. encompasses a portfolio of highly respected specialty chemical businesses formerly operating independently as Manufacturers Chemicals, DanChem, and CRI Tolling.

Name: Ekmas Group
Description:
Gücünü, 35 yıllık köklü temellerinden alan EKMAS Group; yapı, otomotiv, sanayi ve mühendislik ana alanlarında faaliyet gösteriyor. 

Kullandığı teknolojiler ile değerli, güçlü ve estetik yapılar inşa eden EKMAS Yapı, şu anda 14 ayrı noktada 3 bin 500'ün üzerinde konut inşa ediyor.

PSA Grubu araçları Peugeot, Citroen ve Opel'in satış ve servis merkezi EGEM Otomotiv, farklı kategorilerde kazandığı ödüller ile yükselen ivmesini devam ettiriyor.

A Yangın, yangın korunum ile ekipmanları üretiminde Türkiye ve Avrupa'nın lider konumunda bulunuyor.

EKMAS Group şirketlerinden REO Mühendislik, hem EKMAS Yapı hem de ülkemizin en önemli inşaat şirketlerine mühendislik çözümleri üretiyor.

Name: Hotaru Holdings Limited
Description: Hotaru Holdings, founded in 2019, is the parent organization that houses the brands: Reif Japanese Kushiyaki, TERO, SoleSide by Reif, Hoe Lee Kow, and Kushi by Reif under its corporate umbrella. Being led by Reif Othman alongside Ahsan Kahlon, the team is backed up by some of the best talents in the industry specializing in Operations, Human Resources, Finance, Franchising, and Marketing.

Name: Nash21
Description:
Nash21 Holding es una empresa tecnológica que opera en la intersección del PropTech y el FinTech, especializada en el desarrollo de soluciones innovadoras para la gestión del riesgo y la creación de productos financieros aplicados al mercado inmobiliario.

Impulsamos la transformación del sector a través de herramientas digitales que permiten tokenizar, valorar y garantizar flujos financieros vinculados a activos inmobiliarios, aportando eficiencia, liquidez y transparencia a una industria tradicionalmente ilíquida y opaca. Nuestra visión es liderar la evolución del real estate hacia un ecosistema más dinámico, seguro y financieramente inteligente.oportunidades exclusivas en el sector inmobiliario:

Name: Antler Holdings
Description:
Founded in 1978, Antler started with fabric printing and grew to dominate the Sri Lankan market. Strategic diversification led to the formation of the Antler Group, now encompassing:

Fabric printing: Pioneering the industry with cutting-edge technology and serving renowned brands.
Ink manufacturing: Supplying printers locally and internationally, originally born to support Antler's own needs.
Cleaning products: Offering high-quality detergents under the trusted Britol brand.
Over 1500 employees fueled by founder Mr. Jayasinghe's vision and leadership make Antler a success story. Recognized for international standards, ethical practices, and a harmonious work culture, Antler continues to thrive.

Name: WealthGuard Holding
Description: At WealthGuard, we believe in shaping the future through innovation, creativity, and sustainability. Since 2020, we have been redefining industries with a strong presence in Dubai.

Name: Adibayu Group
Description:
Adibayu Group merupakan holding company yang berlokasi di Yogyakarta, Perusahaan ini menaungi 3 Industri dengan 8 perusahaan di dalamnya. 3 Industri yang dimaksud adalah Manufacture, Distributor, Retail. 

Kami memiliki 5 value yakni : Agama, Nyawa, Akhlak, Kehormatan, dan Harta
a. Agama : Agama harus hidup dan dijaga betul. Utamakan Wajib yang maslahat tertinggi dan halal jauhi mudharat.
b. Nyawa Perusahaan : Nyawa perusahaan harus hidup dan rakyat membantu menjaga nyawa perusahaan.
c. Akal : seluruh insan dari Adi Bayu Grup harus memiliki akal dan akal tersebut diberi kebebasan seluas-luasnya namun terikat nilai (wajib dan sunnahnya agama)
d. Kehormatan : Seluruh insan dari Adi Bayu Grup wajib menjaga kehormatan Perusahaan, keluarganya, termasuk dirinya pribadi
e. Harta : Raih harta dan jaga harta sebagai dasar dari kebarokahan dan kemanfaatan.

Name: KEY Holding Company
Description:
Founded in the 1950s in Kahramanmaras, our group has continuously engaged in production activities across different geographies and multiple locations since then. Our journey, initially centered on paper production, has expanded over the years with strategic investments in various business lines, transforming us into a multi-sector holding structure.

Today, with subsidiaries operating in paper, packaging, textiles, construction, energy, recycling, international trade, and logistics, we have built a strong organization with competitive strength both locally and internationally.

Through our corporate structure and strong business partnerships, we not only contribute to the national economy but also continue to develop environmentally conscious, sustainable, and value-adding solutions for our industries. Drawing strength from our past, we move forward with confidence into the future.

Name: Sandberg Development AB
Description:
Sandberg Development is a family-owned investment company that contributes to growth and societal impact through active ownership in innovation and technology-driven companies.
Through active and committed ownership, Sandberg Development develops innovations and business opportunities. By providing resources and expertise, the goal is for the companies to achieve a market-leading position within their innovation areas of water technology, quality of life, and safety.
The philosophy is based on the belief that money should be put to work and create value. Just as we have done for more than 60 years. From innovative ideas to successful companies.
Sandberg Development's holdings include Aimpoint, GAIM, Nordisk Clean Solutions, RESCUE Intellitech, SWATAB, Xocchiali, ISEC Monitoring Systems, as well as Camurus AB (publ), COT, Drupps, Silanos, Orbital Systems, Watersprint, Reccan, PluvioFlow, and Remotive Labs.

Name: Khwarizmi Holding
Description: A Saudi-based, partner-led holding focused on building investment platforms and scaling high-potential businesses across private markets—delivering value beyond capital through strategic and operational support.

Name: DPJ HOLDINGS
Description: As a tech-driven conglomerate, we endeavour to create business solutions that are reliable and sustainable. DPJH have invested in various business verticals during last 25 years. These strategic investments have grown to industry leaders in many areas. DPJH has created impressive local economic contribution through exports and introduction of new technologies.

Name: Intracom Holdings
Description:
INTRACOM established in  1977 by  Sokratis Kokkalis, executive Chairman of the Company, soon evolved into a leading Greek conglomerate strategically positioned in high growth sectors, with significant international footprint and export activity.

In December 2005, INTRACOM has been transformed into INTRACOM HOLDINGS SA, the main shareholder of a group of leading companies specializing in high tech IT solutions and services, advanced defense electronics systems, constructions, real estate and renewable energy.

Following recent transactions, INTRACOM is gradually evolving into investment company, aiming to achieve higherinvestment returns, thus offering, over time, increased value to its shareholders.

Name: Alagöz Holding
Description:
Yarım asra yaklaşan tecrübesi ve ‘Birlikte daha güçlüyüz’ mottosu ile 7 farklı iştirakini tek bir marka altında buluşturan Alagöz Holding, inovatif çözümleri, yeni nesil teknoloji ve perspektifi ile gücüne güç katmaya devam ediyor.    

Alagöz Holding, madencilik ve kimya sektöründe gerçekleştirdiği projelere her geçen gün yenilerini ekliyor. Türkiye’de bir ilk olarak Afyonkarahisar’da hayata geçirdiği patatesten tıbbi etil alkol üretim tesisi ile Alagöz Holding yatırımlarını sürdürüyor.

Name: Shaiva Group
Description: Happiness is Success - driving fintech, biotechnology and real estate products for the success of our clients.

Name: CDG Developpement Groupe CDG
Description:
Filiale à 100% de la Caisse de Dépôt et de Gestion, CDG Développement a été créée en 2004 afin d’incarner la stratégie du groupe CDG dans les activités de développement territorial. La holding, qui couvre l’ensemble du territoire marocain, offre des outils de développement novateurs et des produits et services performants et générateurs de progrès pour la collectivité dans tous ses domaines d’intervention. Elle a une vocation d’opérateur et d’investisseur de long terme, qui concilie performance financière et utilité collective, tout en plaçant les préoccupations du pays au centre de son action. 

CDG Développement a réalisé de nombreux projets structurants et emblématiques dans des secteurs d’activité névralgiques pour le développement du pays, notamment dans le cadre d’une dynamique partenariale. À travers les expertises métiers de ses différentes filiales, qui opèrent dans des secteurs d’activité clés pour le Maroc, la holding contribue à la dynamisation et à l’essor de l’économie nationale et se positionne aujourd’hui en tant qu’acteur incontournable du développement territorial intégré et durable.

Description: U.

Name: PKE
Description:
Introducing the PKE Group – Your Premier European Solution Provider!
Discover the exceptional services offered by the PKE Group, a trailblazing company renowned for its expertise in security, communication, media, building services and house automation, engineering, traffic engineering, parking systems, and facility management. With an illustrious track record spanning over four decades, PKE has consistently delivered outstanding results on challenging large-scale projects, both domestically and internationally.
Immerse yourself in our portfolio of achievements, ranging from safeguarding esteemed institutions like state central banks, prisons, and hospitals, to seamlessly connecting Formula 1 tracks and monitoring extensive subway networks. At PKE, we prioritize maximum availability, unwavering security, and impeccable reliability, all achieved through flexible solutions that offer the simplest, most intuitive operation.
We pride ourselves on our agile and innovative software development, enabling us to swiftly adapt to all product and project-specific requirements. By choosing PKE, you gain access to a world of limitless possibilities and cutting-edge technology.
Unlock the future of excellence with the PKE Group – where your needs are our utmost priority!

Name: INTERTEC GROUP W.L.L.
Description: Intertec Group was established in 1993 and has since grown and expanded over the last 25 years into a multi divisional organisation with diverse business units. Currently, it has interests in the specialised areas of Trading, Interior Decoration, Telecommunications and Wholesale Food Distribution.

Name: CPC, LLC
Description:
CPC is a diversified holding company spanning a wide variety of industries. The Company is owned by large family offices and acquires and supports its operating businesses with an indefinite time horizon. It was formed from the merging of Curran Companies’ and C3 Capital’s management teams and seeks to invest $60 million to $120 million per company into control investments. 

Our mission is to buy, build, and hold great businesses for the long-term. CPC deeply believes in the power of compounding returns, and that the best way to grow wealth over time is by investing in great businesses and supporting them to excel in the Five Key Battles: People, Operational Systems, Execution Capabilities, Product Leadership, and Customer Intimacy. 

Our perpetual structure enables us to hold such businesses for the long term, exiting when it makes sense rather than on a fixed timeline. Our strategies are designed to create defensible, long-term value for the benefit of our Company, our shareholders, employees, customers and communities.

Name: Welco Group
Description:
Welco Group is a dynamic and diverse holding company comprised of 10 specialized companies operating across multiple industries. Our group is committed to providing innovative solutions and services in printing, manufacturing, paper, packaging, textiles, and more.
With a presence across the Middle East and a passion for excellence, we strive to drive progress and create value for our clients, partners, and industries. Our companies include:

•	Welco Engineering: Delivering engineering excellence and advanced technologies.
•	CMYK EG, SY, KSA, UAE,: Leaders in digital print solutions, offering state-of-the-art printing technologies and services.
•	Cladex Industries: Specialists in metal fabrication for various industries.
•	Ad.World: Experts in LED lighting for advertising uses.
•	Cladex Paper: Experts in paper solutions serving a wide range of sectors.
•	Evolva: Specialists in PVC panels for decorative uses.
At Welco Group, we believe in collaboration, innovation, and sustainable growth, continually pushing boundaries to serve our clients and industries better.
Our Mission: To foster innovation, provide top-quality solutions, and create sustainable growth across all our businesses and industries.

Name: Hetzi
Description:
Le Groupe HETZI a été fondé par Daniel Hiribarren, en 1991, à Hendaye.
Longtemps, son métier principal reste centré sur l’immobilier : Transaction Immobilière, Gestion locative, Immobilier d’entreprises et Promotion immobilière.

Depuis une dizaine d’années, le Groupe se diversifie dans de nouveaux domaines : la location de vacances garantie par des professionnels, la restauration, des lieux de divertissement et prochainement l’hôtellerie avec un projet unique et original à Saint-Jean-de-Luz.

Jusqu’en 2022, le Groupe porte le nom de “CARMEN”, en référence à la marque de son activité d’origine du même nom. Suite aux nombreuses diversifications, le Groupe décide de se doter d’une nouvelle identité :
« HETZI », afin de mieux représenter l’ensemble de ses activités, ses valeurs ainsi que ses ambitions.

Name: MGC-Asia
Description:
MGC-Asia is the leading automotive retailer and service provider, with the great variety of business portfolio. The company is established for two decades in Thailand and now growing its business in ASEAN market. There are more than 10 subsidiary companies under MGC (Asia) such as:

•	Millennium Auto, authorized dealer of BMW, MINI and BMW Motorrad
•	Rolls-Royce Motor Cars Bangkok, authorized dealer and sole importer of Rolls-Royce
•	Summit Honda, authorized dealer of Honda cars
•	Master Car Rental (MCR), premium long-term and short-term car rental services, a master licensee of SIXT (the global car rental franchise from Germany) in 7 South East Asia countries
•	Master Motor Services (MMS), a complete car maintenance service center under the MMS-Bosch Car Service brand specially serves vehicles out of warranty. 
•	HowdenMaxi Insurance Broker, a leading insurance consultant which provides professional insurance  services covering a variety of products
•	Master Automotive Training (MAT), a state-of-the-art training center equipped with the technology and personnel to meet every pre-requisite of automotive retailing education
•	i24, an Information Technology, Data Center, Digital Business and Call Center for the automotive industry
•	MGC Marine (Asia), authorized dealer and sole importer of Azimut Yachts and ChrisCraft Boats

Brand partners
•	Aston Martin Bangkok, authorized dealer and sole importer of Aston Martin
•	Belfort Automobile, sole importer of Peugeot and Jeep cars
•	Lion Automobile, authorized dealer of Peugeot and Jeep cars

Name: Capriole Group
Description:
Capriole Group is a dynamic multi-sector group operating at the intersection of innovation, quality, and long-term impact. With a strong presence in education, real estate development, and manufacturing, the Group is committed to building institutions, communities, and solutions that drive sustainable growth across Egypt and the region.

From pioneering K–12 education through Aspire International School, to delivering modern urban developments and producing high-performance building materials, Capriole Group brings together vision, expertise, and execution across every venture.

Name: Kelebek Group Cappadocia
Description:
Kelebek Group was established by Mr. Ali Yavuz. It all began with Kelebek Special Cave Hotel, back then it was a 4 bedroom guest house, in the year of 1993. 

The company extended rapidly after the hard and sincere work of Mr. Ali and his family. He has expanded the hotel by adding more rooms. Now,the group consists of 7 boutique hotels consists of 250 rooms, 3 hot air ballooning companies, and a travel agency in Cappadocia. 

Groups mission is to offer every service a visitor needed in Turkey. By the end of 2028 Kelebek Group will offer tourism related services to the visitors from around the world. 

Currently our services reach to  200,000+ people a year in Turkey.

Name: Team Group
Description:
We are TEAM - A group of companies created with the idea of working together, being open to new ideas, and using technology to move forward.

Our primary expertise lies within the telecommunications industry. It is this proficiency that has driven us to establish a diversified conglomerate with a visionary commitment to explore various sectors, including software development, engineering solutions, fintech, e-commerce, and beyond. 

Together, we embrace the limitless potential of technology, leading the way towards a future where passion and innovation intertwine to shape a better tomorrow.

Name: JJ Matriz Capital
Description:
Holding empresarial cuya actividad abarca sectores tan estratégicos como el inmobiliario, retail, construcción, energía, hidrocarburos y transporte.
Con el objetivo final de convertirse en una plataforma de inversión que genere rentabilidad y bienestar a todos sus integrantes, sus principales sellos de identidad son la confianza, la calidad, la cultura del esfuerzo, la ética y el trabajo en equipo.

Name: Yeremyan Group
Description:
Yeremyan Projects is Armenia's leading food and hospitality company. We produce high-quality dairy products, operate diverse restaurants, and provide culinary education. Our commitment to sustainability and innovation drives our growth and positive impact on Armenia.
Dairy Excellence:
Leading Armenia's premium dairy market, Yeremyan Projects offers over 70 top-tier products, including artisanal cheeses, grass-fed butter, organic grade A milk, Armenian matzoon, sour cream, and a variety of yogurts. Our innovative seed-to-table approach ensures exceptional dairy quality, from cultivated special feed for purebred cattle to ISO-certified high-tech dairy factories.
Culinary Innovation:
Operating 17 restaurants, from Michelin-star equivalent haute cuisine to vibrant casual dining, fast food, and confectionery, Yeremyan Projects has transformed the hospitality industry in Armenia. Our 11 distinctive concepts blend Armenian and European culinary traditions, setting a new benchmark for dining excellence.
Education and Development:
The Yeremyan Academy of Culinary Arts and Hospitality, in collaboration with the City of Oxford College, has proudly graduated over 2,000 students since 2019, with a remarkable 90% employment rate. Una historia de más 150 años, pero siempre marcada por la cultura de ser leales a nuestros principios: el trabajo en equipo, el compromiso, la iniciativa y el valor de la palabra dada.
Fundada por tres emprendedores bilbaínos en 1870, Bergé y Compañía nació y creció como principal protagonista del desarrollo empresarial español desde la revolución industrial del siglo XIX hasta la revolución digital de nuestros días.
Una historia llena de éxitos y aprendizajes, que ha pasado por numerosos sectores, industrias y geografías, y hoy deja su huella en la logística y en la movilidad de más de veinte países, tejiendo por el camino importantes alianzas estratégicas a nivel internacional y nacional. La historia de una empresa multifamiliar que ha sobrevivido, entre muchas cosas, a dos guerras mundiales, una guerra civil, dos pandemias y graves crisis financieras.

1960 yılında kurulan Erçal Group; fındık ve zahire ürünleri alım satımı yaparak ticaret hayatına başlamıştır. 1992 yılında Ordu’nun Kumru ilçesinde Erçal Fındık markası altında ilk fabrikasını inşa ederek natürel iç̧ fındık üretimine başladı. 1993’te ise Samsun’da ilk temelleri atılarak Erçal Otomotiv markası kurulmuş ve kamyon alım satımına başlamıştır. Erçal Group; Fındık, 2. El Binek Otomotiv Alım-- Satım işlemleri, 2.El Ağır Vasıta Alım-Satım işlemleri, Sigorta, İnşaat alanların da yapılan yatırım ve girişimleriyle zamanla büyüyerek şu an beş iş birimiyle lider konumda ve her yıl ISO tarafından belirlenen “Türkiye'nin 500 Büyük Sanayi Kuruluşları" listesinde bu yıl 468. sırada yer almaktadır. Erçal Group olarak, faaliyetlerimizi uluslararası standartlarda kurumsal yönetim, yüksek teknolojiler, müşteri memnuniyeti, sürdürülebilirlik ve toplumsal sorumluluk anlayışı ile yürütmekteyiz. 

Erçal Group’ta hepimizi birleştiren şey; Yürüttüğü her faaliyetinde doğruluk, dürüstlük ve güvenilirliği rehber edinmesidir. Çünkü her şey güvenle başlar. Ürünlerimiz, hizmetlerimiz ve çözümlerimiz aracılığıyla her gün hayatı zenginleştirmeye ve iyileştirmeye çalışan, donanımlı ve yetkin kişilere sahip bir ekibiz. Köklerimizden inşa edilmiştir ve nesilden nesille aktarılarak geleceğe uzun süredir devam eden sorumluluk ve sürdürülebilirlik mirasını taşımaya devam ediyoruz.

- Soluzioni assicurative: sviluppate da società specializzate nell’integrazione di servizi e prodotti assicurativi.

Sermetra Net Service fornisce alle reti di operatori professionali del settore della circolazione mezzi di trasporto, piattaforme integrate innovative, software, assistenza (www.sermetranet.it - www.lanuovaguida.it).

Unsere Vision: Zugang zu besserer Gesundheit für alle.

Services und Technologie der CKM Group
Ein vernetztes Plattform-Ökosystem, das eigene Infrastruktur und Gesundheitsdienste bündelt und innovative Partner integriert:

- Infrastruktur und Services: Klinik, umfangreiches Netzwerk an Partnerärzten, eigenes Labor- und Diagnostiknetzwerk sowie IT-Development Firma

- Plattform Ökosystem: Modulare Plattform mit Schnittstellen für alle Partner, transparenter Datenverwaltung, hohen Sicherheitsstandards und flexibler Anpassungsfähigkeit

- Integration von Partnern: Maßgeschneiderte Anbindung an die Plattform unter Einhaltung von Qualitäts- und Rechtsvorgaben sowie laufender datenbasierter Prozessoptimierung

Description:

Name: Abacus alpha GmbH
Description:
Wir sind Abacus alpha: Ihre Beteiligungsgesellschaft für den Mittelstand.

Abacus alpha ist eine erfahrene und finanziell unabhängige Beteiligungsgesellschaft, die sich als Impact Investor auf nachhaltige Wachstumsfinanzierung und Unternehmensnachfolge für den Mittelstand konzentriert. Abacus alpha investiert in zukunftsweisende Technologien und Innovationen, die einen bedeutenden Beitrag zur Lösung der Zukunftsprobleme durch Technik leisten. Unser Ziel ist es, durch strategische Partnerschaften und Kapitalbeteiligungen, Unternehmen dabei zu unterstützen, ihre Visionen zu verwirklichen und langfristig erfolgreich zu sein.

Wir beteiligen uns an Unternehmen, die in den Bereichen Automatisierung und Digitalisierung, Clean Tech bzw. Green Tech oder in der Entwicklung von innovativen Werkstoffen und Fertigungsverfahren tätig sind. Darüber hinaus haben wir Unternehmen im Fokus, die gut zu unserer Beteiligungsgesellschaft passen und von deren Chancen wir überzeugt sind. Im Mittelpunkt stehen technologieorientierte Aktivitäten, Digitalisierung, Industrie 4.0 und künstliche Intelligenz – dies auch in den Segmenten Dienstleistungen und Handel.

Möglich sind sowohl Minderheits- als auch Mehrheitsbeteiligungen.

Unsere Geldanlagen verfolgen das Ziel, das uns anvertraute Kapital zu vermehren, um dadurch weitere Impact Investments zu ermöglichen. Dabei legen wir großen Wert darauf, dass unsere Investitionen unsere Werte wie Anstand, Innovation und Professionalität widerspiegeln. Es geht uns nicht primär um die Maximierung der finanziellen Rendite, sondern darum, nachhaltigen Mehrwert zu schaffen und die langfristigen Ziele unserer Gesellschafterin, der Johannes und Jacob Klein GmbH, als stiftungsgebundener Holding zu unterstützen.

Name: MAUSAC Foods
Description:
MAUSAC Foods is a family-owned holding company that integrates its portfolio of brands and companies to create, produce, and distribute quality artisanal bakery products across North America.


Our story begins in 2006, when pastry chef Eliana Campos Berry opened her first bakery, Pastelería Eliana. With an unwavering commitment to creativity, resilience, and quality, Chef Eliana quickly turned her vision into a thriving success.

As Pastelería Eliana flourished, her son Mauricio saw an opportunity to expand and adapt to the evolving demands of the North American food industry. This vision led to the creation of MAUSAC Foods—a family-owned company dedicated to uniting diverse artisanal food brands under a shared foundation of excellence.

Rooted in Chef Eliana’s core values of joy, innovation, and partnership, MAUSAC Foods continues to grow, fostering a portfolio of brands that push the boundaries of creativity and quality. With an eye on the future, the company remains committed to developing new solutions that meet the ever-changing needs of the industry.

Guided by the same passion that inspired Chef Eliana’s first cake, MAUSAC Foods embraces change, innovation, and excellence—always evolving, always striving for more.


OUR BRANDS:
DecoCookies — Hand-decorated cookies
Little Rae's Bakery — Decorated shortbread cookies
Cookie Canvas — DIY cookie kit activities
Deliana's Bakery — In-store bakery products & solutions
Woofkies — Hand-decorated dog treats


OUR COMPANIES:
Pasteleria Eliana — GFSI SQF-certified bakery manufacturing facility
Bliss Foods, LLC — Commercialization, USA
Bliss Alimentos — Commercialization, Mexico
DecoBrands, LLC — Brand holdings

Name: Şevginler Holding
Description:
Şevginler Holding, 1970 yılından bu yana Doğu Anadolu bölgesinin sanayileşme sürecinde öncü bir role sahip olarak 50 yılı aşkın bir süreçte çeşitli sektörlerde birçok ilki gerçekleştirmiştir.

Doğu Anadolu'da ilk holding olma ve ilk un ve yem fabrikasını kurma gibi önemli adımlar atan Şevginler Holding, sadece cirosu ve ihracatıyla değil, aynı zamanda ödediği vergiler ve yarattığı istihdamla bölgenin en büyük şirketlerinden biri olmuştur.

Enerji, gıda, agro endüstri, lisanslı depoculuk, antrepoculuk ve uluslararası taşımacılık gibi sektörlerde güçlü rekabet avantajlarına sahip olan Şevginler Holding, yüksek büyüme potansiyeli sunan alanlarda lider konumdadır.

Aynı zaman da Şevginler Holding, Çağdaş ve gelişen bir Türkiye için; yaşamın en temel gereksinimleri olan eğitim, sağlık ve kültür alanlarında faaliyet göstermek amacıyla 2023 yılında temeli atılan Şevginler Holding Vakfını kurdu, Şevginler Holding Vakfı aracılığıyla eğitim, sağlık ve kültür alanlarında öncü bir rol üstlenmeyi amaçlanmaktadır. Vakıf, kâr amacı gütmeksizin özellikle maddi imkanları kısıtlı olan yetenekli gençlere eğitimde fırsat eşitliği sağlamak üzere burslar sunmaktadır.

Şevginler Holding ve bağlı şirketleri, faaliyetlerini uluslararası standartlarda kurumsal yönetim, müşteri memnuniyeti, hizmet ve ürün kalitesiyle, tüketicinin birinci tercihi olma, sürdürülebilirlik ve toplumsal sorumluluk anlayışıyla sürdürmektedir.

Gelecekte de tüm paydaşları için değer yaratma misyonunu sürdüren Şevginler Holding, sektördeki lider konumunu koruma ve inovasyona odaklanma vizyonuyla önemli bir rol üstlenmeye devam edecektir.

Name: Atılgan Group
Description:
Atılgan Grup Hakkında: 1969 yılında Ahmet Atılgan tarafından Rize’de yedek parça satışı ile ticarete başlayan Atılgan Grup, 

1983 yılında Rize ili Ford Yetkili servisi,

1986 yılında İstanbul Aksaray’da toptan yedek parça satışı,

1993 yılında İstanbul Zeytinburnu’nda Ford Yetkili servisi ve toptan yedek parça satışı,

1997 yılında İstanbul Yedpa’da toptan yedek parça satışı,

2007 yılında İstanbul, Sancaktepe Ford Yetkili Satıcılığı ve Servisi,

Toptan yedek parça pazarında tüm Türkiye genelinde 1.000’in üzerinde bayii ve müşterisi olan Atılgan Grup, uzun yıllar Ford orijinal yedek parça satışında liderliğini sürdürmektedir. 2012 yılından itibaren Renault ve Dacia markasını bünyesine katan grup, 2017 yılı itibarı ile bu markalarda da toptan orijinal yedek parça satışını başlatmış olup, liderliğe doğru emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir.

Yedek parça sektöründe yurtdışında da ülkemizi temsil eden Atılgan Grup, Romanya-Bükreş ve Ukrayna-Odessa şubeleri bulunmakta ve 25 ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır.
Ayrıca, Atılgan Grup bünyesinde İstanbul Tuzla Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde faaliyette olan Atıl-San Otomotiv’de ana sanayi ve yan sanayi için yedek parça imalatı yapılmaktadır.
500’e yakın çalışanıyla müşterilerine hizmet veren Atılgan Grup şirketleri, insan kaynakları ve Atılgan misyonundan yararlanarak müşteri sadakatini mümkün kılacak marka değerini yaratmayı ilke edinmiş ve global iş birlikleri ile bölgesel olarak büyümeyi kendine hedef belirlemiştir.

Müşteri memnuniyeti ve güven üzerine kurulu hizmet anlayışı ile dünya çapında saygın markaların temsilciliğini gerçekleştiren Atılgan Grup, dünyadaki ve ülkemizdeki gelişmelere uyum sağlayarak Türkiye’de değişimin öncüsü olmaya devam etmektedir.

Name: HiFive Holdings LLC
Description:
At HiFive Holdings, we aim to build & grow a portfolio of sustainable businesses that drive positive social and environmental impact. We believe that business can be a powerful force for good, and we are committed to promoting sustainable evolution through responsible investment, innovative solutions, and collaborative partnerships. By combining our expertise, resources, and networks, we aim to create a world where people and planet thrive together, today and for generations to come. Our vision is to become a global leader in sustainable investment and innovation, driving systemic change towards a more equitable and regenerative future. We envision a world where businesses operate in harmony with nature, communities thrive on shared prosperity, and all individuals have the opportunity to fulfill their potential. We are committed to harnessing the power of capitalism to solve the most pressing challenges of our time, and to creating a legacy of impact that inspires and empowers future generations.

We believe in functioning with transparency, integrity, and purpose. We prioritize stakeholder engagement and impact measurement, and seek to create value for all our stakeholders, including investors, employees, customers, suppliers, and the communities and ecosystems in which we operate. We foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning, and encourage our teams to think creatively and take calculated risks in pursuit of our mission and vision. We recognize that sustainable evolution requires a long-term perspective, and we are committed to upholding the highest standards of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) performance across our portfolio. By leading by example and inspiring others to follow suit, we believe that we can create a better future for all.

Our portfolio includes

Artificial Intelligence
Renewable Energy
Manufacturing
Food & Agriculture
Pharmacy Retail Chain
Telemedicine & Teleradiology
Real Estate

Name: Nasseri Industrial Group
Description:
Nasseri Industrial Group is a premier business corporation based in Khorasan, Iran, with a rich legacy spanning over several decades. Our diversified portfolio encompasses industry, mining, and agriculture, with an unwavering focus on customer satisfaction and societal benefit.

As a family-owned business, we take pride in our long-term vision, with commitment being the cornerstone of our success. Our customer-centric approach and unwavering reliability have helped us build a reputation as a respectable brand in the industry. At Nasseri Industrial Group, we believe that building lasting and meaningful relationships based on mutual trust and loyalty is the key to our success.

Our core business operations revolve around the ceramic and tile industry, where we have emerged as one of the leading manufacturers in Iran. With over 40 years of experience, we have expanded our operations to five manufacturing sites under four different brands, producing diversified designs and products with a daily production capacity of over 50,000 square meters. Our products are widely used in more than 20 countries worldwide, making us a global player in the industry. Furthermore, we provide over half of the materials needed for the production of tile and ceramic within the same group, reflecting our commitment to vertical integration and sustainable practices.

Apart from our tile and ceramic business, we also have a thriving agricultural division. In 2008, we established Hezardastan company to provide cut flowers for the Middle East and European markets. Today, we operate eight hectares of hydroponic greenhouses, producing high-quality flowers year-round.

Our mission is to create a positive impact on individuals and society by providing high-quality products and services, building lasting relationships with our customers, and promoting sustainable practices that benefit society as a whole. We believe that by doing so, we can contribute to the well-being and prosper

Name: Serra do Amolar & Co.
Description:
Transformamos ativos reais em capital estratégico.
Com precisão jurídica, inteligência financeira e governança institucional, estruturamos operações sólidas, rastreáveis e prontas para o crivo do mercado.

Quem somos
Inspirada pela força simbólica da Serra do Amolar, no coração do Pantanal sul-mato-grossense, somos uma holding estratégica e boutique independente, dedicada à originação, estruturação e governança de Real World Assets (RWAs). Atuamos nos setores de Energia, Real Estate, Agronegócio, Carbono e Infraestrutura.

O que fazemos
Originamos ativos com lastro validado e desenhamos estruturas jurídico-financeiras sob medida, integrando securitização privada, tokenização institucional e mecanismos robustos de governança e tecnologia — incluindo blockchain, escrow, compliance e rastreabilidade.

Nosso modelo
Operamos com um modelo Asset Light, regulatoriamente independente e exclusivamente B2B, em parceria com agentes regulados. Nossas estruturas são auditáveis, elegíveis e aderentes aos padrões do mercado institucional.

Como entregamos valor
Atuamos como ponte entre o mundo produtivo e o capital sofisticado, conectando ativos reais a fundos, veículos estruturados e ambientes digitais, com fluidez contratual, aderência regulatória e elegibilidade institucional.

Real World Assets. Real Structure. Real Value.

Name: ALFA Business Holding
Description:
Fundada en 2002, la empresa se inició en un modesto taller de la ciudad de Barcelona, donde nació la idea de crear equipos de descanso de alta calidad. El éxito de esta línea de negocio provocó que en 2006 la empresa ampliara sus instalaciones con el fin de abarcar las operaciones del mercado de productos relacionados con el hogar, lo que derivó a que en 2011 construyera su primera fábrica de colchones en la periferia de la ciudad condal con 6.000 m2. 
Tras consolidar estas vías de negocio, ALFA Business Holding decide sumergirse en el mercado del e-commerce a través de diferentes marcas dónde logra una expansión global en hasta 18 países de los cuáles sigue manteniendo su representación a día de hoy.
En 2025, ALFA Business Holding cuenta con cinco fábricas de equipos de descanso, muebles y electrónica ubicadas en España, Polonia y China, además de siete almacenes reguladores repartidos en Barcelona, Albacete, Madrid, Valencia y Jerez de la Frontera con más de 100 empleados.
Nuestra empresa siempre se ha enorgullecido del gran equipo humano que forma parte del día a día de la compañía. Creemos apasionadamente en el crecimiento sostenible empresarial, mirando siempre el futuro con nuevas estrategias que permitan seguir expandiendo nuestras marcas. Nuestro mayor objetivo audaz y presente, es  mantener la calidad de nuestros productos independientemente de su lugar de fabricación, fijando un estándar único, la felicidad de nuestros clientes.

Voor ons is het meer dan een job; het is onze passie. Als jouw partner begeleiden we je op elke stap van de reis. We geloven dat in elke uitdaging veerkracht, innovatie en groei verborgen liggen.
Niet om problemen op te lossen, maar om duurzame succesverhalen te creëren. Met empathie, creativiteit en ongeremde steun staan we naast je om jouw verhaal te versterken, het menselijke aspect te omarmen en elk hoofdstuk de moeite waard te maken. LifeWorx neemt je mee op een reis waar verhalen niet alleen worden geschreven, maar ook vol passie en betekenis worden geleefd. Samen schrijven we de meest opwindende hoofdstukken van jouw verhaal.

Description:
Demirgür Şirketler Grubu olarak, sektörde lider olmanın yanı sıra, müşterilerimize karşı da özgüvenimiz yüksektir. Sahip olduğumuz uzman kadro, sürekli eğitim ve gelişimle donatılmıştır. Bu sayede, her projeye yeni ve yenilikçi çözümler sunarız. Müşterilerimizin beklentilerini aşma hedefiyle hareket eder, onların güvenini kazanmayı amaçlarız.
Demirgür Şirketler Grubu, sürdürülebilirlik ilkesini de benimseyen bir kuruluştur. Doğal kaynakları koruma, çevre dostu uygulamalar ve toplumsal sorumluluk bilinci ile hareket ederiz. Gelecek nesillere temiz ve yaşanabilir bir dünya bırakmak için çalışırız.

Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız, sektördeki liderliğimiz, kalite anlayışımız ve özgüvenimizle Demirgür Şirketler Grubu, iş ortaklarımız ve müşterilerimiz arasında uzun vadeli ve güçlü ilişkiler kurmaktadır. Her projede yeni başarı hikayelerine imza atmayı ve sektördeki etkimizi artırmayı hedeflemekteyiz.

Demirgür Şirketler Grubu, İsmail Demirgür tarafından kurulmuştur. Aynı zamanda Mevcut yönetim kurulu başkanlığını yürütmektedir.

Demirgür Şirketler Grubu'na hoş geldiniz. Sizin için en iyisini sağlamak için buradayız!

DRW Manufacture: Berada di garis depan pembuatan kosmetik berkualitas tinggi yang memenuhi standar industri.

DRW Hospitality: Menyewakan kos-kosan eksklusif, villa, hotel, dan guest house untuk pengalaman menginap yang tak terlupakan.

DRW Food & Beverages: Menawarkan beragam pengalaman kuliner melalui restoran dan layanan penyediaan makanan dan minuman berkualitas.

DRW Foundation: Berkomitmen dalam mendukung kegiatan sosial, agama, dan kemanusiaan untuk memberikan dampak positif pada masyarakat.

Kami hadir untuk memberikan solusi yang lengkap, mendukung perkembangan bisnis, dan berkontribusi pada kesejahteraan masyarakat. Terhubunglah dengan kami untuk menjelajahi peluang kerjasama dan kemajuan bersama. #DRWCorporaIndonesia #SolusiBeragam #MelayaniKemajuan

Name: Sarder
Description:
With a mission to educate and certify 1 billion learners by 2035, Sarder exists to architect AI readiness at a global scale.

Building on over two decades of experience in enterprise capacity building and strengthened by a suite of complementary brands, Sarder brings structure to a fragmented AI landscape—transforming learning into sustained, measurable readiness.

Today, Sarder operates as a global AI readiness ecosystem—guiding individuals and enterprises across the full journey, from learning and certification to real-world AI adoption, amplification, and social impact.

One ecosystem. Many capabilities. One purpose.

Our model functions as a continuous readiness loop. Capability is built and validated through learning and certification. Adoption follows through real-world AI implementation. Transformation is measured across people, processes, and platforms. The resulting impact strengthens future learning. This is how AI readiness compounds—not through isolated initiatives, but through sustained coherence.

Across the ecosystem, we enable AI readiness at every stage:

• Upskill & Certify — NetCom Learning & AI CERT
 https://www.linkedin.com/company/netcom-learning/

Trusted by 43,000+ enterprises and partners across 80+ countries, Sarder operates at the intersection of education, AI, enterprise transformation, and social impact—building readiness that compounds over time.

Projelerimizde geniş peyzaj alanlarına ve sosyal tesislere odaklanarak sektörde fark yaratan, Sen Ailesi’nin her bir bireyini özel hissettirecek bir yolculuğa başlıyoruz. Değişen dünya trendlerini yakından takip ediyor ve çağın gereklerine uygun projelere imza atma kararlılığımızı sürdürüyoruz.

Firmamız, üreteceği projelerde tüm müşterilerine konforlu, sürdürülebilir, ekonomik ve çevre dostu bir yaşam alanı sunma misyonuyla hareket ediyor. "Yaşanabilir ve Sürdürülebilir Projeler" vizyonuyla yüksek bir sorumluluk üstlenen firmamız sadece bugünkü nesiller için değil, aynı zamanda gelecek nesiller için de kaliteli yaşam alanları inşa etmeyi amaçlıyor. Bu doğrultuda, çevreye ve sosyal etki alanına saygılı projeler geliştirme konusundaki kararlılığımızı sürdürerek sektörde öncü bir rol oynamayı hedefliyoruz..

گروه درنیکو مجموعهای است از شرکتهای پیشرو در زمینه بازرگانی که از سال 1387 کار خود را آغاز کرده است. این مجموعه با ایجاد ساختارها و رویکردهای نوین، متعهد به ارائه خدمات باکیفیت و بهینه است. شرکتهای زیرمجموعه با مدیریت زنجیرههای تأمین پیچیده، مسئولیت انتقال مواد گوناگون را از محل تولید به مقصد نهایی بر عهده دارند. تأمین مواد اولیه، فراوردهها و تجهیزات مربوط به صنایع آلومینیوم، فولاد، پتروشیمی، کشتیرانی، هوایی حوزههای اصلی کاری این گروه است.
هلدینگ درنیکو با ارائه زیرساختهای جامع در زمینههای گوناگون مانند مدیریت سرمایه و امور مالی، مدیریت منابع انسانی و توسعه سازمانی، فناوری اطلاعات و... امکان رشد و توسعه را برای شرکتهای زیرمجموعه فراهم کرده است.

Description:
Welcome to SND LinkedIn profile! We are a dynamic investment fund dedicated to creating value and driving business growth in various sectors, both within Egypt and beyond.
✦ Who We Are ✦
SND is a forward-thinking investment fund with a global perspective. We believe in the transformative power of strategic investments and actively seek opportunities to partner with exceptional entrepreneurs and management teams. With a diverse portfolio and a proven track record of success, we are committed to driving growth and creating value in the businesses we invest in.
✦ Our Investment Approach ✦

By partnering with exceptional management teams, we aim to unlock value and drive sustainable growth.
✦ Value Creation ✦

We work closely with entrepreneurs, aligning our interests to drive innovation, operational efficiency, and long-term value creation.
✦ Sector Focus ✦
SND's investment interests span a wide range of sectors, including technology, healthcare, real estate, consumer goods, and more. We believe in the power of diversification and seek opportunities in both mature markets and emerging industries. Our goal is to support innovative ventures that have the potential to disrupt traditional business models and create lasting impact.
✦ Global Perspective ✦
While based in Egypt, SND maintains a global outlook. We actively explore investment opportunities in international markets, seeking partnerships with promising businesses around the world. By diversifying our portfolio geographically.

Description:
Asia Healthcare Holdings (AHH) is a pioneering single-specialty healthcare platform, backed by GIC (Singapore’s sovereign wealth fund) and TPG Growth. Since its inception in 2016, AHH has been driven by a singular mission — to Build, Grow, and Lead best-in-class healthcare enterprises, empowering them to become leaders in their sectors.

With a strong focus on operational excellence and patient-centric care, AHH manages some of India’s leading healthcare networks:

~ Motherhood Hospitals – A trusted network of 23 women & children’s hospitals with 2 clinics across 12 cities, specializing in maternity, pediatrics, and fertility care.

~ Nova IVF Fertility – One of India's largest  fertility networks with 98 centers across 56 cities, offering fertility treatments. 

~ Asian Institute of Nephrology & Urology (AINU) – India’s largest single-specialty Urology-Nephrology care provider, with over 500 beds across 7 hospitals in 5 cities, known for its specialized expertise and quality outcomes.

Proven Track Record – AHH successfully built and scaled CTSI, India’s second-largest chain of oncology hospitals, before achieving a strategic exit in 2019.

At AHH, we’re not just investing in healthcare — we’re shaping its future. Through strategic growth, operational innovation, and a relentless focus on quality, we continue to set new benchmarks in single-specialty healthcare across India and South Asia.

Name: ATTN
Description:
ATTN is a unique gaming ecosystem in Southeast Asia housing a collection of companies operating in esports, mobile gaming, and creator economy. These companies operate as an interconnected value chain that supports and reinforces one another to provide gamers with one of a kind, unified social experience.

With our esports arm, EVOS Esports, we empower dreams for gamers and transform the esports ecosystem to the next level. EVOS Esports is the most successful esports organization in Southeast Asia, with three world championships and 80+ first place regional championships. More than just a successful competitive gaming team, EVOS Esports also provides entertainment and empowerment for its fans and communities and have successfully garnered 113 million+ engaged communities of social media followers.

With our creator economy arm, WHIM, we create tomorrow’s influence through influencer marketing and entertainment. It is currently among the largest creator network in Southeast Asia, with a talent base of over 400 creators; partnership with all leading social platforms such as YouTube, Facebook, TikTok and more than 200 brands, including global brands and regional powerhouses. 

With our online gaming arm, Noctua, we aim to bring the next generation of games into Southeast Asia, providing game solution support for hit titles such as Mobile Legends: Bang Bang and World of Tanks among others to enter into the region. In 2022 we started to publish our own game which reached the top ten most downloaded games in google play store within the first three weeks of launching. 

Together, our companies are redefining the gaming ecosystem in Southeast Asia through our own unique approach to empower future generations.

Name: NSL Ltd (Singapore)
Description:
NSL and its group of companies is a leading industrial group in Asia Pacific. The Group’s core businesses are Precast & Prefabricated Bathroom Unit (PBU) and Environmental Services.  

The Precast & PBU division is a market leader in manufacturing precast concrete components in Singapore, Malaysia and Dubai while the PBU business is a dominant producer in Scandinavia.  

The Environmental Services division is a key player in integrated environmental services in Singapore, covering the treatment and logistics services of hazardous industrial waste and wastewater from both land and marine transportation sectors.   

In addition, NSL Group has a majority shareholding in Raffles Marina Ltd, Asia’s Premier Marina Club in Tuas, Singapore.

NSL Group has an active Research and Development programme that leverages on technology to develop innovative products and process improvements for productivity. It also partners local government agencies and tertiary institutions to develop new and sustainable solutions for industrial applications. 

The Group has operations and joint ventures in four countries and has been listed on the Singapore Exchange since 1964.
 
For more information, visit www.nsl.com.sg

Name: Kozuva Şirketler Grubu
Description:
1955 yılında Adem KOZUVA liderliğinde ticari faaliyetlerine başlayan ve çeşitli sektörlerde hizmet veren Kozuva Ailesi, 1980’li yılların sonunda Türkiye’nin globalleşme sürecine de paralel olarak inşaat alanında yatırım yapmaya başlamıştır.

1990’lı yılların başlarında da yeni kuşağın katılımıyla kurumsallaşma yolunda önemli adımlar atarak inşaat alanındaki toptan ve perakende inşaat malzemeleri satışıyla da yurtiçi ve yurtdışı pazarlarda etkin rol üstlenmiştir.

2007 yılı sonunda yapı ve inşaat alanındaki faaliyetlerine ek olarak tekstil sektörüne adım atarak planladığı başarıyı yakalayan Kozuva Şirketler Grubu, dünyanın birçok ülkesine ihracat yapar hale gelmiştir.

Benimsediği ilkeler ışığında insanlığa değer katacak girişimleri hayata geçirme misyonu ile çalışan Kozuva Şirketler Grubu, 2012 yılında da Favori İşletmecilik A.Ş.’yi kurarak havalimanı işletmeciliği konusunda ilk adımını atmıştır. Eylül 2013 itibariyle Somali'de bulunan Mogadişu Aden Abdulle Uluslararası Havalimanı işletmeciliğini 20 yıl süre ile üstlenmiştir.

Kasım 2020’de “Yap-İşlet-Devret” modeli ile Çukurova Havalimanı Projesi’nin ihalesini kazanan Favori Havalimanları, havalimanının 2024 yılının ilk ayında hizmete girmesi için çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir. 

Turizm, eğitim ve Ar-Ge teknolojileri odaklı alanlarda yatırım yapan Kozuva Şirketler Grubu, faaliyetlerini çağa uygun olarak şekillendirmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Egoé
Description:
The idea is only the beginning. For the implementation to succeed, a long team effort is needed. Development, production, marketing, sales. These are all parts of our journey. We believe that ideas make products.

Ideas
The inner craving to solve a problem. Not to copy others, not to follow trends but instead to offer our own perspective. That is the idea. We perceive design as the manifestation of a concrete solution.

Make
To accept responsibility for the implementation. This is the most important precondition for an idea not to end up merely on paper or in our head. That is why we produce ideas ourselves in the first place.

Products
Be it furniture or railway stations, the final product must be the transformation of vision into something tangible, its materialization. The final product must not serve its own purposes but respect the context. It speaks for its creators.

Egoé kovo
We are sustainable manufacturer who trasform public spaces into the place where you want to be. Our main area of production is conected with wood. All of our production waste is another material which supose to be used. And so we do. We give purpose to the production waste.

Egoé plus
We brought design to the transport infrastructure.

Egoé nest
Camper conversion kits. Simply change your van into a camping car.

Egoé life
Quality outdoor furniture.

Egoé move
Sporting good and design skis.

Name: PURPOSIA Group
Description:
PURPOSIA Group is one of the leading European investment groups with Czech roots, which was established in 2023 as a holding structure around its construction companies HSF System in Czechia and Slovakia and other companies mainly from the construction industry.

The history of the companies forming the PURPOSIA Group holding dates back to 2002, when their main specialization was complete roof and facade cladding, followed by an expansion of activities to general construction supplies. With annual revenues reaching CZK 4 billion, the group now deals with the entire life cycle of construction projects. Design and development are provided by companies under the ANTRACIT brand, while property management and maintenance are handled by SK Facility. Comprehensive supplies of industrial flooring and outdoor paved areas are offered by floorING, while aluminum systems and skylights are supplied by PRUNIWERK. The portfolio of companies also includes PREFA ONV, a manufacturer of concrete prefabricated elements, the surveying company Bezecný, Foredeck, which provides services in the field of tourism, and, most recently, Coral Construction Technologies, which specializes in 3D concrete printing and automation in the construction industry.

The holding company now comprises a total of 43 companies with permanent representation in the Czech Republic, Slovakia, and Austria.

The group focuses on projects for customers from both the private and public sectors. Among the best known are, for example, the modern sports hall in Ostrava-Třebovice, Hornbach in Prešov, Nitra and Prague, the elementary school in Velen, the retirement home in Dačice, and the Ronald McDonald House on the grounds of the Motol University Hospital in Prague. It has also implemented other projects in Austria, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Italy, Croatia, Denmark, and Slovenia.

Name: Groupe Chanv
Description:
Le Groupe Chanv est une entreprise québécoise intégrée qui valorise le chanvre et le cannabis à travers ses marques et divisions, du champ à la mise en marché.

Notre mission : faire du bien aux gens en améliorant leur bien-être et leur plaisir grâce à des produits naturels, durables et innovants à base de chanvre et de cannabis

Notre vision : devenir le leader québécois en produits de consommation dédiés au bien-être et au plaisir, grâce à un écosystème d’innovation, de qualité et de durabilité, maîtrisant chaque étape du champ au consommateur

Nos divisions :
– Bleuh : cannabis récréatif haut de gamme, ancré dans la culture du plaisir conscient.
– Maison d’Herbes : bien-être et soins naturels à base de chanvre.
– Division agricole : culture, transformation et innovation durable.

Notre ADN : Discipline. Travail bien fait. Respect. Créativité. Sensibilité à la vie.

Nous croyons en une exécution irréprochable, une culture d’équipe mobilisée et une approche entrepreneuriale forte, c’est ainsi que nous bâtissons un Groupe qui crée de la valeur, du sens et de la fierté.

Name: MB Holding
Description: The foundations of MB Holding, which has led technology and innovations by breaking new ground in the fields of Construction, Textile, Energy, Ready-Mixed Concrete, Perlite and Greenhouse, were laid when MB Holding Honorary President Muharrem Balat founded Muharrem Balat Construction Company in 1968. MB Holding has spent half a century of its business life as a pioneer of innovations and environmentally friendly production. In this sense, MB Holding, which established Turkey's first private geothermal power plant, is also the first company to implement the greenhouse project heated by geothermal resources. İnper Perlit, which it founded in 1997, is the first and only perlite expansion service provider in the Southeastern Anatolia region. As of 2019, while establishing the first geothermal power plant in Croatia with the project initiated with the principle of using the natural resources provided by nature to humankind efficiently, it continues to produce and develop with the power it receives from its employees.

The Group supports clients in air dispersion modeling, biodiversity action plans, noise and vibration studies, and climate risk assessments. VEKR also leads in sustainability consulting, offering energy modeling, indoor air quality assessments, and guidance on LEED and WELL certifications. Additionally, the Group is licensed for asbestos surveys and safe removal, hazardous waste transport, and marine environmental studies, ensuring alignment with national and international environmental standards.

In General Contracting, VEKR delivers reliable infrastructure services with a specialized focus on pre-insulated duct systems, which enhance energy efficiency in HVAC installations. These lightweight systems reduce heat loss, optimize energy use, and support sustainable building standards aligned with Vision 2030.

In Automotive Services, VEKR provides expert maintenance and service for passenger cars and commercial vehicles, including trucks and earthmovers. Services are delivered with a focus on quality, operational efficiency, and environmental responsibility—extending vehicle life while minimizing carbon footprint.

With deep technical expertise and a commitment to sustainability, VEKR Group empowers industries with smart, compliant, and eco-conscious solutions that shape a greener, more efficient future for the Kingdom.

Name: Trans-Oil Group
Description:
TRANS-OIL GROUP OF COMPANIES is an agro industrial holding with a wide range of activities including oilseeds crushing, grain handling and storage, international commodities trading, vegetable oil in bulk, bottled oil, farming and production of flour.
TRANS-OIL GROUP employs 1 650 people, primarily in sunflower oil production, as well as in farming, origination and logistics which are all entirely owned and operated by the GROUP.
The business units of the GROUP are:

Crushing Oilseeds to make oil for the food industry and meal for animal feed. In Moldova, we own and operate two oilseed crushing facilities with full refining and bottling capabilities. Vin Romania we own and operate one oilseed crushing plant with full refining and bottling capabilities. Our pure sunflower oil brands, such as “FLORIS”, are leaders in the local marketplace and are increasingly expanding internationally to supermarkets in Asia, Africa and the Middle East.
Grains & Trading – TRANS-OIL GROUP is the leader in Export of grains and oilseeds in Moldova.The GROUP has inland storage capacity of 750,000 MT spread among 14 elevators.
Export Terminals- TRANS-OIL GROUP provides grain, oil handling and transshipment services, both internally and to third parties, through Reni, Reni-line and Giurgulesti terminals. The total throughput capacity of the three terminals is 2,4 MMT per year.
Farming - TRANS-OIL GROUP is the Nr.1 agricultural producer in Moldova, by holding more than 60 000 hectares of high productive farm land in long-term leases. The farms are located mainly in the North and South regions.
The GROUP employs about 1,650 people throughout all agri-business functions. The breakdown per function is as follows: Origination – 100 employees; silo storage services – more than 600 employees; oil seeds crushing plants, two production units – 1’600 mt capacity and about 700 employees; and loading port facilities – 350 employees (3 units in Giurgiulesti and 2 in Reni).

Description:

Based on the strong leadership of the shipbuilding business, it is becoming the most innovative solution supplier in the heavy industries and energy sector, ranging from shipbuilding and marine engineering to oil refining, petrochemicals, and smart energy management businesses.

HD Hyundai rebranded its name of Hyundai Heavy Industries Group(HHI Group) to 'HD Hyundai' in 2022 to mark its 50th anniversary.

HD Hyundai operates three core businesses - shipbuilding, heavy equipment, and energy - through Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (KSOE), Hyundai Genuine, and Hyundai Oilbank. Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (KSOE) is a sub-holding company that controls the group's shipbuilding companies, including Hyundai Heavy Industries, Hyundai Samho Heavy Industries, and Hyundai Mipo Dockyard. Hyundai Genuine is another sub-holding company that oversees heavy equipment business, having Hyundai Doosan Infracore and Hyundai Construction Equipment as subsidiaries. Hyundai Oilbank is one of major oil refiners in South Korea.

Description:
Outset is the start of something new and different in the world of F&B and hospitality - not just for the sake of novelty, but for the creation of something meaningful. Fresh perspectives that have blossomed from spontaneity and industry know-how.

We’re not just a collection of brick-and-mortar spaces and trendy gastronomy. Outset is an idea, a meaningful conversation, a shared inspiration, and an ongoing dialogue – between you and us. We capture what’s intrinsic to all of us, from our shared wants and needs to our individuality and uniqueness. And it’s from that we craft authentic experiences – each and every day. 

Outset is young, ambitious, and proudly from the UAE – born, nurtured, and grown from its shifting sands, oases, palms, and waters. We speak the language of its soil, celebrating its past and preparing its future. Whether its food, dining spaces, art, or culture, you’ll find us firmly on the horizon, embracing new and exciting concepts, tastes, and spaces to set the benchmark for what’s to follow. We’re here to create the kind of experiences that light up the imagination, push the body, and touch the soul. And we’re doing it with hope, positivity, and excitement. 

We’re good with being different, unusual, and discerning. But while we’re proud to be bold, representing the hidden gems, the exclusively curated experiences, and the distinctively singular tastes – we want everyone to feel welcome. And as Outset grows and our unique take on everything shines through, we’ll continue to celebrate and build spaces, concepts, culinary adventures, and collaborations that speak to you, all while transcending what you know and presenting you with what can be.

مجموعة يوسف بن أحمد كانو تعتبر احدى اكبر الشركات العائلية المستقلة في الشرق الأوسط و تمكن نطاق واسع من وحدات الأعمال والشراكات الاستراتيجية. تأسست في عام 1890 ميلادي كشركة تجارة أسرية تعمل بخدمات الشحن التجاري في مملكة البحرين، وتطورت الشركة إلى مجموعة أعمال متنوعة مع وجود متكامل في منطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا وأوروبا وآسيا، ويصل تعداد القوى العاملة في الشركة إلى أكثر من 3000 موظف.

تعتبر شركة يوسف بن أحمد كانو من المساهمين المميزين في النمو الاقتصادي والتنمية في المنطقة حيث تقدم خبراتها لاعمال التطوير و تعتبر من احدى المساهمين في بناء البنية التحتية من قبل أكثر من 130عاما. أسست الشركة نفسها كخيار أول للشركات الإقليمية والعالمية عند البحث عن شريك أعمال متميز في المنطقة وتستمر الشركة في متابعة نموها التجاري والتوسع من خلال التميز المستمر. وتشمل الأنشطة التجارية للشركة مجالات الشحن، والسفر، والآليات والكيماويات والخدمات اللوجستية والعقارات والطاقة والتكنولوجيا و الاستثمارات.

Name: NUROL HOLDİNG A.Ş.
Description:
The ÇARMIKLI Family, originally from Arhavi, Artvin, had dealt until recently with trading. Later, they started to emphasize construction business, and furthermore getting more focused on contracting business.

Their father Eyüp Sabri ÇARMIKLI, led his business life in Ardahan doing commercial tailoring, haberdashery and contracting work. After he passed away, his children carried on his line of business and developed it further on. Established on January 17, 1966 as an equal partnership, Nurol is a combination of the syllables of their names Nurettin and Erol. At the time Oğuz ÇARMIKLI was studying in school. But later, in 1981 joined the group as a partner. As a result, Nurol Holding has made it until today as a partnership of equally owned shares by the three brothers .

Nurol Group of Companies, with its business experience of more than half a century, is a worldwide success today with its more than 40 establishments, participations and affiliated partnerships in several sectors ranging from trade to defense industry, from construction to machinery and manufacturing, and from tourism to finance.

Our Vision
With commitment to traditions and being open to new things and  developments to carry over to future generations the sound structure formed by  kneading it with the principles proven by the work experience we gained during  the 49 years in our country and in several places around the world, and  based on the power we get from the society  and our employees to produce goods and services in the best possible manner.

Our Principle
To obtain the highest value by improving our products and services permanently while keeping abreast of contemporary developments.
To be honest, consistent and trustworthy.
To provide for the Company objectives to be in harmony with the development of the country and the society.

Name: Ali Alghanim & Sons Group
Description:
Ali AlGhanim & Sons Group: A Legacy Woven into Kuwait's Progress

Founded in the early 1960s, Ali AlGhanim & Sons Group has grown from a Kuwaiti steel fabrication factory into a diversified corporation of different, independent businesses, shaping the nation's economic landscape.

Our unwavering commitment to partnerships has been the cornerstone of our success. We foster long-lasting relationships with international brands while nurturing homegrown businesses, introducing them to the local market.

More than just a business, we're guided by core values that place our partners, clients, employees, and the society we serve at the forefront of every decision. This philosophy has not only fueled our growth but also seen us navigate challenges throughout the decades.

Today, Ali AlGhanim & Sons Group stands as:
•	A pillar of the Kuwaiti economy, with a presence in various sectors including automotive, consumer goods, education, construction, and food & beverage.
•	A bridge connecting international expertise with Kuwaiti aspirations.
•	A champion for stakeholder well-being, driven by a commitment to partnership, integrity, and excellence.

Our rich legacy connects us deeply to Kuwait's forward-looking vision. We're not just building a successful corporation; we're building a better future for Kuwait.

Join us as we continue shaping the next chapter of Kuwait's story.

#Kuwait #Legacy #Partnership #Progress

Name: Dalrada Technology Group
Description:
Founded in 1982, Dalrada Technology Group, Inc. (Ticker: DHTI) is a publicly traded, multinational technology company developing, manufacturing, and marketing innovative products and services across Clean Energy (Climate Technology) and Semiconductor & Electronics sectors.

Dalrada’s Climate Technology segment delivers advanced heat pump systems and integrated water solutions for industrial, commercial, and residential applications—designed to improve energy efficiency, reduce emissions, and support global decarbonization.

Dalrada’s Semiconductor & Electronics segment provides next-generation PVD and CVD deposition systems, modernization solutions for legacy semiconductor tools, real-time plasma diagnostics, and integrated services and components that support advanced semiconductor manufacturing environments.

By integrating these core segments under one unified technology group, Dalrada Technology Group accelerates innovation, advances sustainability, and delivers long-term value for shareholders, customers, and partners.

Dalrada operates globally with teams and strategic partners across multiple regions and is headquartered in San Diego, California.

For more information, visit www.dalrada.com.

Name: Norm Holding
Description:
“İlk cıvatamızı 1973 yılında çift vuruşlu bir makine ile ürettik. İşte, o cıvatanın çanağa düştüğünde çıkardığı ses hala kulağımızda. Bizi bugünlere getiren, daha iyisini yapabilmemiz için çalışma azmi veren aynı tutku.” 

Norm Holding Kurucusu ve Yönetim Kurulu Onursal Başkanı olarak halen görevini sürdüren Nedim Uysal tarafından kurulan Norm Holding, 1973 yılında, İzmir Bornova'da çift vuruşlu bir set makine ile cıvata üretimine başladı. Sektörde kazanılan başarılar sayesinde 1994 yılında, şu an faaliyette olan İzmir Atatürk Organize Sanayi Bölgesi'ndeki yeni ve modern tesis kuruldu. Cıvata üretimiyle başlayan bu yolculuk pek çok şirketin katılmasıyla devam ederek, zaman içinde büyük bir gruba dönüştü.

Norm Holding 50 yıllık tecrübesinin ışığında, entegre üretim ve kaliteli hizmet anlayışıyla yoluna devam etmektedir. Tasarım aşamasından itibaren katıldığı üretim süreçlerinin tümünü yöneten Norm Holding, ana sanayilerin en önemli çözüm ortağı olarak hizmet vermektedir. 2017 itibariyle Norm Grup, Holding çatısı altında birleşti.

Name: CCN Holding
Description:
Founded in 2007, CCN Holding operates in the fields of construction, healthcare, service delivery, technology, education with an awareness of social responsibility and sustainable development.

Specializing in the design and construction of complex health campuses, CCN Construction continues its international experience, which started with the world-class works it built in Baku in 2006, by carrying it to the construction of Türkiye's largest health campuses, hotels and schools. Pioneer of integrated health campuses established with the PPP model CCN Health, a service provider, serves 10 million patients annually. CCN Security provides effective and high quality security services by using security technologies and systems specific to the risks and needs of the companies it is a solution partner. CCN Service and CCN Clinic offer all the services required in business processes at international standards. Providing uninterrupted service to 50,000 technologically active devices and software within the scope of Hospital Information Management System Services, Infera Technology offers software and system integration solutions in the fields of health, energy, tourism and services. CCN Education successfully operates TED Izmir College and TED Kocaeli College and presents a pioneering model with its sustainability projects. CCN Technical, carries out electrical-mechanical contracting, technical operation and maintenance activities and provides engineering, procurement and installation services on renewable energy sources. Founded in 2015, Ice Yachts, focuses on creating yachts with exceptional performance and design, with its high quality production capacity.


As a signatory to the UN-supported Principles for Responsible Investment, CCN Holding conducts its activities in line with the principles aiming to achieve a sustainable global financial system that contributes to the environment and society and continues its activites to contribute to sustainable development.
