Name: Expresso Mirassol Ltda
Description:
Do transporte à logística
               A evolução de um conceito 
Há mais de 70 anos buscamos continuamente novas tecnologias em evolução com o mercado.
Essa visão empreendedora nos proporcionou um grande crescimento, diversificando nossa frota e atingindo novos nichos.. 
Próximos de alcançar o marco de 1000 colaboradores, nosso foco principal é a valorização de cada um que contribui para fazer da Mirassol uma empresa cada vez melhor para se trabalhar.
Estamos alinhados na perpetuidade de uma empresa sustentável, com base em valores sólidos que são a essência da nossa cultura. Muito além de gerar resultados econômicos para nossos acionistas, temos o objetivo de proporcionar valores e benefícios para nossos clientes, colaboradores e sociedade onde atuamos. 
Possuímos as mais diversificadas operações logísticas em nosso portfólio de serviços, além de mais de 20 filiais espalhadas pelo Brasil, otimizando a operação de nossos clientes.
Possuímos registro sem limites de valores para transportes em regime de DI e DTA e somos certificados ISO 9001, SASSMAQ e ANVISA, além de termos uma área sem igual de engenharia e consultoria de projetos logísticos.
100% da frota de veículos é rastreada e trabalhamos  com a roteirização de cargas através da ferramenta Roadnet (líder mundial). Possuímos sistemas ERP, TMS e WMS (TOTVS).

Name: NUHMA
Description:
Nuhma investeert vooral in toepassingen van hernieuwbare energie zoals Aspiravi, Z-Kracht en Bionerga. Nuhma ondersteunt daarnaast ook initiatieven rond innovatie zoals s-Lim en MyCSN. Nuhma werd opgericht in 2001 als de nutsholding van de Limburgse gemeenten.

De 38 Limburgse gemeenten en Laakdal zijn de aandeelhouders en leveren samen met Nuhma een belangrijke bijdrage aan het CO2-neutraal maken van onze regio. 

Nuhma ontwikkelde een weldoordachte totaalvisie waarbij investeringen in duurzaamheid, energie en innovatie centraal staan. Via Nuhma participeren de Limburgse gemeenten in innovatieve activiteiten en projecten die resulteren in een maatschappelijke meerwaarde.

Description:
Founded in 1982, Dalrada Financial Corporation (OTC: DFCO, “Dalrada”) is a publicly-traded company and multi-national conglomerate that focuses on solving complex, multi-disciplinary global challenges in clean energy innovation and personalized healthcare solutions. Dalrada operates through two main subsidiaries: Dalrada Climate Technology and Genefic Health.  

Dalrada Climate Technology (https://dalradaclimatetech.com) develops and distributes eco-friendly heating and cooling solutions for commercial and residential applications. Genefic (https://genefic.com) creates improved health outcomes through its specialty pharmacy solutions. Dalrada creates positive social and environmental impact through its products and services and delivers significant value to its shareholders.

Dalrada’s subsidiaries and strategic partners operate in the United States, United Kingdom, France, India, Malaysia, and Spain and are centrally managed from the company’s San Diego, California headquarters.

For more information, please visit https://dalrada.com.

Özak Global Holding, iş dünyasında 30 yıllık köklü bir geçmişe sahip olan ve tekstil, gayrimenkul yatırım ortaklığı, inşaat, turizm ve tesis yönetimi başta olmak üzere, birçok farklı sektörde faaliyet gösteren Özak şirketlerini çatısı altında toplayan güçlü bir grup yapılanması. ‘Hep daha iyisini yapma’ hedefiyle tüm iş kollarında dünya standartlarını takip ederek yenilikçi yaklaşımlar geliştiren ve hayata değer katmayı hedefleyen Özak Global Holding, uluslararası çapta hizmet veren 20 şirketi ile faaliyetlerini sürdürüyor. 

Özak Global Holding, kuruluşundan bu yana başarıları üzerine inşa ettiği kurum kültürü ve çalışanlarına değer veren yapısıyla, sürdürülebilir büyümesine devam ediyor. Her zaman iyi bir ‘işveren markası’ olmayı amaç edinen Özak Global Holding, güçlü kadrosu ile başarıya odaklanan, hızlı büyüyen yapısıyla kariyer fırsatları sunan dinamik bir yapıya sahip.

Muito além de gerar resultados econômicos para nossos acionistas, temos o objetivo de proporcionar valores e benefícios para nossos clientes, colaboradores e sociedade onde atuamos. 
Possuímos as mais diversificadas operações logísticas em nosso portfólio de serviços, além de mais de 20 filiais espalhadas pelo Brasil, otimizando a operação de nossos clientes.
Possuímos registro sem limites de valores para transportes em regime de DI e DTA e somos certificados ISO 9001, SASSMAQ e ANVISA, além de termos uma área sem igual de engenharia e consultoria de projetos logísticos.
100% da frota de veículos é rastreada e trabalhamos  com a roteirização de cargas através da ferramenta Roadnet (líder mundial). Possuímos sistemas ERP, TMS e WMS (TOTVS).

Established in 1995, Polimeks, renowned for its tourism establishments and architectural structures, has always been among the leading companies in the world.

O günlerde ana faaliyet konusu yassı mamullerin ticareti ve bu mamullerin Lazer, Punch, Plazma, Cnc Abakant teknolojileriyle işlenip kaynak ve boya sonrası yarı mamul ve mamul haline getirilmesiyken günümüzde Askeri, Ticari ve Medikal Soğutucu Ürünler, Elektromobilitie ve Raylı Sistem soğutma Teknolojileri, Savunma Sanayi Soğutma ve Shelter Teknolojileri, Freeze-dry Liyofilizasyon Makineleri üretimi gibi sektörlerde faaliyetlerini sürdürmektedir.

Hizmet Ettiği Sektörler Arasında; Beyaz Eşya, Makine İmalatı, Otomotiv, Tarım Makinaları, Yapı Sanayi, Treyler Sanayi, Savunma Sanayi, İş Makinaları Sanayi, Çelik Konstrüksiyon İmalatlar ve bu sektörlerin yan sanayi kuruluşları bulunmaktadır.

Bugün Manisa Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 18.000 ve Muradiye Organize Sanayi Bölgesi’nde 7.500 m2'lik kapalı alanlarda faaliyet gösteren Öztaş, 10.000 m2'lik ek bir binayı daha devreye almayı planlamaktadır.

Günümüz teknolojisine dinamik teknik ekibiyle ayak uyduran, tasarım ve imalatıyla müşteri taleplerine hızlı çözümler üreten, kaliteli ürünü ekonomik şartlarda temin eden firmamız dünden bugüne sizlerin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak amacıyla yatırımlarına ve büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Aynı zamanda, güçlü bir “Ar-Ge Merkezi” olarak, yenilikçi projeler geliştirmekte ve sektördeki en son teknolojileri takip ederek müşteri memnuniyetini artırmayı hedeflemektedir. Bu sayede, her zaman en güncel çözümleri sunarak, rekabet gücünü arttırmaktadır.

Kimya, enerji, kompozit ve gayrimenkul sektörlerinde faaliyet gösteren Holding bünyesinde, dördü yurt dışında olmak üzere 24 operasyonel şirketi ile 22 üretim tesisi bulunmaktadır. Name: Dallah Albaraka
Description:
Dallah Albaraka was founded in Riyadh by Sheikh Saleh Kamel in 1969 as a small proprietorship and has evolved over a period of forty years into a diversified international conglomerate, incorporating investments in billions in over 40 countries worldwide. The group impacts on almost every sector of economic life, including trade, real-estate, finance, healthcare, transportation and maintenance and operation. 
Dallah Albaraka started its operation in its early days in the field of general services and maintenance, introducing a pioneering example in the contribution of private sector to the public sector’s duties and responsibilities. Other companies followed the lead of Dallah Albaraka after decades.
The contribution of Dallah Albaraka in the governmental services and operation projects expanded to cover transportation and air navigation. Dallah continued performing its unique role and went far beyond geographic boundaries to become an international business enterprise. 
Nowadays, Dallah Albaraka Group recruits more than 60,000 employees worldwide and its investments cover a wide range of economic and business activities in Asia, Africa, Europe and North America. We focus in our business on the development of Muslim countries and societies. We can proudly say that we had a positive impact on the lives of most of the Muslim nations all over the world.
Dallah Albaraka Group has been ranked 5th in the top 100 Saudi companies for the last ten years.
The group has significantly contributed to community development through a number of educational and training institutions. It has recently established a CSR department to pursue the implementation of a wide- range of social development projects.

Since 1936, Juffali has been an active and passionate contributor to the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia's growth and prosperity. With their successful track record over the last eight-decades, and focus on cutting-edge technologies, Juffali is in an ideal position to continue contributing to new developments in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

In light of Saudi Vision 2030, Juffali’s spirit of advancement and commitment to training future thinkers and builders, is more relevant than ever before.

Name: Viyellatexgroup
Description:
It all started as a small family business of knit apparel manufacturing in 1996 and since then has evolved into a rapidly growing multi-dimensional conglomerate. Viyellatex Group considers itself an end-to-end apparel solution provider, starting from sourcing the cotton and going all the way to providing logistical services to its clients.

The company itself is entirely family owned and employs over 300 Management staff and over 15,000 workers. With a vertically integrated setup, the incorporation of advanced technology, and a proficient management team, Viyellatex is emerging strongly as one of the most regarded organizations in the country.  Looking ahead, Viyellatex is focusing more on the front-end of the chain: the end customer. It has further diversified, expanding its presence towards other ventures such as tea production, logistics, engineering, power generation, and educational services.

Viyellatex has one of the best, most dedicated, and most skilled workforces in the country. These are the people with the best talents, commitments, and expertise with a blend of experience and enthusiasm. Name: Kuok Group Singapore
Description:
Kuok Group Singapore (the “Group”) is a global conglomerate with diverse operations in the maritime, real estate, and digital infrastructure sectors. Founded in 1953, the Group has grown into a multi-billion dollar asset base and shares a common heritage with Kuok Brothers in Malaysia and Kerry Holdings Limited in Hong Kong, all established by the Kuok family.

Our subsidiaries include Kuok Maritime Group, Allgreen Properties, and K2 Strategic.

Kuok Maritime Group (KMG) encompasses PaxOcean Group, Pacific Carriers Limited, PACC Offshore Services Holdings, Pacific Workboats Pte Ltd, McPEC Marine & Offshore Engineering Pte Ltd, and KSL Maritime Ventures. KMG provides integrated maritime solutions globally, covering the full maritime value chain from offshore maritime and subsea support services, shipping and transportation, newbuilding, harbour and terminal towage services, as well as turnkey solutions for marine, offshore, energy, market in engineering, procurement, construction and commissioning (EPCC). KMG also supports start-ups with technological and innovative solutions for the industry.

Allgreen Properties’ real estate developments have redefined the places where people live, work and play.

K2 Strategic strengthens the Group’s digital infrastructure capabilities, aiming to empower and connect businesses for the digital economy.

We are dedicated to developing teams and businesses with heart, integrity, and entrepreneurial spirit, creating long-term value for all our stakeholders. Our core values of integrity, effort, unity, compassion, and gratitude guide our actions and decisions as we continue to build on our legacy and innovate for the future.

For more information, visit www.kuokgroup.com.sg.

Name: ODAŞ
Description:
2010’da elektrik üretimiyle başladığımız yolculuğumuzu; enerji, değerli ve stratejik metallerin yer aldığı madencilik ve turizm yatırımlarını kapsayan yüksek katma değerli projelerle sürdürüyoruz. Elektrik üretiminden doğal gaz ticaretine, madencilikten turizme uzanan faaliyetlerimizde sürdürülebilir büyüme ve yenilikçi yaklaşımı esas alıyoruz.

2015’ten itibaren izlediğimiz güçlü finansal stratejilerle kısa sürede Borsa İstanbul Ulusal 100 Endeksi’ne girerek sektörümüzdeki konumumuzu güçlendirdik. 340 MW kurulu güce sahip Çan2 Termik Santralimiz hem bölgeye enerji sağlıyor hem de Türkiye ekonomisine katkı sunuyor. 2021’de gerçekleştirdiğimiz başarılı halka arz sonrası Borsa İstanbul’da işlem görmeye devam ediyor.

Türkiye’deki deneyimimizi uluslararası arenaya taşıyarak, Özbekistan’da doğal gaz kombine çevrim santrali ile ilk yurt dışı yatırımımızı hayata geçirdik. Avrupa ve Ortadoğu’nun stratejik metal üreticilerinden biri olarak, madencilik alanındaki büyümemizi de hız kesmeden sürdürüyoruz. Bugün 2 ülke ve 3 şehirde onlarca sektörün, milyonlarca insanın enerji ihtiyacını karşılıyoruz.

Odağımızda “insan” var anlayışıyla 2023’te üç grup şirketimizle Great Place to Work Sertifikası almaya hak kazandık ve iş yeri kültürü ve çalışan memnuniyeti konusundaki başarımızı tescilledik. 2024’te ise kurumsal itibara katkı sağlayan çalışmalarımızla İtibarlı Baykuş Ödülü’ne, toplumsal sorumluluk anlayışımızla ise Dünya Gazetesi Toplumsal Fayda Ödülleri – Kurumsal Gönüllülük Kategorisi’nde ödüle layık görüldük. Ayrıca, iki şirketimizle yine Türkiye’nin En İyi İşverenler Listesi’nde yer alarak sektördeki liderliğimizi pekiştirdik.

Genç ve dinamik kadromuz, çevik iş modelimiz ve girişimci yeni yatırım fırsatlarında da öncü adımlar atmaya devam ediyoruz. Genç kuşaklara ilham vermek amacıyla kurduğumuz Odaspeople.com platformu ile geleceğin yeteneklerini destekliyoruz.

Bizimle keşfetmeye ve geleceği yeniden tanımlamaya hazır mısınız?

Name: Nasser Bin Khaled and Sons Holdings
Description:
In the early 1950’s, Sheikh Nasser established Nasser Bin Khaled Al Thani Holding with a distinct vision: A commitment to establishing a world-class company, one in which entrepreneurial excellence was the norm, whose innovative and ethical business practices would benefit not only its individual customers, but the state of Qatar as a whole. Then he set about making this vision into a reality.

Under Sheikh Nasser’s guidance, the company quickly became one of the most respected, in-demand operations in the country and the region.
NBK Holding managed the selling and distribution of notable international brands in the Qatari market and, later, enlarged its range of activities to include significant investment, industrial and trade sectors, turning into a key player in the exponentially developing economy of the State of Qatar. 

Over the years, NBK Holding has expanded its portfolio of businesses to include several new companies with diverse operations and has partnered with key multinational organisations. 
Today, Nasser Bin Khaled Holding is a lead provider of premium products and incomparable services, strategically aligning itself world’s best and managing more numerous first-class companies and dealerships such as Mercedes-Benz, Mercedes-Maybach, Mercedes-AMG, Mitsubishi Motors, Mitsubishi Fuso, MG, Lynk&Co, Maxus, Harley Davidson, Bosch, Michelin and Zeibart and MTU. 
Moreover, NBK owns other major companies in the fields of industry, construction, civil engineering, agriculture, real estate, consultancy, and car rental. 

NBK attributes its series of successes to a highly proficient team that has, from the outset, been at the heart of executing major private and public development projects in the country, making NBK's vision Today, the company has earned unprecedented levels of credibility and trust among its clients in Qatar and beyond. A testament to this fact can be found in the company’s strategy.

We have successfully distributed our products to the 17 provinces in Indonesia through our effective and efficient distribution and marketing networks in Sumatera, Kalimantan, Java, Bali, and Southeast Nusa.

For plantations, our main business is harvesting and processing Fresh Fruit Bunch, Crude Palm Oil, Palm Kernel, Crude Palm Kernel Oil, and Palm Kernel Shell. Business activities are in Riau, Jambi, South Sumatera, West Kalimantan, East Kalimantan, West Sulawesi, and Papua.

Description:
ANGEL is the Italian industrial holding company specialized in designing and developing high-tech solutions for the railway, digital mechatronics, and aerospace sectors.

The Group, led by Chairman and Order of Merit of Labor Vito Pertosa, employs more than 3,000 people - 1,400 of them are specialized engineers - with offices in 21 countries. The products and services of the Group’s companies are in use in 73 nations around the world. ANGEL invests approximately 12% of its total revenue in R&D every year.

ANGEL includes: 

-ANGELSTAR: specialized in the design, development, supply of ERTMS on-board signalling and control solutions for railways. 

-BLACKSHAPE: produces high-performance carbon-fiber aircrafts for leisure and training. 

-MATIPAY: a fintech company which has developed an innovative payment and telemetry system for vending machines.

-MERMEC: active in advanced technologies for the world’s railways and rapid transits (signalling, measuring trains and systems, electric traction, telecommunication), urban electric mobility and industrial application. 

-MERMEC ENGINEERING: provides a range of survey, geographic and CAD data, including aerial photography, mapping, LiDAR. It also develops solutions in the strategic fields of computational science, artificial intelligence, applied electromagnetism, radio communications. 

-MERMEC STE: specialized in the design, development, and supply of signaling systems, electric traction infrastructure, and telecommunications solutions for railways.

-SKYCOMM: develops cutting-edge solutions in the field of high-performance On-The-Move antennas for both LEO-MEO-GEO satellite communications and LTE/5G technology.

-SITAEL: develops satellites, advanced propulsion systems, electronics for international space missions.

-VAIMOO: develops and provides complete e-bike sharing solutions for urban mobility, consisting of electric bicycles, charging stations, and apps for using the service.

Name: East African Holding
Description:
East African Holding (EAH) is a leading industrial group in Ethiopia with roots dating back to 1891. EAH has been playing a prominent role in the industrialization of the country and the East African region for several decades. 

As a holding group comprised of several subsidiaries, EAH's companies operate in a variety of sectors such as manufacturing of Fast Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG), agriculture, agro-processing (tea and coffee), printing and packaging, transport, real estate, cement production, and mining. EAH is also involved in importing various essential commodities to the country, as well as exporting of major cash crops such as coffee, tea, pulses, and seeds.  While engaged in such diverse economic activities, EAH continues to evolve and strengthen its position as a major contributor in the development of the private sector in Ethiopia and beyond. Moreover, we take corporate social responsibility seriously, and contribute to society through the Buzuayehu Tadele Foundation. 

Visit our website www.EastAfricanHolding.com, and follow our social media accounts at linktr.ee/EastAfricanHldg to learn more about the monumental work we do.

Creating Wealth through Industries!

In the following year, RFCO Development, the real estate developer of the group, was established in 2018. As a continuation of the successes accomplished by the conglomerate "Ramy Fares Group", SD Solutions, the technical arm of the group, was established in 2021. SD Solutions is responsible for innovative and advanced technological services.

Lastly, RFCO Concrete, the ready-mix concrete company, was established in 2022. RFCO Concrete is responsible for supplying concrete raw materials to various projects.

Name: Blue Capital
Description:
Blue Capital is an innovative investment fund specializing in the insurance and reinsurance sectors. Our approach combines the agility of venture capital with the stability of growth-stage investments, offering investors a balanced and diversified portfolio that spans every facet of these industries, including insurtech, reinsurance, and complementary services. We believe that human talent is the driving force behind growth, and we foster an ecosystem where expertise, innovation, and collaboration create lasting impact.

Our dual investment strategy allocates funds to high-potential insurtech startups leveraging disruptive technologies such as artificial intelligence, blockchain smart contracts, and IoT-based risk assessment tools. Simultaneously, we invest in established insurance and reinsurance companies with strong revenue streams and growth potential, ensuring a stable foundation for our portfolio.

At Blue Capital, we are built on four fundamental pillars: Broking, Expertise, Distribution, and Capital. Through strategic alliances with leading companies in each area, we create a robust network that ensures effective management and continuous expansion in key markets.

With a strong focus on innovation, Blue Capital actively invests in the development of advanced technologies, particularly in artificial intelligence (AI). This initiative empowers businesses to harness cutting-edge technology, optimize operations, enhance decision-making, and unlock new opportunities in an increasingly digitalized market.

 Join us in shaping the future of insurance and reinsurance investments, where human talent and technology come together to drive transformation.

#Insurance #Reinsurance #Insurtech #VentureCapital #Innovation #Blockchain #ArtificialIntelligence #BlueCapitall

Name: Özdilek Holding
Description:
Faaliyetlerini 1967 yılında perakende sektörüyle başlatmış, 1971 yılında tekstil sanayisine yapmış olduğu yatırımla sürdürmüştür.

Perakende sektöründe 193 noktada hizmetlerini sürdürür. Kiralanabilir konseptte 3 alışveriş merkezi, kendi konseptinde ise 11 alışveriş merkezi bulunur. Her Avm’sinde kendisine ait mağazasıyla ve marketiyle hizmet verir. Konsept Avm’lerinde mağaza ve marketin yanı sıra tüm satış operasyonlarını kendisi yürütür. Ayrıca rakiplerinden farklı olarak her noktasındaki hizmet operasyonlarını da kendisi yürütür. Bunlar dışında, 10 hipermarketi, 10 departman mağazası, 159 ev tekstili mağazası bulunur. Avm’lerinde bulunan diğer hizmet alanları: Eğlence merkezi, sinema ve kafe & restorandır.

Ev tekstili sanayisinde, banyo grubunda havlu ve bornoz, yatak odası grubunda ise pike takımı ve nevresim takımı üretir. Modern teknolojiye sahip tam entegre tesislerindeki banyo grubu ürünlere yönelik üretim potansiyeliyle dünyanın sayılı üreticileri arasında yer alır. Yatak odası grubunda ise Türkiye’nin önde gelen markaları arasındadır.

Etkin olduğu alanlar: Alışveriş merkezi, Ar-Ge, eğlence merkezi, enerji, ev tekstili, e-commerce, gıda, inşaat, iş merkezi, ithalat & ihracat, kafe & restoran, sağlıklı yaşam merkezi, perakende, sigorta, sinema, turizm, ziraat ve besi çiftliği.

Cortes Ventures is your partner in building a legacy. Combining our passion for growth, mastery in operations, and strategic acquisitions, we help you realize the dream of a successful exit.

At Cortes Ventures, we bring decades of experience in the digital agency space, making us the ideal strategic partner for agency owners looking to sell. Unlike traditional buyers, we have a deep understanding of the sector’s unique dynamics, enabling us to recognize your agency’s potential and value accurately.

Additionally, our flexibility sets us apart, as we understand that each seller’s needs are unique. Whether you wish to stay involved with the company or part ways completely, we’re open to crafting a deal structure that suits your specific situation.

Finally, we’re in it for the long haul. Our long-term commitment to the digital agency sector testifies to our focus on fostering lasting relationships, even beyond acquisition. When you engage with us, you gain a strategic partner dedicated to delivering an abundance of value, whether we end up acquiring your agency or not.

For more information, access our website: https://cortesventures.com

Dhow Holding is a prominent corporation in the GCC, actively engaged in all the main disciplines of the Industrial, Commercial, F&B, Technology, Healthcare, and Architectural sectors.
 
Backed by two decades of commercial expertise and a proud family heritage spanning more than 110 years in trade and industry, we have earned the trust of our clients by consistently delivering on our commitments. Our strategic alliance with leading global corporations enables us to deliver innovative solutions and services, keeping us at the forefront of modern practices and technology.

Name: BGG S.p.A.
Description:
Bruno Generators Group (BGG) is an Italian company specialized in the design, manufacturing and distribution of power generators. The Group, founded by Bruno family and headquartered in Tribiano (MI) has more than 40 years of history. BGG has 5 production plants: 4 in Italy (Avellino, Bari Milan and Piacenza) and 1 in the UK (Essex).
BGG has a distribution network in more than 70 countries and commercial branches in the UK, Germany, US and Australia.
 
The Group’s offers a full range of generators and related products:
► 4-poles generators: range of medium to large generators with a full range of sound-proof canopies and containers (super silenced generators)
► 2-poles generators: super silenced small portable generators for residential and industrial use
► Generators projects: customised generators to suit special customers’ requests (power stations)
► Lighting Towers: products with LED technology application offering lightweight and compact illumination

Name: Grupo Proeza
Description:
Grupo Proeza is a Portfolio Management Company, headquartered in Monterrey, Nuevo León, Mexico. Focused on building long-term business ecosystems within the Industrial, Agribusiness and Healthcare Industries. Formed by its companies: Metalsa, Proeza Ventures, Citrofrut, Proeza Healthcare and Astrum.

Proeza is composed by a portfolio of companies recognized for their reliability, innovation, and contribution to the development of its employees towards a better society.

Name: S and Z Group
Description: Sultan & Zaman (S & Z Group)  is a prominent UAE-based educational group committed to nurturing care, creativity, and global togetherness. We serve over 14,400 students from 44 nationalities through schools, university campuses, edutainment products, and edtech services. With a focus on sustainability, innovation, and inclusive education, we collaborate with leading boards from the UAE, India, and the UK to equip learners with the skills and values needed for a rapidly changing world. At S and Z, education is a community-driven mission,  blending environment, technology, and social responsibility.

Name: Erciyes Anadolu Holding
Description:
Türkiye sınırlarını aşarak dünyaya uzanan Erciyes Anadolu Holding, bugün mobilyadan tekstile, kimyadan pazarlamaya, demir-çelikten lojistiğe kadar birçok alandaki faaliyetlerini sektör lideri olarak sürdürmektedir. 22 şirkete sahip olan Erciyes Anadolu Holding, 7 ayrı sektörde faaliyet göstermektedir. Erciyes Anadolu Holding çatısı altında, İstikbal,  Mondihome, Hes Kablo, Boyteks ve Form Sünger gibi güçlü markalar bulunuyor.

Türkiye’nin en büyük sanayi kuruluşları arasında yer alan Erciyes Anadolu Holding, entegre üretim anlayışı ve yatırım odaklı yaklaşımı ile hizmet verdiği sektörlere katma değer yaratmaktadır. Holding, 12 binden fazla çalışanı, yurt içi ve yurt dışındaki toplam 2.000 bayisi, yatırımları ve sürdürülebilir büyüme hedefiyle Türkiye ekonomisine ivme kazandırmaya devam ediyor.

Sanayide, yıllık ciro ve yaratılan istihdamla Türkiye’nin önemli holdingleri arasında yer alan Erciyes Anadolu Holding, bugün aralarında Kanada, Belçika, İngiltere, Yunanistan, Rusya, Almanya, İspanya, İtalya ve ABD’nin de bulunduğu 122 ülkeye ihracat gerçekleştirirken, dünya çapında 5 bin’e yakın noktada tüketici ile buluşuyor. Grubumuzun 2023 yılında 559 milyon Amerikan Doları olan ihracatı 2024 yılında yüzde 4’lük artışla 581 milyon Amerikan Doları’na yükseldi. Ülke ekonomisine ihracat ile katkı sağlamak ve uluslararası pazarlarda başarılı sonuçlar almak öncelikli hedeflerimiz arasında yer alıyor.

Her geçen gün faaliyet alanlarını ve yatırımlarını genişleten Erciyes Anadolu Holding, verimliliği benimseyen yönetim anlayışı ve güçlü insan kaynağı ile başarılı büyüme grafiğini devam ettiriyor. İstanbul Sanayi Odası tarafından açıklanan Türkiye’nin En büyük 500 Sanayi Kuruluşu listesinde 4 şirketi ile yer almaktadır.

Ağustos 2016’dan bu yana TMSF kayyımlığında yönetilmeye devam eden Erciyes Anadolu Holding’in 2023 yılında (Ocak-Aralık) 52,9 Milyar TL olan cirosu %36,7’lik artışla 2024 yılında (Ocak-Aralık) 72,3 Milyar TL’ye yükselmiştir.

Name: DCCO
Description:
Com cerca de 30 anos de experiência no mercado, somos representantes da marca Cummins em Goiás, Distrito Federal e Tocatins. E também dos filtros Fleetguard, lubrificantes Valvoline, turbos Holset e transmissões Allison. A DCCO é distribuidor dos equipamentos de construção Komatsu. com toda linha de carregadeiras, escavadeiras, tratores de esteira e motoniveladoras, além de peças e serviços já estão estão disponíveis em todas as nossas unidades. No final de 2018, iniciou a distribuição do maquinário Dynapac, com rolos compactadores, pavimentadoras e recicladores de asfalto.

A DCCO possui, hoje, um quadro com mais de 230 colaboradores e uma frota com mais de 90 veículos para atender os nossos clientes com qualidade e pontualidade.

PRÊMIOS
Certificação Ouro - Excel Cummins
Melhores Empresas para Trabalhar no Centro Oeste - Great Place to Work.
Empresa Solidária - Apae Goiás

PRODUTOS
Comercialização de produtos Cummins: Motores, Filtros e Lubrificantes, Peças Genuínas e Grupos Geradores e Serviços.
Equipamentos Komatsu: Escavadeiras, Carregadeiras, Tratores de Esteira e Motoniveladoras.
Equipamentos Dynapac: Rolos Compactadores, Pavimentadoras e Recicladoras.
Rental: Aluguel de Grupos Geradores, Plataformas Aéreas e Torres de Iluminação.
Transmissões Allison
Energia Solar

Name: Scorpion Capital
Description:
Scorpion Capital, Family Office mexicano, con la firme visión de crear un futuro sostenible y próspero a través de inversiones en sectores clave, diversificadas en bienes raíces, infraestructura civil e industrial, producción de hidrógeno (H2), energías renovables y tratamiento de residuos sólidos urbanos (RSU), y tratamientos de agua (H2O).

En Scorpion Capital, estamos firmemente comprometidos en promover fuentes de energía más limpias y sostenibles, reducir y capturar las emisiones de CO2 y fomentar la producción de hidrógeno (H2) como combustible limpio. Además, implementamos soluciones avanzadas para el tratamiento de residuos sólidos urbanos. Por ello, nuestras inversiones se enfocan en oportunidades estratégicas que identificamos, y desarrollanado proyectos innovadores que transforman el entorno urbano y mejoran la calidad de vida de las comunidades.

Objetivo claro, Futuro seguro!!!

Name: Artan Holding
Description: Artan Holding is a Qatari family-owned holding company with a diverse portfolio of leading businesses in the Education, Real Estate, and Industrial sectors operating primarily in Qatar. Since its founding more than 25 years ago, Artan Holding has played an instrumental role in progressing Qatar’s national agenda of social and economic progress for all. Our core expertise is providing management and functional services to our group companies.

Name: Republica Investment LLC
Description: Republica Investment LTD is a dynamic investment holding company that actively engages in a diverse range of sectors, including food and beverage, retail, hospitality, real estate, and serviced offices & coworking spaces. With a strategic vision to foster growth and innovation, Republica Investment LTD leverages its expertise and capital to build a robust portfolio across these industries. The company is committed to delivering exceptional value to its stakeholders while driving success through long-term investments and operational excellence.

Name: Tadmur Holding W.L.L.
Description:
Tadmur Holding W.L.L. is one of Qatar’s leading business conglomerates, owning and operating a number of multi-disciplinary subsidiaries across the country. Since inception in 1985, our companies have catered to various business sectors through a wide range of products, services and solutions.

Our goal is to inspire and support all of our subsidiaries in continuously reflecting our collective identity as a leading industrial group in Qatar. As Tadmur Holding’s presence in Qatar approaches its three-decade milestone, our subsidiaries utilize our collective experience in the local market to provide the best products, services and business solutions that benefit all our clients and stakeholders. Moreover, the pride with which we uphold our Qatari roots drives us to ensure that, at the root of each corporate undertaking, is the vision of deeper integration into the country’s economic landscape and the objective of a significant contribution towards the realization of Qatar’s National Vision for 2030; all while maintaining unrivalled global standards.

Each of Tadmur’s subsidiaries flourishes under the leadership and perseverance of dedicated teams of skilled, experienced professionals. Each individual team possesses a vast body of knowledge and expertise in their respective fields, and is led by managers and supervisors whose track records speak for themselves.

As our collective workforce engages in realizing our common goals every day, Tadmur Holding provides them with the support and resources required for achieving optimal productivity, namely through offering them a selection of specialized coaching and knowledge
sharing platforms.

While our companies function independently, the synergies achieved have led to the growth and expansion that has placed Tadmur Holding and its group of companies amongst Qatar’s market leaders in multiple industries.

Name: Alturian Group
Description: Alturian is a new age conglomerate business that grows and expands businesses across various verticals in various countries. With offices throughout Asia, we believe in incubating and growing the next generation of business leaders and conducting business in an open and ethical manner by giving back to the communities that we are a part of.
Location: Downtown Core, Central Singapore Community Development Council

Name: Liberty Media
Description: We are Liberty Media Corporation. Based in Englewood, Colorado, we own interests in a high-quality portfolio of assets across the media, entertainment and sports industries. Our interests are attributed to two tracking stocks: Formula One Group and Liberty Live Group.

Name: Zeren Group
Description:
Halihazırda şirketin Onursal Başkanı olan Rıdvan Zeren tarafından 1973 yılında kurulan Zeren Group, Türkiye’deki yarım asrı aşan yolculuğunu global arenada da sürdürüyor. Ekonomiye üretimle verdiği desteğin yanı sıra insana yaptığı yatırımı, iş yapış şekillerinin odağına koyan Zeren Group, enerji, sanayi, gemicilik, profesyonel hizmetler, ticaret, medya ile yeme-içme ve turizm sektörlerinde faaliyet gösteriyor. İştirakleri arasında Alpet, Alfemo, Zeren Metal, Ecogaz, Zeren Energy, MYZ Co Charge, Z Sea Line, Zero Gravity gibi farklı sektörlerden şirketlerin bulunduğu Zeren Group’un, kadın sporunu ve gençleri desteklemek amacıyla faaliyet gösteren ve hem Sultanlar Ligi’nde hem de altyapı liglerinde forma terleten Zeren Spor Kulübü de bulunuyor. Sürdürülebilirliği büyüme stratejisinin merkezine koyan Zeren Group, ana vatanı Türkiye ile birlikte İngiltere, Hollanda, Karadağ, İsviçre ve Birleşik Arap Emirlikleri’ndeki ofisleriyle faaliyetlerini sürdürüyor.

Founded in 1973 by Rıdvan Zeren, who is currently the Honorary Chairman of the company, Zeren Group continues its journey spanning over half a century in Turkey on the global stage. In addition to supporting the economy through production, Zeren Group focuses on investing in people and doing business in a way that puts them first. It operates in the energy, industrial, shipping, professional services, trade, media, food and beverage, and tourism sectors. The Zeren Group's subsidiaries include companies from various sectors such as Alpet, Alfemo, Zeren Metal, Ecogaz, Zeren Energy, MYZ Co Charge, Z Sea Line, and Zero Gravity. The group also includes the Zeren Sports Club, which supports women's sports and young people and competes in both the Sultanlar Ligi and the infrastructure leagues. With sustainability at the heart of its growth strategy, Zeren Group operates from offices in its home country of Turkey, as well as in the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Montenegro, Switzerland, and the United Arab Emirates.

Name: Açık Holding
Description:
We are an international innovative technology company with operations in telecommunication and information technologies, aviation and defense industry, building industry and operational technologies, and health technologies with over 3000 employees in 20+ countries across Europe, Asia, the USA, and the Middle East. For over 20+ years, we have bundled our market knowledge with future-oriented technologies and services. 

Açık Holding generates value for the present and the future with its sense of corporate management at international standards, innovative, fair, effective and agile structure.

The success within the sectors in which it operates is based on the high-quality production using high-level technologies, innovative material selection, professional product development and honesty & trust.

Açık Holding's secret for success relies on three points: Innovation, Technology and Future. Our focus is always on people. All industries in which we operate play an important role in the development of future-oriented solutions for people. 

The strategic approach of Açık Holding is based on; who always puts quality and value production at the forefront, it has an advanced technological and solution-oriented approach. The concept of "sustainability’’ which is the locomotive of the goal of creating value, is at the center of the business model.

Name: COFRA Holding AG
Description: COFRA Holding AG is a privately held group of companies active in various business sectors, including asset management (Anthos Fund & Asset Management), private equity investment management (Bregal), apparel retail (C&A), sustainable food (Dalsem, Ontario Plants), real estate investments (Redevco) and renewable energy (Sunrock). Headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, the group employs more than 60,000 people across its business operations in Europe, the Americas and Asia. Each business operates independently in a spirit of engaged entrepreneurship while striving to be a “force for good” in the world – a guiding principle that has characterised the Brenninkmeijer family owners’ activities for six generations, since the founding of C&A in 1841.

Name: Grupo Mascarello
Description:
O Grupo Mascarello carrega um legado de inovação, crescimento e compromisso com o desenvolvimento sustentável. Atuamos nos setores de mobilidade, loteamentos e agronegócio, impulsionando a economia e melhorando a qualidade de vida nas comunidades onde estamos presentes. Nosso foco é gerar valor, promover responsabilidade social e construir soluções que conectam presente e futuro.

Conheça as empresas do grupo:
https://linktr.ee/Grupo_Mascarello

Name: DAMAC Group
Description:
DAMAC Group is a global private business conglomerate founded by Hussain Sajwani in 1982. Starting in catering and logistics, it has expanded into diverse industries, including real estate, hospitality, data centers, fashion, and capital markets. With a presence across Europe, North America, Asia, and MENA, DAMAC is recognized for its innovation and luxury offerings.

DAMAC Properties, established in 2002, is one of the largest real estate developers in the Middle East, delivering over 47,000 homes with projects in Dubai, London, Miami, and more. It collaborates with global brands like Versace, Cavalli, and de GRISOGONO to create iconic living experiences. The Group also owns hotel assets under brands such as Radisson, Paramount, and Rotana, with an expanding hospitality portfolio.

Beyond real estate, DAMAC is a leader in the data center industry through EDGNEX and has acquired luxury brands Roberto Cavalli and de GRISOGONO. Through DAMAC Capital, it invests in future-focused industries like tech, finance, and life sciences. Committed to social impact, the Hussain Sajwani – DAMAC Foundation supports education, innovation, and community-driven initiatives.

Name: Mammut World Group
Description: دنيای ماموت به عنوان تخصصیترین و بزرگترين تولید كننده انواع تریلر، انواع كانتينر، ساندویچ پانل، اتاقهای ايزوله، خانههای پیش ساخته و كانكس در خاورمیانه شناخته میشود. کاربران و مشتریان دنيای ماموت میتوانند با حق انتخابی بسیار بالا و با دریافت اطلاعاتی کامل برای انتخاب درست محصولات مورد نظر خود، به وب سايت مراجعه نمايند.

Name: Polat Holding
Description:
Kalite, şeffaflık ve güven ilkelerinden ayrılmadan yenilikçi vizyonuyla faaliyetlerine devam eden Polat, 70 yıldır sürdürülebilir bir gelecek yaratmak amacıyla çalışıyor. Türkiye istihdamına güç katan Polat farklı sektörlerdeki şirketleriyle yatırımlarını artırırken, geliştirdiği uluslararası iş birlikleriyle küresel pazarlarda önemli bir oyuncu olmayı sürdürüyor.

Temelleri 1955 yılında atılan Polat, ülkemizin en değerli ve güvenilen markalarından biri olmanın haklı gururunu taşıyor. Polat markası, tüm yatırım alanlarında, ekosistem ve insan refahını önceliğine alan projeler geliştiriyor.   

Kuruluşundan bugüne; başta gayrimenkul, enerji, sanayi ve teknoloji olmak üzere Türkiye’nin lokomotif sektörlerine yatırım yapan Holding, grup şirketleriyle yarattığı sinerjiyle ülke ekonomisine katma değer yaratmaya devam ediyor.

Name: Bakheet Holding بخيــت القابضـة
Description: Bakheet Holding Company is the parent company to a range of subsidiaries which include Bakheet Company for Machinery, Ghina Real Estate Company, Modern Motorworks, Bakheet Fixed Concept, Asahal Equipment Rental, and Taibah.

Name: EXCELLENCE GROUP
Description:
Excellence is a group of companies that caters effective business solutions to various sectors with the means of contemporary tools that are contingent at the present-day requirements.

Through the years, Excellence has grown its finance industry to education, trading, corporate services, software development and more.

Name: Azhar Holding
Description: مجموعة تكاملية ترتقي باستثمارات ضمن قطاعات حيوية برؤية منهجية تُعزّز الريادة والنمو المستدام.

Name: Pure Gold Group
Description:
Pure Gold Group is a UAE-headquartered diversified business group operating across Jewellery Retail, Jewellery Manufacturing, Real Estate Development & Leasing, Business Advisory, and Executive Search. Founded on a legacy of trust and innovation, the Group continues to grow its presence across key markets, delivering long-term value across every venture.

The retail business operates multiple stores across the region along with a travel retail arm. The Group’s real estate arm, Pure Gold Living, is redefining luxury living with boutique residential and commercial developments across the UAE. Through PG Advisory, the Group provides business advisory services, while PG Search focuses on building senior leadership teams through specialized executive search solutions.

Name: aassio group
Description:
Founded in 2010, aassio group is a diversified, private holding company that is established to create opportunities for entrepreneurial activities through its running of small and medium enterprises along with supporting individuals who wish to pursue their business ambitions.
aassio group works with decentralized teams to deliver business solutions, products and services in parts of Europe, Asia, Africa and North America.
We assist businesses and individuals across multiple industry sectors to breakthrough, develop and establish themselves as pioneers in leading global marketplaces. Our collective expertise nurtures growth and capabilities in E-Commerce, Management Consulting, Human Resources & Recruitment, Wholesale Distribution and Tourism.

Name: The Red Users
Description:
The Red Users is a future-ready technology company focused on building impactful digital solutions across diverse sectors. We specialize in crafting intelligent platforms, automation tools, and scalable systems that drive innovation and solve real-world challenges.

Founded with a vision to redefine how people interact with technology, The Red Users blends design, engineering, and strategy to deliver high-performance digital products. Our approach is rooted in simplicity, security, and purpose—ensuring that every solution we create makes a meaningful difference.

Whether you're a business looking to streamline operations, a startup seeking tech empowerment, or a visionary chasing bold ideas—The Red Users is your partner in progress.

Name: Demirören Yatırım Holding
Description:
Bu yıl iş hayatındaki 57. yılımızı kutluyoruz. Ülkemize hizmet etme heyecanımız ve hep geleceğe yönelik davranma tutkumuz hala ilk günlerimizdeki kadar canlı ve güçlü. Bu nedenle, yıldönümümüzü kutlarken geriye bir dönüp bakmak ve geçmişimizi değerlendirmek istiyorum. Geçtiğimiz 53 yılı gözden geçirmeyi isteyişim, pek çok zorluğun üstesinden gelmiş, gelişmesi sırasında çeşitli engelleri aşmış genç bir kuruluşa duyduğum hasretten kaynaklanmıyor. Geçmişimizin bir değerlendirmesini yapmayı, ancak geçmişlerini doğru değerlendirenlerin kendilerine daha iyi bir gelecek kurabileceklerine inandığım için istiyorum.

O günlerde, yani 53 yıl önce, Türkiye'de likid petrol gazı (LPG) dağıtımı yapacak ilk şirketi kurmak büyük cesaret ve sorumluluk duygusu gerektiriyordu. Attığımız bu adım aynı zamanda altyapıya, bina ve makinalara yapılan yüklü bir yatırım anlamına da geliyordu. Demirören'den başka hiçbir grup da böylesi iddialı bir yatırıma girmeye cesaret edemezdi. Biz ettik, çünkü kendimizi ülke hizmetine adamanın bize getireceği itibarın başka herşeyden daha değerli, daha önemli olduğu inancındaydık. Geriye dönüp baktığımda, hedeflerimize erişmiş olduğumuzu görerek gurur duyuyorum. Bugün, enerji sektöründen sınai üretime kadar pek çok dalda rekabet eden Demirören Grubunun emsalsiz bir itibara sahip olduğunu biliyorum. Sosyol konulara ve eğitim hizmetlerine yönelik güçlü ve yaygın programlarımız var. Başardıklarımızdan hem gurur hem de büyük haz duyuyoruz. Bugüne gelirken atlattığımız badireleri, aştığımız engelleri düşündükçe bu duygularımız artıyor. 45 yıl önce önümüze koyduğumuz hedeflere ulaştığımıza göre artık geleceği planlamaya başlamalıyız.

Demirören gibi şirketler küreselleşen dünyada Türkiye'nin en büyük kozları sayılmalıdır. Dünya piyasalarına tümüyle entegreyiz ve bu piyasalarda en üst düzeydeki teknolojik altyapımızla rekabet ediyoruz. İnsan kaynaklarımıza sürekli yatırım yaparken en yüksek ürün kalitesine erişmemizi sağlayacak standartlar uyguluyoruz.

Name: LE BRIEF
Description:
𝐁𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐮𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐫 𝐋𝐄 𝐁𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐅, 𝐯𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐳-𝐯𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐧𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐝𝐞 𝐥’𝐞́𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐠𝐢𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐞 !

Nous sommes bien plus qu’une simple chaîne dédiée à l’actualité énergétique. 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐪𝐮𝐞 𝐬𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐝𝐢, 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐫𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐠𝐚𝐳𝐢𝐧𝐞 𝐡𝐞𝐛𝐝𝐨𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐯𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞 𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐚𝐥𝐲𝐬𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐥𝐞̀𝐭𝐞 𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐞́𝐯𝐞́𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐪𝐮𝐢 𝐟𝐚𝐜̧𝐨𝐧𝐧𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐥’𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐮𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞 𝐩𝐞́𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐞̀𝐫𝐞 𝐚̀ 𝐥’𝐞́𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚𝐥𝐞. Nous décortiquons les enjeux géopolitiques, économiques, et stratégiques pour vous offrir une vision claire et détaillée des mouvements sur les marchés du pétrole et de l’énergie.

Restez connectés à l’actualité mondiale avec LE BRIEF, et découvrez l’énergie sous toutes ses facettes !

Description: Alturian is a new age conglomerate business that grows and expands businesses across various verticals in various countries. With offices throughout Asia, we believe in incubating and growing the next generation of business leaders and conducting business in an open and ethical manner by giving back to the communities that we are a part of.
Location: Downtown Core, Central Singapore Community Development Council

Name: JFS Holdings Limited
Description:
Welcome to JFS Holdings, one of the most passionate companies in Sri Lanka reaching one billion equity by 2028, with expertise across four different industries. Established in 2012, From its initial offering as an HR service provider for local companies, the company has expanded its portfolio and diversified across multiple sectors, while staying true to its core values of sustainable development and creating value for its customers.

At JFS Holdings, we believe in the power of "Thinking Big", which has led us to venture into diverse industries such as Information Communication Technology (ICT), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Ago Food and Action sports. Our ability to dominate each of these sectors is a testament to our unwavering commitment to excellence and innovation.

At our company, we pride ourselves on our diversity and ability to provide complete solutions to our customers through every channel of our fields. Our range of services includes Staff Augmentations, providing Dedicated Teams, Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Website Development, and Mobile App Development in the Information and Communication Technology (ICT) sector. The ICT sector accounts for the biggest contribution to our company revenue, at 40%.
In addition to ICT services, we also provide Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) services to local and overseas clients. As a trusted partner, we take over the business process partially or completely, acting as the employer of record for offshore resources of global companies. BPO services contribute 18% to our company revenue.
Our Agro Food sector is where innovation mostly happened, and our brand name RAVINE manufactures finely ground flour and spices that meet international standards. As a leading exporter of premium quality spices, provide our clients with the world's finest Ceylon cinnamon, clove, black pepper, cardamom, and nutmeg. Ator global no setor da construção e das concessões, a VINCI concebe, financia, constrói e gere infraestruturas e equipamentos, serviços e soluções, que contribuem para a melhoria do quotidiano e da mobilidade de todos.

Os 8 princípios do Manifesto VINCI são a orientação pela qual a VINCI Energies em Portugal pauta o seu crescimento de forma responsável, tendo sempre em conta os interesses e preocupações dos seus colaboradores, investidores, clientes, parceiros e a comunidade em geral.

A ambição constante da VINCI Energies, no exercício dos seus 5 valores fundamentais, é criar um ambiente que permita a cada um realizar a plenitude dos seus talentos. Trabalhar na VINCI Energies significa contribuir para progressos que tornam o dia-a-dia mais inteligente, ágil e seguro enquanto se prepara rapidamente um futuro mais humano e sustentável. A VINCI Energies encontra-se ainda totalmente empenhada em contribuir para um ambiente de trabalho totalmente seguro para todos os seus colaboradores.

VINCI Energies no mundo, em 2020: receitas de 13,7 mil milhões de euros // 83.800 colaboradores // 55 países.

At Triangle Group, our rich heritage and forward-looking vision converge, propel us ever forward in our pursuit of excellence and innovation.

2. Revenue & Profitability Centers:

Otomotiv sektöründe Fiat bayiliği ile Konya ili marka liderliğini yıllardır elinde bulundurmaktadır. 2019 yılı başında Jeep ve Alfa Romeo satış showroomu hizmete açılmış olup bu markaların yanı sıra Chrysler, Lancia ve Dodge markalarının da servis hizmetleri verilmektedir. Ayrıca ikinci el satış hizmeti de sunulmakta olup, 2024 yılı itibariyle Jaecoo, 2025 yılı itibariyle ise BYD bayiliği hizmeti de vermektedir.

Tuz Gölü’ndeki modern üretim tesisleriyle Türkiye’nin en büyük tuz üreticisi konumunda olan Koyuncu Grup Türkiye tuz ihracatının %50’sini tek başına gerçekleştirmektedir. Bursa’da bulunan likit tuz tesisinde tekstil sektörüne yönelik yüksek kalite rafine sıvı tuz üretilmektedir.

Koyuncu Grup; 9 ilde 21 araç muayene istasyonu ile TÜVTÜRK’ün en büyük iş ortağıdır.

Konya ve Ankara'da bulunan 19,88 MWp kurulu güce sahip olan 10 adet güneş enerjisi santrali ile çevre dostu elektrik üretimi gerçekleştirmektedir.

Shell ve Total Energies markaları ile, Konya il merkezi ve Sarayönü ilçesinde toplam 5 adet akaryakıt istasyonu işleten Koyuncu Grup, bu alanda Konya il marka liderliğini de sürdürmektedir.

Afyon Sandıklı'da yer alan 10 hektarlık alanda topraksız tarım yöntemiyle doğal salkım domates yetiştiriciliği yapılmaktadır.

Konya'da faaliyet gösteren son teknoloji makine ve ekipmanlarla donatılmış modern bir kimyasal ürün tesisi olan Klor Alkali Kimya tesisimizde yüksek saflıkta tuz ve çevre dostu üretim yöntemleri kullanılmaktadır.

Koyuncu Grup, Aselsan ortaklığında Konya'da en büyük özel sektör ortağı konumundadır.

Name: Arctic Slope Regional Corporation
Description:
Arctic Slope Regional Corporation (ASRC) is owned by and represents the business interests of its nearly 14,000 Iñupiaq shareholders. Corporate headquarters are based in Utqiaġvik, Alaska, with administrative and subsidiary offices located in Anchorage and throughout the United States. 

As the largest Alaskan-owned company - employing nearly 12,000 people worldwide - the corporation serves shareholders who primarily reside in the eight villages within the North Slope region: Point Hope, Point Lay, Wainwright, Atqasuk, Utqiaġvik (also known as Barrow), Nuiqsut, Kaktovik and Anaktuvuk Pass. Shareholders are also located throughout other regions of Alaska and the Lower 48. 

ASRC and its family of companies operate six diverse lines of business, including government services, petroleum refining and marketing, energy support services, industrial services, construction and resource development. 

ASRC has been ranked #1 as the largest Alaskan-owned and operated business for over 20 years.

Name: Care n Cure Group
Description:

Driven by his passion for business, he transitioned into a medical representative and began his entrepreneurial journey by opening Care n Cure's first retail pharmacy, Corniche Pharmacy.

Today Care n Cure serves Qatar's pharmaceutical needs through 60+ retail pharmacies with 1000+ employees to serve 24/7. 

Care n Cure group has grown over the years with the Founder's vision by diversifying & expanding the business into Industrial Trading, Distribution, Information & Technology, Digital Surveillance & Security Systems across the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Southeast Asia & India. 
 
Businesses & Sectors:- 

Care n Cure Pharmacy - 60+ Retail Pharmacies

Care n Cure Trading - Pharmaceutical Distribution to over 400+ pharmacies

Hydrocare Trading - Exclusive Industrial Automobile dealer of Hydraulics & Filters with 16+ outlets

Al Ghaliya Computer Systems - IT Service Provider. 

Carecom - Systems Integrator Servies.

Al Qimma Security Systems - Digital Surveillance & Security Systems.

FMCG - Distribution division that handles 24+ brands like Amul chocolates, Plum Cosmetics, Good Day Coffee, Belo Cosmetics, Yoko Cosmetics, and much more having 2000+ products.

Name: REITAN AS
Description:
REITANs visjon er å bli kjent som det mest verdidrevne selskapet. 

REITAN er et holdingselskap som utøver aktivt eierskap gjennom selvstendige selsakper. Som eier bidrar vi med å videreutvikle selskapene gjennom å være en pådriver i arbeidet med strategi, struktur, kultur og finansielle standarder.

Vi har virksomhet i syv land i Norden og Baltikum. Våre største selskaper er Reitan Retail, hvor all handelsvirksomhet er samlet, og Reitan Eiendom. 

Vår oppgave er å bygge flest mulig vinnere, skape en robust virksomhet og bidra til fellesskapet. I REITAN jobber vi hver dag for å være «verdens beste» eier, noe som krever fokus på logiske og effektive selskapsstrukturer, bygging av en sterk bedriftskultur og etablering av solide finansielle standarder.

Name: Aurora Vision Group
Description:
Aurora Vision Group | Empowering Iconic Brands to Shape the Future of Lifestyle

Aurora Vision Group is where exceptional lifestyle brands thrive. We empower iconic brands that elevate daily experiences, set new standards of quality, and captivate global audiences. With a focus on strategic growth and brand authenticity, we curate and nurture brands that redefine what it means to be culturally relevant and enduring.

As leaders in lifestyle branding, we’re not just building brands—we’re creating legacies that inspire for generations. Discover how we’re shaping the future of iconic lifestyle.

Name: Ominvest
Description: Ominvest is one of the largest listed investment companies in the region. Founded in 1983, it has been consistently profitable and has an enviable track record of uninterrupted dividend payments to shareholders. As of 2023 year end, the company’s total assets stood at USD$ 3.4 billion covering diverse sectors, including Banking, Insurance, Finance and Leasing, Financial Investments, Private Equity and Investment Banking. The company’s assets cover diversified geographies including the GCC and Asia in addition to significant investments in global capital markets. It shares its experiences, visions and concerns on the future of content management innovation with its clients, providing them with an insight into tomorrow’s innovation services and solutions and giving them the upper hand. Name: Hili Ventures
Description:
Hili Ventures is the holding company of a diversified group with a deep rooted entrepreneurial heritage dating back to 1923. Through its divisions, Hili Ventures is engaged in food service & retail, real estate & hospitality, shipping, logistics, oil and gas & engineering, and technology in 10 countries across Europe and North Africa with a team of 13,000 people.
 
From its headquarters in Malta, Hili Ventures steers its subsidiaries towards continued growth in selected sectors and markets. Hili Ventures is a proud partner of McDonald's, Apple, Konecranes, Microsoft, NCR, Six Senses and many other global brands.

We have two priorities: growing our business and supporting our people to grow in their personal and professional lives. Our secret? Opportunity. As we're growing fast, there are always exciting career opportunities on offer across our footprint. We train, mentor and inspire so everyone can be the best they can be. We run group-wide management training programmes, so, as talent develops, we'll be able to match it with greater opportunity. You can grow within one company or across the group. We'll even help you move to another city or country to join other members of the Hili Ventures family. Do 'You Belong Here' with us too?

Name: Al Handal International Group
Description:
When humble beginnings are combined with a man that possesses a truly aspirational vision, success is not only eminent but guaranteed. This was how the late Haji Noori Ayyed Al Handal began his career in 1940s. With determination, unwavering perseverance, and long tiresome years filled with struggles, Haji Noori Ayyed managed to break through the mold and establish small and medium enterprises in Iraq.

These enterprises are now the cornerstone of established companies that specialize in Banking, Real Estate Development, Tourism, Hospitality, and others. Although the group is rooted in Baghdad, our branches and projects span across the United Arab Emirates, and Turkey.

Name: Nakkaş Holding
Description:
Hakkımızda

Nakkaş Holding, Türkiye’nin ekonomik gücünü uluslararası arenada temsil etmek ve sürdürülebilir büyüme sağlamak amacıyla, farklı sektörlerde başarıyla faaliyet gösteren grup şirketlerini tek bir çatı altında birleştirerek kurulmuştur.

“Petrol ve Rafine Ürünler”, “Yenilenebilir Enerji”, “Sanayi”, “Hizmet” ve “Madencilik” olmak üzere beş ana sektörde faaliyet gösteren Nakkaş Holding, 40 yılı aşkın deneyime sahip şirketlerin bilgi birikimini ortak bir vizyonla bir araya getirmektedir. Transpet, Global Gas Trans, Global Terminal Hizmetleri, Saves Enerji, GGG Petrolleri, Türk Ytong, Be Aero ve Nakkaş Madencilik gibi sektörlerinde öncü markaları bünyesinde barındırmaktadır.

Yaklaşık 3.000 çalışanıyla Nakkaş Holding; yenilikçi çözümler, ileri teknolojiler ve uluslararası standartlara uyumlu yaklaşımıyla paydaşlarına, çalışanlarına ve topluma sürdürülebilir değer katmayı hedeflemektedir.

About Us

Nakkaş Holding was established to bring together its group companies operating successfully across various sectors under a single roof, with the aim of representing Türkiye’s economic power internationally and achieving sustainable growth.

Operating in five main sectors—Petroleum and Refined Products, Renewable Energy, Industry, Services, and Mining—Nakkaş Holding combines the expertise of companies with more than 40 years of experience. Its portfolio includes leading brands such as Transpet, Global Gas Trans, Global Terminal Services, Saves Enerji, GGG Petrolleri, Türk Ytong, Be Aero, and Nakkaş Mining.

With nearly 3,000 employees, Nakkaş Holding focuses on innovation, advanced technologies, and compliance with international standards to create sustainable value for its stakeholders and society.

Name: United Group
Description:
Yatırım ve ticaret yolculuğuna 1974 yılında otomotiv sektöründe başlayan United Group, bugün faaliyetlerini; Entegre Tesis Yönetim hizmetleri, Güvenlik, Profesyonel Temizlik, İnşaat, Otomotiv ve Teknoloji sektörlerinde sürdürmektedir. 
2014 yılında yaşadığı değişim ve dönüşümle birlikte, farklı sektörlere yatırım yaparak her geçen yıl hızla büyüyen ve gelişen bir yapıya kavuşan United Group, müşteri merkezli hizmet anlayışı ve sürdürülebilir büyüme odaklı bir stratejiyle ilerlemektedir.
United Group, 100’den fazla idari kadro ve 4000’i aşkın saha çalışanıyla Türkiye’nin 67 ilinde, İstanbul Genel Merkezi ve Ankara Bölge Ofisiyle müşterilerine, hizmet verdiği her alanda entegre çözümleri yüksek kaliteyle sunmakta olan bir kuruluştur. 
United Group, milli ve kültürel değerlerden ödün vermeden, küreselleşen dünyanın iş ve rekabet koşullarına uygun şekilde tüm toplumun faydalanacağı hizmetler sunarak Türkiye Ekonomisi’ne katkı sağlamayı hedeflemektedir. “Birlikte, Daha Güçlü” sloganıyla vizyonunu net bir şekilde ortaya koyan United Group, hedeflerine ulaşmak için çıktığı yolculukta en önemli paydaşı olarak United Group Çalışanlarını görmektedir. 
Sahip olduğu geniş hizmet, bilgi ve iş birliği ağını hedeflerine ulaşmada en iyi şekilde değerlendiren United Group, standart belirleyen, keşfederek ilerleyen küresel bir oyuncu olma vizyonuyla, ülke ekonomisine faydalı olacağına inandığı iş birliği ve yatırım fırsatlarını incelemeyi sürdürmektedir. 
İşine tutkuyla bağlı çalışanları ve bilimsel yönetim odaklı hizmet anlayışıyla United Group, müşterilerinin hayatlarını kolaylaştırarak değer yaratmak ve onlara en güvenilir hizmeti sunarak her birinin içini rahat ettirmek için tüm gücüyle çalışmaktadır.

GRUP ŞİRKETLERİ:

UFS Kurumsal Hizmetler | UNTD İnşaat | Ortem | Mahrek Teknoloji | Ottomotive

Name: Viohalco
Description:
Viohalco S.A. (VIO) is a Belgium-based holding company of leading metal processing companies in Europe. With production facilities in Greece, Bulgaria, Romania, North Macedonia, the United Kingdom, and participations in companies with production facilities in Turkey, Russia and the Netherlands, a strong commercial network in 18 countries and sales in more than 95 countries worldwide, Viohalco companies focus on technological advancement and specialise in the manufacture of aluminium, copper, cables, steel and steel pipes products The Viohalco companies are committed to sustainable manufacturing of high-quality, innovative products and solutions for dynamic and promising markets such as: building and construction, packaging, transportation (automotive, shipbuilding & rail), energy networks (offshore energy, utilities & power grids, renewable energy, gas & liquid fuels), HVAC&R (heating, ventilation, air conditioning & refrigeration), water supply, telecommunications, printing, and various industrial applications.

Viohalco’s dedicated R&D&I and technology segment focuses on product innovation, industrial research, technological development, engineering applications and ERP application services.

Viohalco is also active in the real estate sector, through a Real Estate Investment Company (REIC) with a diversified and high-quality portfolio spanning offices, shopping centres, hotels & logistics.

Across all segments, the companies offer products and services that closely align with current global sustainability megatrends. This reflects their ability to meet the evolving needs of customers and their drive to operate sustainably.

Viohalco companies’ products cater directly to megatrends such as circular economy, reflected in demand for recyclable products, with high recycled content, transition to climate neutrality, sustainable urbanization reflected in energy efficient buildings and e-mobility, and technological advancements & digitalization.

Name: Erdemoğlu Holding
Description:
Üretim faaliyetlerine 1970 yılında 2 adet kilim dokuma tezgâhı ile başlayan Erdemoğlu Ailesi, 1990 yılında Erdemoğlu Halı San. ve Tic. A.Ş.'yi kurmuş, 1998 yılında ise isim değişikliği yaparak, firmanın adını Merinos Halı San. ve Tic. A.Ş. olarak değiştirmiştir. 

Bünyesine daha sonra Dinarsu, Padişah markalarını da katan, halının yanı sıra mobilya, ev tekstili ve iplik sektörlerinde de büyük yatırımlar yapan firma, 2010 yılında tüm şirketlerini tek bir çatı altında toplayarak Erdemoğlu Holding’i kurmuştur. Yaptığı yatırımlarla her geçen gün büyüyen Erdemoğlu Holding markalaşma yolunda önemli aşamalar kaydetmiş, 2012 yılı itibariyle 65 ülkede temsil edilen dev bir kuruluşa dönüşmüştür. Bugün Merinos, Dinarsu, Padişah, Efsane ve Boğaziçi markaları ile parça halıda dünya lideri olmasının yanı sıra, mobilya, ev tekstili ve iplik sektörlerinde de piyasanın güçlü oyuncuları arasında yer alan Erdemoğlu Holding, gerçekleştirdiği sosyal sorumluluk projeleriyle de ülke insanına hizmet etmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: CoreX Holding BV
Description:
CoreX Holding is a highly diversified, vertically integrated, global industrial conglomerate established in 2024 by Robert Yüksel YILDIRIM after 35 years of his vast industrial, financial, and operational experience at YILDIRIM Group. With financial headquarters in Amsterdam, the Netherlands, and operational headquarters in Istanbul, Türkiye, CoreX is dedicated to creating new success stories through a visionary approach and exponential growth under the leadership and vision of its founder, Robert Yüksel YILDIRIM.

CoreX operates in 10 sectors, including metals & mining, ports & terminals, green energy, shipping & logistics, infrastructure & construction, oil & gas, chemicals, international trading, financial investments, and venture capital. The company is active in 55 countries across 5 continents, employing over 20,000 people globally. As a profit-driven company, CoreX intends to focus on its future growth, utilizing its deep experience and extensive business know-how.

With a legacy of excellence, the group is committed to expanding and evolving its core businesses while maintaining the highest standards of quality in its products and services.
Capital Partners operates across five key verticals: Retail (Discount Stores), Distribution, Real Estate Development, Trading, Logistics, and Agriculture. Its diverse portfolio includes well-established businesses such as Tawfeer, Euroland, Prologistics, and Agro-Catalonia, each playing a vital role in driving growth and innovation within their respective industries.

Description:

Originally established as a family business, Delham has grown into a leading manufacturer and brand developer, known for its commitment to quality, creativity, and excellence across the region.
 
Our portfolio includes a range of successful brands in the packaged confectionery space, offering high-quality products crafted with precision and innovation. Through continuous investment in manufacturing excellence, product innovation, and impactful visual design, we have built a reputation for delivering exceptional experiences to our consumers both locally and in key international markets.
 
Today, Delham is expanding its footprint beyond manufacturing, with strategic initiatives in distribution and brand partnerships across the FMCG sector. We aim to become a trusted platform for global and regional brands seeking growth in the Saudi and GCC markets.
 
Driven by a spirit of entrepreneurship and a deep understanding of our consumers, Delham continues to evolve — connecting tradition with modernity, and local expertise with global ambition.

Description:

Porsche SE is a holding company with investments in the areas of mobility and industrial technology. In particular, it holds the majority of the ordinary shares in Volkswagen AG, one of the leading automobile manufacturers in the world. In addition to the investment in Volkswagen, the Porsche SE Group holds 25 percent plus one share of the ordinary shares in Porsche AG. Furthermore, Porsche SE owns a stake in the PTV Group, which was fully consolidated until 31 December 2021, as well as non-controlling interests in several technology companies based in the USA, Israel and Germany.

The investment strategy of Porsche SE aims to create sustainable value for its shareholders. This is based on the increase in value of assets under management as well as dividend distributions. The investments of Porsche SE fall into two categories. The first category includes the long-term core investment in Volkswagen AG and Porsche AG. The second category comprises portfolio investments that Porsche SE generally holds for a  temporary period of time. Typically, such investments are characterized by their high potential for growth and for increasing value during the holding period. The sector focus in both investment categories is on mobility and industrial technology.

Description:
Ergun Gürsoy Holding şirketlerinin temelleri 1973 yılında atılmıştır.

Lojistik, inşaat, medya ve sigorta sektörlerinde alanlarında uzman çalışanlarıyla faaliyet gösteren Ergun Gürsoy Holding, %100 iştiraki olan 11 farklı firma ile Türkiye ekonomisine katkıda bulunmaktadır.

Ergun Gürsoy Lojistik şirketleri kuruluşlarından bu yana geçen 50 yılı aşkın sürede, özellikle otomotiv lojistiği alanında kazandığı birikim ve tecrübe ile Türkiye’nin en önemli oyuncularından biri olmuştur. Özmal tır filosu, İzmit-Gölcük ve Bursa’da bulunan tesisleri ve iş ortaklarıyla beraber Türkiye’nin önde gelen otomotiv üreticilerinin tercih ettiği uzun soluklu çözüm sağlayıcısıdır.

Gürsoy İnşaat, 1993 yılından bu yana gerçekleştirdiği projeleriyle özelikle ticari yapı alanlarında müşterilerine kaliteli ve güvenli çözümler sunmaktadır. Türkiye’nin 7 coğrafi bölgesine yayılmış onlarca farklı projeyi, alanında uzman ekipleri ve iş ortaklarıyla beraber başarıyla tamamlamıştır.

Ergun Gürsoy Medya Grubu, firmalarıyla yaratıcı, etkili ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışını ön plana çıkarmaktadır. Fortune Turkiye 500 sıralamalarında en üst sıralarda yer alan 100’e yakın müşteri portföyü, teknolojik alt yapısı ve alanında uzman çalışan kadrolarıyla sektörün çok üzerinde büyüme hızını yakalamıştır.

Ergun Gürsoy Holding’in toplumsal sorumluluk alanlarından biri olan eğitim vakfı, gençlerin eğitimine destek sağlamaktadır. Türkiye genelinde fırsat eşitliği yaratmak ve nitelikli eğitim imkânları sunmak için çalışmalarını sürdürmektedir.

Ergun Gürsoy Holding kurucularının girişimci ruhunu alanında uzman ekipleriyle yaşatan kültürüyle önümüzdeki yıllarda da hem mevcut alanlarda liderliğini sürdürmeyi hem de yeni sektörlerde yatırımlarla büyümeyi hedeflemektedir.

KACMAZ group, with its 19 existing companies, creates adding value to our country and continues to give confidence to all its employees, shareholders and customers.

Description:

Aynı zamanda, birçoğu yönetici pozisyonunda bulunan kadın çalışanlarıyla toplumsal cinsiyet eşitliğini, yeni mezun personeli ile fırsat eşitliğini destekledi.

Levent Grubu’nun bugünkü logosu, 1957 yılından bu yana dünyanın en büyük grafik tasarım şirketleri arasında sayılan ve uluslararası alanda belleklere yer etmiş sayısız ünlü tasarıma imza atan Chermayeff, Geismar&Haviv şirketi tarafından 2024 yılında yaratıldı. Levent Grubu'nun logosunun tasarımında kullanılan teknikler ve yaklaşım, grubun marka kimliğini güçlendirmek ve onu uluslararası arenada tanınır hale getirmek için özenle seçildi. Logonun özünde, Levent Grubu'nun değerleri, vizyonu ve sektördeki konumunu yansıtan bir yaklaşım bulunur. Levent, Chermayeff, Geismar&Haviv’nin yarattığı logo tasarımı ile önemli bir dönüşüm yaşamış ve global marka kimliğini güçlendirmiştir.

Birlikte Üretmek, Birlikte Başarmak!
Levent olarak bizler üretime ve birlikte üretmenin gücüne inanırız. Birlik ve beraberlik ruhuna değer veren, başarı odaklı, aidiyet duygusu yüksek çalışanlarımız en kıymetli değerimizdir. Farklı sektörlerdeki faaliyet alanlarımız arasında yakalanan sinerji, gücümüze güç katmamızın sebebidir.

Toplumsal Güçle İlerliyoruz!
Geçmişten günümüze süregelen başarımız başta tüketicilerimiz olmak üzere iş ortaklarımız ve tüm toplumumuza verdiğimiz değerin sonucudur. Ülkemize ve insanımıza olan inancımız, her geçen gün katma değer yaratan başarılara imza atmakta en büyük motivasyon kaynağımız olmuştur.

Name: PMB | POSSEHL Mittelstandsbeteiligungen GmbH
Description:
Possehl Mittelstandsbeteiligungen GmbH, in short PMB, invests in small and medium-sized companies in Germany, Austria and Switzerland. As part of the internationally operating Possehl Group based in Luebeck, Germany, we are committed to a long Hanseatic entrepreneurial tradition. We are proud to say that Possehl has stood for entrepreneurial continuity and sustainable success for 175 years.

PMB is a long-term oriented shareholding company that invests in small and medium-sized companies. In doing so, we fundamentally differ from other private equity investors: We are not looking for a quick increase in value including an exit strategy, but are committed to the long-term preservation and sustainable development of our companies. With the financially strong Possehl Group behind us, we finance our acquisitions with 100% own capital. 

Within the Possehl Group, PMB also assumes the role of incubator for new business areas. The goal: Identifying industries and technology areas with high future potential and then continuously building them up. Because we do not see digitalization as a threat, but as an opportunity - and accompany our investments on this path.

Our investment criteria focus on the following points:
- Succession solutions or group spin-offs in the countries Germany, Austria and Switzerland.
- Turnover in the range between 20 - 80 million EUR
- Already profitable companies that show a stable earnings situation
- Business models with potential for digitization
- Motivated management capable of leading the company independently and responsibly
- Majority shareholding up to 100%

For more information on Possehl Mittelstandsbeteiligungen GmbH and our investments, please visit our website.

Name: ARCHÉTYP AFRICA
Description:
ARCHETYP AFRICA : Construire l'Afrique de demain, aujourd'hui.

Holding panafricaine visionnaire, ARCHETYP AFRICA est dédiée à l'excellence et à l'impact premium sur le continent. Nous forgeons l'avenir par un écosystème intégré, développant des projets innovants et durables qui répondent aux besoins essentiels de l'Afrique.

Notre modèle combine un leadership panafricain avec une expertise pointue à travers 8 pôles stratégiques :

-  Immobilier & Aménagement : Créer des espaces de vie et de travail emblématiques, premium et durables.
-  Agro-Industrie & Logistique : Contribuer à la sécurité alimentaire et optimiser les chaînes de valeur.
- Éducation & Santé : Élever les standards de savoir et de bien-être par des infrastructures de qualité supérieure.
-  Hôtellerie & Services : Offrir des expériences d'hospitalité exceptionnelles et des services à forte valeur ajoutée.
- Énergie & Innovations : Impulser la croissance via des solutions énergétiques propres et des avancées technologiques disruptives.
-  Industrie & Infrastructure : Bâtir les fondations d'une économie robuste avec des projets industriels et des infrastructures structurantes.
-  Finance : Accélérer les investissements et soutenir la croissance des entreprises africaines par des solutions éthiques et performantes.
-  Fondation : Amplifier notre impact social et le bien-être des communautés, en synergie avec nos activités économiques.
Chez ARCHETYP AFRICA, l'innovation, la durabilité, l'impact social, la création de valeur partagée et le leadership panafricain sont les piliers de notre action. Nous sommes le partenaire privilégié de ceux qui, comme nous, sont déterminés à transformer le potentiel africain en réalités concrètes et durables.

Rejoignez-nous et façonnons ensemble l'Afrique de demain, aujourd'hui.

Clients across industries rely on our proven model that enables them to plug into a full-fledged operational ecosystem—without building their own. With structured revenue-sharing or fixed-fee models, we create win-win partnerships tailored to each client’s growth stage and industry.

Operating through our services include:

Business Management Support

Strategy & Growth Consulting

Head Office Services

Compliance & Legal Setup

Scalable Revenue Operations

Branding, Planning & Corporate Structuring


It’s a simple business model: You bring your business idea or existing operations, and we provide the management muscle, systems, and support to run it efficiently and grow it sustainably.

Hundreds have already trusted us to elevate their business—because with AARARU, success feels structured, supported, and smart.

The group's management is always interested in exploring the promising investment opportunities in various business sectors to diversify revenue streams. Shortly after entering the field of real estate and contracting, it established Topcar company in 2014, which became one of the leading companies in the field of car dealership in Saudi Arabia. 

Then the group expanded to include new commercial and service activities to achieve its goals, So the group established Dova Medical Company that provide premium skin& hair care products, and Automask company that provide complete protection solutions for cars.

Despite the multiplicity of fields in which Wethaq Group companies operate, they are interconnected with a unified vision, mission and common values. 

The activities of some of these companies also Integrates with each other to provide a comprehensive package of products and services to the same customer, especially in the automotive sector and car care services.
