The Group revenue for 2023 is ~ 82M€ and we have 450 employees. We’re in it for the long run, we believe in continuous learning and development and crafting value-adding solutions for our customers. Paree Group is committed to making an impact today for a healthier and more sustainable tomorrow through its operations in MedTech and the built environment. For us, people are full of untapped potential and we’re here to help you turn your talent into brilliance as a member of our international family.

We have +30 professionals working for Paree Group in the areas of finance, ICT and HR. In addition, Paree Group subsidiaries have even more versatile range of opportunities for instance in innovation and product development, project managing, quality and regulation, sustainability, sales, marketing, software, and operations.

Description:
Leonardo Lifescience Group è il primo gruppo indipendente Made in Italy nel settore della protezione delle persone e degli ambienti civili e industriali.

La visione che ha portato alla costituzione di Leonardo Lifescience Group nasce dalla volontà di creare un polo innovativo con un approccio realmente sostenibile nella realizzazione di prodotti e soluzioni per la protezione delle persone, di colture, giardini, spazi domestici e pubblici, in risposta ad un mercato e a un contesto globale in cui l’attenzione all’ambiente è una delle maggiori priorità.

Il Gruppo riunisce in sé il know-how e le competenze di innovazione, ricerca e sviluppo e presidio del mercato di Vebi Istituto Biochimico e Bleu Line, due storiche realtà italiane nel campo della protezione degli ambienti per il mercato domestico e professionale, e guarda a costruire collaborazioni di valore e partnership strategiche con player italiani e internazionali che che ne condividano i valori di sostenibilità e miglioramento continuo.

L'obiettivo di Leonardo Lifescience Group è quello di porsi come sinonimo di innovazione responsabile e protezione sostenibile, un punto di riferimento in grado di creare sinergie e aggregazioni proiettate alla crescita delle realtà esistenti e allo sviluppo di nuove opportunità di business, per contribuire a migliorare la vita delle persone e del Pianeta.

Posiada know how, zespół ekspertów i szerokie kompetencje zarządcze w przemyśle metalowym. Koncentruje się na spółkach przemysłowych, zarządza i realizuje inwestycje rozszerzając portfel swoich produktów jak również skalę i terytorium działania. 

Spółki zależne dystrybuują swoje produkty do ponad 70 krajów na całym świecie.

Misją MANGATY HOLDING jest budowanie lepszej przyszłości, zapewnienie inwestorom stabilnych zysków oraz satysfakcjonująca dla obu stron współpraca z partnerami. Tworzymy własną kulturę biznesu. Stawiamy na nowoczesne myślenie i tradycyjną solidność. 

MANGATA HOLDING to solidny inwestor i odpowiedzialny partner wyznaczający nowe standardy biznesu. Spółka przedstawia rzetelny obraz, buduje wiarygodność i zaufanie w oczach inwestorów, a swoją współpracę z interesariuszami opiera na długotrwałych relacjach.

Name: Gözeler Holding A.Ş.
Description:
THE SECRET TO OUR FUTURE LIES iN OUR ROOTS!
Gözeler Holding started its activities in 1970 in lstanbul, Bayrampaşa Topçular, one of the important industrial centers of the period, in the field of metal sector raw material trade under the title of Hasan Göze Metal. 
Currently, the company continues adding value to the national economy and the sector with its customer satisfaction, trust, technology, innovation and quality notions in the fields of metal raw materials, aluminum, architectural systems and construction. 
We continue today this journey which our founder Hasan Göze started half a century ago, with the strength we get from our roots, in unison with our new companies that gather under the same roof of GÖZELER HOLDING.

GELECEĞİMİZİN SIRRI, KÖKLERİMİZDE SAKLI…
Gözeler Holding, 1970 yılında dönemin önemli endüstri merkezlerinden biri olan İstanbul, Bayrampaşa Topçular'da, Hasan Göze Metal unvanı ile metal sektörü hammadde ticareti alanında faaliyetlerine başlamıştır.
Halen metal ham madde, alüminyum, mimari yapı alanlarında müşteri memnuniyeti, güven, teknoloji, yenilikçilik ve kalite anlayışı ile ülke ekonomisi ve sektöre değer katmaktadır.
Kurucumuz Hasan Göze'nin yarım asır önce başlattığı bu yolculuğu, köklerimizden aldığımız güçle, bugün Gözeler Holding çatısı altında yeni şirketlerimizle devam ettiriyoruz…

Name: ALFA Business Holding
Description:
Grupo internacional especializado en descanso, hogar y electrónica, con presencia en 18 países.
Fundada en 2002 en Barcelona, Alfa Business Holding nació con una clara vocación: ofrecer soluciones de descanso de
alta calidad. Lo que comenzó en un modesto taller pronto se transformó en un proyecto empresarial en constante
crecimiento, diversificándose hacia nuevas líneas de negocio relacionadas con el hogar y consolidando su presencia
industrial con la construcción de su primera fábrica de colchones en 2011.
Con más de dos décadas de trayectoria, la compañía ha evolucionado hasta convertirse en un referente global en la
fabricación y distribución de equipos de descanso, mobiliario y electrónica. Actualmente, Alfa Business Holding opera en 18
países, cuenta con cinco plantas productivas en España, Polonia y China, y dispone de siete centros logísticos
estratégicamente ubicados en el territorio nacional, respaldados por un equipo de más de 100 profesionales.
Nuestro compromiso se centra en tres pilares fundamentales: innovación, excelencia y sostenibilidad. Trabajamos bajo un
mismo estándar de calidad, garantizando que cada producto, sin importar su lugar de fabricación, cumpla con las más
altas expectativas de nuestros clientes.
En Alfa Business Holding creemos firmemente en la fuerza del talento humano y en la construcción de relaciones
duraderas basadas en la confianza. Nuestra visión es continuar expandiendo nuestras marcas a nivel internacional,
liderando con estrategias innovadoras que generen valor y bienestar, siempre con un objetivo inalterable: la satisfacción y
felicidad de quienes confían en nosotros.

Name: Alnus S.p.A.
Description:
Alnus S.p.A. is the holding company that controls businesses operating in different industries by acquiring a majority stake in them with the aim of consolidating companies within the Group. Our philosophy is based on the decentralized model whereby each company acts independently of the others, and of the parent company, enjoying its own management autonomy and management to guide its business. Alnus searches for and acquires small and medium-sized companies in Europe operating mainly in the manufacturing sectors with focus on the B2B model, which are experiencing situations of generational change, change management or seeking capital for growth by taking over a majority stake by structuring with the entrepreneurs an incentive long-term project without distorting the company and without the objective of reselling the subsidiary, in order to create shared value growth.
Acquired companies must enjoy a sustainable competitive advantage in an industry niche, solving problems for customers that other competitors cannot solve, generate a good return on capital and steady profitability by selling innovative products and services.
Joining Alnus means being part of a large family where you share first and foremost values and ideals of business ethics as well as industrial projects to be jointly developed by bringing on board a Partner like Alnus that rows side by side with.

Real Estate Development & Management — delivering high-quality residential, commercial, and retail projects.

Industrial & Manufacturing — operating steel factories and supporting UAE’s infrastructure growth.

Trading & Logistics — bridging supply chains with efficient warehousing and import/export operations.

Retail & Lifestyle (Coming Soon) — developing vibrant retail destinations and shopping experiences.

At the core of Royal Xylon is a commitment to excellence, compliance, and innovation. We believe in empowering people, fostering partnerships, and maintaining the highest standards of corporate governance across our group.

As we expand, our mission is to become a trusted leader among regional investment holdings, shaping industries and creating opportunities in the UAE and beyond.

Temel değerlerimize sadık kalarak, stratejilerimizi ve iş kollarımızı sürekli olarak yenileyip geliştiriyoruz. Name: Remah International Group
Description:
For over 34 years, Remah International Group (RIG) has been a trusted partner to the UAE Armed Forces including the Navy, Land Forces, Air Force, Air Defense, Presidential Guard, National Guard, CICPA, Police, and Security Forces and other key national sectors. 

We deliver innovative solutions, as well as advanced products, and comprehensive support to ensure operational readiness, mission success, and resilience in an ever-evolving local, regional and global landscape.

Headquartered at Addax Tower, Al Reem Island, Abu Dhabi; RIG supports the UAE’s strategic goals through partnerships that drive innovation, foreign investment, and national development. Our diverse portfolio includes cutting-edge technologies such as Artificial Intelligence and Unmanned Systems, as well as full lifecycle support that spans concept development, solution design, equipment supply, system upgrades, training, and cyber capabilities. Whether integrating complex platforms, ensuring seamless system interoperability, or providing essential products and spare parts, our solutions are designed to enhance operational efficiency and readiness.

In collaboration with leading local and global organizations, RIG delivers tailored solutions to meet the complex demands of modern defense and security operations. Backed by a team of experienced professionals, we are committed to seamless execution and unparalleled excellence.

Looking ahead, RIG remains steadfast in empowering the UAE’s defense and security sectors with world-class technologies and services, further strengthening the nation’s position as a global leader in defense.

Remah International Group – We Innovate the Mission.

Name: Stock Lens
Description:
Welcome to Stock Lens – your window into the stock market, simplified.

We get it. The stock market can seem like a scary place. Candlesticks, moving averages, PE ratios, IPO buzz, F&O, market crashes – the jargon never ends. But here’s the thing: investing isn’t meant to be complicated. And with the right lens, anyone – literally anyone – can understand it.

That’s where Stock Lens comes in.

This platform was born from a simple idea — to decode the market for the common investor. No MBA required. No prior experience needed. Whether you're a college student looking to start SIPs, a working professional confused about mutual funds, or someone who's heard of “Nifty” but thinks it's a biscuit — we’ve got you.

At Stock Lens, we turn complex financial topics into simple, relatable stories. We break down:

Stock market news without the noise

Fundamental and technical concepts in plain language

Investing mistakes people make (and how not to)

Real-life case studies and market psychology

Easy-to-follow charts, memes, and bite-sized videos

And we do all this with a sense of humor, clarity, and realism that even your dog (or dadi) would enjoy.

So if you've ever thought, “This stock stuff is not for me,” we’re here to change your mind — gently, and with a lot of chai, charts, and common sense.

Stock Lens – Dekho Market Saaf Saaf.

Follow us for explainer videos, short posts, reels, and full-length stories that reveal the real India behind Dalal Street.

Description:
We are a conglomerate holding company with a shared mission to offer sustainable and innovative solutions across multiple industries. Name: Winning Form Group
Description:
Winning Form initially began as a premier horse racing form guide with the first of the publication being in circulation from 1987. It subsequently grew into becoming the holding company for the group of entities compromising what’s known today as the Non-Gaming entities, a sister group to the Hollywoodbets Group. These entities are key contributors to the solid foundation that the Hollywoodbets Group has been built on, whilst also operating in their respective industries, and are individually known as SplashOut, Star Merchant, Star Bar & Café, and Racing Distribution.

SplashOut forms the media house within the group and specialises in printing, signage and design.  Some of its publications are Winning Form, Top Turf, BetCard, Soccer Betting News and more. The Signage division provides an all-round branding partner to the group of companies specialising in vehicle branding, interior and exterior signage, stadium branding, large format printing and much more!

Racing Distribution functions as the courier & distribution service provider to the Hollywoodbets and Winning Form groups and assumes responsibility of fleet management as well. We have distribution points situated in key cities around South Africa which allows us to offer an efficient and effective national courier service to our customers.

Star Merchant specialises in local and international procurement, warehousing and distribution. Currently stocking more than 2500 items, Star Merchant offers its customers a fully outsourced procurement model leveraging off its existing strong bulk-buying capabilities, passing on those savings to our customers.

For over 18 years, Star Bar & Café (aka Hollywood Bunny Bar) has been plating a showstopper “Bunny Chow” that has appealed to a diverse range of palates. Customers can try this award-winning dish, a variety of Indian cuisine or other customer favourites that are on the menu. Under the Star Bar & Café name, we have 8 Bunny Bars & 54 Bars nationally.

Name: Hero Brands
Description:
Hero Brands is responding to emerging consumer trends and is building fast-casual brands of the future.

With our network of experienced multi-unit franchise operators, we can move at pace and quickly launch brands to a global consumer audience.

Our leadership team and partners have brand development, supply chain, operational and marketing expertise, as well as the financial power to create true disruption.

Name: Metamorphic Enterprises
Description: Metamorphic Enterprises, LLC is a diversified holding company that builds and protects lasting value. We are the permanent home for a growing portfolio of intellectual property—like The TASK Framework—and tangible assets, including agricultural and commercial real estate. Our purpose is to own the foundations that enable innovation and growth, ensuring these strategic assets are managed for long-term impact and stability.

Name: Africa International Policy Research Center (AIPRC)
Description:
Africa International Policy Research Centre (AIPRC) Company is a multidisciplinary Private limited Company comprising specialized subsidiary centres and bureaus addressing diverse lines of business and public interest. Our work spans humanitarian action, anti-corruption, public–private partnerships (PPPs), the SDGs, agriculture, health systems, legal and policy advisory, consultancy services, environmental sustainability, ocean governance, information technology, and infrastructure development, among others.

At AIPRC, we believe that effective policy, responsible business, and sustainable development must be data-informed, people-centred, and ethically grounded. Our company operates at the intersection of policy, research, investment, and implementation, enabling institutions to navigate governance, regulatory, and operational complexity with clarity and confidence.

We work collaboratively across the public sector, private sector, civil society, and humanitarian spaces, supporting leaders and institutions to design, implement, and scale solutions that protect human dignity while delivering measurable impact.

AIPRC  looks forward to collaborating with partners committed to evidence, integrity, innovation, and sustainable outcomes.

Name: Otto Krahn Group
Description: The globally active Otto Krahn Group is family-owned and managed by the holding company Otto Krahn Holding GmbH. It defines strategic guidelines and at the same time takes on the role of a professional service provider to support Group companies with the development of successful and sustainable growth strategies. Overall, the Otto Krahn Group, which includes plastics distributor ALBIS, plastics compounder and recycling specialist MOCOM, the specialty chemicals distributor KRAHN Chemie Group, KRAHN Ceramics and the business incubator Otto Krahn New Business, is represented in more than 30 countries. In the 2024 financial year, the Otto Krahn Group employed a total of around 1,700 people and its global turnover was €1.3 billion.

Description: JOOL Group is a family owned investment company, rooted in Swedish industrial tradition. With holdings in various industries including paper, timber and financial services, our passion is green growth and entrepreneurship – both our own and that of others.

Name: FANKAM
Description:
Where Result-oriented and Humanist Businesses Should Rely-On! 


ما در گروه فنکام بر آنیم تا مرجـع و مـأمن کسب وکـارهای انسانمحور و نتیجه گرا باشیم

رسالت ما در فنکام حفظ سرمایههای انسانی با استعداد در داخل مرزهای کشور است. به طوری که بتوانند در معیارهای رفاهی تجربهای مشابه با کار در یک محیط بینالمللی را از منظر پیشرفت، صمیمیت و رفاه تجربه نمایند

در فنکام مبنای ارزشمندی، ذات انسانهاست و بر این مبنا، فنکام را محلی برای رشد و توسعه فردی و خانه ای ماندگار برای متخصصین و جایگاهی برای شناخت و پرورش استعدادها باشد 
 
توسعه فناوریهای نوین کیان الماس مهر- فنکام- با هدف افزایش تولیدات داخلی، توسعه صادرات کشور و به خصوص ایجاد فرصت های شغلی برای نخبگان جوان کار خود را آغاز نمود. امروز ما مفتخریم که این گروه به پشتوانه باتجربه ترین مدیران کشور در چندین صنعت مختلف در حال فعالیت است و بسیاری از فارغ التحصیلان دانشگاه های معتبر در کنار مدیران زبده وارد فضای صنعت شده اند تا دانش بهروز خود را به عرصه عمل در آورند.

گروه فنکام در حوزه های آرایشی و بهداشتی، مواد اولیه شیمیایی، تولید چسب های صنعتی، تجارت الکترونیک و محصولات تند مصرف فعالیت دارد و دارای 8 شرکت فعال با چندین برند معتبر می باشد. در تمامی زیرمجموعه ها هدف ما ارائه محصولات و خدمات نوآورانه و خلاق است تا بتواند چالشها و دغدغه های واقعی مصرف کنندگان را به درستی حل نماید.

Name: Kopuz Şirketler Grubu
Description:
Temelleri 1974 yılında atılan Kopuz Şirketler Grubu, 45 yılı aşan ticari hayatında değişime ve gelişime ayak uydurarak Türkiye'nin başarılı aile şirketlerinden biri haline gelmiştir.

Tüm faaliyetlerinde, öncelikle istihdam sağlamaya odaklanan  Kopuz Şirketler Grubu, Türkiye ekonomisine daha fazla katma değer sağlama amacını gözetmekte ve Türkiye’deki başarısını daha da ileriye taşıyarak; faaliyetlerini dünya çapında sürdürmeyi hedeflemektedir.

Ayrıca, Kopuz Şirketler Grubu, 1993 yılında kurulan Kopuzlar Vakfı aracılığıyla 25 yılı aşkın süredir yurt içinde ve yurt dışında yürüttüğü sosyal sorumluluk projeleri ile insanlığa hizmet etmeye devam etmektedir.

Name: MediaTurtles Network
Description:
Media Turtles Network is a Middle Eastern venture builder transforming creativity into sustainable economic value. We specialize in designing, funding, and managing innovative companies, while developing original intellectual properties (IPs) that celebrate the region’s cultural richness and deliver global impact.

What We Do:

Our Vision:

Join us as we redefine the creative economy in the Middle East and beyond.

Name: 3S Kale Holding A.Ş.
Description:
3S Kale Holding, faaliyet alanlarında geçmişinden gelen güven ve kalite anlayışını yansıtıyor.

Köklü aile şirketinin bünyesindeki  gayrimenkul stoklarının yeniden yapılandırılmasıyla; 2011 yılında 3S Kale Gayrimenkul Geliştirme ve Yatırım A.Ş., 2012 yılında 3S Kale Yapı ve Ticaret A.Ş., 2014 yılında 3S Kale Enerji Üretim A.Ş. şirketleri kurulmuştur. 2015 yılında grup şirketlerini bünyesinde toplayan 3S Kale Holding A.Ş. hayata geçmiştir.

3S KALE GAYRİMENKUL

Gayrimenkul alanında katma değer sağlama ve bu sayede ülke gelişimine destek verme vizyonuyla fark oluşturan projeler geliştiren 3S Kale Gayrimenkul; en iyi tasarım ve işçiliği kullanarak, kaliteden ödün vermeden iş yapmayı misyon ediniyor. 

Tamamladığı projeler arasında 523 konut ve 45 mağazasıyla 3S Firuze Konakları, 136 konutluk Kale Özgür Evler, 1.463 konut ve 59 mağazasıyla Kale Kent ve Fenerbahçe'de kentsel dönüşüm projeleri bulunuyor.

3S KALE ENERJİ

“Yenilenebilir enerji arama ve üretimi konusunda Türkiye’nin önde gelen şirketlerinden biri olma” misyonuyla yola çıktığımız enerji iş kolumuzda, temiz ve yenilenebilir enerji alanına odaklanıyoruz. 3S Kale Enerji’nin, Aydın’da 1, Niğde Bölgesinde 7 ve Manisa yöresinde 1 adet olmak üzere toplam 9 ruhsatı bulunuyor. 

3S Kale Enerji;  uzun vadede uluslararası alanda önde gelen bir enerji şirketi olma hedefiyle faaliyetlerine devam ediyor.

3S KALE YAPI

3S Kale Yapı, 98.000 m² kiralanabilir alan ve 515 adet bağımsız bölümden oluşan, 3S Kale Holding’in sahibi olduğu mülklerin kiralama ve işletmesini yaptığı şirketidir. 

Güngören’de bulunan Kale Outlet Center, 27.000 m² kiralanabilir alanda 130 mağazasıyla hizmet veriyor. 

Davutpaşa’da ki Kale İş Merkezi, 38.000 m² inşaat alanı üzerinde 311 dükkanı; Güngören İş Merkezi ise 63.000 m² inşaat alanı üzerinde 74 dükkan ve ofis alanlarıyla müşterilerine hizmet veriyor.

Name: Yeremyan Projects
Description:
Yeremyan Projects is Armenia's leading food and hospitality company. We produce high-quality dairy products, operate diverse restaurants, and provide culinary education. Our commitment to sustainability and innovation drives our growth and positive impact on Armenia.
Dairy Excellence:
Leading Armenia's premium dairy market, Yeremyan Projects offers over 70 top-tier products, including artisanal cheeses, grass-fed butter, organic grade A milk, Armenian matzoon, sour cream, and a variety of yogurts. Our innovative seed-to-table approach ensures exceptional dairy quality, from cultivated special feed for purebred cattle to ISO-certified high-tech dairy factories.
Culinary Innovation:
Operating 17 restaurants, from Michelin-star equivalent haute cuisine to vibrant casual dining, fast food, and confectionery, Yeremyan Projects has transformed the hospitality industry in Armenia. Our 11 distinctive concepts blend Armenian and European culinary traditions, setting a new benchmark for dining excellence.
Education and Development:
The Yeremyan Academy of Culinary Arts and Hospitality, in collaboration with the City of Oxford College, has proudly graduated over 2,000 students since 2019, with a remarkable 90% employment rate. The Academy, renowned for its celebrity chefs, engages in numerous local and international partnerships and contributes to Armenian national TV through the acclaimed "Hot Kitchen" program.
Corporate Social Responsibility:
Yeremyan Projects is reshaping social norms in Armenia through transformative initiatives that elevate dietary choices and nutrition. Our "Milk in Schools" program, launched in 2023 with the UN World Food Program, highlights our dedication to enhancing child nutrition and fostering healthy eating habits.
As a Guinness World Record holder, Yeremyan Projects' commitment to excellence drives our ongoing growth and substantial impact in every facet of our operations.

The Group trademarks – Aermec, Sierra, Nplus, FAST and RPM – have an aggregate turnover that exceeds 500 million euros, more than 1,800.00 employees and 8 production plants, always combining innovation and research for people’s wellbeing in the respect of the environment.

Name: Mostafa Bin Abdullatif Investments L.L.C
Description:
Mostafa Bin Abdullatif Investments was founded nearly 100 years ago to ensure the prosperity of the family business. This was to be realized by establishing a successful business based on offering the residents of the country and region the best value with an added sense of responsibility, and fair play. 

Our family office, Global M Holding Ltd, was set up to cater to the financial and lifestyle needs of our family members. The family office co-invests with the family business across various asset classes and also has a venture studio vertical that supports our next generation to achieve their business visions.

Our verticals include:
 
Investments:

The investment arm, Global M Holding Ltd, is involved in investing in stable, cash-generating financial products and collective investments. 

Global M Holding Ltd along with the family office, also focuses on the Private Equity and Venture Capital space by strategically investing in private companies across the globe that have the potential to create positive impact in industries they operate in. 

Our focus is technology & healthcare and supporting infrastructure around these themes.

Real Estate:

Our Real Estate portfolio is built around a build to rent model. Our vision is to create long term value for our shareholders. Our focus area is residential real estate in Dubai and we have internal management and maintenance division that ensure effective upkeep of the properties.

Distribution:

We distribute a highly diversified brand portfolio across multiple channels. Some of the top brands we distribute are Braun, Chubbsafes, Nexans, Breitling, Oral B, Gunnebo & HIK Vision.

Services & Manufacture:

Some of our services include media production, ice manufacturing, signage production & way-finding solutions.

For more information please visit us at our website.

Tabi Connect: Tabi Connect is a rating automation platform and rate management system that enables brokerages to respond to more quotes faster, with less human labor, while capturing every data point. By utilizing Tabi Connect, 3PLs increase their load count, revenue, and gain more insight into their customer demand and quoting process. 
  
Talentek: We are a Global Talent provider that combines technology, top-notch leadership, and a world-class recruitment team, allowing us to help our customers build their satellite teams across different countries. 

  

At Hubtek, we blend sophistication with innovation, transforming challenges into opportunities and aspirations into achievements. Join us on the path to excellence, where every solution is crafted with elegance and every partnership is a testament to success.

Name: Taavura Holdings Ltd - תעבורה אחזקות
Description:
Founded over 76 years ago by Avraham (Bondi) Livnat, Taavura Holdings Ltd. has grown into one of Israel's leading mobility, transportation, logistics, energy, and service groups. With approximately 70 companies and over 5,500 employees, Taavura remains at the forefront of the industry, combining operational excellence with innovative solutions.

Ownership and Vision:
Taavura is directed by the Livnat family (60%), along with strategic partners Leumi Partners (20%) and Phoenix Holdings (20%). The group is committed to sustainable growth and market leadership through innovation and expertise.

Main Areas of Operation:
Truck, Bus, and Heavy Equipment Importation to Israel: Representing world-renowned brands such as Daf, Isuzu, Kenworth, Tatra, Oshkosh, VDL, Liebherr, and more, providing advanced transportation and heavy equipment solutions.

Private Car and Commercial Vehicle Importation to Central Europe: Taavura imports and distributes vehicles from leading brands, including Ford, Hyundai, Nissan, Renault, Dacia, and MG, across multiple European markets.

Logistics and Road Haulage: As Israel’s largest transport company, Taavura offers nationwide services, including car transport, bulk cargo, container hauling, and more. Through its stake in Maman, Taavura specializes in airport ground handling and comprehensive logistics support.

Infrastructure: With expertise in earthmoving, mining, cranes, heavy haulage, and marine operations, Taavura supports Israel’s infrastructure development.

Energy and Environment: Taavura leads sustainability initiatives through Shmerling Synchro and operates major waste management and sewage treatment facilities.

Innovation through Quantum Hub: As the group's innovation center, Quantum Hub fosters collaboration with top brands, including Talcar, Hyundai, VDL Group, and Bazan, to drive advancements in logistics, automotive, energy, and Industry 4.0.

For inquiries, contact us at taavura@taavura.co.il.

Name: Satoria Group

Mr. Alim Satria, the Chairman of Satoria Group - a very seasoned developer, entrepreneur and industrialist in the company he previously led - is a visionary, vivacious and an inspiring ﬁgure.

He was one of the Co-Owner & Managing Director of Maspion Group from 1976 – 2013, where he pioneered and led key stone companies and projects including jetty operator (PT. Siam Maspion Terminal), LPG storage tank (PT. Maspion Energy Miratama), Maspion Square Mall, Singapore National Academy International School, PT. Alumindo, TBK. Mr. Alim Satria is also shareholder and President Director of Trillium Office and Residence. Trillium Office and Residence received “2014 Green Building Awareness Award” from City Governor and was featured in the 2015 Surabaya City Video Profile.

Under his leadership, together with a strong team of leaders and employees on board, Satoria Group is soon to set foot in different parts of the world.

Description:
Living Big Group es un grupo de Agencias de Comunicaciones especializada en Experiencias de Marca, fundada en 2011. Big Fish: Agencia de Experiencias BTL. Bloom 4 All: Agencia de Experiencias Digitales y Tecnológicas. Motion House: Productora Audiovisual.

Nuestro propósito es crear momentos inolvidables para nuestros clientes, colaboradores y sus familias. Buscamos contribuir a la realización de sus sueños y metas mediante una constante innovación y la materialización de ideas únicas y creativas."

Name: Arkan Holding Group
Description:
Arkan Holding Group: A leading franchise operator with 12+ years of experience, managing multiple franchise businesses across diverse sectors. Our dedicated team is committed to providing exceptional service and empowering franchisees' success. We foster long-term partnerships and deliver unparalleled SOPs for establishing global brands locally.

 مجموعة أركان القابضة هي مجموعة رائدة في مجال تشغيل العلامات التجارية في ليبيا، حيث تمتلك سجلًا حافل بالنجاح يمتد لأكثر من 12 عامًا في مجال إدارة الامتيازات. نحن متخصصون في إدارة وتشغيل العديد من شركات الامتياز عبر قطاعات متنوعة، بما في ذلك الأغذية والبيع بالتجزئة والخدمات.

في قلب مجموعة أركان القابضة فريق من المهنيين ذوي الخبرة المتميزة المكرسين لتقديم خدمة استثنائية لعملائنا وتمكين نجاحهم. نؤمن بشدة بتعزيز الشراكات طويلة الأجل مع موزعي الامتيازات ونلتزم بتقديم إجراءات تشغيلية قياسية لا مثيل لها طوال عملية تأسيس العلامات التجارية العالمية في الأسواق المحلية.

نفتخر بشدة برعاية بيئة عمل احترافية تعزز الابتكار والتميز والنمو المستمر. يتغلغل التزامنا الراسخ بخدمة العملاء المتميزة في كل جانب من جوانب عملياتنا، مما يدل على قيمنا التجارية الأساسية المتمثلة في الولاء والشفافية والالتزام.

Name: Lyceum Global Holdings
Description: We are a prominent global holdings company, driving value and growth through diverse investments and strategic operations worldwide.

Name: Grupo Andrade
Description: Grupo Andrade es uno de los grupos automotrices más importantes de México, con 100 años de experiencia en la industria. Operamos una amplia red de más de 60 concesionarias de las 27 principales marcas del mercado, ofreciendo soluciones integrales de movilidad, desde la venta de vehículos nuevos y seminuevos, servicios postventa, financiamiento y seguros. Nuestro compromiso es brindar atención de excelencia, innovación constante y confianza a cada cliente, impulsando el crecimiento del sector automotriz en el país.

Name: FAMCORP
Description: FAMCORP, initially founded as Faisal Al Matrook Company W.L.L. in 1975 by Mr. Faisal Al Matrook in Bahrain, was rebranded in 2013 as FAMCORP. Today, it operates as a dynamic holding company with a diverse portfolio of major investments spanning various industries and countries in sectors such as construction, manufacturing, real estate and property management, education, telecommunications, trading, and hospitality. For a comprehensive overview of our subsidiaries and investments, we invite you to visit our website.

Name: Blooming Group
Description:
Blooming Group SpA è un gruppo industriale in ambito food & bevarage. L’iniziativa nata nel 2017 con la creazione di BKNO è oggi leader italiano nel settore retail con i brand Alice Pizza, Burger King, Befed e Rosso pomodoro e con i propri marchi Lab, Il Barotto e Gallo’s.
We nurture brands è il claim che guida il suo sviluppo, territorialmente diffuso nelle principali regioni del Nord Italia. Una forte attenzione alla sostenibilità e alla centralità delle persone completano i valori del gruppo, che conta al proprio attivo oltre 500 dipendenti.
Un management di esperienza guida l’azienda con la forte ambizione di crescere sostenendo l’occupazione e lo sviluppo dei territori in cui è presente.

Name: Versora Partners
Description: Versora Partners is a global group of companies uniting specialized ventures under one roof. As the umbrella structure, we provide strategic vision, governance, and investment guidance to drive sustainable growth and international expansion. Beyond business, we proudly run our social impact brand, dedicated to giving back to communities and supporting a more sustainable future.

Name: PT CMM GLOBAL INTERNASIONAL
Description:
PT CMM GLOBAL INTERNATIONAL berdiri sejak 25 November 2019. Didirikan oleh Bapak Apt, Tony Firmansyah., S. Farm dengan slogan "Cahaya Menebar Manfaat"

Perusahaan ini berdiri di Bogor sebagai Holding yang bergerak dibidang aktivitas perusahaan grup, pembiayaan, dan entitas keuangan. 

Saat ini CMM Group memiliki 12 area bisnis, antara lain yaitu :
1. PT SR12 Herbal Kosmetik (Retail)
2. PT Natural Indah Perkasa (Retail)
3. PT Putikayo Internasional (manufacture)
4. PT Bio Nature Internasional (manufacture)
5. PT Gemilang Ayu Perdana (manufacture)
6. PT Sinar12 (e-commerce)
7, Apotek & Klinik kecantikan

Name: Rafmoh Group
Description:
Welcome to Rafmoh Group, a dynamic and diversified global company with a robust presence in six countries spanning the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. Employing over 200 talented individuals, we are at the forefront of an innovation-driven investment-based precious metal trading industry.

Key Highlights:
 Global Presence: Rafmoh Group operates in six strategically chosen countries, fostering a global footprint that positions us as a key player in the ever-evolving world of precious metal trading. Our international presence enables us to serve clients with unparalleled expertise and market insights.

 Triumphant Strategy: Our success is rooted in a triumphant strategy that prioritizes innovation and forward-thinking. Rafmoh Holding continually adapts to market dynamics, ensuring that our clients benefit from cutting-edge solutions and opportunities in the precious metal industry.

Our Commitment:
 Gold Excellence: Rafmoh Group is unwavering in its commitment to the highest standards of gold excellence. With a legacy built on trust, transparency, and expertise, we have earned a prominent position in the global arena of gold trading, refining, and bullion sales.

 Innovation-Driven Investment: Innovation is at the heart of our approach. Rafmoh Holding pioneers innovation in the precious metal trading industry, offering our clients the latest advancements and opportunities that drive successful investment strategies.

Why Choose Rafmoh Group:
 Legacy of Trust
 Expertise and Transparency


Join Rafmoh Group on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest ventures, industry insights, and innovative approaches in the global precious metal trading landscape. Be a part of a legacy that defines excellence in gold trading.

#RafmohHolding #PreciousMetalTrading #GoldExcellence #InnovationDrivenInvestment

Name: GALESONG GROUP
Description:
Jelang 50 TAHUN GALESONG GROUP BERKARYA
Dari Otomotif Ekspansi ke Properti, Perhotelan & Leisure, Pertambangan dan Akuakultur.

Galesong Group adalah perusahaan induk (Holding Company) yang memiliki berbagai bidang bisnis dengan kendali usaha berpusat di Kota Makassar, Sulawesi Selatan. Kiprah Galesong Group dalam dunia usaha dan bisnis telah dijalani hampir 50 Tahun. Dalam kurun waktu yang cukup panjang, berbagai rintangan telah dihadapi.

Meski demikian, perusahaan ini tetap eksis berkembang hingga saat ini dan Galesong Group bertekad terus berkarya untuk menjadi salah satu kelompok perusahaan terpercaya di kawasan timur Indonesia. Sebagai perusahaan yang berkembang, Galesong Group tetap berkomitmen dan berkelanjutan untuk bersaing pada pasar global sehingga tetap membuka diri untuk selalu bekerjasama dengan perusahaan nasional dan internasional.

Name: JK World Group
Description:
Headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, JK World Group is an international holding company committed to elevating the standard of luxury living through our diverse collection of businesses, including GreenTee Golf, JK World Group Real Estate, Development, Design, and Financial, Jess’ Restaurant, and GFJ Golf Apparel.  
GreenTee Golf currently operates three shop locations in Greater Vancouver, in addition to our golf course, the Green Tee Country Club in Langley, British Columbia. GreenTee Golf Shops are unique in the Lower Mainland, specializing in a variety of top of the line, luxury products from Japan and Korea.
Jess’ restaurant, located in Kerrisdale, Vancouver, offers the only modern Korean fine dining experience in the city; featuring contemporary cuisine that celebrates local ingredients and global flavours.
JK World Group strives for excellence in everything we do, and remains dedicated to engaging, inspiring, and entertaining our clients by providing exceptional service, experiences, and access to luxury brands that you won’t find anywhere else.

Name: Wattlestone
Description:
Wattlestone was established in 2015 as a privately owned holding company owned by Andrew Northcott.

Our portfolio spans across the energy, business services, financial, agriculture, tourism and real estate sectors actively acquiring and operating businesses for the long term.

The core strategy of Wattlestone is to acquire or create new opportunities that are well positioned for profitable, long term growth and success, whilst focusing on developing and aligning top tier management to ensure enduring success of each group business. Wattlestone, leverages its proven systems and processes, Wattlestone Business Systems (WBS), to gain operational efficiency and promoting real time data driven analytical decision making. Our passionate and driven community of leaders are at the center of our existence and operate in a true meritocratic environment.

The forward thinking, systemised and disciplined approach by Wattlestone drives industry leading innovation, creating significant efficiencies and low cost operating models through our group businesses with a long established reputation for an absolute focus on the customer experience whilst maintaining the absolute highest of standards of professionalism, integrity and operational excellence.

The Wattlestone management team leverages prior management experience, our proven Wattlestone Business Systems and an extensive global network to successfully perpetuate the enduring success of the group businesses.

www.wattlestone.com

Name: Viwey
Description:
Grupo de Empresas atuantes nos seguimentos de Consórcios, Comercialização de Automóveis, Contabilidade, Coworking, Seguros e Imóveis.

Análise e implementação de soluções ligadas Planejamento Financeiro, Estruturação Financeira/Fiscal, Legalização, Serviço de Endereço Fiscal, Alavancagem Financeira, Alavancagem Patrimonial, Aquisição de Bens, Investimentos, Consultoria Automotiva, Consultoria em Benefícios Corporativos, Consultoria Contábil/Tributaria, Recuperação de Créditos Tributários, Investimentos Imobiliários e Locações.



Conta com Profissionais altamente qualificados para auxiliar na tomada de decisões que envolvam soluções diversificadas. 

Amplo relacionamento com as maiores referências do mercado!

Name: Coeclerici Group
Villa Group
Description:
Founded in 1986 by Hon. Qasim Ibrahim, Villa Group is the largest and most diversified business entity in the Maldives. Beginning with modest trading roots, our expansion into shipping and strategic entry into tourism in 1988 reflect our dynamic growth. 

Today, with over 5000 team members, we continue our rapid pace of development, making a significant impact on the business landscape in the Maldives.

Join #TeamVILLA in crafting the path to a brighter Maldives.

Name: HM International Holding Co.
Description:
HM International Holding Company, based in Kuwait, is a diversified organization with a strong focus on the Food & Beverage and Kids’ Entertainment sectors. The company manages a growing portfolio of renowned brands and innovative concepts, committed to delivering exceptional experiences and setting new standards of excellence in the region.

Through strategic partnerships, franchise development, and operational expertise, HM International continues to expand its footprint across local and international markets. Guided by a vision of quality, creativity, and sustainable growth, the company plays a leading role in shaping lifestyle and entertainment experiences for families and communities.

Name: Miwa Sugar
Description:
About Miwa Sugar Ltd:
Founded in 2022 and publicly listed on the Stock Exchange of Mauritius (DEM), Miwa Sugar Ltd is dedicated to creating value in Africa through sustainable sugar production, community empowerment, and strategic partnerships. With revenue of $142 million in FY 2022-23, Miwa Sugar employs 4,300 people and supports 17,000 outgrowers. The company emphasizes operational excellence, integrity, respect, and innovation in its operations across Tanzania and Kenya.

TPC Ltd : In Tanzania, TPC Ltd operates at the foot of Mount Kilimanjaro, producing 115,000 tonnes of sugar annually and growing 16,000 hectares of cane. With 1,900 permanent employees and 1,000 seasonal workers, TPC boasts high sugarcane yields of 150 tonnes per hectare and maintains a competitive cost of production. Over its 23 years of successful operations in Tanzania, TPC has initiated significant projects, including the development of a high-capacity distillery.

Transmara Sugar Company Ltd : In Kenya, Transmara Sugar Company is based in Narok County, supporting 17,000 farmers and producing 99,000 tonnes of sugar annually. The company employs 1,400 permanent staff and 2,400 subcontractors. Transmara has achieved record production and revenue growth, driven by investment in cane development and robust support for outgrowers. The company plans to expand its capacity to 160,000 tonnes per year and is set to commission a new briquetting plant to add further value to its operations.

Miwa Sugar Ltd continues to expand its footprint in Africa, leveraging strong governance, financial excellence, and community-focused operations.

Name: Hanan Dashti Company
Description:
Mrs. Hanan Dashti founded HD in 2002.

Hanan Dashti launched her first Hawally, Kuwait salon in 2003. Her second location launched in Abu Halifa, Kuwait, in 2006, and her third salon in Kuwait City's Safir Bastaki Hotel in 2007.
Hanan Dashti developed an all-new photographic studio in 2005. HD Studio
She launched HD Boutique Shop for Professional Makeup and Brushes after her company's success.
Hanan Dashti develops new and improved products through R&D.

Her business is valued over a million Kuwaiti dinars.

Mrs. Dashti is the first Kuwaiti and Gulf woman to develop a Middle Eastern beauty brand and trademark it in Europe, France, and internationally (HD). The tenacity that led to participation in big exhibitions attracted many segments, especially Kuwaiti women who follow the latest trends and are unique in the makeup and fashion industry.

Name: Yuj
Description:
Yuj Global Holdings represent the personal interests of Sid Yog, Founder and former Managing Partner of emerging markets investment firm Xander Group; Founder and former Chairman of the Board of community centric retail real estate company Virtuous Retail; and former Professor at Harvard Business School.

Yuj Global Holdings is the sponsor of Yuj Ventures and Yuj Kutumb which make private, public and impact investments, and the Yuj Foundation which supports communities, organizations and initiatives through grant making. 

Yuj Ventures backs passionate founders building and scaling innovative companies, and entrepreneurs launching and expanding successful franchises in new markets.

Yuj Kutumb supports entrepreneurs building or running organizations that provide public goods in a financially sustainable way. 

Yuj Foundation’s grant making focuses on projects and initiatives run by social entrepreneurs and not-for-profit organizations in three primary areas - education / vocational training, (de)urbanization, and the arts. These represent our Principal’s belief that a better world requires universal access to quality education / vocational training, a sustainable world requires regenerative urbanization and planned de-urbanization, and a civilized world requires more support to the arts that make us human.

The current Yuj portfolio of companies, investments, initiatives and programs spans the United States of America, the United Kingdom, India, the United Arab Emirates, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Luxembourg, Switzerland, France, Ireland, Hong Kong, Mexico, Brazil, South Africa, the Philippines, South Korea, Japan, Indonesia and Singapore.

Name: Vallaham
Description: We are the House of Vallaham! Led by a passionate entrepreneur, Chris Sargunam, this House is the story of his foundation, which took birth in 19th century India, courtesy of his grandfather Masilamai Jesudasan Sargunam, fondly known as MJ Sargunam. Today, after spending over two decades in the corporate, Chris is now keen to dedicate his time and expertise to making a meaningful impact on society, via the Vallaham Foundation. Joining him in this dream, are a bunch of people with varied experiences in different industries, but united by a common cause, which is to drive positive change in society by supporting various initiatives and small businesses that will innovate and empower the next generation. Whether you have a question, need assistance, or want to explore how our platform can elevate your entrepreneurial experience, we’re here for you. Our team is ready to connect, collaborate, and create solutions tailored just for you. And start a conversation that leads to success. Welcome to our world!

Name: Dr Hala Alsayed Medical Group
Description:
Dr. Hala Medical Group is one of Bahrain’s most forward-thinking family-founded healthcare organizations, delivering multidisciplinary clinical care and internationally aligned professional education across the GCC. Founded by Dr. Hala Alsayed and Prof. Mukhtar Al-Hashimi, the Group began as a dedicated dental clinic with a strong focus on pediatric dentistry, steadily evolving into the integrated healthcare ecosystem it is today — spanning medical and dental services, healthcare training, consultancy, trading, events, and academic publishing.

The Group is now guided by second-generation leadership through Group Director Dr. Hashim Al-Hashimi, advancing a knowledge-driven, globally connected model of care built on ethics, quality, and long-term community impact.

At the center of the Group is Dr. Hala Alsayed Medical Center, a leading multidisciplinary provider offering General & Family Medicine and a comprehensive range of dental specialties — including Restorative & Cosmetic Dentistry, Prosthodontics, Implant Dentistry & Oral Surgery, Orthodontics & Clear Aligners, Periodontics, Endodontics, Pediatric Dentistry, and Preventive & General Dentistry — supported by the latest digital and clinical technologies.

The Group also operates Hala Alsayed Health Training Center, one of Bahrain’s largest private-sector providers of life-support and healthcare skills education. The Center delivers CPD, medical postgraduate pathways, and advanced dental residency-style programs, and serves as an International Training Center (ITC) for the American Heart Association (AHA), Saudi Heart Association (SHA), Highfield International, HSI / MEDIC First Aid, EMS Safety, and the American Safety Institute (ASI).

The Group portfolio also includes Hala Publishing Group LLC (Doha, Qatar), Hala Trading — home of Brü, the eco-luxury bamboo oral-care brand — plus Hala Co. for Consultancy & Research and Hala Co. for Organizing Events & Conferences.

Name: Abdul Mohsen Al Hokair Holding Group
Description:
“Believe in what you do & you shall become the master of your craft”
This phrase inspired Sheikh Abdul Mohsen Al Hokair to start his first theme park in Riyadh, which was «an unprecedented leap» in the tourism and entertainment sector, a sector that ran on mere «coincidence. »

Here in Abdul Mohsen Al Hokair Holding Group, we turned «the dream» into an organized industry that aspires to be the best locally, regionally, and internationally. Sheikh Abdul Mohsen›s vision began with the need for tourism and entertainment in the Gulf region, which led to the opening of parks, and recreational centers in 1978, making him the Sheikh of Tourism in the Gulf Region. The roots of our companies were based on research and planning and deep consideration for all aspects of success.

Now, many people look to us with deep appreciation and respect. Each of our companies has its own story of success, and together they crowned us as a holding company», an umbrella for all companies and businesses.

Holding is the mother and protector of our businesses, which began from the first day of networking that Sheikh Abdul Mohsen started to a glorious road that we hope to continue.

Name: Grupo Mesquita, SA
Description: Somos um grupo com um forte foco em diversificação, através da expansão para novos mercados e negócios, com o objectivo de fortalecer nossa posição no crescimento económico de Moçambique, preservando e desenvolvendo nossa linha tradicional de negócios, ao mesmo tempo em que buscamos desenvolver soluções inovadoras que agreguem valor e respondam às necessidades atuais e futuras dos nossos clientes.

Name: Groupe Safari
Description:
Le Groupe Safari est un groupe familial présent dans plusieurs secteurs économiques du Royaume, à travers des entreprises toutes leaders dans leurs domaines d’activité respectifs et réparties de manière équilibrée entre l’industrie et la distribution : industrie (panneaux de bois et dérivés, fabrication de meubles, armatures du béton armé, planchers en béton et acier, béton prêt à l’emploi, produits métallurgiques, plâtre et dérivés, levures et améliorants de panification, tissus automobiles, compteurs d’eau et d’électricité), distribution (marques d’automobile premium, matériel agricole, produits chimiques et de laboratoire, services (métiers de la logistique).

Le Groupe Safari est fondé par feu Mohammed Karim Lamrani dans les années quarante.  Mohammed Karim Lamrani a créé une culture d’entreprise fondée sur le travail ainsi que sur des valeurs de moralité, de transparence, de loyauté et de rigueur.

Les dirigeants actuels du Groupe sont les enfants du fondateur : Saïda Lamrani Karim et Hassan Lamrani Karim, respectivement Président Directeur Général du Groupe et Vice-Président Directeur Général, incarnent les valeurs transmises par leur père et ont contribué à ériger un groupe sain et solide.

Le Groupe privilégie ainsi, pour chacune de ses entreprises, une vision à long terme, une totale indépendance financière et un développement soutenu.

Après plusieurs années de consolidation de ses activités et de développement organique, le Groupe Safari s’inscrit aujourd’hui dans une démarche proactive de développement externe pour accélérer sa croissance au Maroc et initier son expansion à l'international.

Le Groupe compte plus d'une cinquantaine de filiales dont voici les principales : Smeia, Ryad Auto, Jama Auto, Smm Socodam Davum, Somadir, Cema-Bois de l'Atlas, CBA Meubles, CMPE, Comicom, Dimateq, Smcv, Cccm, Mory & Cie, Scim Chimique, Mafaco, Sociétés immobilières, Sociétés agricoles

Name: Activa Holding
Description:
Un grupo empresarial peruano que integra marcas líderes, comprometidas con el crecimiento de nuestros clientes, el desarrollo del país y la generación de oportunidades para nuestro talento.

 Ilumi
El aliado número uno del emprendedor peruano. Con más de 29 años en el mercado, lideramos el sector de equipamiento comercial y gastronómico ofreciendo soluciones como visicoolers, congeladoras, máquinas de helado y más. En Ilumi, no solo equipamos negocios, también impulsamos sueños.

 Fricanox
Somos una cadena especializada en equipamiento comercial y gastronómico, con presencia en 10 tiendas a nivel nacional. Hoy, además de ofrecer nuestras propias soluciones, trabajamos con marcas aliadas para brindar un portafolio más completo y accesible. Somos el primer paso en el camino de muchos emprendedores.

 Lares Grupo Inmobiliario
Desde hace casi 20 años, desarrollamos proyectos inmobiliarios que transforman espacios en hogares y terrenos en oportunidades de inversión. Ya sea en la playa, el campo o la ciudad, en Lares trabajamos para mejorar la calidad de vida de las personas, construyendo comunidades donde el bienestar y el crecimiento van de la mano.

 En Activa, apostamos por el talento, promovemos entornos colaborativos y nos movemos con agilidad para cumplir objetivos reales.

Name: Groupe Alizon
Description:
Le Groupe Alizon fut fondé dans un esprit d’entrepreneuriat et d’aventure, marquant ainsi le début d’une histoire exceptionnelle. 
Chaque acquisition est abordée comme une nouvelle opportunité, avec un véritable intérêt porté non seulement à l’entreprise elle-même, mais aussi à son leadership.

Name: Capital Management Partners - CMP
Description:
Grupo Master Perú, es un grupo de empresas peruanas del sector automotriz (Autopartes Master, Autoquip e Infrima), con gran presencia en el mercado nacional, que se dedica a la importación y venta de frenos y autopartes, así como a la fabricación de pads y pastillas de frenos, los mismos que comercializan en todo el territorio nacional.

Importación, distribución y venta de:

- Pastillas de freno y segmento FRITEC (México)

- Discos y tambores HIPPER FREIOS (Brasil)

- Bloques de freno INCOLBEST (Colombia)
- Rótulas y terminales TNK (Colombia)
- Líquido de freno FRITEC (México)
- Pegamento FAM (Perú)
- Remaches FAM (Perú)

Name: D11 Group
Description:
D11 GROUP  specializes in the trade of a diverse array of businesses services
Energy and Natural Resources, Real Estate and Construction, Finance and Insurance, Healthcare and Pharmaceuticals, Technology and Telecommunication, Manufacturing and Industrial, Agricultural and Food Industries, Transportation and Logistics, Travel and Tourism, Entertainment and Media, Education and Training. 
With extensive contacts throughout Africa & Eastern and Western Europe, Asia, and the Middle East, we are able to offer high-quality services and products at competitive prices.
Our strong relationships with manufacturers and factories allow us to ensure that we provide exceptional value to our clients. In addition to our expertise in product supply, D11 GROUP also boasts significant knowledge in logistics, enabling us to efficiently manage the distribution and delivery of goods worldwide.
With our comprehensive approach, D11 GROUP  is committed to meeting the needs of our customers and delivering excellence in every aspect of our business.

Name: Grupo Osafi
Description:
Grupo formado pelas empresas Minerare, Uniqo Urbanismo, Dois Arcos, Hekos Ambiental, GNR Dois Arcos e Tosana. Fundado em 1968 por Osaná Sócrates de Araujo Almeida, o grupo atua nos segmentos de: Mineração, Pecuária, Resíduos, Energia e Real State.

Conta com aproximadamente 250 colaboradores em suas atividades.

Name: OMR Group
Description: OMR Group je sistem kompanija koji već dve decenije uspešno posluje na tržištu Srbije i regiona u oblastima automotiva, osiguranja, lizinga, flotnog menadžmenta i nekretnina.

Name: Ze Holding
Description:
KMC, a steel-oriented company established by Ziya Eren in Kayseri in 1987, continues its operations with nine different companies under the roof of KMC Group.

KMC Group is named after its first company KMC (Kayseri Metal Center). It operates in other fields such as construction, real estate and sports, along with steel and has more than 700 employees.

KMC Group operates everywhere related steel industry in Turkey with a total of 200.000m² open and 100.000m² closed area and leads the economic and social developments of the region.

Exports to more than 70 countries in 5 continents, designing various products according to the needs of many countries’ markets, just as in the domestic market, and providing unconditional customer satisfaction with several strategies are among the factors that increase the market share of KMC Group every year all over the world.

Gaining its power from the corporate values and being a successful and an important company in Turkey, KMC Group’s added-value for the country’s economy keeps increasing for each and every day with its long-term partnerships and strong financial status.

KMC Group has always been sensitive towards its employees, stakeholders and country, and it adopted the principle which is contributing these actors’ development by important projects in education, health and science.

Name: Sarıkoç Holding
Description: 50 yıla yakın şirket tecrübesini geleceğe yatırımlarıyla birleştiren ve yüksek yetkinlik seviyesini lider personel kadrosuyla pekiştiren SARIKOÇ HOLDING’in temelleri; 1969 yılında KOÇ ELEKTRİK KOLLEKTİF ŞİRKETİ adı altında İstanbul’da atılmıştır. Gelişmeye devam eden elektrik ve mekanik yapısı 2000 yılında KOÇ ELEKTRİK A.Ş.’yi ve bunu takip eden 2016 yılında ise yenilikçi bir gelişimle KOÇ MEKANİK A.Ş.’yi SARIKOÇ GRUP çatısı altında birleştirmiştir. 2018 yılından itibaren sektörel güçlerini perçinleyip SARIKOÇ HOLDING çatısı altında birleşen SARIKOÇ GRUP; ileriye dönük planlama, etkin yönetim sistemleri ve teknolojik gelişim sürecine başarıyla girmiş, ulusal ve uluslararası yüksek nitelikli ve motivasyonlu bir oluşum içerisinde yoluna devam etmektedir.

Name: BeMotion
Description:
BeMotion Inc is a leading innovator in security and defense, prefab housing, oil and gas, and armored vehicle industries, making a significant impact since its inception in 2016. In just a few years, BeMotion has established itself as a formidable presence, recognized for delivering disruptive, game-changing solutions across these sectors.

BeMotion has consistently pushed the boundaries of innovation, redefining industry norms and introducing pioneering technologies that reshape our engagement with the world. Harnessing the newest breakthroughs in AI weapons detection, communication, security and defense, smart city investments, and intelligent vending solutions, BeMotion delivers effectiveness and efficiency at the forefront of change.

Name: CID Kapital Holding
Description: Somos un grupo de empresas enfocadas en diferentes sectores de nuestra sociedad con presencia en: salud, finanzas, logística, comercialización y el apoyo a sectores vulnerables de la población.

Name: Akro Holding
Description:
2016 yılında köklü bir başlangıçla temelleri atılan AKRO Şirketler Grubu, hızlı büyüme stratejisi ve kalite odaklı hizmet anlayışıyla sektörlerinde kendine sağlam bir yer edinmiştir. 2023 yılı Aralık ayında holding yapısı altında birleşerek, daha güçlü ve kapsamlı bir yapıyla faaliyetlerine devam etme kararı almıştır.

AKRO Holding olarak, enerji, güvenlik, araç kiralama, gayrimenkul yatırımı, mühendislik hizmetleri ve danışmanlık, BT donanım kiralama ve bakım hizmetleri ile işe alım ve danışmanlık hizmeti gibi geniş bir yelpazede faaliyet gösteriyoruz. Sektörlerimizdeki deneyimimiz ve uzmanlığımızı birleştirerek, müşterilerimize en iyisini sunmayı ve sürekli olarak gelişmeyi hedefliyoruz.

AKRO Holding olarak, yenilikçi yaklaşımlarımız, güçlü iş etiği ve müşteri odaklı hizmet anlayışımızla sektörlerimizde öncü olmayı ve sürdürülebilir başarılar elde etmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini ve iş ortaklıklarımızın güçlenmesini ön planda tutarak, her geçen gün daha da büyüyor ve ilerliyoruz.

Name: Elaf Group
Description:
Established in 1999, ELAF Group is one of Libya’s most prominent privately held business groups, recognized for its diverse portfolio and commitment to driving innovation across industries. From humble beginnings as a small trading firm, ELAF Group has grown into a powerhouse with a strong presence in key sectors, including Fashion Retail, FMCG, Food & Beverage, Healthcare, Automobiles, Construction, Electromechanical Services, and Alternative Energy.

With a reputation built on trust, integrity, and a customer-first approach, ELAF Group is a market leader in Libya, shaping the future of multiple industries by introducing world-class solutions, brands, and services. Our journey is fueled by a passion for excellence, strategic partnerships, and a deep understanding of the Libyan market.

At ELAF Group, we remain committed to contributing to Libya’s economic development and empowering communities through sustainable growth and innovation. Our vision is to continue expanding our footprint regionally and internationally, building on our legacy of success.

Name: Majuperak Holdings Berhad
Description:
Majuperak Holdings Berhad ("MHB") is an investment holding company with subsidiaries involved in Property Development & Infrastructure, Asset & Facilities Management, Renewable Energy and Trading & Services.

MHB was incorporated back in July 5, 2002 and was listed on the Main Market of Bursa Malaysia on June 27, 2007. The Company strives to be the Best Government-Linked Company ("GLC") in Perak & Beyond by Year 2024, having Perbadanan Kemajuan Negeri Perak (PKNPk) as its holding company. 

MHB's Corporate Head Office is situated in Bazar Ipoh, Perak.

Name: AlSuhaimi Group Holding | مجموعة السحيمي القابضة
Description:
AlSuhaimi Group Holding is a family owned company serving Saudi Arabia and The GCC from our offices located in Dammam, Riyadh, and Jeddah. Our company provides the region with different services and manufacturing capabilities including:
• Water Well Drilling 
• Piling & Deep Foundations 
• Pump Supply & Installation 
• Environmental Consultancy 
• Corrosion Protection Services & Rubber Lining
• Electrical Solution Low-Voltage Switchgear & Panel-Board
• Real Estate
• Hydroponics & Aquaculture

Name: Hedin Group
Description:
Hedin Group is a family-owned company that owns and manages companies operating primarily in the automotive, mobility, construction and real estate industries. The Group’s companies employ more than 12,500 people in 14 countries. Hedin Group is wholly owned by CEO Anders Hedin and has its headquarters in Mölndal, Sweden.

The Group's automotive business dates back to 1985 when father and son Ingemar and Anders Hedin acquired a car dealership in Borås, Western Sweden and founded I.A. Hedin Bil. Almost 40 years later that company, now called Hedin Mobility Group, has grown into a powerhouse in the European automotive market with significant import and distribution operations and leading dealer groups in a number of countries across Europe. 

Hedin Group also includes Tuve Bygg, which offers total solutions in construction, project development, property maintenance and interior carpentry. Tuve Bygg operates in Western Sweden and Stockholm, with headquarters in Gothenburg.

In addition, Hedin Group owns and manages real estate and securities and is also a partner in Consensus Asset Management and Ripam Invest.

Name: Mamabox Corporation Pte Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2019, Mamabox Corporation Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based company specializing in the efficient, reliable, and scalable distribution of fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) across key Asian markets - including Singapore, Hong Kong, and Vietnam.

We are the brand behind brands. Mamabox partners with multinational companies (MNCs), renowned content creators, and celebrity-owned brands to accelerate product growth and visibility throughout Asia.

Leveraging strategic alliances, data-driven insights, and a robust omni-channel B2B2C distribution network, we ensure seamless product reach through:
- D2C Channels: Brand Shops & Kiosks
- Retail Networks: Modern Trade, General Trade, Lifestyle & Convenience Stores
- Digital Platforms: E-commerce Marketplaces & Live-streaming Channels

Our comprehensive distribution solutions empower partners to connect with consumers more effectively and make a lasting impact in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

Please connect with us at reachus@mamaboxcorp.com

Name: Positive Space Media
Description: Positive Space Media is an American communications company where creativity meets impact. We acquire, build, and amplify platforms that inform, connect, and empower communities. Our impact spans film, advertising, education, local news, technology, and economic development. We believe communication is the foundation of progress. Through our businesses, brands, and strategic partnerships, Positive Space Media translates creativity into measurable impact. Our company is building a future where communication itself becomes a force for good.

Name: Doski Holding
Description:
As Doski Holding, real-estate development, tourism, industrial and logistic ventures are at the core of our commitments to people all across the world. While maintaining our quality-focused approach, we are proud to be one of the leading companies, with the help of our global brands, in our operating fields of activity.

Doski Holding was founded in 2006 and is currently among the leading holding companies and groups in all of Iraq. Its position is due to the successful past projects and accomplishments that we have completed with the vision in mind of becoming leaders in the sectors that we operate in. Doski Holding as of now, is operating in various different sectors such as construction, construction materials, contracting, real estate development, real estate investment, tourism, hospitality, logistics, energy, retail trade, foreign trade and more. In addition to its past history which has pushed Doski Holding to the top, one of its keys to success is its customer-oriented approach which developed with not only material achievements but also its awareness of its social responsibility. We are determined to making sure that society benefits, and will continue to benefit, with our projects and achievements in the future. We as Doski Holding are intent on being a positive change to the community by being a patron of charities and sponsoring various projects steered to help the development and education of children in the region.

Name: Asthanesia Group
Description:
Asthanesia is a holding company that serves as a trusted partner for growth. Focusing in the field of food and consumer goods industry that supports the growth of businesses rooted in local potential and driven by innovation. From building brands that celebrate the richness of Indonesia’s culinary heritage to empowering food-tech innovation, Asthanesia continues to grow as a modern enterprise, while staying grounded in the values of integrity, sustainability, and impact.

Our portfolio includes a range of business units such as PT Agrinesia Raya, PT RasaLokal Nusantara, PT Nutrisi Lokanatura Nusantara, Belah Doeren, Kopielatte, and Taro Bun. These businesses are home to more than 10 brands — from beloved traditional snacks to modern food innovations, which have become a meaningful part of daily life for millions of consumers.

By staying close to evolving consumer needs and embracing continuous innovation, we help our brands grow with relevance and resilience. Our commitment to local sourcing, quality products, and responsible business practices has led us to new markets, both at home and abroad.

None of these achievements would be possible without the trust of consumers, the dedication of our people, and the values we hold close. Together, they shape Asthanesia into a company that continues to move forward, with purpose, with people, and with pride.

Name: Golden Gateway Holding
Description:
Kurucumuz Halis Ali Çakmak tarafından yüzde yüz yerli, milli sermaye ve değerler üzerine inşa edilen holdingimizin temelleri 2002 yılında atılmıştır. 2022 itibariyle kuruluşumuzun 20. yılını kutlarken, öncelikle ülkemize, vatandaşlarımıza ve ülkemizin kıymetli misafirlerine nitelikli hizmet sağlamak ve yönetimsel sinerjiyi yakalamak amacıyla grubumuz bünyesinde bulunan şirketler “Golden Gateway Holding” çatısı altında birleştirilmiştir. 
 
Köklü Geçmiş, Güçlü Gelecek: Sektörde Liderlik

20 yılı aşkın süredir sektördeyiz; vize başvuru hizmetleri, sigorta, teknoloji, ticaret, gıda, enerji, finans ve eğitim sektörlerinde kesintisiz hizmet sunuyoruz. Toplam 12 ülkede, 2000'den fazla uzman personelimizle her sektörde yüksek kalitede ve profesyonel çözümler üretmeyi misyon ediniyoruz.
 
Değerlerimizle Yol Almak: Dürüstlük, Hizmet Odaklılık, Yenilik ve Yaratıcılık

Bu değerler, her bir çalışanımızın ve şirketimizin temelini oluşturuyor. Her adımda dürüstlük, hizmet odaklılık, yaratıcılık ve yenilikçilik prensipleriyle ilerleyerek müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmayı ve sektörler arasında fark yaratmayı amaçlıyoruz.
 
Golden Gateway Holding
“Türkiye’den Dünyaya Dünyadan Türkiye’ye Açılan Kapınız”

Name: True North Family of Companies
Description:
True North Equity Partners is a holding company with a nontraditional approach: Our leadership seeks to come alongside business owners who share our worldview and who wish to see their legacies preserved. We believe in servant leadership, and we strive to keep a small family business feeling as we to build our businesses through equipping and building people. Our investments are deeply personal; we care about people and long-term success, and we care about missions and impact beyond profit.

Our portfolio of companies spans diverse sectors: precision manufacturing, distribution, technology, business services, software, and hospitality. True North Equity Partners is affiliated with Paradygm Equity Partners through common ownership, and Paradygm Equity Partners is where we perform due diligence in our acquisitions.

Name: EGY Holding
Description: Founded in 2002, as a 100% Egyptian shareholding company, EGY Holding has been an investment pioneer company that contributed to the investment and development sectors, offering a wide range of successful projects.

Name: Nordic Ignite
Description:
We dedicate ourselves to supporting early-stage companies at the pre-seed level with solid teams, clarity of purpose, and addressing large markets poised for growth or change. Our focus is on companies domiciled in the Nordics and Baltics, in sectors where the Nordics have a competitive advantage, deep knowledge and strong infrastructure.

We priorities sustainability in all our decisions, focusing on advancing the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and following Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) principals. We aim for total gender equality regarding the composition of our management team, shareholders, and partner companies.

Name: Pineda Company
Description:
At Pineda Company, we are dedicated to transforming entrepreneurial visions into reality through innovative strategies, high-impact systems, and industry-leading support. Our portfolio of dynamic brands reflects our mission to empower individuals and businesses to achieve scalable success.

Our Brands:
Wealthy Investor: A premier education platform equipping entrepreneurs and real estate investors with the tools, coaching, and community to thrive. Wealthy Investor has helped countless individuals close their first deals and scale to 7- and 8-figure success.

Pineda Capital: Helping investors grow their portfolios through strategic real estate investments. Pineda Capital specializes in identifying lucrative opportunities and providing expert guidance to build long-term wealth.

Homerun Offer: Simplifying the home-selling process by offering fast, fair cash offers for homeowners. Our transparent and streamlined approach ensures a win-win experience for all parties involved.

Meet Our Founder & CEO:
Ryan Pineda is a visionary entrepreneur, real estate investor, and business leader who has scaled multiple companies to 8 figures. With a passion for creating wealth and impact, Ryan has helped thousands of entrepreneurs and investors build thriving businesses through his innovative coaching, systems, and leadership. As the driving force behind Pineda Company, Ryan’s mission is to inspire and empower others to achieve freedom through entrepreneurship and real estate.

Together, our brands form a robust ecosystem designed to support entrepreneurs.

Name: Thrive Holdings
Description:
Holdings owns and operates businesses in critical industries where we believe technology can deliver strategic value to employees and customers.
We take a long-term approach, acquiring established businesses and combining their expertise with our technical and operational capabilities. This integrated strategy enables us to develop domain specific AI models and other proprietary technology that can continuously improve over time.
Holdings is focused on sectors that are core to the real economy and currently operates in the Accounting and IT services sectors.

Name: GDEV Inc. ($GDEV)

Its franchises, such as Hero Wars, Island Hoppers, Pixel Gun 3D and others have accumulated over 550 million installs and $2.5 bln of bookings worldwide. For more information, please visit www.gdev.inc

Name: Press Corporation plc
Description:
Press Corporation PLC is a public company incorporated in Malawi, under the Companies Act 1984; and is listed on the Malawi Stock Exchange. Being the largest holding company in Malawi, Press Corporation has interests in different sectors of the Malawi economy including: financial services; telecommunications; enegry;  property investments; and hospitality and tourism. The highly diversified company has stakes in fifteen companies comprising of eight subsidiaries, four joint ventures and one associate.

These include National Bank of Malawi (NBM) plc, Puma Energy Malawi Limited, PressCane Limited, Ethanol Company Limited, Telekom Networks Malawi (TNM) plc, Open Connect Limited, Limbe Leaf Tobacco Company Limited, The Foods Company Limited, LifeCo Holdings Limited, Macsteel Malawi Limited, Press Properties Limited and Sunbird Tourism plc

Name: Triple-M Group Of Industries
Description:
Triple-M Group Of Industries is one of the leading business conglomerates based in Punjab, Pakistan with over 50 years of experience in three main industries – Textile, Real Estate and Technology.
We own and operate an extensive range of businesses including Fashion Textile, Home Textile, Import and Export, Yarn Trading, Real-Estate Investment, and Software Development each having their own individual brand and product range but working in isolation and enjoying discrete financial benefits.

Name: Merisai Group
Description: Founded in 2011, Merisai Group has acquired multiple businesses & expanded operations into various industries: gasoline, health & wellness, construction, IT, and marketing. We strive to grow our presence in existing industries exponentially, while also stepping into and transforming other industries.

Name: Possehl Digital
Description:
Possehl Digital investiert, als Teil der Possehl Gruppe mit mehr als 200 mittelständischen Industrieunternehmen, in relevante digitale Technologiefirmen und verschafft somit für die Gruppe sowie für die Industrie, Zugang zu passenden digitalen Angeboten und leisten damit einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Zukunftsfähigkeit des industriellen Mittelstands.

Was bedeutet das für uns?

Wir verstehen durch die enge Zusammenarbeit mit der Possehl Gruppe praxisnah die Herausforderungen des industriellen Mittelstands bei der digitalen Transformation.

Diese Herausforderungen überführen wir in Suchfelder und suchen neue Beteiligungen und Partnerschaften, die ein Angebot zur Lösung haben oder entwickeln wollen.

Die Beteiligungen und Partnerschaften bringen wir dann in die Possehl Gruppe, lösen die Herausforderungen, entwickeln die Unternehmen und damit das Angebot strategisch weiter und skalieren damit in der DACH Region.
Dadurch verschaffen wir der Possehl Gruppe sowie dem industriellen Mittelstand insgesamt Zugang zu passenden digitalen Angeboten und leisten damit einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Zukunftsfähigkeit dieser beider Gruppen.

Unser Portfolio deckt dabei bereits einige Bedarfe der digitalen Transformation im Mittelstand ab. Dabei suchen wir weiterhin nach neuen Beteiligungen, die zu unserer Mission passen. 

- Possehl Analytics GmbH
- Possehl Online Solutions GmbH
- cluetec GmbH
- bitnamic GmbH
- Possehl Secure GmbH (before Twinsec GmbH)
- Simplifier AG
- mono d.o.o
- DataSpark GmbH
