Name: AlAggad Holding Company (AICO)
Description:
Since its establishment in 1975 by Sheikh Omar A. AlAggad, the AlAggad Holding Company (AICO) has been a driving force in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the entire region as well as a key participant and contributor to the country’s vision for a more promising and prosperous future.

Rooted in a nation that thrives by creating a positive and nurturing business climate, AICO’s ongoing achievements reflect the Saudi Arabian government’s formation of a strong ecosystem for business growth. That, combined with AICO’s effective corporate structure and a motivated and skilled team, allows it to provide local and regional markets with exceptional products and outstanding services while contributing to sustainable economic development.

Today, Sheikh Omar A. AlAggad’s strategic vision has transformed AICO and its seven successful affiliates into regionally recognized leaders in the automotive, communications, healthcare, manufacturing, insurance, and consumer goods sectors across the GCC and the MENA regions.

Based in Riyadh, AICO’s strengths and its innovation-fueled outlook have built a diverse investment portfolio that includes wireless communications, building materials, automobiles, medical equipment and more, while its strategic partnerships with recognized global brands and multinationals reverberate across local and regional markets.

Through meticulously planned operations and the stringent implementation of best practices, AICO drives its affiliates to continuously advance and achieve financial success by creating a platform for intelligent and sustainable growth, ultimately opening the doors for impactful regional opportunities. 
Today, AICO, led by Chairman Talal Omar AlAggad, is strategically building on the company’s legacy, propelling AICO forward to effectively serve and expand into a dynamic and continuously evolving range of markets and industries.

Name: Konfor Grup
Description:
Konfor markasının 1978 yılında başladığı kurumsal serüven, zamanla büyüyen ve güçlenen iştiraklerin katkısıyla günümüzde Konfor Grup çatısı altında devam etmektedir. Konfor Grup, bünyesinde yer alan mobilya ve inşaat şirketlerinin tüm yönetimsel stratejilerine yön vermekte ve sektördeki liderliğini sürdürmektedir.

Konfor Grup’un markaları, müşteri memnuniyeti, inovasyon ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkelerini ortak payda olarak benimsemektedir. Teknolojik yenilikleri takip ederek tüketicilerine modern yaşam standartları sunmanın yanı sıra, ekonomiye katma değer sağlayacak projeler geliştirmek de en temel önceliklerimiz arasındadır.

Konfor Grup Markaları:

Konfor Mobilya
Konfor Yatak
Çetmen Mobilya
Resty Yatak
Landor İnşaat

Biz, her bir markamızla sektördeki yenilikçi çözümlerimiz ve yüksek kalite anlayışımızla fark yaratmayı hedefliyoruz. Modern yaşam alanları ve konforlu çözümler sunarak, müşteri memnuniyetini en üst düzeyde tutuyoruz.

Name: HartLogic - Sustainable Entrepreneurship Platform
Description:
HartLogic supports entrepreneurs through 3 solutions: Foundation, Enterprise, and Society. HartLogic Foundation to achieve justice and human well-being through Sustainable Ecosystems, Development Programs, and Initiatives. HartLogic Enterprise to reach maximum potential through Incubator, Consulting, and Ventures. HartLogic Society to established relationships and exchanging information through Membership, Community, and Associations.

As an NGO (Non-Governmental Organization) HartLogic has the vision to support entrepreneurs around the world. With the mission of creating new connections, enabling collaborations, providing knowledge, improving personal skills, and building organizations. “Kita Wujudkan, Sekarang.” is the HartLogic tagline which is the basis for Hartroopers in carrying out all activities. As an entrepreneurship platform, HartLogic helps entrepreneurs to start, launch, develop, sustainable, and expand because everything we do is driven by this question: How can we provide the best support for entrepreneurs?

Assets include both wholly owned businesses and holdings in public and private companies.

Name: Salgraf
Description:
Misión:
Somos una organización dinámica y competitiva, con un equipo humano comprometido y apasionado en convertir la imagen de nuestros clientes en ventajas competitivas; basados en productos y servicios de calidad, buscando rentabilidad sostenida para los accionistas.
Visión:
Ser una empresa líder en todas las líneas de negocio en las que participemos. Competitiva en el mercado internacional, desarrollando y ofreciendo productos y servicios diferenciados por su nivel de calidad e innovación. Reconocidos como modelo organizacional, por una óptima relación con sus stakeholders, apoyados por gente apasionada por el éxito y comprometida con los valores y principios de la organización, la satisfacción del cliente, la cultura de calidad, la rentabilidad sostenible, la responsabilidad social y ambiental; y contando con la tecnología más adecuada que permita un crecimiento sostenido en el tiempo.
Valores corporativos:
Pasión:
Sabemos que solo con la suma de nuestros esfuerzos alcanzaremos el éxito, por eso disfrutamos el trabajo en equipo y siempre apoyamos donde se requiere.
Lealtad:
Estamos plenamente identificados con los objetivos de nuestra empresa, por eso somos incapaces de traicionar con nuestros actos y omisiones la consecución de las metas de nuestros equipos de trabajo.
Compromiso:
Conscientes de la importancia de nuestra misión, reconocemos la obligación de otorgar un servicio eficaz que responda a las expectativas de nuestros clientes. Conocemos las políticas de la empresa y la importancia de las funciones que desempeñamos, por eso somos capaces de responder por los resultados de nuestras acciones.
Respeto:
Nuestros actos se desarrollan dentro de un constante reconocimiento y aceptación de los derechos, bienes y pensamientos de los demás.

Name: Wien Holding GmbH
Description:
Wien ist eine vielfältige, moderne, dynamische, aufgeschlossene und soziale Stadt, die sich im Wettbewerb der europäischen Städte ausgezeichnet positioniert hat. Weit über die Landesgrenzen hinaus wirkt die Stadt Wien als Zentrum innovativer Dienstleistungen und vielfältiger Kompetenzen. Die Wien Holding leistet mit ihren rund 75 Unternehmen in vier Geschäftsfeldern - Kultur, Immobilien, Logistik und Digital - dazu einen wesentlichen Beitrag.

Der Konzern befindet sich im Eigentum der Stadt Wien. Er erfüllt kommunale Aufgaben, ist privatwirtschaftlich organisiert und auf Ertrag ausgerichtet, unter Berücksichtigung gemeinwirtschaftlicher Ziele. Gemeinsam mit Partner*innen und privaten Investor*innen steht die Wien Holding für zukunftsorientierte und nachhaltige Projekte, die den Wirtschaftsstandort sichern, das Wirtschaftswachstum ankurbeln, Arbeitsplätze schaffen und damit die Lebensqualität für die Menschen insgesamt erhöhen.

Name: Grupo Fila

Controlar as organizações para que prezem pela excelência nos serviços ou produtos, visando uma busca incansável por melhoria contínua na qualidade, atendimento e satisfação.
Buscar constantemente por oportunidades de negócios e soluções inovadoras que acrescentem valor as empresas do grupo.
Manter relação respeitosa e ética com o meio ambiente e a sociedade. 
Prover recursos para desenvolvimento profissional e pessoal dos envolvidos na organização.
Desenvolver negócios e relacionamentos que nos coloquem como uma organização que preza pela transparência, confiança, agilidade, segurança e rentabilidade.

Name: Virtus Trading Limited (A Virtus Holding Company)
Description:
VTL has a long proven experience in introducing cutting-edge healthcare equipment and solutions from world-class manufacturers. Their diverse capabilities in Marketing, Sales, Application Support and Service of a wide and comprehensive range of medical equipment and consumables for healthcare facilities, rehabilitation and wellness, makes them a leading solution provider in the region.

Starting from textiles and with 70 years of continuous investment and expansion, the Far Eastern Group has achieved vertical and horizontal integration, and now spans ten major industries, including petrochemicals and energy, polyester and synthetic fiber, cement and building materials, retail and department stores, financial services, sea/land transportation, communications and Internet, construction, hotels, and philanthropy. There are 10 publicly listed companies in the Group with total assets exceeding US$100 billion and annual revenue surpassing US$23 billion.

With a commitment to constantly creating new value for customers and shareholders, the Group has nearly 57,800 highly qualified, solidly-trained, enthusiastic and dedicated employees in more than ten countries, including Taiwan, China, Hong Kong, Vietnam, Singapore, Malaysia, and Thailand. Leveraging state-of-the-art technology, know-how, skills, facilities and management, the Group manufactures and markets high-quality products ranging from energy, chemical fibers, textile & apparel, to cement & construction materials.

To improve human welfare and enhance harmony between people and the environment, all of the Group’s business activities focus on environmental protection and effective utilization of natural resources. Apart from providing the most comprehensive on-the-job training and the best working environment for its staff, the Group also encourages lifelong learning to broaden knowledge and skills. Backed by active R&D and innovation, the Group strives to manufacture the best products and offer the highest level of services within its environmentally friendly business model.

FEG aims to make every division in the group the top-ranking company in their respective industries. This has been and always will be the Group's objective.

With a revenue of nearly €2.6 billion and almost 8,300 employees, Oetker Collection KG is an internationally active group owned by shareholders Dr. Alfred and Ferdinand Oetker. It comprises 148 individual companies in 37 countries. 	•	ICT Services – digital infrastructure, cloud solutions, and enterprise technology.

	•	Sustainability-driven solutions aligned with global goals.

	•	Partner-in-growth approach — more than a service provider, we build ecosystems.

At Three Ace Group, we believe power, technology, finance, and hospitality are the pillars of Africa’s future. We are proud to stand at the intersection of these industries, creating opportunities and shaping tomorrow’s global hub for growth and innovation.

 Together, let’s power the future.

Otomobil, hafif ticari, yolcu tașıma grubu, orta ve ağır ticari kamyonlar, çekici, treyler ve tüm bu ürünlerin yan ekipmanları ile birlikte karayolunda hareket eden tüm segmentlere hitap edebilen ürün yelpazesini olușturan markalara sahiptir. Name: HAR Group
Description:
2011’de kurulan Har Group, 2021 yılı itibariyle dört farklı sektördeki beş şirketiyle faaliyet gösteren bir şirketler topluluğudur. Teknoloji, turizm, enerji ve tarım sektörlerindeki şirketlerimiz iş dünyasında emin adımlarla yürümeye devam etmektedir.

Son yıllarda uluslararası yatırımlarla daha da büyüyen grup, bugün 500’den fazla çalışanıyla, faaliyet gösterdiği sektörlerde lider olma yolunda ilerlemektedir. Hem gelişen Türkiye ekonomisinin hem de global pazarın önemli aktörlerinden biri olmayı hedefleyen Har Group, gücünü doğduğu topraklardan, Anadolu’dan almaktadır.

Temelleri Elazığ’da atılan ve bugün başka ülkelere ulaşmış olan hikayemiz, yüzü Batı’ya dönük ancak her daim köklerine sadık bir vizyonla yolculuğuna devam ediyor. Küresel dünyada, dijital çağın kodlarını iyi okuyan ve doğru teknolojik hamleler yapan girişimlerin öncü rol üstleneceğine inanıyoruz. O nedenle Har Group olarak en büyük yatırımımızı teknolojiye ve bilişim alanlarına yapıyoruz. Bu anlamda yazılım şirketimiz Roof Stacks’ı grubumuzun amiral gemisi olarak görüyoruz. Teknoloji ekosisteminde yenilikçi ve özgün içerikler yaratmak hedefiyle yoluna devam eden yazılım şirketimiz, bu noktada dünyaya açılan yüzümüzü temsil ediyor.

Ticari hedeflerimizi hayata geçirirken, yaşadığımız coğrafyanın ekonomisinde pozitif etki yaratmayı ve istihdam alanları açarak memlekete fayda sağlamayı amaçlayan sorumlu bir yatırım grubuyuz. Bu noktada ‘Önce insan, önce memleket’ rotamızı belirleyen temel mottomuz.

İlerlediğimiz bu yolda, önümüzü aydınlatan ise, benimsediğimiz ilkeler ve işimize duyduğumuz tutku. Rasyonel yatırımlarımız, stratejik iş birliklerimiz ve girişimci fikirlerimizle, iş dünyasında sağlam temeller inşa ederek, hayallerimizi gerçekleştirmeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Timah Partners
Description:
Timah Partners is a permanent holding company that acquires and operates high-quality, recurring, essential B2B SMEs across Southeast Asia. Unlike traditional investment firms, we don’t aim for an exit — our intention is to steward great businesses indefinitely.

We’re solving a looming crisis hiding in plain sight: SME succession. Take Singapore: SMEs employ over 70% of the workforce, yet only a quarter have a formal succession plan. As the population aged 65+ is set to double — reaching nearly a third of the country over the next two decades — thousands of high-quality, cash-generating businesses risk disappearing each year. Not for lack of value, but for lack of a viable next chapter.

Timah was built to meet this moment. We acquire great SMEs from retiring owners and serve as a permanent, values-driven home to grow their legacies over the next generation. In parallel, we’re developing the region's next wave of SME leaders through the region’s first CEO Succession Program — a structured path for emerging operators to one day lead these businesses.

We’re fortunate to be backed by Compounding Labs, the pioneer in modern long-term holding companies, and the founders of Danaher, TransDigm, and 3G Capital — some of the world’s most successful holding companies. Our boards include senior operators from leading regional firms such as Sea, Grab, DBS Bank, QuantEdge, and Union Energy, as well as high-level public sector figures, including a former PAP politician and heads of key regulatory agencies like JTC and SLA.

We’re not a fund. We’re not flippers. We’re builders — committed to permanent stewardship, operational excellence, and deep respect for what founders have built.

2011 yılında finans kurumlarına bilişim ve danışmanlık hizmeti ile başlayan ve bugün itibariyle holding iştirakleri bünyesinde bulunan 250’den fazla çalışma arkadaşımız ile bilişim, fintech, elektronik para ve ödeme hizmetleri, enerji, mühendislik ve tarım alanlarında hizmet veren şirketlerimizi 2021 itibariyle Veventures Şirketler Topluluğu çatısı altında bir araya getirdik. 2023 yılında ise Ticaret Bakanlığı izni ile şirketlerimizi Holding bünyesinde topladık.

Grup şirketlerimiz, dünyanın bir çok ülkesinde bankalardan enerji santrallerine, devlet kuruluşlarından son kullanıcılara çeşitli alanlarda hizmet vermekte olup, bulunduğu sektörlere çeşitlilik ve yenilik katmayı vizyon edinmiştir. Bu vizyon ile farklı alanlarda hizmet verme arayışlarına ve çeşitli start-up ve şirketlere yatırım yapmaya devam etmektedir.

2023 yılı itibariyle holding yapılanmamızı tamamlayarak, faaliyetlerimize Veventures Holding adı altında devam etmekteyiz.

Name: Mehyou Group
Description:
Founded in the 1980s, Mehyou Group has evolved from a strong foundation in into a dynamic, multi-faceted enterprise. Over the years, we have scaled businesses, ventured into new sectors, and developed the strategic capabilities to foster growth. Our success is rooted in a commitment to meticulous planning, applying cutting-edge systems, leveraging the latest technology, and partnering with a highly skilled team of professionals.

As creators, we are constantly developing new business strategies and institutions. We have established several divisions within Mehyou Group, where we not only own our companies but also actively collaborate with community businesses to drive shared success.

After decades of growth and diversification, Mehyou Group has transformed into an investment firm, overseeing two major holdings: Intercontinental Aviation Enterprise (IAE) and Mehyou Properties. These ventures represent our commitment to excellence in both aviation and real estate.

IAE specializes in aviation education and training, with academies located in the UAE, Lebanon, Cyprus, and Greece. The company also offers general aviation management services, as well as private and charter jet services. Through IAE, we aim to shape the future of aviation by providing world-class training and services that meet the needs of a global industry.

Mehyou Properties, on the other hand, is a leading provider of bespoke real estate services across the Middle East and Cyprus. The company is a key shareholder in PWR Group, a development, construction, contracting, and energy services provider with operations in the UAE and Cyprus. Additionally, Mehyou Properties holds stakes in Compass Real Estate, a prominent firm operating in the UAE. 

Through these ventures, Mehyou Group continues to build on its legacy of creating lasting value, driving innovation, and shaping the future of industries in which it operates.

Description:
HEWA Holding of Companies was formed to consolidate various current business operated by the group under Chairman Mr. Ahmad Kadir Ismail Al Majidi.
History:
Mr. Ahmed Qadir Al Majidi the company founder, was born in 1950 in Erbil. Mr Al- Majidi started his career in the commodity trading business and also handled various other interests of the family. Over the years the group of companies diversified and grew into various business activities ranging from Investment projects to real estate developers to construction & Retailing within Erbil and abroad.

Hewa Holding, based in Arbil, Iraq, imports and provides infrastructure materials that are required by the top contractors in Iraq and the region in general.

Hewa Holding is Iraqs largest importer of construction materials, such as all sizes of construction Iron / steel bars, cement, all kinds of PVC, Wood, bricks, building blocks and electricity materials etc. Hewa Holding is a major importer of other construction materials including asphalt and ready-mixed concrete equipments.

Hewa Holding is a leading importer of cement in Iraq.

Hewa Holding imports nearly all kinds of construction materials as well as building and road construction materials, primarily crushed stone, sand and gravel, that are used in almost all forms of construction. In particular, large quantities of aggregates are used to build roads and non residential properties.

Hewa Holding has always strived to bring the best quality materials to the Iraqi market and the satisfaction of our customers is our first priority and that is the secret behind our success.

Name: Official Brand Company
Description:
A OBC nasceu do esporte e evoluiu com ele. Nossa trajetória começou com a criação de marcas autênticas que dialogam com atletas reais, como Pretorian, Naja e Kailash - nomes que carregam força, propósito e uma conexão genuína com quem vive o esporte na pele.
Com o tempo, expandimos nosso olhar para além dos produtos. Hoje, somos uma plataforma de marcas que impulsiona o ecossistema esportivo brasileiro por meio de inovação, performance e parcerias estratégicas. Atuamos lado a lado com atletas, fornecedores e parceiros que compartilham da mesma energia de superação que nos move desde o início.
Olhamos para o futuro com ambição e responsabilidade: queremos crescer de forma sustentável, investir em tecnologia, atrair novos talentos e contribuir ativamente para a transformação do esporte e da sociedade. Acreditamos no poder do movimento - físico, social e cultural - como agente de mudança.
Se você compartilha essa visão, a OBC está de portas abertas. Vamos juntos mais longe.

OBC was born from sport and has evolved alongside it. Our journey began with the creation of authentic brands that resonate with real athletes, such as Pretorian, Naja, and Kailash — names that carry strength, purpose, and a true connection with those who live and breathe sports.
Over time, we expanded our vision beyond products. Today, we are a platform of brands driving Brazil’s sports ecosystem through innovation, performance, and strategic partnerships. We work side by side with athletes, suppliers, and partners who share the same spirit of resilience that has guided us from the start.
We look to the future with ambition and responsibility: striving for sustainable growth, investing in technology, attracting new talent, and actively contributing to the transformation of both sports and society. We believe in the power of movement - physical, social, and cultural - as a force for change. If you share this vision, OBC is ready to connect. Let’s go further, together.

Além disso, sua estrutura promove inovação contínua e alinhamento estratégico entre as empresas controladas, ampliando o potencial de crescimento e valorização patrimonial.

Consolidado como referência no mercado, o REE Holding avança em ritmo acelerado, expandindo suas frentes de atuação e fortalecendo sua posição como protagonista no desenvolvimento de soluções que transformam a gestão e a valorização de patrimônios imobiliários em escala nacional e internacional.

Name: Sumitomo Forestry America Inc.
Description:
Sumitomo Forestry America, Inc. is the holding company of Sumitomo Forestry's affiliates in the US. In addition to its function as a holding company, the Dallas office sells timber and building materials, while the Los Angeles branch sells landscape materials. Additionally, SFA MF Holdings, LLC manages multi-family housing developments as a holding company for real estate businesses.

Since 2003, Sumitomo Forestry has been selling houses in Seattle, Washington, the location of one of its distribution bases for timber and building materials. The company has established a foothold into the world’s biggest housing market.

Following this, we have been providing high-quality wooden housing through the acquisition of equity interests of leading local builders, while making sure to consider local culture, climate, and construction methods that are unique to the U.S.

In 2016, we started the multi-family housing business, and we expanded our businesses further in 2018 through the acquisition of equity interests from a land development company and a real estate company which was focused on the development of multi-family housing, as well as commercial and mixed-use complexes. Through the expansion, not only in the single-family homes section, but also in a wider range of other business sectors, we have both consolidated and diversified our sources of revenue in the U.S.

We strive for an effective yet potent synergy between Sumitomo Forestry and its affiliated companies. This is done through the gathering and bolstering of the strengths of all our groups, which is based on a relationship of trust through the sharing of business policies and philosophies with management teams of each group company. Simultaneously, appropriate living environments within communities are provided in order to meet the local needs of each area; with the aim of further expanding and developing our businesses in the future.

But our success isn’t solely measured by our bottom line. We understand that as a corporation, we have a responsibility to make a positive impact on the world. That’s why we remain unwavering in our commitment to marrying our passion with the purpose to enact real change.

We recognize that our greatest asset is our people. We value each and every member of our diverse team and are dedicated to fostering an inclusive culture where all voices are heard and valued. As we continue to strive for excellence, we do so with the knowledge that it is our employees who drive our success and make us the global standard for excellence.

Name: Meteor Group
Description:
2005 yılında attığımız ilk adımla yalnızca bir şirket kurmadık; bir hayali, bir hedefi ve bir yaşam felsefesini de başlatmış olduk. 2008 yılında Bursa’da konut projelerimizle yalnızca binalar değil, hayatlar inşa ederek “yaşam markası” olmayı başardık. 2011’de Türkiye’nin köklü akaryakıt firmalarından Opet’in distribütörlüğünü üstlenerek sektöre güçlü bir giriş yaptık. 2013’te İstanbul şubemizi açarak faaliyet alanımızı genişletirken, 2016’da dijital dönüşüm hamlemizle çağın gereklerini önceden gören bir vizyon sergiledik. 2019’da SAP sürecini başlatarak, yeni nesil kurumsal kaynak planlama sistemlerini bünyemize entegre ederek, Meteor Grup'u geleceğin şirketi haline getirme yolunda kararlılıkla ilerledik. Dijitalleşmenin gücüyle iç süreçlerimizde hız ve şeffaflık sağlarken, müşteri memnuniyetini de her zaman odağımızda tuttuk. 2020 yılında ise Avos markamızla tarımsal faaliyetlere yönelerek doğaya dokunan bir iş modelini hayata geçirdik. Aynı yıl sanayi çatısı altında Löher, Löwe, T.R.U.S.T. markalarımızla yürüyen merdiven ve asansör sektörüne yenilikler kazandırarak, teknolojik yatırımlarımızı sanayiye taşıdık. Bu bağlamda, İzmir ve Iğdır’da şubeler açarak sanayi yatırımlarımızı somutlaştırmış olduk. 2022 yılı Bursa Nilüfer’de Meteor Kültür Evi ve Simya Kitap Kafe ile toplumsal gelişime katkı sunduk, aynı yıl “Pazarfili Sadakat Programı” ile müşteri bağlılığını güçlendirdik. 19. yılımızda farklı sektörlerde aynı değerlerle birleşerek büyük bir aile olduğumuzu ilan ettik. Günümüzde inşaattan enerjiye, sanayiden tarıma, kültürden dijital çözümlere uzanan alanlarda öncü, yenilikçi ve sürdürülebilir çözümler sunmaya devam ediyoruz. Henüz tamamlanmamış bir hikâyeyiz; güçlü adımlarla büyüyor, hayallerimizi gerçeğe dönüştürmek için heyecanla çalışıyoruz, çünkü Meteor Ailesi olarak biliyoruz ki bu yolculuk daha yeni başlıyor.

Bünyemizdeki markalar:
- Meteor Petrol 
- Löher
- Avelice
- Löwe
- Meteor İnşaat
- PazarFili
- Simya Kitap Kafe

Name: Nomadd Group
Description:
Nomadd Group | Future-Ready Education, Workforce & Systems Transformation

Nomadd Group is a national education, workforce development, and innovation partner helping school districts, higher education institutions, municipalities, and employers prepare learners and communities for the Future of Work.

We specialize in Portrait of a Graduate (POG) transformation, STEM and Industry 4.0 pathways, and cross-sector partnerships that align education systems with real workforce demand.

Our work sits at the intersection of change management, talent development, economic mobility, and emerging industries.

Our Core Services

Portrait of a Graduate Transformation & Change Management
We support districts and institutions in moving from vision to execution.


Portrait of a Graduate Readiness Assessment
A diagnostic tool to assess how well systems are aligned to their Portrait of a Graduate goals.

STEM Gap Finder
A proprietary assessment that identifies gaps between student skills, instructional design, and future labor market needs.


STEM Certifications & Career Pathways
We design and deliver industry-aligned credentials that lead to real careers.


Workforce Development & Industry Partnerships
We help institutions move beyond education into economic mobility.

Portrait of a Graduate Leadership Network (Launching Soon)
A membership based learning and collaboration network for Superintendents, Principals, and Education Leaders driving system transformation.

Who We Serve
-K–12 School Districts
-Charter & Alternative Schools
-Higher Education Institutions
-City & State Agencies
-Community-Based Organizations
-Employers & Industry Partners

Our Impact
NG helps communities:
-Build future-ready learners
-Align education to real workforce demand
-Increase economic mobility
-Strengthen regional talent ecosystems
-Turn strategy into measurable outcomes

Name: Schwanhäußer Industrie Holding GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
We are a part of Schwan-STABILO. 

About 850 million euros in turnover. More than 5,250 employees. 37 sites around the world. Schwan-STABILO is one of the most successful family firms in Germany today.

Gustav Adam Schwanhäusser laid the foundations for the company’s success back in 1865. He quickly recognised the opportunities offered by the burgeoning Industrial Revolution, obtained a loan of 32,000 guilder from his father, and purchased a pencil factory founded 1855 in Nuremberg. More than 165 years and six generations later, this has become an international group with three independent divisions: Cosmetics, Writing Instruments and Outdoor.

Today, as in the past, entrepreneurial courage, foresight and knowledge of what is feasible form the mainstays of the company’s success.

Through a combination of legacy businesses and forward-looking ventures, ABEHCO maintains a strong, evolving presence across high-impact industries that shape regional economies.

Rooted in strong family values and Kuwaiti culture, ABEHCO proudly serves a diverse network of partners across both private and public sectors—delivering reliable, solutions-driven outcomes anchored in integrity and professionalism. Leveraging deep expertise and strategic foresight, we foster sustainable growth and long-term impact across everything we do.

Our commitment is to build lasting legacies by investing thoughtfully, nurturing meaningful partnerships, and consistently creating value that endures. As we expand our presence regionally and globally, trust, vision, and responsibility remain at the heart of our journey.

Name: Summus Capital
Description:
Summus Capital OÜ is a real estate investment holding group established in 2013 with investments in commercial real estate in Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania and Poland. Direct real estate investments are made through daughter companies of the respective country of location. We believe that the best way to increase the asset value and wellbeing of tenants and employees is through sustainable management. 
We are a well-managed and well-capitalized company with a primary focus on the Baltics and Poland. Well diversified commercial real estate portfolio includes properties in retail, office, logistics and medical segments. Our tenants include resilient international players like KPMG, Synlab, Confido, Lindex, RIMI, Maxima, H&M and Apollo. 
Summus Capital’s portfolio consists of 16 properties in Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania and Poland with a total net leasable area of 257 thousand m2 and ca 440 tenants. The portfolio value is ca 500MEUR.
Summus Capital holds a corporate rating from rating agency Scope Ratings GmbH of BB (stable).
Bonds issued by Summus Capital have been admitted to trading on the Nasdaq Baltic First North market by Nasdaq.
The investment strategy of Summus Capital portfolio is based on cash flow generating commercial real estate with a long-term perspective. Summus Capital sees a future in sustainable buildings and value add investments. Portfolio strategy foresees that share of any sector should not significantly exceed 50% of the portfolio, the share of anchors in the portfolio’s cash ﬂow is at least 50%, and the minimum investment size is 10 MEUR.
We are always interested in new projects with prospective partners. Whether you are a financial services provider interested in providing financing, a service provider in the real-estate sector or a real-estate holder looking to sell your property, we look forward to a fruitful and long-term cooperation with you.

Name: zhouse
Description:
Nossa missão é desenvolver o ecossistema integrado onde estamos presentes, a fim de guardar o patrimônio natural, histórico e cultural do país. 

Nossa atuação: 

• Agrosustentável
Acreditamos em um modelo de desenvolvimento socioeconômico sustentável, capaz de potencializar a vocação original das regiões onde atuamos e colaborar com a estruturação de cadeias de produtos da sociobiodiversidade.

• Hospitalidade
Nos orgulhamos de um portfólio de hospitalidade formado por pousadas e experiências turísticas imersivas na natureza e nas culturas locais, que provocam impacto positivo tanto em nossos 
hóspedes e visitantes, quanto nas comunidades onde estamos inseridos.

• Filantropia
Integramos e colaboramos com uma rede de conexão entre parceiros de diferentes setores da sociedade, para promover um desenvolvimento mais sustentável e a coexistência mais harmônica entre pessoas e recursos naturais.

• Imobiliário
Investimos em áreas de conservação, corredores ecológicos, zonas de amortecimento e áreas dedicadas a atividades produtivas sustentáveis, gerando valor para os territórios onde estamos presentes.

• Coparticipações
Criamos oportunidades de investimentos com o objetivo de gerar escala, replicabilidade e rentabilidade a marcas de produtos e serviços alinhados ao desenvolvimento sustentável.

• Descobertas
Abrimos espaço para inovação, seja por meio de iniciativas transversais aos outros eixos de negócios ou novos projetos e experiências.

Description: Die Greiffenberger AG ist eine börsennotierte Industrieholding mit strategischem Fokus auf Unternehmen aus der Metallverarbeitung. Das Produktportfolio besteht aus Präzisionsbandstahl, Bimetall und Bandsägen. Diese Produkte werden in den Branchen Maschinenbau, DIY, Bau, Automotive und Energiewirtschaft eingesetzt. Die Greiffenberger Gruppe hat eine hohe Exportquote von 92% und verfügt über Tochtergesellschaften in Deutschland, Frankreich, Italien, Südkorea, Polen und den USA.

Name: GRUPPO FININC
Description:
FININC is a leading infrastructure player in Italy, with a strong position in the development, financing, construction, and management of large-scale infrastructure assets through its subsidiaries INC SpA and SIPAL SpA. With over five decades of experience, the Group has delivered strategic transport projects — motorways, tunnels, viaducts, and bridges. Current projects under management include the Pedemontana Veneta (SPV), A3 (Napoli–Pompei–Salerno), A21, A5, and A55 (Ivrea–Torino–Piacenza) highways.

Renowned for its expertise in project finance and PPP models, both greenfield and brownfield, FININC leverages project finance to optimize risk allocation, secure long-term funding, and ensure bankability for complex ventures. Through a fully integrated DBFMO approach (Design, Build, Finance, Maintain, Operate), the Group combines engineering and operational excellence with financial structuring capabilities, delivering sustainable, cash-generating investments across the entire asset lifecycle.

Beyond infrastructure, FININC operates across complementary sectors, ranging from construction and technological engineering to finance, international tourism, and the wine industry.

Name: Meteor Group
Description:
2005 yılında attığımız ilk adımla yalnızca bir şirket kurmadık; bir hayali, bir hedefi ve bir yaşam felsefesini de başlatmış olduk. 2008 yılında Bursa’da konut projelerimizle yalnızca binalar değil, hayatlar inşa ederek “yaşam markası” olmayı başardık. 2011’de Türkiye’nin köklü akaryakıt firmalarından Opet’in distribütörlüğünü üstlenerek sektöre güçlü bir giriş yaptık. 2013’te İstanbul şubemizi açarak faaliyet alanımızı genişletirken, 2016’da dijital dönüşüm hamlemizle çağın gereklerini önceden gören bir vizyon sergiledik. 2019’da SAP sürecini başlatarak, yeni nesil kurumsal kaynak planlama sistemlerini bünyemize entegre ederek, Meteor Holding’i geleceğin şirketi haline getirme yolunda kararlılıkla ilerledik. Dijitalleşmenin gücüyle iç süreçlerimizde hız ve şeffaflık sağlarken, müşteri memnuniyetini de her zaman odağımızda tuttuk. 2020 yılında ise Avos markamızla tarımsal faaliyetlere yönelerek doğaya dokunan bir iş modelini hayata geçirdik. Aynı yıl sanayi çatısı altında Löher, Löwe, T.R.U.S.T. markalarımızla yürüyen merdiven ve asansör sektörüne yenilikler kazandırarak, teknolojik yatırımlarımızı sanayiye taşıdık. Bu bağlamda, İzmir ve Iğdır’da şubeler açarak sanayi yatırımlarımızı somutlaştırmış olduk. 2022 yılı Bursa Nilüfer’de Meteor Kültür Evi ve Simya Kitap Kafe ile toplumsal gelişime katkı sunduk, aynı yıl “Pazarfili Sadakat Programı” ile müşteri bağlılığını güçlendirdik. 19. yılımızda farklı sektörlerde aynı değerlerle birleşerek büyük bir aile olduğumuzu ilan ettik ve Meteor Holding doğdu. Günümüzde inşaattan enerjiye, sanayiden tarıma, kültürden dijital çözümlere uzanan alanlarda öncü, yenilikçi ve sürdürülebilir çözümler sunmaya devam ediyoruz. Henüz tamamlanmamış bir hikâyeyiz; güçlü adımlarla büyüyor, hayallerimizi gerçeğe dönüştürmek için heyecanla çalışıyoruz, çünkü Meteor Ailesi olarak biliyoruz ki bu yolculuk daha yeni başlıyor.

Bünyemizdeki markalar:
- Meteor Petrol 
- Löher
- Avelice
- Löwe
- Meteor İnşaat
- PazarFili
- Simya Kitap Kafe

AMBAC International is more than a manufacturing company—we’re an incubator of innovation, supporting industries that never stop. Since 1910, we’ve been designing, manufacturing, and remanufacturing critical power and fluid components for defense, heavy-duty trucking, aerospace, and utilities.

Our employee-owned (ESOP) structure fuels a culture of dedication and creativity. At AMBAC, every team member has a voice, a stake in our success, and the opportunity to drive innovation. We invest heavily in developing talent, fostering an environment where big ideas become reality.

We specialize in high-mix, low-volume manufacturing, creating niche, hard-to-source components that demand precision. From short-run production to prototyping and remanufacturing, we provide solutions that keep our customers’ missions moving forward. Our adaptable processes allow us to solve the challenges others can’t, building custom products with unmatched quality.
 
We proudly support our hometown heroes—drivers, farmers, soldiers, and first responders—by providing the components they need to succeed. AMBAC isn’t just about parts; we’re about building relationships, empowering people, and shaping the future of small manufacturing.

Join us and be part of something bigger. Learn more at ambacinternational.com.

Description:

Atitlan estructura su actividad empresarial a través de cuatro plataformas estratégicas:
- ATGRO, especializada en agricultura a escala global.
- ATDI, centrada en el desarrollo urbanístico y la promoción inmobiliaria de alto impacto.
- Acuicultura premium y sostenible, representada por Sea Eight.
- Industrial y servicios, representada principalmente por Imex y Gaviota.

El grupo impulsa su crecimiento mediante la inversión directa, la creación, adquisición y desarrollo de compañías, así como a través de asociaciones estratégicas. Todo ello con un enfoque orientado a la creación de valor a largo plazo. 

Atitlan se distingue por una gestión flexible, ágil y creativa, orientada a la construcción y consolidación de negocios sólidos y escalables.

Actualmente, Atitlan gestiona más de 1.500 millones de euros en activos bajo gestión, ha invertido más de 2.200 millones de euros desde 2005 y cuenta con un equipo de más de 10.000 personas en el conjunto del grupo.

Name: Wallenberg Investments AB
Description:
The assets of the Wallenberg Foundations are managed through engaged ownership, a tradition that has existed with the Wallenberg family since the founding of Stockholms Enskilda Bank in 1856. The assets of the Foundations are primarily managed on a long-term basis through direct or indirect holdings in companies with world-leading market positions. 
The largest assets of the Wallenberg Foundations are the partly owned industrial holding company Investor AB, listed on the Stockholm Stock Exchange, and the wholly-owned holding companies Wallenberg Investments, FAM, Navigare Ventures and Nineteen Private Capital.
The largest Wallenberg Foundations are the Knut and Alice Wallenberg Foundation, the Marianne and Marcus Wallenberg Foundation, and the Marcus and Amalia Wallenberg Foundation. To ensure that their assets are managed in a professional manner, the Foundations have entrusted the wholly-owned company, Wallenberg Investments AB, with managing their assets and administration.

Name: Pasifik Holding
Description: Bugün Pasifik’in sınırsız maviliklerine doğru açılarak süren yolculuğumuz, Hızır Dedemizin, Babamız Ahmet Erdoğan ile 1986 yılında ilk büyük girişimimiz olan çay fabrikamızı açarak, Orçay A.Ş.’yi kurmasıyla başladı. Ardından 50 yıla yakın inşaat tecrübesi ile 2008 yılında Ankara’da Pasifik İnşaat’ı kurduk; Next Level Ankara, Next Level Loft, Next Level Çayyolu gibi alanında ilk olan projelerin ardından karma yaşam projemiz Merkez Ankara’yı yaşama geçirdik. Next Level çizgisini İstanbul’a da yansıtmak amacıyla Next Level İstanbul, Next Level Country ve Next Level Kemer projelerine başladık. Türkbükü’nde Next Level Bodrum projeleri ile yeni projelere imza atmaya devam ediyoruz. Uluslararası lojistik ve taşımacılıkta demiryolu taşımacılığını merkeze alan Pasifik Eurasia ile ülkemiz üreticilerinin küresel pazarlara ulaşmasına, firmalarımızın rekabetçiliğine, ihracata ve ekonomimize destek oluyoruz. Asya ve Avrupa arasındaki taşımacılıkta Türkiye’yi transit merkez haline getirmek için çalışıyoruz. Lojistik ve taşımacılık operasyonlarımızı tüm dünyada genişletirken, yeşil lojistik sertifikası da alarak sürdürülebilir gelecek için önemli bir imza attık. Pasifik Teknoloji ile savunma teknolojilerinden bilişime, siber güvenlikten altyapı hizmetlerine kadar farklı alanlarda geniş bir hizmet yelpazesi sunuyor; ülke için stratejik değerde yerli ve milli teknolojik ürünler üretiyoruz.  Enerji sektöründe, sürdürülebilir büyüme perspektifine uygun yatırımlar yapıyoruz. 100 MW kurulu gücümüzdeki yeşil enerjinin payını yüzde 80’in üzerine çıkarmayı hedefliyoruz. Ayrıca, Giresun’da 25 bin m2 alan üzerine kurulu pelet fabrikasıyla atık orman ürünlerinin değerlendirilerek yeniden ekonomiye kazandırılmasını amaçlıyor; yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarının yaygınlaştırılmasına katkı sağlıyoruz. Sayıları 55’e ulaşan şirketlerimizle 2.500’den fazla istihdam oluşturarak, geleceği tasarlamaya, ülkemize katma değer sunmaya ve kalkınmaya omuz vermeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Honest Holding A.Ş.
Description:

Turizm acenteciliğinden otelciliğe, taşımacılıktan havacılığa, inşaattan ihracat ve ithalata, sektöründe kalite ve iyi fiyat politikalarını ilke edinmiş bir yapıya sahip olan Honest Şirketler Grubu aldığı başarı ödülleri ile her geçen gün büyümekte, Türkiye ekonomisine ve tanıtımına katkısını arttırmaktadır.

Sunduğu hizmetlerin kalitesi, gerek yurt içinde gerekse yurt dışında çeşitli uluslararası ödüller ve sertifikalarla belgelenmiş olan Honest, deneyimli ve eğitimli insan gücüyle faaliyet gösterdiği her sektörde maksimum verimlilik ve etkinlik ilkesi ile çalışırken, toplumsal sorumluluk bilinciyle de hareket ederek liderliğini sürdürmektedir.

Co-Founder, girişimcilerin ve işletmelerin yanında duran, iş fikirlerini hayata geçirmelerine ve büyütmelerine destek olan bir ekosistemdir. Amacımız; iş dünyasında ortak aklı, iş birliğini ve sürdürülebilir başarıyı ön plana çıkarmaktır.

Biz, Co-Founder olarak yalnızca bir iş ortağı değil; aynı zamanda vizyonunuzu paylaşan, yolculuğunuzda yanınızda duran güvenilir bir destekçiyiz. 

Girişimcilere stratejik planlama, iş geliştirme, marka yönetimi ve dijital çözümler gibi alanlarda profesyonel hizmetler sunuyoruz.

Her fikir değerlidir. Doğru yönlendirme, güçlü strateji ve sağlam bir iş birliğiyle her fikir, başarıya dönüşebilir. Co-Founder, iş dünyasında fark yaratmak isteyen herkese ilham vermek ve yol göstermeyi hedefler.

Name: Torkam Holding A.Ş.

The foundations of TORKAM HOLDING were laid in 1989 by the Chairman of the Executive Board, Mr. Mahmut DERELI.

After that he works respectively in the field of Construction, Real Esatate development, PVC profile production, İron and Steel production, Oil-Gas exploration and operation fields, Oil-Gas Seismic and Drilling Activities. Today these activities are carried out with a total of 15 companies and 5000 employees in Europe, Asia and North Africa. In 2019, Torkam Holding was established and all companies merged under the Holding. Up to the present his heart of activity which is Construction and Real Estate ; 3 million m2 construction area consisting of residences, commercial units, shopping malls, schools and hotels and a business volume of 2 Billion USD has been reached.

Name: Teagá Inovação
Description:
Muito prazer, somos o grupo TEAGÁ Inovação!

O mundo industrial é complexo. Feito de engrenagens, decisões técnicas e pressões por eficiência. Mas também é feito de gente. De ideias que evoluem. De conexões que precisam ser fluidas, confiáveis e humanas.

O Grupo Teagá nasceu para unir o que estava fragmentado. Para entregar o que o setor sempre precisou: um ecossistema integrado, onde inteligência técnica, atendimento consultivo e execução especializada trabalham juntos e não em silos.

Somos uma rede de marcas que pensa, executa e transforma a indústria com visão, agilidade e profundidade. O que fazemos vai além de peças, projetos ou serviços. Entregamos fluidez. Eliminamos ruído. Projetamos o futuro, porque movemos Empresas, Cidades e Pessoas.

Não estamos aqui para seguir o ritmo do mercado. Estamos aqui para criar o nosso próprio. Um ritmo alinhado com propósito, estratégia e resultado. Preparamos soluções com inteligência em cada conexão. Somos o Grupo Teagá.

Name: KARUB HOLDİNG
Description:
Karub has been active in the energy, foreign trade, and construction sectors since 2013. Headquartered in Istanbul, the company continues its global projects with offices in the UK, China, UAE, and Turkmenistan. With its global trade network, deep expertise in energy projects, and construction field, Karub continues to grow through implementing projects around the world, especially in Central Asia.

In the field of foreign trade, Karub supplies mechanical equipment, materials, and raw materials for various industries, primarily for the oil and gas industry. By leveraging global supply chain networks, it provides tailored solutions to industrial projects, enhancing operational efficiency.

In the energy sector, Karub is a key player with its solutions in energy and natural gas supply, facilitated through international consortium agreements. Additionally, the company aims to contribute to the future energy infrastructure by offering solutions for renewable energy projects.

In the construction sector, Karub focuses on public projects and collaborations with governments. The company successfully manages every phase of public institutions' construction and modernization projects, ensuring high quality at all stages. Additionally, with its EPC projects, Karub manages the entire construction process under one roof.

With its strong partnerships in the global market and expert team, Karub continues and will continue to provide effective solutions for projects carried out with governmental institutions throughout the world. The company aims to expand its sectoral experience and supply chain solutions, becoming more reliable and effective each day.

We acquire businesses from retiring owners and current entrepreneurs with an emphasis on preserving legacies and positioning companies for long-term success. Chenmark companies share a commitment to Chasing Better, Keeping Score, Playing the Long Game, and Putting the Team First. 

We are not a private equity firm or a typical financial investor.  We are proven owner-operators providing a permanent destination for great businesses.

Name: Loras Holding
Description:
DAİMA DAHA İLERİYE
Türkiye’nin geleceğine katkı sunmak, tüm toplumumuzla birlikte büyümek için varız.

1988 yılında 20 idealist girişimci tarafından İttifak Holding ismiyle kurulduk. Farklı sektörlerdeki büyümemizi takiben 1993 yılında holdingleştik ve 1994 yılında da Sermaye Piyasası Kurulu`na kaydolduk. 2009 yılına gelindiğinde 19 bine yakın yatırımcımız ile Borsa İstanbul’a kote olan, 2010 yılında da hisse senetleri Borsa İstanbul’un ilk 100 endeksinde işlem görmeye başlayan bir kurum haline geldik.

Ana faaliyet alanlarımızı gıda, inşaat, gayrimenkul yatırım, makine ve enerji oluşturuyor.

2023 yılı itibariyle İttifak Holding ismiyle çıktığımız yolculuğumuzu, yeni yüzümüzle fakat aynı değerlerimiz ve hedeflerimizle Loras Holding ismiyle sürdürüyoruz.

Büyüyen Türkiye’nin yüzde 100 yerli sermayeye dayalı gücü olarak faaliyetlerini sürdüren Loras Holding ve şirketleri, bugüne kadar dünyanın 120 ülkesine ihracat gerçekleştirdi, milyonlarca müşteriye ulaştı.

Loras; özgüveni, güçlü öz sermayesi, ileri teknolojiden faydalanmadaki yetkinliği, uluslararası ölçülerde deneyimi, entelektüel birikimi ve evrensel standartlarda ahlaki değerleri benimseyerek elde ettiği başarılarıyla, “birlikte büyümek” misyonunda, Türkiye’nin öncü kuruluşlarından biri olarak faaliyetlerini yürütmeye devam ediyor.

1998 yılında kurulan ilk şirketi Ulsan İnşaat ile faaliyetlerine başlayan Ulsan Holding, zaman içinde farklı sektörlerde yaptığı yatırımlarla büyümesini sürdürmüş; Faaliyet gösterdiği her alanda inovatif iş modelleri geliştirerek sürdürülebilir büyümeyi temel strateji olarak benimsemiştir.
Bugün Ulsan Holding bünyesinde:
* Savunma Sanayi sektöründe: Ulsan Savunma,
* Madencilik sektöründe: Ulsan Madencilik, Ulsan Mining Congo, Ulsan Senegal, Ulsan Resources Zambia, Ulsan Enerji ve Madencilik, Ulsan Botswana, BK Madencilik,
* İnşaat ve Endüstriyel Tesisler sektöründe: Balatek Teknoloji,
* Enerji sektöründe: Ulsan Enerji ve Madencilik, Anadolu Dağıtım Petrol,
* Havacılık sektöründe: LYL Havacılık
şirketleri yer almakta ve faaliyetlerini başarıyla sürdürmektedir.
2024 yılında, farklı kimliklerle faaliyet gösteren tüm şirketler Ulsan Holding çatısı altında birleştirilmiş ve kurumsal yapı güçlendirilmiştir.
Ulsan Holding, faaliyet gösterdiği her coğrafyada kalıcı değerler oluşturmayı ilke edinmiş; finansal, toplumsal, çevresel ve kültürel alanlarda sürdürülebilir fayda üretmeyi amaçlamıştır. Bu doğrultuda geliştirdiği iş süreçleri ve sunduğu hizmetlerle yaşamın her alanına değer katmaya devam etmektedir.
Hedefi; faaliyet gösterdiği tüm sektörlerde küresel ölçekte daha üst sıralarda yer almak, sürdürülebilirlik odağında güçlü bir gelecek inşa etmektir.

Name: SINERBA
Description:
Sinerba es un ecosistema empresarial vinculado a los hermanos Borrego Álvarez, que heredando la tradición de sus antepasados en el sector de la construcción emprendieron una nueva etapa con Bilba Constructora. La solvencia alcanzada tras dos décadas de andadura profesional permitió a la familia invertir en nuevos sectores haciendo de Sinerba un conjunto diversificado y profesionalizado de empresas.

A nivel de estructura societaria, Sinerba se constituye como un holding empresarial por ser la forma más recomendable para la gestión de un grupo familiar de empresas, permitiendo la eficiencia fiscal y de gestión del conjunto. El modelo propone una gestión centralizada en el que Sinerba, como matriz, presta los servicios de administración, contable, fiscal, laboral, financiero y legal a las distintas empresas. La gestión coordinada favorece el crecimiento de las distintas áreas de negocio al mismo tiempo que posibilita la diversificación de los riesgos propios de cada línea de negocio.

Sinerba desarrolla sus actividades en los principales sectores productivos de nuestra economía: construcción, inmobiliario, agrícola, socimi y energías renovables, compartiendo en todos los casos la vocación emprendedora en búsqueda de la diversificación, cooperación, profesionalidad y crecimiento conjunto con el objetivo de alcanzar los mejores resultados para la organización.

Onze collectieve expertise, verspreid over diverse industrieën, stelt ons in staat om naadloos aan te sluiten op jouw specifieke wensen. Wij doen niet alleen beloftes—wij leveren concrete resultaten.

Ben je nieuwsgierig naar hoe we dit doen? Verken ons brede aanbod van diensten voor een gedetailleerd overzicht of maak direct een afspraak voor een persoonlijk gesprek. Jouw ideale oplossing is slechts een klik verwijderd en ons team staat klaar om je te verwelkomen en te begeleiden naar succes.

Name: Intergea Group
Description:
The Intergea Group is leader in automotive distribution in Italy, first for cars sold with over 55,000 deliveries in 2022.
Twenty years after its birth, Intergea reaches one billion euros in sales with 23 subsidiaries and 13 investee companies. It is present in 11 regions with 128 points of sale and 362 service and spare parts centres. The Group is led by the president and ceo Alberto Di Tanno.

The business model is based on the total autonomy of the Group companies, with the interchange of operational data, the reduction of financial costs and allowing economies of scale on supplies.
Mobility beyond the car is the focus concept of its development: the value of services is strengthened on assistance, insurance, spare parts.

Intergea makes several acquisitions over the years, creating a network, respecting autonomy and historicity of each company.
It’s the first group in the automotive sector to create an insurance company: in 2008 Nobis Assicurazioni was born thanks to the president Alberto Di Tanno.

The Business Development Team studies new business opportunities on markets, including international ones, and identifies brands that are looking for potential partners.
AutoBro is the new digital reality created in 2022: an online platform that communicates and guides the final consumer in choosing the car up to delivery at home.

The Group supports the "Giorgio Valsania" onlus, a voluntary association operating in the distribution of food parcels and humanitarian aid.

Name: Sociedade Moçambicana de Medicamentos, SA
Description:
A Sociedade Moçambicana de Medicamentos SA (SMM) destaca-se como uma força impulsionadora no sector farmacêutico de Moçambique, dedicada à produção e fornecimento de medicamentos e dispositivos médicos de alta qualidade. Com um compromisso sólido com a inovação, a SMM tem como objectivo estratégico fortalecer a produção local, contribuindo para a autonomia do sistema de saúde e garantindo o acesso da população a soluções médicas eficazes e acessíveis.

Mais do que uma fabricante, a SMM assume um papel transformador na indústria farmacêutica. A nossa abordagem integra pesquisa e desenvolvimento contínuo, permitindo-nos acompanhar as tendências globais e adaptar as melhores práticas às necessidades locais. Ao investir fortemente na capacitação dos nossos colaboradores e no estabelecimento de parcerias estratégicas com instituições e stakeholders chave, a SMM assegura que as suas operações se mantenham na vanguarda da inovação e da qualidade.

Cobrimos toda a cadeia de valor do sector farmacêutico: desde a produção, distribuição e armazenamento até à exportação de medicamentos e dispositivos médicos. Este amplo alcance garante que nossos produtos cheguem de forma eficiente, rápida e segura a todas as províncias de Moçambique, fortalecendo a saúde pública em todas as regiões do país.

A nossa actuação reflecte um compromisso profundo com a sustentabilidade. A SMM promove práticas responsáveis que geram impacto económico positivo, criando emprego, fortalecendo o tecido económico local e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento socioeconómico sustentável de Moçambique.

Com uma visão de longo prazo, a SMM está firmemente posicionada como um agente de transformação no sector de saúde do país, promovendo uma produção farmacêutica local robusta e alinhada com os mais altos padrões internacionais, oferecendo soluções que melhoram a qualidade de vida de milhões de moçambicanos.

Name: myUbuntu
Description: At myUbuntu, we believe that Africa’s future lies in the hands of its smallholder farmers. These farmers are the backbone of the continent, feeding nations and sustaining communities. However, they are also among the most vulnerable to the growing threats of climate change, financial instability, and market inefficiencies. At myUbuntu, our mission is simple yet profound: to empower these farmers by delivering innovative, scalable solutions that provide security, stability, and growth. Our work is centered around two transformative pillars: Parametric Insurance Solutions and the myUbuntu Agri Platform. These initiatives are designed to address the most pressing challenges that farmers face today, ensuring that they have the tools, knowledge, and financial security to not just survive—but thrive—in an increasingly uncertain world. Smallholder farmers across Africa face a formidable enemy—climate change. Unpredictable weather patterns, including droughts, floods, and temperature extremes, threaten their livelihoods every season. Traditional insurance models have proven insufficient in addressing the unique challenges of these farmers, who often cannot afford high premiums or wait for lengthy claims processing in times of crisis. That’s where myUbuntu steps in. Our parametric insurance solution is a game-changer. It’s fast, affordable, and designed with the specific needs of African farmers in mind. Unlike traditional indemnity insurance, parametric insurance provides payouts based on pre-agreed triggers such as rainfall levels, temperature thresholds, or other weather indicators. This means that when adverse weather strikes, farmers receive automatic payouts without the need for time-consuming claims assessments. For a smallholder farmer, a single season of crop loss can mean the difference between recovery and ruin. Parametric insurance is not just a product; it’s a promise—a promise that no farmer should be left without support in their time of need.

Name: Enki Holdings

Enki Holdings is a boutique, high-end holding company specializing in strategic asset management, investment planning, and comprehensive consulting services. Operating out of Wyoming, we leverage the state's business-friendly legal framework to offer clients significant tax advantages and strategic insights. We focus on building direct, personalized relationships with our clients, avoiding active social media engagement to ensure secure and tailored interactions.

Strategic Asset Management: Customized strategies to optimize your investment portfolio.
Investment Planning: Comprehensive plans aligned with your short-term goals and long-term vision.
Consulting Services: Expert advice to help you make informed financial decisions.
Enki Insights

We regularly publish Enki Insights—a series of in-depth articles and analyses exploring market trends, economic indicators, and financial strategies. These insights empower our clients with the knowledge needed to navigate today’s complex financial environment confidently.

Why Enki Holdings?

We believe in ethical practices, financial literacy, and diversification as key components of successful financial planning. Our goal is to foster resilience and growth in an ever-changing economic landscape, ensuring that our clients are well-prepared to achieve their financial objectives. Whether you seek strategic investments, risk diversification, or innovative financial planning, Enki Holdings is your trusted partner.

Connect with Us

Learn more about how we can help you achieve your financial goals by visiting our website or contacting us directly.

This passion drives our mission beyond business success. We aim to catalyze wealth and inclusivity across Africa, nurturing local entrepreneurship and empowering communities. TweezGroup is more than a company; we're a philosophy of innovative, persistent business approaches. As we navigate this entrepreneurial path, we invite you to join us. Let's combine our experiences to create a future where every brand and individual thrives in an ecosystem of shared success!

Name: KHAI TOAN GROUP (KTG)
Description:
Kính thưa Quý khách hàng và Quý đối tác,

Khởi đầu từ nhà phân phối thiết bị điện và chiếu sáng, qua từng bước hoàn thiện, đến nay Tập đoàn Khải Toàn (KTG) đã trở thành Tập đoàn hàng đầu về thiết bị điện và chiếu sáng; sở hữu và phân phối các thương hiệu mạnh trên thị trường như AC, Comet, Lumex,..

Với sứ mệnh “Nâng tầm Tiện Nghi và Cảm Hứng cuộc sống cho khách hàng” thông qua các giải pháp thiết bị điện toàn diện và tiên phong về các ứng dụng công nghệ tương lai, KTG mong muốn mang đến cuộc sống thịnh vượng cho nhân viên, cổ đông, cùng chia sẻ trách nhiệm với cộng đồng và xã hội. Với mục đích “Phát triển dựa trên nền tảng năng lượng xanh”, KTG đã chủ động thành lập các liên doanh – liên kết với những công ty, tập đoàn lớn trong và ngoài nước, phát huy sức mạnh liên kết của toàn hệ thống, áp dụng các mô hình quản trị tiên tiến thế giới, nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm, đa dạng hóa chủng loại, phục vụ ngày càng tốt hơn nhu cầu của Quý khách hàng.

Nhìn lại hành trình đã qua, tôi luôn trân trọng những cá nhân, tập thể trong công ty, Quý khách hàng, Quý đối tác… đã đồng hành, hỗ trợ để KTG đạt được thành quả như ngày hôm nay.

Trong bối cảnh hội nhập và phát triển của nền kinh tế, thị trường thiết bị điện và chiếu sáng đã và đang thu hút sự tham gia của các tập đoàn đa quốc gia nhiều tiềm lực tài chính, giàu kinh nghiệm. Tuy nhiên, tôi tin tưởng sự ủng hộ, sự hợp tác và hậu thuẫn của Quý vị sẽ là nền tảng vững chắc để KTG không chỉ giữ vững vị trí hiện tại mà tiếp tục vươn đến những tầm cao mới.

KTG rất mong được tiếp tục đồng hành cùng chặng đường phát triển bền vững của đất nước và của toàn thể Quý vị.
Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Clay Group
Description:
CLAY GROUP buscou melhorias para seus clientes, hoje comercializa ENERGIA SOLAR e Iluminação LED. Ao longo de sua história, atuante no segmento heathcare com distribuição, serviços de engenharia, manutenção de equipamentos e produtos médicos vem ampliando  para outros segmentos na área de ENERGIA RENOVÁVEL, CONSTRUÇÕES, INFRA-ESTRUTURAS e MEIO-AMBIENTE.

Nos últimos anos intensos trabalhos levaram a diversificação dos investimentos com a promoção de projetos na área de energias renováveis, indústria de semicondutores fotovoltaico com a produção de módulos de 250w a 315w e produção de lâmpadas LED.

A Fundação foi em 2008 com a DMX MEDICAL, empresa da área heathcare que trouxe ao Ceará, Piauí, Rio Grande do Norte e Maranhão equipamentos hospitalares e produtos inovadores para cirurgias da alta complexidade, comercializando e mantendo os equipamentos médicos com certificação internacional, como também é autorizada exclusiva de grandes marcas mundiais como a Nihon Kodhen, Getinge Group, BBraun - Aesculap, Sebbin.

Em 2011 surgiu a FÊNIX ENG especializada em serviços de engenharia e soluções técnicas, constituída por profissionais de engenharias civil, mecânica, elétrica, produção e energia renovável, enfermeiros, fisioterapeutas e técnicos responsável por projetos, execuções de obras elétricas, civil e atuante na aplicação e manutenções dos equipamentos da área médica.

Em 2015 instala-se no Ceará, frutos de intenso trabalho internacional a SUNLIGHT - Fábrica de Módulos solares, tornando-se pioneira nesse segmento no Brasil. 

A divisão SOLAR ONE já é uma das principais empresas integradora de sistema de energia solar do país. 

A mais recente empresa do grupo é a LUMUSLED - Fábrica de LED para iluminação pública, industrial e comércio. Fundada pelo forte conhecimento empresarial em LED, experiência internacional do sócio-fundador, com aperfeiçoamento da equipe de engenheiros já é um grande sucesso em várias partes do país e buscando a internacionalização.

PHG started as a small family business in 1979 and grew up to be the long-term growth partner preferred by high-performing Midwest brands. 

Today we guide market leaders across sectors including construction, insurance, manufacturing, engineering, architectural solutions, workplace strategy, interior environments, and design. 

Within each market, our goal is to make a lasting impact on the places we call home. 

Our Values
1. Invest in People: Because it’s people who create the value in companies and communities. As a holding group that began as a family business, we consider employees and founders to be key stakeholders. That means doing what’s right and taking the long view. 

2. Make Your Place: As members of companies, we are members of communities with the power to bring positive impact to the world. For PHG, it’s not just a corporate responsibility. Taking ownership of what’s around us and contributing to the greater good is a commitment. 

3. Respect The Work: The most successful companies are constructed all the same way” with time and energy. Put partners and people deserve to get the same passion back, but without changing what makes the business, the person or the community unique. 

4. Build For Potential: The best way to predict the future is to build it, then relentlessly improve it over time. So instead of waiting for innovation, we proactively drive it with long term investment – in our companies, our people and the places we live and work. 

5. Serve Like a Leader: Our Founders looked at how businesses are typically run and decided to do it differently. At PHG, leadership is serving – both your team, and your community. It’s empathy, follow-through and putting people above purely transactional business practices.

Name: Maya Holding
Description:
MAYA Grubu’nun temelleri 1949 yılında İlyas Özsüer tarafından atılmış, 1958 yılında şirketleşmiştir. İlk yıllarında iplik ve elyaf hammadde ticareti, sanayi ve çeşitli endüstri alanlarında faaliyet göstermiştir.

1970’li yıllardan itibaren gayrimenkul sektörünü ana iş kolu haline getiren MAYA Grubu; gayrimenkul geliştirme, konut, ofis, alışveriş merkezi, iş merkezi ve enerji gibi birçok alanda Türkiye’nin önde gelen geliştiricilerinden biri olarak faaliyet göstermektedir.

Türkiye’de IKEA markası ile perakende sektöründe önemli bir rol üstlenmektedir. Ayrıca, sosyal sorumluluk anlayışı doğrultusunda kurulan Maya Vakfı ile eğitim, kültür ve toplumsal gelişim alanlarında da aktif olarak katkı sağlamaktadır.        

                                                                         
About MAYA Group
Established in 1949 by İlyas Özsüer and incorporated in 1958, MAYA Group initially operated in the trade of yarn and fiber raw materials, as well as in various industrial sectors.

Since the 1970s, the Group has strategically focused on real estate as its core line of business. Today, MAYA Group is recognized as one of Turkey’s leading developers, with a strong presence in residential and commercial real estate, including office buildings, shopping centers, business complexes, and energy projects.

In the retail sector, the Group plays a key role in representing the IKEA brand in Turkey. Additionally, through the Maya Foundation—established in line with its commitment to social responsibility—MAYA Group actively supports initiatives in education, culture, and community development.

Name: World of Johan Cruyff
Description:
Johan Cruyff (25 april, 1947 - 24 March, 2016) is widely regarded as one of the greatest players in football history. In 1999, Johan was voted European Player of the Century. 

The World of Johan Cruyff connects people to the philosophy of one of the greatest minds in football, promoting creativity, innovation, and development in sports and society.

After his retirement from playing and coaching, Johan Cruyff initiated the Cruyff Foundation, Cruyff Education (Institute, Academy, College), Cruyff Classics, Cruyff Football and Cruyff Library. All these initiatives together are part of the World of Johan Cruyff. 

More about the World of Johan Cruyff, the various global Cruyff initiatives, and about Johan Cruyff personally, can be found on www.johancruyff.com. 
#CruyffLegacy

Name: Moll Gruppe
Description:
Die Moll Gruppe ist ein renommiertes Münchner Familienunternehmen mit 130 Jahren Erfahrung. Mit einer weltweiten Präsenz und 1.600 engagierten Mitarbeiter*innen setzen wir auf langjährige Tradition und kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung. Die Moll-Gruppe wird organisatorisch und strategisch in drei Geschäftssegmenten geführt, um eine gezielte Markt-, Kunden- und Produktorientierung zu gewährleisten. 

Industriebereich: Die Industrieholding Leonhard Moll AG hält hundertprozentige Beteiligungen in der Keimfarben Gruppe, Leonhard Moll Betonwerke Gruppe und der Techno Physik Group, die in den Bereichen Farben und Putze, Bahninfrastruktur und Betonfertigprodukte sowie Brandschutz und Wärmetechnik tätig sind.

Immobilienbereich Inland: In der Moll Immobilien Holding GmbH sind die unternehmerischen Aktivitäten im Immobilienbereich der Moll Gruppe in Deutschland zusammengefasst. Der Fokus liegt auf der Entwicklung und Verwaltung von eigenem Grundbesitz sowie dem langfristigen Erhalt und der Wertsteigerung von Bestandsimmobilien und der Schaffung zusätzlicher Mietflächen.

Immobilienbereich Ausland: Über die Beteiligungen an den US-Immobilienfonds UVAG Realty Limited Partnership und Lakeridge Land Limited Partnership nimmt die Moll GmbH & Co. KG ihre Interessen im Immobilienmarkt in den USA wahr.

Name: MAISON LE BERRE
Description:
Maison Le Berre Holding est une entreprise familiale située au cœur de Paris. Nous nous distinguons par la diversité et la complémentarité de nos activités, qui englobent plusieurs secteurs dynamiques. Notre portefeuille comprend :

- Prise de participation dans d'autres sociétés : Nous investissons stratégiquement dans diverses entreprises, renforçant ainsi notre présence et notre influence sur le marché. 
- Franchise Leonidas : Opérant plusieurs points de vente, nous sommes également le partenaire clé de l’enseigne belge dans le secteur B2B en France, garantissant la qualité supérieure des célèbres chocolats Leonidas à nos clients. 
- Espace de coworking Wegal Space : Nous fournissons des espaces de travail modernes et flexibles, adaptés aux besoins des entrepreneurs, des startups et des entreprises en pleine croissance. 
- Agence marketing : Notre équipe de marketing développe des stratégies innovantes pour aider les entreprises à accroître leur visibilité et leur succès. 
- Agence merchandising MLB Services : Nous offrons des solutions de merchandising créatives et efficaces pour optimiser la présentation et la vente de produits.

Notre holding est le socle qui soutient et fédère tous nos business. Nous opérons tant dans le B2C avec nos points de vente physiques, notamment Leonidas, qu'au niveau B2B grâce à des partenariats de qualité.

Chez Maison Le Berre Holding, la qualité est notre mot d’ordre. Travaillant en famille, nous croyons en l'innovation, l'engagement envers nos partenaires et nos clients, et la création de valeur durable.

Rejoignez-nous sur LinkedIn pour suivre nos actualités et découvrir nos opportunités de collaboration.

Wir bauen Investorennetzwerke auf und investieren gemeinsam in sinnvolle und gewinnversprechende Vorhaben.

Dabei sehen wir von komplizierten und teuren Strukturen ab und setzen stattdessen auf eine langfristige und vertrauensvolle Zusammenarbeit der Geschäftspartner / Co-Investoren.

vrupa Yatırım Holding, yenilikçi, sürdürülebilir, değer odaklı ve sorumlu yaklaşımı ile güçlü büyüme potansiyeline sahip sektörlerde yatırımlar yaparak organik ve inorganik olarak büyümesini sürdürecektir.

Yönetim kurulu başkanımız Sayın Ramazan Burak Telli liderliğinde 2014 yılında sağlık sektörü ile faaliyetlerine başlayan Avrupa Yatırım Holding, orta vadede yatırımlarına sağlık, enerji, inşaat, yazılım gibi stratejik sektörlere yatırım yapmayı ve hızlı bir şekilde büyümeyi hedeflemektedir.

Türkiye’nin en değerli yatırım şirketlerinden biri olmayı hedefleyen Avrupa Yatırım Holding ; hastalara misafir odaklı yaklaşımı, tecrübeli hekim kadrosu ve disiplinli çalışmayı bir araya getirerek, hastalarından aldığı değerle büyüyen, güvenilir ve kaliteli sağlık hizmetinin öncüsü olmayı, tevazu, üstün nitelikli, halka yakınlık, bireye saygı ve sosyal sorumluluk bilinciyle kurumsal yönetimi gerçekleştirmeyi esas almıştır.

Avrupa Yatırım Holding; daha birçok kişiye ulaşarak Türkiye’de ve yurt dışında öncü sektörlerde faaliyet göstermeye, analizlere dayalı istikrarlı ve sürdürülebilir büyüme stratejisini tercih etmektedir.

Name: InSpe
Description:
InSpe is a private family owned business founded in 1991 by Izaokas Shapira. In the beginning advertising services on a local market was the main business area.
1999 Guy Shapira took over company management and control.

2000 In-house, digital printing department was set-up.  Invests to Xerox and Xeikon printing equipment, various post press machines.

2002 invests to offset printing by taking over local offset print house Vilniaus Spaustuve,it includes KOMORI press and various post press equipment.

2003 registers EXPOLIGHT SYSTEMS trade mark for the new business area - mobile displays trading. First years of development and supplying from far east. Later establishes its own production in Suzhou area near Shanghai. Today we produce and export displays all over the Europe, Africa and Middle east countries.

2005 expands its digital printing department by investing to second Xeikon engine.

2008 expanded digital printing in wide and grand format printing. Company invests to various 1.6-3.2m eco-solvent machines.

2010 starts supplying sign-making companies with printers, post to press equipment, media and inks. Colibri Digital brand was born. Today Colobri Digital is well known European trademark for wide format solutions.

2012 Partnership between VEIKA and InSpe was established. We became trading partners for VEIKA digital inks in Baltics, Belarus, and Scandinavian countries. New distributor partners were confirmed by the end of 2014.

2014 opens first REKLAMIS.LT shop. Company becomes official distributor of well known companies like ROLAND DG, Intercoat, ONYX, Jetrix , CWT, Berger etc.

2015 InSpe Latvia SIA established in Riga. Company becomes official distributor of PONGS, Siser, J-Teck , etc.

2016 InSpe Bel established in Belarus. Company doubles its growth, starts Ad/Print Masters Forum to support and deliver newest technology to the local printing companies.

2017 Engineering division expands rapidly, company starts developing its own inks and UV printers.

Name: Hanubu
Description:
Hello, we are Hanubu. 

Most people don’t think about the automotive aftermarket. But it’s everywhere. From the local garage that keeps your car running, to the family-run tyre shop that’s served its community for decades, these are the businesses that keep the world moving.
 
But this sector is under pressure. A growing shortage of skilled technicians, succession challenges, and a lack of capital force many great businesses to close. That’s not just a business problem, it’s a community problem.

Hanubu is changing that. 

As a tech-enabled rollup, we’re acquiring great local businesses and investing in their future, not stripping them for parts. We're here to preserve what works, improve what doesn’t, and build something stronger. 

→ We integrate operations, not dismantle them.
→ We invest in people, not just profit.
→ We bring modern technology into the hands of long-standing teams to help them thrive.

With SMEs responsible for over 50% of GDP and 60% of employment, the stakes couldn’t be higher. We're building something that lasts, for the owners, their employees, and the communities they serve. 

We’re not private equity. 
We’re not looking to flip. 
We’re not just buyers. 
We’re builders.

Together, we are stronger.

Name: ORASIS Industries Holding
Description:
ORASIS Industries ist ein Zusammenschluss von Technologie- und Engineering-Unternehmen, mit dem strategischen Ziel Unternehmen voranzubringen und zwar in allen Geschäftsfeldern, die die Welt, die Menschen und den gesellschaftlichen Wohlstand im Fokus haben. 

Als Holding sehen wir uns verantwortlich für die strategische und finanzielle Führung mit Fokus auf Unternehmensentwicklung durch Ausrichtung unserer Business Units entlang unseres Purpose und unserer Strategie.

Unsere Business Units, sind seit Jahrzehnten Vorreiter in den unterschiedlichsten Industrien - die Komptech als Champion für Abfallrecycling, die ASTOTEC als Pyrotechnik Pionier. Komptech bietet innovative Abfallaufbereitungslösungen zum Schutz der Ökosysteme. Astotec Automotive steht für pyrotechnische Sicherheitskonzepte im Automobilsektor, während Astotec Pyrotechnic Solutions sich auf energetische Materialien & Zünder für den Bergbau- und Automobilsektor spezialisiert hat. 

ORASIS Industries is a group of technology and engineering companies with the strategic goal of advancing companies in all business areas that focus on the planet, people and social prosperity. 

As a strategic holding company, we are responsible for the group’s strategic and financial management with a core focus on corporate development by aligning our business units along our purpose and strategy.

Our business units have been pioneers in a wide range of industries for decades - Komptech as a champion in waste recycling, ASTOTEC as a pioneer in pyrotechnics. Komptech offers innovative waste processing solutions to protect ecosystems. Astotec Automotive stands for pyrotechnic safety concepts in the automotive sector, while Astotec Pyrotechnic Solutions specializes in energetic materials & detonators for the mining and automotive sectors.

Name: 2D Group
Description:
Benvenuti in 2D Group: Innovazione ed Efficienza Energetica, sulle basi di una Tradizione Familiare

Siamo un'azienda di costruzioni ed edilizia con oltre 40 anni di esperienza. La nostra missione è guidare la transizione energetica, mettendo al centro l'efficienza energetica e l'innovazione.

EFFICIENZA ENERGETICA: La nostra expertise si concentra sulla riqualificazione energetica, migliorando l'efficienza degli edifici e contribuendo alla riduzione delle emissioni di gas climalteranti. Il nostro lavoro crea ambienti più salubri e favorisce città più vivibili e resilienti.

TRANSIZIONE ENERGETICA: Siamo impegnati a sostenere la transizione verso fonti rinnovabili, con impianti fotovoltaici, eolici e biomassa. Aiutiamo le aziende a riposizionarsi competitivamente, rispondendo alle esigenze dei consumatori attenti all'ambiente.

INNOVAZIONE: Utilizziamo tecnologie all'avanguardia come la Building Automation Solution, per un controllo ottimizzato degli impianti di riscaldamento. La nostra squadra è dotata di strumenti avanzati, garantendo risultati di alta qualità.

La nostra storia è radicata in una lunga tradizione familiare nel settore edile. Giuseppe e Ivana Diovisalvi hanno gettato le basi del nostro impegno, con il contributo del nostro socio Pasquale Berardi. Nel 2020, anno della fondazione dell'attuale gruppo, l’azienda si è impreziosita ulteriormente con l’esperienza di Rocco Iacovera, che ha favorito lo sviluppo della realtà che ad oggi conta 40 unità nel team e decine di partner tra aziende artigianali e istituzioni.

DIVISIONI AZIENDALIi: 
2D Energy
2D Consulting
Diovisalvi Costruzioni

Unisciti a noi per un futuro più verde, efficiente e sostenibile. Siamo qui per innovare il settore edilizio e guidare la tua azienda verso un mondo migliore.

#EfficienzaEnergetica #TransizioneEnergetica #Innovazione #Edilizia
