Name: Groupe Garan
Description:
Groupe Garan – L’écosystème entrepreneurial de demain 

Créé par Grégory Julien, Antonin Guyot et Armand Bouchard, le Groupe Garan est une holding dont l’ambition est claire : bâtir un écosystème propice à la création et au développement des entreprises de demain.

Notre mission est d’offrir aux entrepreneurs un environnement complet, où chaque besoin stratégique trouve une réponse grâce à des sociétés expertes, complémentaires et alignées sur une même vision : simplifier l’entrepreneuriat et lui donner les moyens de durer.

Avec Norixia, nous donnons aux projets leur identité digitale et leur visibilité en ligne.
Avec Diggama, nous permettons aux marques de gérer et déployer leurs contenus via un CMS moderne, flexible et API-first.
Avec LegalNest, nous sécurisons la croissance grâce à des solutions juridiques et administratives simples, rapides et fiables.
Avec Parkib, nous innovons dans la mobilité urbaine en rendant le stationnement plus intelligent et fluide.
Avec Coinstancy, nous ouvrons la voie vers les nouvelles opportunités de la finance décentralisée, pour démocratiser l’accès aux rendements de demain.

Indépendamment, chacune de ces entités a un impact fort. Ensemble, elles forment un véritable écosystème intégré, capable d’accompagner un entrepreneur depuis la naissance de son projet jusqu’à son expansion, en passant par sa consolidation et son financement.

Le Groupe Garan, c’est plus qu’une holding : c’est une vision partagée, portée par des entrepreneurs passionnés, pour transformer chaque ambition en réussite durable.

Name: Monty Holding
Description:
Founded over two decades ago, Monty Holding is an international holding company headquartered in the United Kingdom, with a portfolio diversified across evolving sectors and geographies. The group’s origins lie in telecommunications and mobile services. Since its inception, Monty Holding's operating companies have delivered core communications infrastructure, messaging, and roaming solutions to mobile network operators and enterprise clients, establishing a reputation for technical innovation and dependable global reach.

Over time, the group has expanded its portfolio to include payments, digital banking, and fintech platforms, combining deep sector knowledge with disciplined investment to accelerate growth. Monty Holding measures success not only by building profitable businesses but also by creating long-term value for people, communities, and the planet.

Founded on the vision of transforming connectivity and financial inclusion, Monty Holding brings together technology, capital, and operational expertise to scale market-leading solutions serving consumers, enterprises, and partners worldwide. Guided by the principle that technology drives progress while people give it purpose, the group remains committed to innovation, integrity, and sustainable growth.

Name: VODA Backyard Leisure Group
Description:
VODA Backyard Leisure Group is the largest backyard leisure products business in Canada.  VODA refers to ‘Water’ in Eastern Europe.  With an unmatched national footprint, Canada-wide distribution and online retail capabilities, VODA group of companies serve the market for pool, spa, and patio products for distributors, retailers, and dealers across Canada.  Our Group success is attributable to trusted relationships with our customers and industry-leading North American and global manufacturers and suppliers. 

VODA Backyard Leisure Group is comprised of three prominent businesses:

Aquiform is the largest Canadian distributor to the pool, spa and patio furniture industry.  Leveraging it's Canada-wide network of warehousing facilities, Aquiform provides efficient distribution to an extensive network of customers supported by an experienced sales force with deep roots in the industry.

Pool Supplies Canada is the largest online retail platform for pool and spa supplies across Canada.  With extensive industry and supply relationships, Pool Supplies Canada offers market leading supplies and products that are competitively priced and efficiently delivered. 

Club Piscine opened its doors in Quebec in 1991.  With over 30 years of experience, Club Piscine is the largest retail brand in Quebec of pools, garden furniture, barbecues, spas, and fitness equipment.  Club Piscine head office serves as a franchisor and distributor to an extensive network of franchisees. 

VODA Group businesses are guided by a leadership team with decades of experience in our industry.  We create fun backyard experiences for thousands of families across Canada.

Name: Prolifico Group
Description:
Prolifico is an alternative Real Estate & Private Equity investment management firm in Brazil.

The company acquires undervalued, medium-sized real estate assets that do not invite heavy competition from large capital sources, typically in up-and-coming areas of major Brazilian cities. The managers target investments with 20%+ projected yields on total cost, and IRRs of at least 25% over periods of 3 to 6 years.

Prolifico looks to create value through development and operation of “niche” operating businesses that are resilient in all macroeconomic business environments. Added protection for invested funds is provided through a strong underlying asset appreciation expected as Brazilian cities mature.

Prolifico has entered into joint ventures with international experienced professionals to form Self Storage, Student Housing, Senior Living and Data Centre operating businesses.

Microsoft CSP Direct Reseller: Our subsidiary, taotp.store, is a Microsoft Cloud Solution Provider (CSP) Direct Reseller, offering Microsoft 365, Azure, and Dynamics 365 licenses to businesses of all sizes.

Cloud Expertise Provider: We provide cloud solutions to SMEs, ETIs, and large corporations worldwide, helping them drive efficiency and innovation through tailored strategies in public, private, and hybrid environments.

Food and Beverage: We invest in Southern Europe by creating welcoming spaces dedicated to relaxation and local traditions, offering premium culinary experiences that foster community and cultural appreciation.

Media: We are expanding our media presence in Southern Europe, operating news outlets that deliver reliable information and engaging content, focusing on digital publishing and storytelling.

Fire Prevention Studies: Through our subsidiary, firestudy.gr, we conduct fire prevention studies in Southern Europe, addressing the growing wildfire risk due to climate change, working with local authorities to develop effective strategies.

Always Open to New Opportunities:
At RAGNAROK HOLDINGS, we are always exploring new avenues for growth and innovation. We welcome partnerships and projects that align with our vision and expertise. If you have a proposal, we would love to hear from you.

Name: AQAL Group
Description:
AQAL Capital, based in Munich, stands as a testament to the vision and pioneering spirit of the award-winning and globally recognized serial entrepreneurs and investors, Tom Schulz and Dr. Mariana Bozesan. As the 2017 European Early Stage Investor and the 2019 Female Business Angel of the Year, as well as a distinguished member of the Club of Rome and the World Academy of Art and Science, their investment philosophy is rooted in leveraging exponentially growing technologies to address the existential challenges facing humanity.
Their work extends beyond mere financial returns to embody a holistic approach to investing, encapsulated in their publication and report to the Club of Rome, "Integral Investing: From Profit to Prosperity," published by Springer in 2020. This groundbreaking work delineates a path toward sustainable prosperity, emphasizing investments that not only yield profit but also contribute positively to the planet and society.
For further insights into their innovative approach and the impact of their work, visit AQAL Capital's website. Here, one can explore the depth of their commitment to transforming the investment landscape, driving forward a future where technology and capital work in harmony to solve some of the most pressing issues of our time.

Hengdian Group is a diversified conglomerate operating in four main business areas: electrical and electronics, pharmaceuticals and healthcare, film and entertainment, and modern services. We have regional headquarters in Europe, Japan, Singapore, and are comprised of six public companies - DMEGC, Apeloa, Nanhua Futures, HG Entertainment, TOSPO and Innuovo – plus over 60 other subsidiaries and more than 200 manufacturing bases. Our operations are now active in more than 150 countries and regions around the world as we continue to grow. 

Since our founding in Hengdian, China in 1975, Hengdian Group has grown from a regional business into one of China's largest private enterprises. Through strategic diversification and operational excellence across multiple sectors, we have continuously evolved to meet the demands of an ever-changing global landscape. As Hengdian Group looks to the future, we remain dedicated to balancing diversified expansion with our commitment to social responsibility. Firmly rooted in Hengdian and driven by global ambitions, we strive to create lasting, meaningful impact in all our endeavours.

Our team of experienced professionals is committed to strategic asset management, rigorous oversight, and meticulous attention to detail, ensuring that every asset under our care is not only preserved but also positioned for future growth.

At BrainStorm Holdings, we understand that securing assets is about more than just protection—it’s about building a foundation for long-term success. With our comprehensive approach to asset management, we provide the backbone that supports the continued innovation and excellence of the entire organization.

Name: BEN Berlin Energie und Netzholding GmbH
Description:
Die BEN Berlin Energie und Netzholding GmbH (BEN) ist eine 100-prozentige Tochter des Landes Berlin und bildet zusammen mit der Stromnetz Berlin GmbH den BEN-Konzern. Die BEN, in der Funktion als Finanz- und Managementholding, spielt eine entscheidende Rolle bei der Bereitstellung von Investitionsmitteln, um sicherzustellen, dass die Stromnetz Berlin einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur Energieversorgungssicherheit und Energiewende in Berlin leisten kann. 

Die Absicherung der Kreditverbindlichkeiten aus dem Kauf des Berliner Verteilungsnetzbetreibers ist eine zentrale Aufgabe. 

Zudem ist die fortlaufende Beschaffung weiterer Finanzierungsmittel essenziell, um zukünftige Investitionen in die Energie- und Wärmewende sowie die Digitalisierung und den Ausbau erneuerbarer Energien zu sichern. 

Die BEN übt die strategische Steuerung der Stromnetz Berlin GmbH SNB aus, um die energie- und klimapolitischen Ziele Berlins zu unterstützen.

The investment environment in Malaysia continues to be promising for foreign investors, with sustained growth in multiple sectors and growing private consumption making it a profitable destination. This is further supported by an increasingly affluent middle class, a vibrant retail scene, and growing sophistication in regard to quality consumer goods.

Recognizing the rich opportunities in this South-East Asian hotspot, MyUS Venture Partners Sdn. Bhd. connects investors, corporations, and businesses in the US with potential opportunities in Malaysia as a major gateway to ASEAN. MyUS currently has interests in Agriculture, Tourism, Bio-Technology, Investment, Education, Property, Trading, Consultancy, IT, and the Medical sector. The company’s combination of global experience, expansive network, and home-grown, grassroots insight makes it an ideal partner for investors looking to make inroads into this high-potential emerging ASEAN economy.

Name: Teleferik Holding
Description:
2012 yılında Bursa merkezli olarak kurulan Teleferik Holding, dağ geliştirme ve teleferik sistemleri başta olmak üzere halatlı taşımacılık sektörlerinde faaliyet gösteriyor.  

Türkiye’de ve yakın ülkelerde ulaşım ve eğlence aracı olarak teleferik tesisleri kurmayı hedefleyen Teleferik Holding, 2014’de dünyanın en uzun teleferik hattı olan Bursa Teleferik ve 2017’de Alanya Teleferik işletmelerini hizmete sundu. 
Ülkemize profesyonel teleferik yatırımcılığını tanıtan Teleferik Holding, şu ana kadar hayata geçirdiği 50’yi aşkın anahtar teslim proje ve 3 işletmesi ile sektörlerindeki lider konumunu kurulduğu günden beri koruyor. 
Alanında dünya çapında söz sahibi olan İtalyan Leitner Ropeways ile yapmış olduğu teknik çözüm ortaklığı, yurtdışı satış imkanları ve kurumsal yapısıyla çalışanlarına gelecek vaat eden Holding, şirket içi eğitimleriyle de kişisel gelişime katkı sağlıyor.

Teleferik Holding, bünyesindeki 250’yi aşkın çalışandan oluşan profesyonel bir ekip ile yüksek teknoloji ve çevre dostu çözümleri bir araya getirerek grup şirketlerinin temel fonksiyonlarını koordine ederken, girişimci yönüyle de yeni yatırımlar yapmaya devam ediyor.

Name: Bintami Holding Co.
Description:
Bintami Holding is a Riyadh based investment holding company. As one of the most dynamic investments holding company in the Kingdom of Saudi Arab.

The Group’s business policy is based on a tactical and proven combination of investment planning, opportunity assessment, project initiation, execution and management, introduction of innovative management techniques and the creation of successful partnerships with other corporations. 
Our business started in 1952 of the last centuries in a store for trading basic building materials in the center of Riyadh at the hands of the late businessman Sheikh / Hamoud Al-Tami (may God have mercy on him), then his business developed into medium commercial institutions working in the trade of marble, electrical and mechanical tools and air conditioning works.

In 1970, the late eldest son Sheikh/ Saleh Hamoud Al-Tami (may God have mercy on him) joined the management of these institutions and had clear fingerprints in their prosperity and transformation into companies, where he followed the policy of diversity in investments and worked to open several activities and branches for them at the level of the Kingdom as well as forging alliances and strategic partnerships with some major local and regional companies.

Bintami Holding Company is now considered one of the oldest and largest companies operating in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and the region, due to its pioneering and diversified investments, which includes real estate, contracting activities of all kinds, Construction and waterproofing, food chain, trade, air-conditioning, manpower solutions and the chemical industry...etc

Bintami Holding is fully committed to playing its part in helping to make Country success – both from a commercial perspective and in bringing international best practice and investment opportunities to a wider cross-section of stakeholder interests.

Description:
At Barkhill, we've been reshaping the fast-food industry since our inception in 2009. From our very first product launch, we set out to redefine the standards of quality and service. We detached ourselves from the competition and quickly secured a substantial market share, all while earning a reputation as a reliable, long-term partner dedicated to excellence.

Our journey has been one of constant evolution. We've expanded our operations, relocated to a new city, and diversified the branches we serve, all in our pursuit of delivering exceptional experiences to our customers.

In 2020, we took our ambitions to the global stage. Barkhill's growth story now extends beyond Romania, with a local presence in Bulgaria, the UK, and Singapore. Our position is to open doors and provide opportunities they have not had in the past. Through our platforms, we give existing businesses the know-how and expertise to run small or medium enterprises. 

Our brands in our portfolio allow us to maximize our success, given their diversity in different verticals. We ensure that those brands can take pride in themselves within the group. Whether providing in-house services such as back-office support, marketing, consumer research, branding and/or consultancy, our sister companies are the pillars of our portfolio's sustainability.

To be the leader in business transformation, delivering innovative solutions that drive success.

Empowering our customers with innovative solutions, collaborative partnerships, and excellence.

Name: DAR - Sociedad Peruana de Derecho Administrativo y Regulación
Description:
Foro comprometido con la libertad, la legalidad y la buena administración del Estado.

La participación en este foro es libre y abierta, sin fines de lucro, y sin diferencias por nacionalidad ni por otra causa.
 
Los participantes consideran que:

i)	Garantizar y optimizar el principio de libertad, con responsabilidad en su ejercicio, promueve la solidaridad y el bienestar en una sociedad;

ii)	Respetar el principio de legalidad, como fundamento y límite de la función pública en un Estado democrático y social, contribuye con la realización del principio de buena administración de los poderes públicos; y

iii)	Cumplir los deberes propios y respetar la legalidad, en igualdad ante la ley, desde la actividad ciudadana y empresarial, es fundamental para asegurar el ejercicio de derechos y la igualdad de oportunidades.

Este foro asume como misión promover el diálogo, el conocimiento y la práctica responsable del Derecho Administrativo y la Regulación, en beneficio de las personas y de la sociedad en su conjunto.

Powstała w wyniku konsolidacji grupy REXER (REXER Sp. z o.o., REXER Design Sp. z o.o., REXER Service Sp. z o.o.) oraz Clima Komfort Sp. z o.o. - co daje jej ponad 30 lat doświadczenia w branży HVAC i pozwala połączyć w strukturach jednego strategicznego gracza know-how, doświadczenie, wiedzę oraz talenty obu organizacji. PHI zatrudnia ponad 140 pracowników i współpracuje z ponad 350 specjalistami-podwykonawcami. Grupa PHI działa poprzez silne marki rynków lokalnych - realizując projekty w całej Polsce począwszy od projektów przemysłowych, poprzez obiekty użyteczności publicznej aż po inwestycje hotelowe, logistyczne, mieszkaniowe i wojskowe. Name: ATDI
Description:
¿Qué es ATDI? ATDI es la plataforma de Atitlan especializada en desarrollo urbanístico y promoción inmobiliaria de alto impacto, así como en gestión patrimonial y servicios logísticos de cobertura integral.

Con más de 15 años de experiencia en la Península Ibérica, ATDI desarrolla, estructura y gestiona proyectos inmobiliarios complejos a lo largo de toda la cadena de valor, contribuyendo a la configuración de ciudades y territorios con una visión de largo plazo. En el marco de su estrategia de crecimiento, la plataforma impulsa activamente su proyección internacional, participando en proyectos en nuevos mercados europeos y globales.

ATDI combina capacidades financieras, estratégicas, técnicas y operativas para la inversión, financiación, desarrollo y gestión de activos inmobiliarios, actuando tanto de forma directa como en colaboración con promotores y socios especializados, especialmente en proyectos singulares y de alto valor añadido.

Actualmente, ATDI gestiona más de 650 millones de euros en activos, consolidándose como un actor relevante en el ámbito inmobiliario por su enfoque inversor, su capacidad de estructuración y su modelo de gestión integral.

Name: Regnork Group
Description:
In 1992, a visionary entrepreneur named Edwin Regnork embarked on what would become a remarkable journey in the world of business. With a focus on private finance, he laid the groundwork for what was to blossom into a multifaceted enterprise. Edwin’s initial foray into private finance set a solid foundation, allowing him to explore and expand his business interests over the years. His dedication and keen business acumen were evident as he navigated through the complexities of the financial world, steadily growing his venture with precision and foresight.


Three decades later, in 2022, Edwin Regnork, together with his wife Smitha Regnork and son Alwin Regnork, decided it was time for a transformative leap. The family, united in their vision and backed by years of experience and success, made the bold decision to venture beyond the realm of finance. This led to the birth of Sensa Homes, Sensa Studios, Sensa Games, and several other subsidiaries under the Regnork brand. Each of these new ventures was imbued with the same spirit of innovation and excellence that had been Edwin’s hallmark. Sensa Homes, in particular, quickly distinguished itself, becoming synonymous with premium and luxury construction. The company’s foray into real estate was not just about building homes but creating a lifestyle that resonated with the aspirations of modern homeowners.
Today, the Sensa brand stands as a testament to Edwin Regnork’s enduring legacy and his family’s commitment to excellence. 


Sensa Homes, along with its sister companies, has set new standards in their respective industries, combining innovative design with unmatched quality. The journey from a private finance initiative to a leading name in luxury construction showcases the power of vision, dedication, and the ability to adapt and grow. Edwin Regnork’s story is a source of inspiration for aspiring entrepreneurs, proving that with the right mix of perseverance, innovation, and family support, transforming dreams into r

Name: Alvi Global Enterprises (AGE)
Description:
Alvi Global Enterprises (AGE) is a premier, founder-led diversified holding company established in 2025. Headquartered in the tech innovation hub of Austin, Texas, AGE bridges the gap between Western market demands and high-performance global execution.

With strategic partnerships anchored in Dubai, Qatar, and London, and robust production operations in Pakistan, we operate as a seamless global ecosystem. This structure allows us to combine regional opportunities with global ambitions, delivering state-of-the-art solutions that transcend borders.

We operate across dynamic verticals including FinTech, Real Estate, Travel Technology, and AI-Driven Enterprise Services. Specifically, we excel in high-yield vectors such as Legal Operations Automation, Headless B2B Commerce Architecture, and ESG Data Assurance, positioning ourselves not merely as vendors, but as strategic partners solving complex, regulated business problems.

Our production facilities in Pakistan are the engine of our delivery model. Here, our specialized workforce of "Logic Engineers," data analysts, and full-stack developers operationalize existing technologies to solve the "productivity crisis" facing US and EU markets. We assist clients who are "software rich but process poor," transforming administrative bloat into streamlined, automated efficiency.

What makes Alvi Global Enterprises stand out is our ability to merge high-level strategy from our Austin headquarters with agile, cost-effective execution. Through our interconnected organizational arms DIGIMO for industry-specific marketing, a dedicated Software Development Arm, and AGE E-Ventures for product incubation we build solutions that scale.

Our work philosophy is simple: 
"Split the Work - Not the Profits."

Collaboration is at the core of our investment strategy. We actively partner with visionary entrepreneurs, industry experts, and thought leaders who share our passion for creating a better future. Name: ERIH HOLDINGS
Description:
ERIH Holdings was formed in 2012 as the gable incorporation of the companies, start-ups founded by the same shareholding in between 2008 and 2012. 
At ERIH, we believe that creating long-term shareholder value, through a distinct focus on innovation, best practices, corporate governance and risk management, is far more important than merely creating the traditional ROI. The continued support and encouragement of our valued shareholders, not just vindicates this belief but also constantly encourages ERIH to continue achieving greater heights.

ERIH is driven by industrial entrepreneurship based on societal challenges, innovation, and demand. When we see that a new business model and capital can solve problems and enable long-term value creation, we help to start a new business. We provide knowledge, experience, and capital, and build teams capable of bringing large, smart ideas to fruition.

The companies that we help to start are built on either new or old technologies that combine new business models. The companies that we support redraw the map and rewrite the rules in their markets. We follow macro trends and have our sights set on the ideas that have clear growth potential while at the same time reduce our ecological footprint.

The fact that we are involved right from the start and build companies from the ground up makes us unique. We are committed owners who work in partnership with companies, instilling confidence in and giving freedom to management. We are happy to remain majority owners of the companies we work with and have a long-term outlook.

Name: Air Rent A Car
Description:
Turizm sektörüne 2011 yılında adım atan Air Rent a Car, pazardaki yenilikleri, güçlü teknik alt yapısı, profesyonel çağrı merkezi ile çözüm ortağı müşterilerine, bireysel müşterilerine ve kurumsal müşterilerine yaratıcı çözümler sunmaktadır. Air Rent a Car Türkiye’ nin ilk Peugeot bayisi olan Aktif İriyıl Otomotiv İnş. Tur. Tic. ve San. Ltd. Şti. markasıdır.

Araç kiralama ile ilgili tüm ihtiyaçlarınızın çözümlerini tek bir çatı altına toplayan Air Rent a Car, Rent a Car kaskolu geniş araç filosu ile günlük araç kiralama, aylık, yıllık ve operasyonel  kiralama hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Air Rent a Car’ dan günlük, haftalık ve aylık araç kiralayabilir, Air Filo’ dan 12 Ay’ dan 36 Ay’ a kadar Operasyonel Filo Kiralama yapabilirsiniz.

Air Rent a Car filosunda otomotiv pazarının  BMW, Peugeot, Toyota, Renault, Nissan ve Opel gibi güçlü markaları ile hizmet vermektedir.
 
Air Rent a Car, "KİRALAMA İLE YENİDEN TANIŞIN" sloganıyla araç kiralama sektörüne yepyeni bir vizyon kazandırmıştır.
 
Büyümemizde çok önemli rol oynayacağını düşündüğümüz, Müşteri Talebi Odaklı yaklaşımımız ile geliştirmekte olduğumuz ürün ve ürün gruplarımızı çok yakın zamanda hayata geçirerek katma değerli hizmet kalitemizi, ihtiyaçlar ile harmanlayarak, kusursuz seviyeye taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Böylece yeni ürün ve servislerimiz sayesinde de pazardaki rekabet gücümüzü artırarak, iş ortaklarımızın değerine değer katacağız.
 
Biz sektörde farklı bir yaklaşım gösterme çabası içinde, araç kiralama hizmetlerinizde çözüm ortağı olmayı, danışmanlık hizmeti vermeyi, şartlarınıza en uygun çözümü sunmayı ve değerli müşterimizi KİRALAMA İLE YENİDEN TANIŞTIRMAYI  taahhüt ediyoruz.

Description:
Aderans America Holdings, Inc. is a holding company headquartered in Beverly Hills, California, with our global headquarters based in Tokyo, Japan. Established in 1968, Aderans group have always been dedicated to the creation of products designed to please our customers, providing them with thoughtful and attentive services as a leading provider of total hair solutions.

In North America, Aderans America Holdings oversees three sales subsidiaries. Our subsidiaries offer a diverse range of hair solutions to address hair loss and meet the needs of our customers regardless of race, age, gender and other demographics. 

Our portfolio includes:
   • HAIRCLUB: Provide hair loss solutions for men and women in the United States and Canada, including hair replacement systems (Xtrands, Xtrands+, and Extensions) and regrowth treatment (EXT Extreme Hair Therapy). They have 98 centers across the countries (as of June 2023).
   • BOSLEY: A pioneer and leader in hair transplantation through FUT (Follicular Unit Transplantation) and FUE (Follicular Unit Excision). They have 25 surgical offices and 45 consultation offices across the United States (as of February 2023). Bosley also provides BosleyRx, a telemedicine service. 
   • Aderans Hair Goods: Wholesale of ready-made hair wigs, accessories, hairpieces etc. Their brand includes, but is not limited to, Rene of Paris, Noriko, and Amore.

Name: WAIG
Description:
WAIG is a multi-patent AI holding group designed to transform intellectual property into high-growth ventures. At the core of our strategy is a portfolio of proprietary computer vision and AI patents that serve as the foundation for building, acquiring, and scaling innovative companies.

For Investors:
WAIG provides diversified exposure and targeted upside through a unique investment structure. An allocation into WAIG secures equity in the holding group while also providing direct participation in select portfolio companies or future spinouts. This dual exposure model creates two powerful payout streams: distributions from startup exits and holding company ownership.

The structure is carefully engineered to reduce risk while amplifying returns:

Dual Exposure – Group equity plus direct startup stakes.

Diversification – Every venture ties back to the broader WAIG portfolio.

Pipeline Advantage – Steady flow of internal spinouts and acquisitions increases the chance of outlier successes.

Targeted Upside – Investors can double down on high-traction leaders when signals are strong.

This combination makes WAIG a flexible yet disciplined platform for capital deployment in AI, giving investors more than just passive exposure, but an active role in the growth of transformative ventures.

For Partners:
WAIG is a strategic partner to corporations, acquirers, and industry leaders seeking to integrate advanced AI into their ecosystems. By leveraging our multi-patent portfolio, we accelerate time to market, unlock new revenue streams, and create competitive advantages across industries. Each venture in our portfolio is structured around a specialty use case, ensuring direct applicability and measurable impact.

Name: Amboro Capital
Description:
Als Nachfolgeunternehmer habe ich das Ziel, zusammen mit meinen Partnern ein profitables KMU in der Schweiz oder Süddeutschland zu erwerben und längerfristig als (Mit-)Inhaber und Geschäftsführer erfolgreich operativ fortzuführen.

Ich möchte Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmern in dieser Übergangsphase ein langfristig orientierter, vertrauensvoller Partner sein – mit dem Ziel, ihr Lebenswerk nachhaltig zu sichern. Nach erfolgreichem Erwerb übernehme ich persönlich die Rolle des Geschäftsführers, sichere Kontinuität für Mitarbeitende und Kunden und lege den Fokus auf nachhaltiges Wachstum – ohne vordefinierte Haltedauer.

Dabei werde ich von einem erfahrenen Kreis von mittelständischen Unternehmern sowie geduldigem institutionellen Kapital unterstützt. Die Partner von Amboro Capital verfügen über jahrzehntelange Erfahrung in der Begleitung von Nachfolgeunternehmern, über fundiertes operatives und finanzielles Know-how bei der nachhaltigen Skalierung von KMUs sowie über das notwendige Kapital.

Falls Sie eine Unternehmerin oder ein Unternehmer sind und sich mit Ihrer Nachfolge befassen, freue ich mich über einen unverbindlichen Austausch. Diskretion ist für mich selbstverständlich.
Und wenn Sie einfach neugierig sind, mehr über Amboro Capital zu erfahren, freue ich mich ebenso über Ihre Kontaktaufnahme.

Our portfolio includes TUGA Innovations, a leader in urban mobility, where DAHCOR Group proudly plays a significant role as a major shareholder. Additionally, we offer a wide range of lifestyle products, including accessories, gadgets, and experiences that elevate personal style and contribute to a conscious and sustainable fashion industry.

By combining our expertise, passion, and relentless pursuit of excellence, we are reshaping industries, pushing boundaries, and creating a future filled with limitless possibilities. Join us on this exciting journey as we redefine what is possible in sports, mobility and lifestyle.

With roots as operators, we founded Bristlecone to provide a different path for business owners: one in which we preserve the founder’s legacy, maintain the company’s independence, and empower the team to realize their full potential. 

We are hands-on entrepreneurs that love long-term business building, hold ourselves to exceptionally high standards, move with velocity, and appreciate that everything starts with people.

Name: SUTOR Global
Description:
Jsme přední projekční, inženýrská a dodavatelská společnost s 30 lety zkušeností. Specializujeme se na komplexní řešení pro chemický, těžební, hutní, automobilový, energetický průmysl a také na stavebnictví. Nabízíme široké spektrum služeb, od návrhu a výroby až po montáž, údržbu a modernizaci technologických zařízení.

Co přesně děláme?

 Engineering a re-engineering
Zajišťujeme komplexní návrhy technologických a průmyslových celků – od studií proveditelnosti přes detailní dokumentaci až po realizaci na klíč. Specializujeme se také na digitalizaci a vývoj jednoúčelových strojů.

 Montáže a servis
Máme oprávnění na montáže, opravy a revize zdvihacích, tlakových, plynových a elektrických zařízení. Naše služby zahrnují také školení obsluhy, pravidelné inspekce a modernizace.

 Výroba a opravy
Disponujeme vlastními kapacitami pro výrobu ocelových konstrukcí, potrubních systémů a náhradních dílů. Naše certifikace EN ISO 3834-2 zajišťuje nejvyšší kvalitu svařování a obrábění.

 Automatizace a řízení
Dodáváme řešení v oblasti měření, regulace a řídicích systémů včetně implementace Průmyslu 4.0. Pracujeme se špičkovými technologiemi od značek SIEMENS, ABB či SCADA.

 Stavební práce a mechanizace
Dodáváme lešení, zajišťujeme výkopové práce, autojeřáby a případně další techniku.

Mezi naše zákazníky patří významné průmyslové firmy jako například ORLEN Unipetrol, ČEZ, Czech Coal a další.

Proč si nás vybrat?
 Spojujeme dlouholetou tradici s moderními technologiemi.
 Zaměstnáváme špičkové odborníky a spolupracujeme s klíčovými průmyslovými partnery.
 Jsme hrdí na naše kořeny a podporujeme regionální komunitu, sport i kulturu.

Připojte se k nám a sledujte naše nejnovější projekty, inovace a profesní úspěchy.

Turizm sektöründe başarılı adımlarla ilerlerken, Hizmet sektöründe Ramada Plaza by Wyndham Istanbul Sultanahmet  ve  Söğüt Otel SPA & Old City ile konaklama alanında otelcilik sektöründe de değerli işlere imzasını atmaktadır.

Kurum içinde “bir” olmanın önemini iyi bilen SVN Group, mutlu işlerin mutlu çalışanlarla mümkün olabileceğine inanmaktadır. Yarattığı kurum kültürüyle çalışanlarına ve hayata geçirdiği işlere değer katmaktadır.

İş ortaklarıyla ilişkilerini şeffaflık ve dürüstlük çerçevesinde yürütmekte, güvene dayalı profesyonel ilişkiler kurmaktadır. Kendisine olduğu kadar iş ortaklarına da değer katma çabasıyla hareket etmekte, karşılıklı fayda sağlama amacı gütmektedir.

Çatısı altında bulunan markalarıyla yer aldığı sektörlerde öncelikli olarak kaliteli hizmet sunmayı amaç edinen SVN Group; ülkesine değer katmaya, misafirlerinin ve iş ortaklarının memnuniyet beklentilerini karşılamaya devam etmektedir. Yenilikçi anlayışı arkasına aldığı vizyoner bakış açısıyla daha fazla insanın hayatına dokunmak için attığı her adım, sağlam temeller haline gelerek,  gelecek çalışmalarına ışık tutmaktadır.

ERIH Holdings was formed in 2012 as the gable incorporation of the companies, start-ups founded by the same shareholding in between 2008 and 2012. 
At ERIH, we believe that creating long-term shareholder value, through a distinct focus on innovation, best practices, corporate governance and risk management, is far more important than merely creating the traditional ROI. The continued support and encouragement of our valued shareholders, not just vindicates this belief but also constantly encourages ERIH to continue achieving greater heights.

ERIH is driven by industrial entrepreneurship based on societal challenges, innovation, and demand. When we see that a new business model and capital can solve problems and enable long-term value creation, we help to start a new business. We provide knowledge, experience, and capital, and build teams capable of bringing large, smart ideas to fruition.

The companies that we help to start are built on either new or old technologies that combine new business models. The companies that we support redraw the map and rewrite the rules in their markets. We follow macro trends and have our sights set on the ideas that have clear growth potential while at the same time reduce our ecological footprint.

The fact that we are involved right from the start and build companies from the ground up makes us unique. We are committed owners who work in partnership with companies, instilling confidence in and giving freedom to management. We are happy to remain majority owners of the companies we work with and have a long-term outlook.

Indonesia is the second largest producer of tin mining commodities in the world. As a contributor to 70% of the world’s tin exports but has not been able to take part in determining the price of tin, we hope by contributing our experience  as a facilitator for domestic tin trade and managing receipt system warehouses, will improve Indonesia’s economy through effective commodity supply chains.

We believe that by building a reliable and efficient supply chain in Indonesia, it can form the basis for stable food security. Starting from a dream to prosper farmers and ranchers in Indonesia, we collaborate with the government and the best private companies for agricultural facilities and infrastructure and to increase food production.

Founded in 2017, Darmawan Aryansyah Group is an independent institution focuses on creating sustainable growth to bring economic impact in Indonesia. We have empowered and participated in funding rounds of various businesses and managing start-ups, while simultaneously building integrated supply chain with the implementation of receipt system warehouses, licensed by official government to ensure our reliability to gain customers’ trust.

Name: KB18 Företagsförädling
Description:
KB18 är ett annorlunda investeringsföretag. När vi blir ägare till ett nytt företag funderar vi aldrig på när vi kan sälja det. Går vi in är det för att stanna. Tillsammans med medarbetarna utvecklar vi det som redan är bra till något ännu bättre. Vi investerar mer än bara pengar. Minst lika viktigt är vår kunskap, vår tid och vårt engagemang.

De företag vi letar efter
Vi söker stabila och framgångsrika små- och medelstora bolag med tillväxtpotential samt med kompetenta och lojala medarbetare. Inte sällan kan en generationsväxling vara en bakgrund till försäljningen. Vi tar en operativ roll i bolagens ledning. Den nya energin och kompetensen vi tillför kombinerat med bolagens gedigna erfarenheter, utgör vårt framgångsrecept.

Långsiktighet och ansvar
Hållbarhet, ansvar och aktivt ägande präglar allt vid gör. De företag vi förvärvar betraktar vi som livsverk som vi både vill förvalta och förädla. Med avstamp i historien vill tillsammans med medarbetarna bygga stabila och framgångsrika företag med sunda värderingar.

Name: Nictus Holdings Limited
Description:
Founded in 1945, the Nictus Group of Companies has a proud history rooted in southern Africa. In 1969, the company was listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange (JSE) to raise equity for regional expansion, with its core operations originally based in what was then South West Africa.

A significant milestone came in 2012 when Nictus Holdings Limited, now widely recognised as Nictus Namibia, was unbundled from the JSE-listed entity. On 21 September 2012, it achieved a primary listing on the Namibian Stock Exchange (NSX).

Nictus Holdings oversees a diverse group of businesses operating across three core segments:
 Retail – Motor vehicles, tyres, automotive glass, and furniture
 Properties
 Insurance & Finance

With a strong local presence and a commitment to service excellence, Nictus Holdings continues to play a vital role in Namibia’s economic development.

Today, KOLAO Group offers a wide range of products and services in the automotive industry, including the distribution of cars, motorcycles, and other vehicles from leading brands such as Hyundai, Kia, BMW, Mitsubishi, and Changan. They also offer aftersales services, such as maintenance and repairs, as well as financing options for their customers.

In addition to our automotive business, KOLAO Group has also diversified into other sectors, including real estate, energy, and trading. We are committed to sustainable and ethical business practices and have received numerous awards for our contributions to the community and the environment.

KOLAO Group is a prominent player in the Southeast Asian automotive industry, known for our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer service.

Name: LivingGroup
Description:
LivingGroup operates at the intersection of creative industries and strategic investment, developing ventures across media, fashion, music, and culture. Our defining characteristic is adaptation: we evolve in direct response to founder Alexander Sylte's engagement, curiosity, and creative direction.

This is not a conventional holding company. We are a living structure—entering new domains, departing from others, following momentum rather than precedent. The only constant is change itself.

We seek partnerships with individuals and organisations who share our commitment to creative excellence and understand that relevance requires perpetual reinvention. If your initiative operates at the edge of what is emerging rather than what is established, we want to hear from you.

LivingGroup's portfolio reflects Alexander's current focus whilst remaining open to future direction. We maintain strategic partnerships with those who share our commitment to creative excellence and our acceptance that nothing—no structure, no strategy, no investment thesis—is permanent.

This approach demands institutional flexibility uncommon in traditional holding companies. It requires governance that supports exploration over consolidation, movement over stability, and genuine creative development over financial engineering alone.

We remain committed to this founding principle: LivingGroup exists to support Alexander Sylte's lifelong creative practice, adapting to wherever that practice leads, maintaining only the discipline required to do so sustainably.

Le nostre aziende operano esclusivamente in strutture all'avanguardia, garantendo servizi e prodotti di alta qualità.

La Nostra Missione:
La missione del Gruppo Bondatti è guidare la crescita sostenibile e creare valore per i nostri stakeholder investendo in aziende ad alto potenziale e fornendo loro le risorse e l'esperienza necessarie per eccellere nei rispettivi mercati.

Politica del Luogo di Lavoro:
Il Gruppo Bondatti mantiene un ambiente di lavoro dinamico e inclusivo. Prioritizziamo il benessere e la soddisfazione dei nostri dipendenti, garantendo un'atmosfera sicura, rispettosa e collaborativa per tutti.

I Nostri Valori:
    Integrità: Manteniamo i più alti standard di integrità in tutte le nostre azioni.
    Innovazione: Incoraggiamo la creatività e puntiamo al miglioramento continuo.
    Eccellenza: Ci impegniamo a fornire qualità superiore in ogni aspetto del nostro business.
    Collaborazione: Crediamo nel potere del lavoro di squadra e del successo condiviso.
    Sostenibilità: Miriamo a creare valore a lungo termine, prestando attenzione al nostro impatto sulla società e sull'ambiente.

Il Gruppo Bondatti - Dove l'innovazione incontra l'eccellenza.

Name: Çetin Şirketler Grubu
Description:
Çetin Şirketler Grubu, 1992 yılında Denizli’nin Honaz ilçesinde inşaat malzemeleri satışıyla sektöre ilk adımını atmıştır. Zamanla birçok alanda faaliyet göstererek günümüze kadar önlenemez bir yükselişin temsilcisi olmuştur. 1997 yılında Honaz'ın yanı sıra Denizli’nin Kocabaş kasabasında kurmuş olduğu merkez binayı faaliyete geçirmiştir. 2000 yılında yeni bir atılımla akaryakıt piyasasına girmiş ve ilk olarak Kocabaş Akaryakıt İstasyonu'nu kurmuştur. 2006 yılında madencilik sektörüne atılarak Dağdere Mıcır Tesisi'nde üretime başlamış ve aynı zamanda hazır beton sektöründe yaşanan gelişmelere paralel olarak Akhan Beton Santrali'ni hizmete sunmuştur. Tüm bunların devamında yeni tesisler kurma kararı alarak 2009'da Kaklık Mıcır Tesisi'ni ve Honaz Akaryakıt İstasyonu'nu faaliyete geçirmiştir. Denizli Çimento’nun bölge bayiliğini de bünyesinde barındıran firmamız; aynı zamanda 105 araçlık geniş filosu ile lojistik sektöründe de hizmet sunmaktadır. Son olarak 2014 yılında yeni bir yatırım yapan firmamız, yüksek kalitede parke ve bordür üretimine başlamıştır. Hızla büyüyen kuruluşun daha iyi organize edilebilmesi amacıyla her tesis için ayrı planlar, yerleştirmeler ve atamalar yapılmıştır. Çetin Şirketler Grubu, yaklaşık olarak 50 beyaz yakalı ve 100 mavi yakalı çalışandan oluşan geniş ve dinamik bir ekiptir. 

Müşterilerimize daima daha iyi ve daha etkin bir hizmet vermek adına güncel teknolojileri takip ederek yatırımlarını yapmaktan çekinmeyen şirketimizin bu anlayışı, tüm çalışanlarınca da paylaşılan sonu gelmez bir çabanın odak noktasını oluşturmaktır.

Name: Homeunity
Description:
Homeunity: Architecture for Rational Participation in Real-World Assets

Homeunity is a Swiss holding company acting as the architect of institutional frameworks for real-world assets. We are not an investment platform or a real estate agency; our role is that of a facilitator, providing access to assets by removing the "structural overload" typical of traditional ownership models.

Our model is built on the core principle of strict functional separation between Ownership, Participation, and Usage. We design an environment where participation in the real economy is transparent, protected, and free from operational complexity.

Core Ecosystem Components:

Wholesale Entry: We acquire assets in their entirety at the Acquisition Price (AP). This creates a Structural Buffer (ranging from 20% to 47%) relative to the retail unit-based valuation from the very first day of participation.

Swiss Security Standard: All structures are administered by Fuchs Treuhand AG (Switzerland). Participation rights are issued as register rights (Registerwertrechte) in accordance with the Swiss Code of Obligations.

Universal Financial Logic: We eliminate interest-bearing mechanics and speculative distortions. Our focus is on participation in the Real Operational Result (NOI) and the underlying economy of the assets.

Controlled Demand: Through the Homeunity Travel Club, our hospitality assets benefit from a structured internal demand channel. This minimizes dependency on external aggregators and ensures the stability of operational performance.

Our Mission:
To design a future where access to quality assets is defined not by status or geography, but by transparent architectural frameworks and clear rules of engagement. We replace marketing promises with structural honesty.

Homeunity is the choice for those who value architectural clarity and real-world assets over marketing illusions.

Name: Demetra Lifecare
Description:
Il benessere della Donna e della Coppia sono la nostra missione. 

È proprio da questa ambizione che nasce Demetra Lifecare, gruppo sanitario che gestisce e sviluppa sul territorio italiano centri medici, istituti di ricerca, laboratori e centri di riabilitazione. 

Le nostre origini sono lontane, affondano le radici nello Studio Egeria: centro medico milanese con 20 anni di storia, specializzato nel sostegno completo alla Donna attraverso percorsi di studio, cure e accompagnamento in tutte le fasi della sua vita, stagione eterna di evoluzione e di cambiamenti.

È insieme al Centro Medico Sempione, parte della nostra realtà, che ci apriamo ad un’assistenza completa e altamente qualificata per tutta la Famiglia, di cui la Donna è da sempre fonte amorevole. 

Un approccio medico clinico, ma capace di rimanere calorosamente umano, è ciò che ci contraddistingue. Per questo abbiamo costruito uno Staff Medico d’eccellenza, specializzato e multi-disciplinare, riconosciuto dalla Comunità Scientifica italiana e internazionale, nonché punto di riferimento durevole per i nostri Pazienti. 

Protocolli medici unici e calibrati per ambito d’intervento sono applicati attraverso metodologie e strumenti d'avanguardia, e ci consentono oggi di ricoprire un ruolo centrale nel nostro Network di riferimento: dall’Ospedale Maggiore Policlinico “Clinica Mangiagalli”, con cui siamo convenzionati, mantenendo interrelazioni di confronto e fiducia consolidata, a poli d’innovazione diagnostica e farmaceutica come le società Polo GGB, Novavision Group e YoUBe Cosmetics.

Le attività principali riguardano servizi di lavanderia industriale, che includono il comodato e il noleggio di biancheria, e lo svolgimento di pulizie esclusivamente per hotel.

Con una gestione efficiente delle risorse, PROMETA si occupa a livello centralizzato dell’amministrazione, della gestione delle risorse umane, degli acquisti e di altri servizi per tutte le società del gruppo, creando sinergie ed economie di scala e di scopo.

Punto di forza di PROMETA è la cultura organizzativa improntata sull'etica, sulla costruzione di relazioni positive tra direzione e collaboratori, sulla valorizzazione dei talenti, sulla formazione continua e sulla tutela del work- life balance delle persone che lavorano nella holding, cercando di conciliare la serenità lavorativa a una vita personale di soddisfazione all'insegna dei propri valori. 

Nel 2024 PROMETA ha iniziato un progetto di espansione, con l'apertura del secondo stabilimento di Lavanderia Adriatica e una nuova sede di OMNIS Servizi Alberghieri a Quarto d'Altino, nel Veneto Orientale, con l'obiettivo finale di realizzare ulteriori cinque stabilimenti nel corso dei prossimi sette-dieci anni, posizionati strategicamente nell'intero territorio nazionale.

Description:

Desenvolvemos operações envolvendo cessão de crédito com garantia, aquisição em leilões, estruturações de imóveis de mercado, além de projetos de retrofit e reposicionamento de portfólios.

A entrada no Banco Patrimonial é feita exclusivamente por convite, por meio de nossos Advisors Real Estate – profissionais  capacitados para conduzir o relacionamento local com os clientes, de forma ética e estratégica.

Oferecemos soluções sob medida, sempre com discrição, visão de longo prazo e foco na geração de valor real para os nossos clientes.

Name: SBSH Groupe
Description:
SBSH Groupe : Diversification et accompagnement de proximité pour nos clients

Fondé en 2009 et dirigé par Stanislas Heck, SBSH Groupe est un acteur majeur dans la promotion immobilière et l’investissement. Avec ses marques Grand Paris Immobilier et Grand Paris Promotion, le groupe a su élargir ses activités dans des secteurs complémentaires tout en restant centré sur la valorisation des actifs immobiliers.

Fort de plus de 25 ans d’expérience, SBSH Groupe a mené avec succès de nombreuses opérations immobilières : logements individuels et collectifs, logements sociaux et intermédiaires, mais aussi bureaux et espaces de coworking.

CIVALIM, entité spécialisée du groupe, intervient dans la Garantie Financière d'Achèvement (GFA) pour accompagner les garants dans la gestion et la reprise de projets immobiliers en difficulté. En tant qu’Administrateur Ad Hoc suivant l’article L261-10-1 du CCH et la loi ELAN, CIVALIM intervient partout en France pour sécuriser les projets, notamment en résidentiel, bureaux, locaux d’activités, hôtels. Le savoir-faire de CIVALIM en Assistance à Maîtrise d’Ouvrage (AMO) et en Maîtrise d’Ouvrage Déléguée (MOD) permet une gestion complète des projets, couvrant les aspects financiers, techniques, administratifs, juridiques et commerciaux, garantissant une livraison optimisée et sereine.

Le groupe opère également via VERSUS e.g, son entité d’Entreprise Générale, spécialisée dans l’aménagement d’espaces tertiaires et la réalisation d’ouvrages métalliques.

Enfin, SBSH se distingue avec son pôle immobilier d’entreprise Grand Paris Business Center, proposant des espaces de coworking modernes à Marnes-la-Coquette (92), avec bureaux privés, salles de réunion et open-space, idéalement situés près des grands axes routiers et de la gare de Vaucresson.

La diversification et la capacité d'adaptation de SBSH Groupe illustrent une vision entrepreneuriale forte, consolidant sa place parmi les leaders du marché immobilier

MEDYA |

Bu bakış açısı ile beraber online alanlarda yaratıcı işlerin sürekliliğini dinamik ekibimizle birlikte sonuca ulaştırmak Noblemen olarak en önemli medya politikamızdır.


TAŞIT | 
Deneyimli ekibimizle birlikte sizlere yedek parça alanında günümüz teknoloji anlayışına uygun, kaliteli ve hesaplı bir seçenek sunuyoruz. Bütün araç modellerine hitap edebilen geniş yedek parça temini ağımızla sizlere hızlı ve kaliteli çözümler sunmak Noblemen olarak önem verdiğimiz ilk kuraldır.


İNŞAAT | 
Kaliteli, güvenilir ve konforlu yaşam alanları sağlamak, istikrarlı kalite anlayışı ile değer yaratmayı esas alan kurumsal yapımız müşteri odaklı çalışma stratejimiz ve rekabetçi büyüme potansiyelimiz ile sektörde fark yaratmak. Nuestro modelo combina visión inversora, capacidad de desarrollo y control técnico, lo que nos permite abordar proyectos complejos con criterios de solvencia, rigor y vocación de largo plazo.

Nuestra actividad se orienta a la creación de producto residencial de calidad, con un enfoque riguroso en planificación, viabilidad económica y excelencia en la ejecución.

Hospitality Real Estate
Desarrollamos y gestionamos activos inmobiliarios operativos en el sector hotelero, a través de plataformas estructuradas junto a socios institucionales.

Nuestras operaciones se orientan a la creación de activos de calidad institucional, con foco en el control del riesgo, la ejecución eficiente y una estrategia de desinversión a largo plazo.

Plataformas de Inversión - (HERITAGE)
HERITAGE Capital es nuestra plataforma de gestión de inversiones inmobiliarias.

Energía - (HIDROFREIXA)
Operamos una plataforma de producción eléctrica a través de dos minicentrales hidroeléctricas, con una capacidad instalada total de 11 MW.

Construcción: (DICSA)
Es nuestra plataforma técnica, especializada en la ejecución industrial de proyectos complejos, con foco en el control de costes, plazos y calidad.

Name: Eiffage Energiesystemen B.V.
Description:
𝗚𝗲𝗱𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗼𝗺 𝗵𝗲𝘁 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗶𝗹 𝘁𝗲 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗻!
Eiffage Energiesystemen bestaat uit meerdere gespecialiseerde bedrijven die samen technische totaaloplossingen bieden voor industrie, infrastructuur en utiliteit. We ontwerpen, bouwen en onderhouden complexe installaties op het gebied van elektrotechniek, industriële automatisering, HVAC en energie-infrastructuur. 
Als onderdeel van de internationale Eiffage Group combineren we lokale vakkennis met Europese slagkracht. In Nederland werken ruim 1.300 collega’s aan innovatieve oplossingen die bijdragen aan een veilige, betrouwbare en toekomstbestendige leefomgeving.

𝗗𝘂𝘂𝗿𝘇𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗱 𝗮𝗹𝘀 𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗷𝗳𝘃𝗲𝗲𝗿
Klimaatverandering is een feit. Wij zien het als een kans om het verschil te maken. Daarom passen we duurzame werkmethoden toe in al onze projecten en dragen we actief bij aan de CO2-neutrale strategie van de Eiffage Groep. Deze strategie rust op drie pijlers:
•	CO2-neutrale materialen en ontwerpen
•	Hernieuwbare energie en energieprestaties
•	Ecomobiliteit

𝗢𝗻𝘇𝗲 𝗸𝗲𝗿𝗻𝘄𝗮𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗲𝗻
Bij Eiffage Energiesystemen willen we het goede voorbeeld geven en verantwoordelijkheid nemen voor onze acties. We waarderen transparantie en vertrouwen op onze beslissingen. Moed, vasthoudendheid en een heldere geest zijn de kracht achter onze groei.
De gezondheid en veiligheid van onze medewerkers zijn onze eerste zorg. Daarom streven we naar een risicovrije operatie door elke dag talent op te leiden, bij te scholen en aan te trekken.

Meer weten? Bezoek onze website!

Name: Maju Bersama Digitalindo
Description:
Bayangkan sebuah perusahaan yang tidak hanya berbisnis, tetapi juga peduli pada kebahagiaan Anda, lingkungan sekitar, dan masa depan generasi mendatang. Itulah MBD Corp , brand dari PT Maju Bersama Digitalindo, yang hadir untuk membuat hidup lebih mudah, lebih bahagia, dan penuh rasa syukur. Dengan visi besar "Mewujudkan kehidupan yang lebih baik melalui inovasi bisnis berkelanjutan" , kami percaya bahwa setiap langkah kecil yang kami ambil hari ini bisa menjadi awal dari perubahan besar besok.

Kami di MBD Corp memiliki satu tujuan utama: Menyebarkan manfaat dan kemudahan untuk bahagia dan penuh syukur . Melalui berbagai layanan dan produk yang kami tawarkan, kami berusaha memberikan solusi nyata yang bisa dirasakan langsung oleh masyarakat. Mulai dari menciptakan kenyamanan dalam kehidupan sehari-hari, membantu pelaku usaha lokal berkembang, hingga menyediakan akses terhadap produk berkualitas tinggi dengan harga terjangkau. Semua ini dilakukan agar Anda merasa lebih ringan menjalani hari-hari tanpa harus khawatir tentang hal-hal kecil.

Inovasi dan keberlanjutan adalah dua prinsip utama kami. Di MBD Corp, kami selalu mencari cara baru untuk membuat hidup lebih mudah bagi Anda, menggunakan teknologi yang bermanfaat dan ramah lingkungan. Kami juga aktif mendukung komunitas lokal serta program sosial seperti pelatihan keterampilan dan pendidikan digital. Bagi kami, kesuksesan bukan hanya soal angka, tetapi juga senyum di wajah masyarakat. Bersama MBD Corp, mari kita wujudkan kehidupan yang lebih baik—lebih bahagia, lebih mudah, dan penuh rasa syukur.

Description:

What began as a creative media and innovation company in Malawi has evolved into a transformative force in ethical investment, driven by a commitment to sustainable development and long-term impact.

Rooted in a deep understanding of entrepreneurship and systemic challenges, Bien Corporation addresses the primary barrier faced by emerging innovators: access to equitable financing. Through a dual-model approach, the company offers early-stage non-profit seed funding combined with a scalable private investment mechanism. The fund empowers high-potential ventures with mentorship, global networks, and tailored business development programs, ensuring that entrepreneurs maintain ownership of their businesses while scaling globally.

As Bien Corporation expands beyond its African origins, it is positioned to foster entrepreneurship across the Global South, bridging the gap between opportunity and sustainable growth. With its foundation in ethical, non-exploitative investment, Bien Corp stands as a beacon of change, nurturing the next generation of business leaders to thrive on their terms.

Name: Beaver Group
Description:
Beaver Group is a private holding company based in Perth, Australia. We invest in private businesses and partner with their leaders to grow these via organic growth and acquisitions. We are a permanent capital investor and own businesses for the long-term. We are led by successful entrepreneur and business owner Josh Beaver.

We typically invest in businesses that look like:
•	Ownership – typically founder or family run.
•	Industry – primary focus on industrial services, value-added distribution, and specialised manufacturing.
•	Revenue – $5m to $50m.
•	Profitability – $1m to $10m EBITDA.
•	Location – headquartered in Australia (no restriction for add-on acquisition).

Our primary goal is to help our businesses succeed. We provide permanent capital, access to a team of experts, and support in target areas to accelerate growth including strategic planning, digital marketing, sales process & team development, technology enablement, talent acquisition, financial controls & decision-making, and add-on acquisitions.

We typically make majority acquisitions that look like:
•	Growth capital – strong growth opportunity, owner keeping 25-49% and staying to grow the business.
•	Transition buyout – established business, owner looking to take some money off the table, keep 10-30% and run the business for another 2-5 years before full exit.
•	Complete buyout – established business, owner looking to retire and sell 100%.

We typically invest 100% equity (no debt) with a permanent time horizon.

Die Landesholding Burgenland und ihre 81 vollkonsolidierten Gesellschaften verstehen sich als Dienstleister für alle BurgenländerInnen.

Als sozial handelndes Unternehmen ist es unser Ziel, Ressourcen verantwortungsvoll und nachhaltig einzusetzen, Wertschöpfung im Land zu halten, den Wirtschaftsstandort Burgenland zu stärken sowie Innovation und Wachstum zu fördern.

Durch unsere Kompetenz stellen wir sicher, dass öffentliche Gelder zum größtmöglichen Nutzen im Land eingesetzt werden.

Wir in der Landesholding Burgenland sind ein Team von SpezialistInnen. Unser Leitspruch ist: „bündeln & bewegen“.

„Bündeln“ steht für das Schaffen von effizienten Strukturen und das Zusammenlegen von Kräften, Know-how und Geldmitteln. Damit optimieren wir die Leistungen für die Menschen in unserm Land und sparen das Geld aller Steuerzahler.

„Bewegen“ steht für die professionelle Umsetzung von Vorhaben die unser Land moderner und lebenswerter machen. Durch Innovation und Einsatz gelingt es uns immer wieder viel beachtete Meilensteine zu setzen.

Wir glauben daran, dass unsere Arbeit das Burgenland entscheidend prägt und weiterentwickelt. So wird unser Land im Standortwettbewerb weiter gestärkt und neu positioniert. Damit schaffen, erhalten und sichern wir hochwertige Arbeitsplätze im Burgenland.

Bewegen Sie die Zukunft mit uns!

Sie wollen sich in den Dienst der BurgenländerInnen stellen, sich für das Land engagieren und die Region mit vereinten Kräften fit für die Zukunft machen?

Dann besuchen Sie unsere Homepage, entdecken Sie die vielfältigen Einsatzmöglichkeiten in unserer Unternehmensgruppe und starten Sie Ihre Karriere im Burgenland!

Name: DNC Group
Description:
2020 yılında Deniz Işın Coşkuner tarafından kurulan şirketimiz, kısa sürede etkileyici bir ilerleme kaydetti. İlk olarak DNC Digital markası altında dijital medya ve bilişim alanında yenilikçi çözümler sunmaya başladık. Bu adım, teknoloji ve dijital dünyadaki güçlü vizyonumuzu ve yetkinliğimizi yansıtıyordu.

Hızlı büyümemiz, sektördeki sağlam yerimizi pekiştirdi. 2020'nin son çeyreğinde araç alım satım sektörüne girerek DNC Motor’s markasını oluşturduk. Bu stratejik adım, iş modelimizi çeşitlendirdi ve sektörel genişleme hedeflerimizi destekledi.

2021'de spor ve sağlık alanında DNC Fitness markasıyla modern fitness merkezleri açtık, böylece spor ve sağlık sektöründe güçlü bir varlık oluşturduk. Aynı dönemde tekstil sektörüne de adım attık ve kurduğumuz markamız aracılığıyla kaliteli ve yenilikçi ürünler sunduk. Bu girişimler, sektörel çeşitliliğimizi artırarak rekabet gücümüzü pekiştirdi.

Gelecekte uluslararası pazarlarda etkin rol oynamayı ve yenilikçi çözümler sunarak müşteri kitlesini genişletmeyi hedefliyoruz. Ayrıca, sektörler arası sinerji yaratma ve stratejik ortaklıklar kurma planlarımız doğrultusunda ilerliyoruz.

Deniz Işın Coşkuner’in liderliğinde, şirketimiz dinamik ve yenilikçi bir yaklaşımla güçlü bir konum elde etti. Başarı öykümüz, girişimcilik ruhu ve stratejik adımların bir sonucudur ve gelecekteki büyüme potansiyelimizi güçlü şekilde ortaya koymaktadır.

İlerleyen dönemde yeni pazarlara açılım, Ar-Ge yatırımları ve sürdürülebilir projeler önceliklerimiz arasındadır. Esnek iş modelimiz, değişen pazar koşullarına uyum sağlamamızı kolaylaştırırken, teknoloji ve inovasyonu stratejik bir avantaj olarak kullanarak müşteri memnuniyetini sürekli artırmayı ve marka değerimizi güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Sonuç olarak, şirketimiz, kuruluşundan bu yana sergilediği dinamizm ve stratejik yönetim anlayışıyla başarılı bir büyüme grafiği çizdi. Gelecekte de sektörel liderliğimizi pekiştirerek global ölçekte etkin bir iş modeli sergilemeye devam edeceğiz.

Name: Misto Holdings Corp.
Description:
Misto Holdings: 'Redefining Boundaries'

Misto Holdings stands as a distinguished and dynamic global brand portfolio company, dedicated to fostering energy, potential, and growth. Originating from the prestigious sports fashion brand FILA, founded in Italy in 1911, Misto Holdings acquired FILA's global business in 2007 and became a publicly traded entity on the Korean stock market in 2010. In 2011, the company further expanded its portfolio with the acquisition of Acushnet Holdings Corp., renowned for its premium golf brands, including Titleist, FootJoy, Scotty Cameron, KJUS, Vokey, and others.

In recent years, we rebranded from FILA Holdings to Misto Holdings, a name that reflects our unwavering commitment to shaping the future of brand management with innovation, inclusivity, and foresight.

At Misto Holdings, we are driven by our core values of Synergetic, Empowering, Resilient, and Responsible. Our vision is to empower brands to harness their energy and potential, enriching the lives of individuals and communities. Through our mission, we aim to unite a collective of dynamic brands that connect, inspire, and create meaningful experiences, fostering a positive impact on both people and communities.

We are resolute in our commitment to Redefining Boundaries, shaping the future of branding, and leaving a profound, positive legacy within society. As the custodian of these esteemed brands, Misto Holdings provides unparalleled strategic guidance and resources, ensuring the highest standards of excellence across our portfolio and creating long-term value for all our stakeholders.

Description:
Clôtures et Portails de France est un groupe familial français basé dans les Hauts-de-France, spécialisé dans la fabrication, la pose et la distribution de produits d’aménagement extérieur tels que clôtures, portails et occultation.

L’aventure commence en 1992 avec la création de Clôtures et Travaux du Douaisis par David Dupuis, initialement axée sur les travaux publics, mais déjà animée par un fort intérêt pour l’aménagement extérieur.
 
Quelques années plus tard, son frère Matthieu Dupuis le rejoint pour consolider l’entreprise familiale à travers Clôtures et Portails du Douaisis, aujourd’hui l’un des piliers du Groupe et acteur de référence dans la région des Hauts de France.

Pour proposer une offre globale d’aménagement extérieur, leurs activités se diversifient : fabrication, pose, automatisme et distribution, à travers de nombreuses entités complémentaires. 

En février 2009, toutes ces sociétés sont réunies sous une seule bannière : Clôtures et Portails de France, symbole de qualité, d’innovation et de savoir-faire local.

Le società del gruppo sono:

Siq – Sicurezza e Qualità
Id mep – Consulenza e Progettazione impianti meccanici, elettrici e idraulici
Id equo – Ambiente e Sostenibilità

Id group fonda le basi del proprio operato su di un efficace sistema di organizzazione e di gestione che assicura la giusta soluzione al problema specifico, ottimizzando tempi e costi, con la garanzia di un risultato di qualità. La precisione di un approccio metodologico ed organizzativo unito alla capacità di lavorare in gruppo per integrare competenze diverse sono le fondamenta dell’attività.

L’ampiezza tecnica e la qualità dei servizi offerti dal gruppo Id group ci permette di essere presenti con i nostri servizi in molti enti e in molte organizzazioni, sia di grandi dimensioni che di piccole dimensioni, di settori differenti, nazionali e locali.

Name: Argan, Inc.
Description:
Argan, Inc. is a holding company that acquired and now operates four wholly owned subsidiaries: Gemma Power Systems, The Roberts Company, Atlantic Projects Company and SMC Infrastructure Solutions. 

The largest of these subsidiaries, Gemma Power Systems, provides a full range of engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, operations management, maintenance, development, technical and consulting services to the power generation and renewable energy markets for a wide range of customers, including independent power project owners, public utilities, power plant equipment suppliers and global energy plant construction firms. 

The Roberts Company provides on-site plant services that support maintenance turnarounds, shutdowns and emergency mobilizations for industrial facilities primarily located in the southern United States based on its expertise in producing, delivering and installing fabricated steel components such as pressure vessels, heat exchangers and piping systems. 

The Atlantic Projects Company provides turbine, boiler, large rotating equipment installation, commissioning and outage services to the global power industry. 

SMC Infrastructure Solutions provides project management, inside and outside construction, installation, and maintenance services related to technology infrastructure and power distribution systems for commercial, local government and federal government customers located primarily in the Mid-Atlantic region.

Headquartered in Rockville, Maryland, Argan continues to show consistent growth primarily as a competitor for energy services. The company supports more than 1,000 employees worldwide, with most located in the United States.

Name: Lorenzi Holding
Description:
Our history began in 1990 with LORENZI Srl, founded by Lorenzo Lorenzi. 
Initially established as a distributor of products for footwear and leather goods, the company evolved into a technical textile manufacturer.
Over the years, it grew to become the leading textile industry specialized in microfibers, introducing LYLIANE, a brand that remains one of the most prestigious in the sector worldwide.

Thanks to its international success and outstanding performance, the majority of LORENZI SRL was later sold to a private equity fund, while our holding retained a significant shareholding and continues to be part of its story.

Building on this foundation, the group expanded into real estate, developing luxury residential properties and industrial buildings for both sale and lease. Over time, this branch became one of the holding’s strategic pillars.

In 2024, we entered a new chapter by acquiring a 90% stake in one of Italy’s pioneering gluten-free food companies, founded in 2011. This acquisition represents the cornerstone of a broader project: making gluten-free products accessible to everyone, not only in retail but also in cafés, restaurants, hotels, and other hospitality venues.

To support this vision, we are also investing in distribution, acquiring specialized gluten-free retail stores.

Today, our holding stands on three complementary pillars — textiles, real estate, and food innovation — combining heritage, excellence, and a clear vision for the future.

Alesia, Faruk BULUT ve Kaan Bereket BULUT tarafından modern hayatı şekillendirerek yeni keşiflerin öncülüğünü üstlenmek ve daha iyi bir yaşamın standartlarını oluşturmak için teknolojiyi ana odak sektörü olarak benimseyerek 2022 yılında İstanbul'da kurulmuştur.

Paydaşları ve hatta rakipleri için bir tutkuya dönüşecek, sınıfının en iyi markalarını bünyesinde barındıran Alesia, çalıştığı alanlarda küresel bir oyuncu olma hedefiyle çalışarak operasyonel haritasını bu doğrultuda sürdürmektedir.

Ana sektörü teknoloji sektörünün yanı sıra eğlence, medya & sosyal medya sektöründe faaliyet gösteren Alesia, ayrıca mevcut hizmet verdiği sektörlerin yanı sıra yeni sektörlerde AR-GE çalışmalarını sürdürürek büyüme sağlamaktadır. Alesia, üstün teknoloji, yüksek marka kalitesi ve dinamik bir insan kaynağı ile tüm paydaşlarına ve müşterilerine hizmet vermektedir.

Alesia'nın kısa bir süreç içerisinde ulaştığı başarının arkasında, insan merkezli bir yönetim yaklaşımı yer almaktadır. Bu yaklaşım ile, Alesia, dünya ölçeğinde saygın kuruluşlarla iş birliği yaparak, Türkiye’yi bütün dünyada temsil etmektedir.

Alesia'nın yönetim yaklaşımı, bütün toplumun yararlandığı ve yararlanacağı kurumsal yurttaşlık bilincini de yansıtmaktadır. Alesia, markalarıyla birlikte yürüttüğü sosyal sorumluluk çalışmaları ile insanların hayatlarına dokunarak onlar için daha güzel ve iyi bir hayat kurmayı sağlamayı hedeflemekle birlikte ülke ekonomisine ve istihdama katkı sağlamaktadır.

Türkiye’de değişimin öncüleri arasında yer alma vizyonu ile keşfederek çalışan Alesia, sahip olduğu geniş hizmet, bilgi ve iş birliği ağını hedeflerine ulaşmada en iyi şekilde değerlendirmektedir.

Name: The Chris Paul Collective
Description:
In Los Angeles, where Chris Paul plays, works, and builds, The Chris Paul Collective is entering its next stage of growth—uniting his business and philanthropic ventures under one roof and expanding their reach. Founded and led by Paul, the Collective spans consumer products, basketball, media, investments, events, and community impact. Its verticals include Paul’s NBA business operations; CP3, LLC; Good Eat’n, his rapidly growing snack brand; Los Angeles-based production company Ohh Dip!!! Entertainment, which he co-owns with Words + Pictures; The Chris Paul Family Foundation; and CP3 Investments. Rounding out the portfolio is The Playbook Group, a grassroots events and experiential business that runs tournaments, academy programs, and camps all over the country where Paul has mentored countless young athletes, coaches and NBA players.

Paul is a 12-time NBA All-Star, two-time Olympic gold medalist, and nine-time NBA All-Defensive Team selection who ranks second all-time in career assists and steals. As the longest-serving President of the National Basketball Players Association (2013–2021), he played a pivotal role in reshaping the modern NBA — championing player empowerment and expanding economic opportunity. He is also a New York Times best-selling author and a recipient of the ESPN Humanitarian of the Year award. Off the court, Paul has built a dynamic business and philanthropic ecosystem rooted in quality, equity, and innovation.

Üşenmez Holding olarak, sadece ticari başarıya değil, aynı zamanda toplumsal katkıya odaklanırız. İşimizin ötesinde bir anlam taşıyan bu yolculukta, her bir çalışanımızın ve iş ortağımızın katkısı büyüktür. Birlikte, daha ileriye ve daha iyiye doğru ilerlemeye devam ediyoruz.

Name: Conselho Holding
Description:
Nossa missão é transformar a maneira como as famílias transmitem seus bens, entre gerações, de modo econômico, livre de impostos, inventários e disputas judiciais.

Ajudamos empresários a proteger seu patrimônio familiar e empresarial em vida, contra execuções e ações judiciais, economizando Milhões em impostos, evitando o Inventário e brigas judiciais familiares.

Nossa atuação cria condições para que a família fique longe do judiciário e nunca precise dele para discutir a sucessão.

Garantir que a vontade do Patriarca e/ou Matriarca seja preservada e que ele(a) permaneça no controle de seus bens até o momento final.

Sobre o nosso CEO - Fundador: Glaucon do Bom Conselho é Economista e Contador formado pela PUC, Atuou como Controller e CFO em empresas de grande porte como Hospitais e Escritórios de Advocacia. 

Possui MBA em Finanças pelo IBMEC e se tornou Especialista em Sucessão familiar por BABSON College University USA. 

Atualmente na Conselho Holding, assessora Centenas de Clientes na parte de Gestão Patrimonial familiar e Holdings, além de atuar como Acessor de investimentos também é especialista em Seguros de Vida.

Nascemos no Brasil, a sexta maior economia do mundo e a segunda maior do continente americano, ficando atrás apenas dos Estados Unidos. Estamos sediados no estado do Maranhão, segundo maior do Nordeste brasileiro. Com 217 cidades, 6.574.789 habitantes e 331.935,507 mil quilômetros quadrados, sua capital é a ilha de São Luís, onde está a matriz dos nossos negócios.

O Maranhão tem uma das melhores localizações de acesso aos mercados norte-americano e europeu, e o porto mais próximo ao Canal do Panamá do Brasil.
A posição estratégica e a infraestrutura, somadas aos recursos naturais disponíveis, transformam-no em um dos estados com maior potencial econômico do país.

Name: Fifty-Fifty-Five
Description:
Fifty-Fifty-Five is a venture creation platform rooted in intuition, trust, and deep belief in people. Our mission: to co-found 50 companies with 50 unique partners over the course of 5 years.

We invest early belief, strategic thinking, and a bit of capital, not to test ideas, but to build sustainable businesses that make a real difference.

Every venture under the Fifty-Fifty-Five umbrella starts with one simple moment: a human connection that feels right. We don’t chase trends or industries - we follow people.

Our model is built on four founding principles:

We start with intuition, when it feels right, it usually is.

We partner with potential, we see what’s often hidden.

We bring value, not time. Our involvement is leverage, not dependency.

We build things that help real people, value first, always.

We are not a fund, not an incubator, not an accelerator.
We are a belief system that turns into businesses.

Description:
BPN Holding è un leader globale nell'innovazione tecnologica e nelle soluzioni imprenditoriali, guidando la trasformazione digitale attraverso la sua vasta gamma di servizi e prodotti all'avanguardia.
Con una visione orientata al futuro, ci impegniamo a offrire soluzioni innovative che affrontano le sfide più complesse del mondo moderno. Grazie alla nostra esperienza multidisciplinare e alla costante ricerca di eccellenza, aiutiamo le aziende a ottimizzare le loro operazioni, a espandere il loro impatto e a prosperare in un ambiente in continua evoluzione.
I nostri settori di competenza includono:
Tecnologia dell'informazione e della comunicazione (ICT): Offriamo soluzioni personalizzate di ICT per migliorare l'efficienza operativa, la sicurezza e la competitività delle aziende.
Intelligenza Artificiale (AI) e Apprendimento Automatico (ML): Utilizziamo tecnologie all'avanguardia per sviluppare sistemi intelligenti che ottimizzano processi, analizzano dati e predicono trend futuri.
Consulenza Strategica: Forniamo consulenza strategica personalizzata per guidare le aziende nel raggiungimento dei loro obiettivi di crescita e sviluppo a lungo termine.
Start-up e Venture Capital: Supportiamo l'innovazione e l'imprenditorialità attraverso il nostro programma di investimenti in start-up promettenti e progetti ad alto potenziale.
Presso BPN Holding, ci impegniamo a creare valore tangibile per i nostri clienti, adattandoci alle loro esigenze e anticipando le tendenze di mercato. Siamo guidati da una passione per l'eccellenza e una determinazione a trasformare le sfide in opportunità di successo. Unisciti a noi nel plasmare il futuro dell'innovazione e dell'imprenditorialità.

Name: Hellenic Wineries
Description:
Ο Όμιλος Ελληνικά Οινοποιεία Α.Ε. δραστηριοποιείται στην παραγωγή και εμπορία οίνων, καθώς και στην εμφιάλωση και διάθεση φυσικού μεταλλικού νερού. 

Με κύριους βραχίονες την ιστορική Μπουτάρη Οινοποιεία Α.Ε. – με τρεις οινοποιητικές μονάδες, περισσότερες από 40 ετικέτες και τη διαχείριση του ιστορικού brand CAMBAS – το Κτήμα Scalarea στην Κρήτη, που ξεχωρίζει για τα κρασιά του κρητικού αμπελώνα, τα αποστάγματα και τη φιλοξενία του, καθώς και από τον Ιανουάριο του 2025 το Κτήμα Σεμέλη, γνωστό για τη δέσμευσή του στην παραγωγή υψηλής ποιότητας οίνων με έμφαση τις αμπελουργικές ζώνες της Νεμέας και της Μαντινείας, ενισχύει περαιτέρω το χαρτοφυλάκιο του ομίλου. Η στρατηγική συνεργασία με τους βιολογικούς αμπελώνες Navarino και η δραστηριότητα της ΙΟΛΗ ΠΗΓΗ Α.Ε., με την εμφιάλωση φυσικού και ανθρακούχου μεταλλικού νερού από ιδιόκτητη πηγή στους πρόποδες του βουνού Οίτη, συμπληρώνουν το πολυδιάστατο χαρτοφυλάκιο του Ομίλου. 

Με επίκεντρο την ποιότητα, την καινοτομία και την εξωστρέφεια, τα Ελληνικά Οινοποιεία δημιουργούν προϊόντα υψηλής προστιθέμενης αξίας για την ελληνική και διεθνή αγορά. Από το 2022, βασικός μέτοχος του Ομίλου είναι η Sterner Stenhus, σε συνεργασία με ομάδα Ελλήνων και ξένων επενδυτών.
