Name: GGM Group
Description:
O GGM Group é um ecossistema integrado que reúne soluções em infraestrutura logística, operações aduaneiras, transporte e desenvolvimento regional.

Com sede em Pouso Alegre (MG), atuamos estrategicamente no eixo que conecta o Sul de Minas ao Estado de São Paulo e ao Corredor Rio–Minas, fortalecendo cadeias produtivas e aproximando empresas de mercados nacionais e internacionais.

Nosso portfólio reúne as seguintes unidades:

GGM Business Parklog
Complexo logístico corporativo com 328 mil m², área alfandegada de 30 mil m² e o CLIA Pouso Alegre em operação. Integra armazéns de alto padrão, pátios operacionais, módulos de expansão e salas corporativas para locação, voltadas ao ecossistema de COMEX. O parque reúne armazenagem, circulação, comércio exterior e infraestrutura em um único ambiente.

GGM AG Log
Unidade responsável pelo transporte e movimentação de cargas, conectando operações industriais e aduaneiras com rotas eficientes, incluindo o Corredor Rio–Minas.

Portal Sul das Gerais
Solução voltada à locação de salas comerciais e espaços corporativos (Portal Office 1 e 2), oferecendo estrutura para empresas e escritórios administrativos em Ouro Fino (MG).

Nossa atuação é guiada pelos pilares de integração, eficiência e desenvolvimento, consolidando o GGM Group como um ecossistema que conecta infraestrutura, logística e soluções corporativas sob uma visão estratégica unificada.

Trabalhamos para fortalecer cadeias produtivas, aproximar empresas e impulsionar o crescimento sustentável do Sul de Minas por meio de operações sólidas e processos logísticos integrados.

Our *Me6rash* service revolutionizes delivery with door-to-door courier solutions, ensuring that packages arrive safely and on time, no matter the distance. 

With a passion for fashion, our *Thredz* clothing line combines style and comfort, catering to diverse tastes and preferences while promoting self-expression.

Our business consultancy and brokerage company *Mashroo3 App* empowers entrepreneurs by facilitating the buying and selling of businesses. We leverage our extensive industry knowledge and network to guide our clients through every step of the process, helping them achieve their goals and maximize their potential.

We are more than just a holding company; we are partners in your journey towards success. Our expertise allows us to provide tailored solutions that drive growth and foster resilience in an ever-evolving market. Join us in our mission to Innovate, Inspire, Impact.

This wave of retirements presents both a challenge and an opportunity for European economies, as millions of businesses face succession and modernization.

Misyonumuz, güvenilir hizmetler sunarak müşterilerimize en yüksek memnuniyeti sağlamaktır. Vizyonumuz ise, yerel ve global pazarlarda lider bir firma olarak bölge ve ülke ekonomisine katkı sunmaktır. Şirket olarak şeffaflık, sürdürülebilirlik, yenilikçilik ve müşteri odaklı çalışma anlayışını temel değerlerimiz olarak benimsiyoruz.

Abdulkadir Karavil Grup, inşaat, enerji, lojistik, tekstil, perakende ve e-ticaret gibi farklı sektörlerde faaliyet göstermekte olup, bu alanlarda bölgenin lider firmalarından biridir. Yıllar boyunca birçok prestijli ödüle layık görülen firmamız, büyük ölçekli projeleri başarıyla tamamlayarak sektörde güvenilir bir marka haline gelmiştir.

Abdulkadir Karavil Grup, sosyal sorumluluk projelerine büyük önem vermekte ve topluma değer katan çeşitli projelerde yer almaktadır. Gelecek yıllarda uluslararası arenada daha fazla yer alarak küresel pazarlarda büyümeyi hedefliyoruz. Bizimle işbirliği yaparak, güvenilir ve kaliteli hizmetlerimizden faydalanabilirsiniz. Detaylı bilgi için bizimle iletişime geçin.

Vision Aérospatiale et Leadership - Avec une solide expérience dans le secteur de l'aérospatiale, notre visionnaire apporte leadership et expertise du marché pour guider les équipes vers l'excellence. Sa gestion habile de fournisseurs internationaux et sa capacité à superviser des projets dans des environnements compétitifs font de lui un leader efficace, essentiel à la réussite de votre entreprise.

Chez Katalys, nous nous engageons à offrir une valeur ajoutée significative aux entreprises en quête de croissance ou de transition, ou tout simplement pour assurer la pérennité de l'entreprise. Name: Harmony Group
Description:
Harmony Group sadəcə investorlardan ibarət bir topluluq deyil. Burada potensiallar məharətlə idarə olunur, yeni idarəçilər yetişdirilir və sarsılmaz dəyərlər fonunda sabahın arzuları dizayn edilir. Şirkətlərimiz ana missiyamıza əsaslanan maliyyə hədəflərimizi vurmağa kömək etməklə yanaşı, həm də sosial məsuliyyətlərimizi effektiv formada yerinə yetirməyimizə şərait yaradır. Buna görə də innovasiyalara açıq, təklif və iradlara tolerant, davamlı proqres və böyüməyə mütləq mənada sadiqik.

Hədəfimiz hərtərəfli inkişaf və proqresə töhfə vermək, innovativ yanaşmaları ruhlandırmaq və sahib olduğumuz şirkətlər vasitəsilə ətrafımızda müsbət dəyişikliklərə təkan verməkdir. Üstəlik, bunu edərkən bütöv bir ailə olaraq hər birimiz üçün qalıcı fayda və qazanc yaratmağı hədəfləyirik. İnvestisiya sferasında müsbət nümunə olmaq, gəlirliliyin etik və qanuni məsuliyyətlə parallel gedə biləcəyini göstərməyə çalışırıq. Ölkəmizdə və planetimizdə müsbət iz buraxa biləcəyimizə inanırıq.

Dəyərlərimiz
1. Dürüstlük: Biz bütün işlərimizdə ən yüksək etik standartları dəstəkləyirik, etimad və şəffaflığın əlaqələrimizin təməl daşları olmasını təmin edirik.

2. İnnovasiya: Biz toxunduğumuz hər bir sektorda böyümə və irəliləyişə təkan verən, mümkün olanın sərhədlərini aşan cəsarətli ideyaları təşviq edir və dəstəkləyirik.

3. Dayanıqlılıq: Biz bütün şirkətlərimizdə dayanıqlı inkişafı təşviq etməyə, eləcə də ətraf-mühitə məsuliyyətlə nəzarət etməyə çalışırıq.

4. Əməkdaşlıq: Biz əməkdaşlığın gücünə inanırıq və ortaq uğur və qarşılıqlı böyüməyə kömək edən tərəfdaşlıqlar axtarırıq.

5. Vəsaitləndirmə: Biz holdinqimizdə çalışan alan komandaları və sahibkarları gücləndirir, onlara tam potensiallarına çatmalarına kömək etmək üçün təlimat və resurslar təklif edirik.

İrəli yönümlü düşünən şirkətlərdən ibarət rəngarəng portfelimizlə Harmony Group sizi daha böyük bir şeyin parçası olmağa dəvət edir. Biz maliyyə uğurunun və etik məsuliyyətin birgə aparıldığı bir gələcək qura biləcəyimizə inanırıq.

Maho’s Vision – Le prestige volcanique de la jeunesse

Nous sommes plus qu’un acteur économique : nous sommes des créateurs d’émotions, des bâtisseurs de moments uniques qui marquent les esprits et renforcent les liens.

Notre action principale : Salahin Event
Au cœur de notre stratégie, Salahin Event incarne notre vision :
• MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, Exhibitions) pour les entreprises qui veulent inspirer et fédérer.
• Événements privés et corporate : soirées, galas, team building, célébrations.
• Festivals et expériences immersives qui font rayonner la culture locale et l’excellence française.
Chaque projet est pensé comme une histoire à raconter, où chaque détail devient un chapitre et chaque invité, un acteur. Nous ne créons pas seulement des événements : nous écrivons des récits qui laissent une empreinte durable.

Nos filiales :

Salahin Event : agence événementielle premium et généraliste compétences locales.
Salahin Conciergerie : conciergerie premium à destination des pentreprises et des particuliers.
Triton Invest : Investissement immobilier durable et valorisation patrimoniale.


Notre vision
Créer des lieux et des instants où l’excellence française rencontre l’authenticité réunionnaise, dans une démarche durable et responsable.
Avec notre slogan « Le prestige volcanique de la jeunesse », nous affirmons notre énergie créative et notre volonté d’impacter positivement La Réunion.

Name: Africa Pele Holdings (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Africa Pele Holdings- Pioneering Sustainability in Mining, Logistics, and Infrastructure.

About Us:
Africa Pele Holdings is a South African based multi-disciplinary company committed to driving sustainable solutions across the mining, environmental, logistics, real estate, and digital investment sectors.
Our approach focuses on integrating green economy principles, environmental stewardship, and strategic innovation to create long-term value for industries and communities.
Our Focus Areas
Tailings Management & Environmental Sustainability- We are conducting a self-propelled project on abandoned mine tailings, focusing on land rehabilitation, biodiversity restoration, and sustainable water management. By leveraging research-backed methodologies, we aim to provide scalable and innovative solutions for responsible mine waste management. We align with global ESG standards to ensure mining operations transition towards sustainable, responsible, and economically viable models. Our policies and frameworks prioritise environmental compliance, resource efficiency, and circular economy principles. We are actively exploring smart, sustainable logistics models within the mining and industrial sectors. Our goal is to bridge supply chain gaps, optimise transportation efficiency, and reduce environmental impact through strategic collaborations in logistics and rail sector. We focus on sustainable real estate projects, repurposing and rehabilitating land for commercial and residential development, our strategy integrates green building practices, ensuring eco-friendly and resilient infrastructure solutions. We are keen on leveraging digital transformation and fintech solutions to enhance efficiency and scalability across all our sectors, our focus includes digital investments such as cryptocurrency.
Strategic Goals- Foster partnerships with key stakeholders in mining, logistics, and sustainability sectors, develop practical, research-driven frameworks for tailings management.

Name: Damacar
Description:
Kaliteli hizmet, kusursuz müşteri memnuniyeti ve dürüst çalışma ilkelerini benimseyerek 2007 yılında köklü bir tecrübe ve profesyonellikle kurulan DAMACAR, araç kiralama sektöründe öncü bir markadır. Hem uzun dönem hem de günlük kiralama hizmetleriyle, seyahatlerinizi unutulmaz kılmak için buradayız. Geniş ve çeşitli araç filomuz, her türlü ihtiyaca cevap verecek şekilde tasarlanmıştır.

DAMACAR olarak önceliğimiz, müşteri memnuniyeti ve güvenidir. Bu nedenle araçlarımız, modern teknolojiyle donatılmış, bakımlı ve güvenli bir şekilde size teslim edilir. İster iş seyahati, ister tatil planı olsun, DAMACARaraçlarıyla yolculuklarınızı daha keyifli ve rahat hale getiriyoruz.

DAMACAR kurumsal yapısı ile hizmet ağını, genç ve dinamik kadrosuyla yurt çapında genişleterek büyümesini hızla sürdüren 1000'den fazla araçlık kapasitemizle, İstanbul'dan Kahramanmaraş'a, Adıyaman'dan Adana'ya, Nevşehir'den Kayseri'ye ve Gaziantep'e kadar geniş bir coğrafyada hizmet sunmaktayız. Size en yakın konumda bulunan ofislerimizle, ihtiyacınıza en uygun aracı temin etmek için hızlı ve pratik çözümler sunuyoruz.

Müşterilerimizin istek ihtiyaçlarını tespit ederek pratik ve uygun çözüm önerileri geliştirmektedir. Filo yönetimi konusunda deneyimli kadrosu ile bilgi ve birikimini müşteriyle paylaşan DAMACAR, müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutarak hizmet vermeyi ilke edinmiştir. DAMACAR büyüyen ve gelişen araç kiralama pazarında siz değerli müşterilerimizin desteğiyle büyümesini sürdürecektir.

Name: Monada
Description:
Monada, groupe multisectoriel spécialisé dans les industries de l'acier, de la première transformation du bois et de l'immobilier.

Notre vision s'inscrit dans une démarche de développement économique réfléchi, respectueux des écosystèmes et orienté vers l'avenir.

Le groupe Monada est composé de 5 structures aux expertises variées :

Scierie du Sauzé : Fondée en 1964, la scierie du Sauzé est spécialisée dans le sciage, le débit et la commercialisation du chêne, contribuant ainsi au secteur du bois avec un savoir-faire traditionnel et de qualité.

Beniva : Depuis plus de 15 ans, Beniva conçoit et développe des bennes, plateaux ampliroll, des plateaux agricoles et des bennes environnementales, toutes fabriquées en France, avec un engagement fort envers l'innovation et la performance.

Toré Invest : Société d'investissement foncier, spécialisée dans l'achat, la gestion et le développement de terrains et bâtiments industriels, offrant des solutions immobilières adaptées aux besoins spécifiques des entreprises locales.

Kamoké Chalets : Propose des locations saisonnières de chalets d'exception, nichés au coeur des Vosges, pour des séjours reposants et immersifs en pleine nature.

 Apparté Locations : Entreprise spécialisée dans la location d'appartements meublés à Epinal, offrant des solutions modernes et pratiques.

Chaque société de Monada joue un rôle clé dans son secteur, tout en partageant une vision commune : allier tradition, performance et innovation.

Pour en savoir plus, visitez notre site

Name: Susplanet
Description:
Susplanet is a pioneering Egyptian company aims to driving institutional development in sustainability for businesses. Our mission is to raise awareness about integrating sustainable development goals into corporate strategies by providing comprehensive content on environmental, social, and economic governance (ESG-TCFD-GRI-EPD-SROI). By offering audiovisual and readable content through various mediums, such as organizing events, news portal, producing videos, and conducting workshops, Susplanet aims to create a business environment capable of localizing sustainable development goals in all pillars “economic, social, and environmental”.
The company was established in 2014 under the name CSR Egypt, then the SUSPLANET trade mark was developed in 2023.
Susplanet is keen to create a state of integration between the development stakeholders (the business community, non-profit organizations, governments, experts, academics and think tanks) in order to create a dynamic networking for a sustainable world.

Name: Keitofoké
Description: Keitofoké is a family office club-deal brand with a diversified portfolio of assets primarily in the UAE and Guinea. Its main objective is to maximize portfolio value and generate capital gains through strategic, periodic asset rotation. Keitofoké maintains an arm’s length relationship with its portfolio companies, which include both minority and majority stakes, to minimize operational risk. The company’s income is derived from dividends, interest, and capital gains. While some investments follow a long-term horizon, with holdings retained for several years to realize sustainable value growth, others are managed with a more flexible exit strategy.

Name: Vistura Group
Description:
At Vistura, we acquire creative agencies, offering owners with a smooth exit while focusing on building long-term sustainability for the businesses we acquire. Our approach is centred around helping portfolio businesses maintain a strong vision and operational endurance for the future.

In a world where business moves faster than ever, vision is the currency of success. At Vistura, we believe that enduring success comes from the ability to see not just what lies ahead, but what’s possible - beyond the horizon. Our name, Vistura, is derived from "vista," meaning vision, and "endure," signifying long-term resilience. Together, they embody our mission: to build businesses that are not only visionary but built to last.

Founded on the principle that growth isn’t just about today, but about where you’ll be tomorrow, Vistura was created to partner with businesses seeking not just quick wins, but sustainable, strategic growth. Whether through creative solutions, business consulting, or helping companies unlock their potential through carefully guided acquisitions, Vistura serves as the catalyst for companies looking to rise above the noise.

Name: Clara Carpenè Srl
Description:
Clara Carpenè Srl è la holding del Gruppo Carpenè, un’organizzazione imprenditoriale con oltre vent’anni di storia che integra servizi, tecnologie e attività industriali in Italia e all’estero. La società svolge un ruolo di coordinamento strategico e amministrativo sulle controllate, garantendo governance, sviluppo e innovazione in settori ad alto valore aggiunto.

Il cuore operativo del Gruppo è rappresentato da In Aria! Media Group, tra i leader in Italia nella produzione e distribuzione televisiva tecnica per lo sport e l’entertainment. In Aria! gestisce eventi internazionali, canali televisivi lineari e piattaforme digitali con soluzioni proprietarie per la Connected TV, la distribuzione IP e la produzione live. Grazie a un approccio integrato, supporta broadcaster, federazioni sportive e media company nello sviluppo di contenuti e infrastrutture, con un’attenzione costante all’innovazione tecnologica e alla qualità del servizio.

Accanto al mondo dei media e dei servizi industriali, Clara Carpenè Srl mantiene le proprie radici nella tradizione vitivinicola di Valdobbiadene attraverso la controllata Cantinae Clara C’, che rappresenta l’origine storica del gruppo e porta avanti un’eredità enologica riconosciuta in Italia e all’estero.

La mission di Clara Carpenè Srl come holding è creare valore per le proprie società e per gli stakeholder, rafforzando i processi di internazionalizzazione e sostenendo la diversificazione delle attività. Con sedi a Valdobbiadene, Milano e Lugano, il Gruppo si distingue per la capacità di unire solide radici territoriali a una visione globale, offrendo servizi avanzati nei media e nelle telecomunicazioni, e mantenendo al contempo un forte legame con le proprie origini.

Name: The SAB Group
Description:
The SAB Group of Companies is a diversified conglomerate with a strong presence across multiple industries, including staffing, security services, manufacturing, real estate development, event management, consumer goods distribution, and logistics. Founded and led by entrepreneur Safir Ahmad Babar, The SAB Group is committed to delivering innovative and customized solutions to meet the evolving needs of businesses and consumers. The group’s mission is to drive economic growth, create long-term value, and provide top-quality services to clients while fostering a culture of excellence and integrity.

The SAB Group operates several companies, each a leader in its respective field. Stersbury Inc. specializes in workforce solutions, offering staffing services for the manufacturing and distribution sectors across Southern Ontario. Kentarch Inc. provides tailored security services for businesses, industrial facilities, and high-profile events, while Mapco Inc. focuses on the manufacturing of high-quality garbage bags for retail and consumer use. Kinza Holding Ltd. leads in real estate development and management, creating high-value commercial and residential properties. Additionally, Eclusion Entertainment delivers unique event planning and management services, CashNCarry Emporium Inc. distributes consumer goods through partnerships with major retailers like Amazon and Walmart, and Haulsters Inc. offers freight forwarding, moving services, and specialized rental solutions for logistics, agriculture, and construction industries.

At The SAB Group of Companies, our values of integrity, innovation, and customer satisfaction drive every decision we make. We are dedicated to building long-term relationships with our clients, partners, and stakeholders, ensuring that each company under the group continues to meet the highest standards of quality and service.

Name: Nova Network Group
Description:
Nova Network is a privately held business ecosystem operating across Wellness, Beauty, Fashion, Photography and Media Studios, Real Estate and Short Let Investments, and Social Impact Development.

We build scalable and sustainable ventures by combining strategic planning, operational systems, and structured skills development. Our focus is on identifying high potential opportunities within underserved and evolving markets, then developing strong business models that deliver premium services aligned with international standards.

Nova Network operates as a strategic holding and development platform rather than a collection of standalone businesses. Our ventures benefit from shared governance, talent development pipelines, operational oversight, and brand standards, allowing each business to grow efficiently while maintaining quality and accountability.

People are central to our growth model. We operate with a skills first philosophy, investing heavily in training, mentorship, and professional development to create capable teams and long term career pathways. This approach supports consistent service delivery while empowering individuals to grow professionally and personally.

Alongside our commercial activities, Nova Network operates an independent Non Profit Organisation, Nova Foundation. The foundation is dedicated to improving the lives of children and youth by providing skills development, mentorship, creative exposure, and character building. Our goal is to help young people discover purpose, build confidence, and contribute meaningfully to society.

Guided by strong governance and ethical leadership, Nova Network is committed to building businesses that endure, empowering people to thrive, and creating measurable economic and social impact across Africa and the Middle East.

Name: HenriPay Holding N.V.
Description:
About HenriPay Holding N.V.
HenriPay Holding N.V. is a publicly traded financial management holding company, listed on the German stock exchange under ISIN NL0015000NA2. Originally established in 2020 as a real estate and construction holding, we quickly built a strong foundation, operating with a self-funded, debt-free model that fueled our early success.

In 2024, we signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the government agency Marchica Med to develop the Nador region—a highly profitable venture that reinforced our ability to execute large-scale projects. This success provided the strategic momentum for a pivotal shift later that year, as we redefined our focus toward Financial Technology. The transition had already begun in 2022 with the acquisition of HenriPay, marking our entry into fintech. By 2024, we made financial technology our primary business, leveraging our expertise to drive innovation and long-term growth in the sector.

This bold move propelled our market capitalization beyond €4 billion, solidifying our position as a powerhouse in financial technology investments. Today, we actively invest in and co-found fintech companies with a mission to disrupt the industry and establish ourselves as the premier stock-listed financial management holding for fintech investors.

At HenriPay Holding, our philosophy is simple: Maximized Shareholder Value.

For more information, visit our website.

Name: Brederode
Description:
Brederode is an international investment company whose shares are listed on the Brussels Euronext and Luxembourg Stock Exchanges.


Brederode’s mission is to create long-term value for its shareholders. Its portfolio is henceforth made up of two different and complementary sectors; that of investments in unlisted companies (“Private Equity”) and that of investments in listed securities.

The appeal of Private Equity is linked to the opportunity it offers of securing higher returns than those expected from the stock market.

Beyond its own return objectives, the listed securities portfolio is increasingly regarded as an ultimate financing reserve in support of Private Equity. It continues to be subject to rigorous management, with the aim of achieving a balance between its defensive character and the objectives of profitability, liquidity and growth.

Brederode is today one of the few companies specialised in Private Equity, publicly traded and self-managed to the exclusive interest of its shareholders.

Brederode also benefits from the stability of its controlling shareholder from which the executive management emanates. This means that the latter can take a long term view, less subject to the influence of disruptive external factors and therefore less affected by short-term considerations.

Finally, Brederode benefits from an overall level of management costs lower than that of the market and an uncompromising governance structure.

Name: Spokane Workers Cooperative
Description:
We are buying and building some of Spokane’s most iconic businesses, and turning them over to employee ownership and control. We fundamentally believe everyone deserves economic freedom and self-determination, and we’re using worker-owned cooperatives to make it happen. 

All SWC workers are also owners, equitably sharing company profits. As the company grows and thrives, its worker-owners build meaningful wealth not accessible in traditional ownership structures.

Democracy is built in at SWC, top to bottom: day-to-day decision-making is kept as close to immediately affected teams as possible, and our governing board of directors always has a super-majority of worker representation.

SWC is a Limited Cooperative Association, which allows worker-owners to partner with investors.
- Making it easier for workers to find community-focused investment
- Allowing investors to make a meaningful, direct impact on their communities

We use our funds to buy beloved community institutions and turn them over to employee control, giving workers autonomy, ownership and financial freedom.
- Every acquired business adds strength, resiliency and value to SWC.
- Each worker and investor own a piece of the whole thing, sustaining amazing jobs, mitigating risk, and keeping more wealth directly in our community.

All employees of SWC businesses become worker–owners after a 90 day trial period.
- SWC is governed by a board of directors elected from among the worker and investor members with there being twice as many worker-owner directors as there are investor-owner directors.

Name: Company Project
Description:
Company Project | Leader de l’économie circulaire industrielle

Company Project est un groupe engagé dans la transition écologique. Nous transformons les déchets en opportunités industrielles, sociales et territoriales grâce à des solutions concrètes et innovantes fondées sur les principes de l’économie circulaire.

Nos entités spécialisées :
 Technical Project : Réparation et maintenance des équipements électriques et électroniques (EEE), labellisé QualiRépar, pour prolonger la durée de vie des produits et limiter les déchets numériques.

 Industrial Project : Nettoyage industriel durable, recyclage de l’eau en circuit semi-fermé et procédés écocertifiés pour réduire l’impact environnemental.

 Eco Project : Recyclage des plastiques rigides en filaments pour imprimantes 3D et granules pour l’industrie. Transformation des déchets plastiques en matières premières secondaires.

 Fiumi-Tech : Bureau d’études spécialisé dans la durabilité et la formation aux métiers émergents de la transition écologique. Accompagnement des territoires et des acteurs vers des modèles responsables.

En expansion en France et en Europe, nous collaborons avec l’Union européenne, le Pacte Climat et de nombreux acteurs publics et privés pour mettre en œuvre des solutions alignées avec le Green Deal.

Company Project, c’est l’engagement pour une économie circulaire industrielle, inclusive et européenne, au service des générations présentes et futures.

Bizneslərin inkişafı üçün strateji məsləhətlər veririk. Biznes konsaltinqi sahəsində təcrübəmiz müştərilərimizin uzunmüddətli uğuruna dəstək olur.

Müxtəlif sektorlarda geniş çeşiddə məhsul və xidmətlərin topdan və pərakəndə satışını təşkil edərək müştərilərimizin ehtiyaclarını qarşılamağa çalışırıq.

Name: Aegida Group
Description:
Holding company

The history of the city of Koper and the origin of its original name dates back to antiquity: Aegida is a Greek name reminiscent of the aegis (shield) of the Greek goddess of wisdom and knowledge Athena. 

An interesting legend tells the tale of the foundation of the city, according to which the island where Koper is located today was created during a dispute between the gods Poseidon and Athena. After Athena (the Greek goddess of wisdom) had a row with Poseidon (the Greek god of the sea), she supposedly escaped to this location, where a fight between these two deities ensued. During the battle, Athena’s shield (called aegida, which is supposed to be the source for the previous name of the island) fell into the water, transforming itself into an island. If you look at the shape of the ancient island (town), you will see that it actually resembles a shield.

The aegis as stated in the Iliad, is a device carried by Athena and Zeus, variously interpreted as an animal skin or a shield and sometimes featuring the head of a Gorgon. 

The modern concept of doing something "under someone's aegis" means doing something under the protection of a powerful, knowledgeable, or benevolent source. The word aegis is identified with protection by a strong force with its roots in Greek mythology and adopted by the Romans; there are parallels in Norse mythology and in Egyptian mythology as well,[citation needed] where the Greek word aegis is applied by extension.

The aegis of Athena is referred to in several places in the Iliad. "It produced a sound as from myriad roaring dragons (Iliad, 4.17) and was borne by Athena in battle ... and among them went bright-eyed Athene, holding the precious aegis which is ageless and immortal: a hundred tassels of pure gold hang fluttering from it, tight-woven each of them, and each the worth of a hundred oxen."

In 2011, the first JV between Fratelli Cosulich and Erich Cossutta was founded in Koper.

Name: Lab One Capital
Description:
Lab One Capital is a permanent holding company dedicated to acquiring exceptional family-owned businesses in Western Canada. Founded by entrepreneurs for entrepreneurs, we partner with proven mid-career operators to buy, build, and hold businesses permanently creating lasting value for our partners, employees, and the communities we serve. 

We are a team of self-made, lifelong entrepreneurs passionate about identifying and unlocking value in every business we acquire. Our first-hand founder, operator, and private equity experience allows us to deploy our own dedicated CEOs armed with proprietary private equity playbooks and resources into a segment of the market that is typically underserved by professional equity capital providers. 

While Lab One Capital operates similarly to a private equity firm in that we buy equity of private companies, we differ from traditional private equity and search funds in several key ways:

1) Operator-first investment approach – We begin by identifying industry-leading SME operating partners in each vertical, and then collaboratively reverse-engineer a search process to source businesses that align with their expertise and Lab One’s investment focus;

2) Forever hold strategy – We follow a permanent hold philosophy, investing with no intention to exit and viewing profit as a measure of value creation rather than value extraction; and

3) Investing our own capital – Our equity investments are comprised exclusively of our own capital earned through our own successful entrepreneurial endeavors in the past. 

Simply put, we are a collection of builders committed to creating enduring value. We have an active and profitable portfolio, enhanced by industry-leading SME operators and support systems, and deeply enjoy our work. With an active mandate of buying family-held companies paired with our constant pursuit of better, we are committed to being the purchaser of choice for retiring business owners in Western Canada.

Name: Inès Capital
Description:
Pour des raisons démographiques les 5 années à venir donneront lieu à de nombreuses transmission de portefeuille clients dans le secteur de l’assurance, notamment sut le secteur dît des « lignes spécialisées ». En effet la majorité des chefs d’entreprise approche des 60 ans, d’après de récentes études plus de 100 sociétés de courtage d’assurance vont changer de main d’ici 10 ans.

Face à cette situation économique, le courtier d’assurance qui est un commerçant indépendant (personne physique ou société), propriétaire d’un portefeuille de clients a intérêt à repenser son organisation et réorienter sa stratégie commerciale pour initier une transmission des ses clients en douceur.

Inès Capital, Holding personnelle de Romain Frobert, est une société qui investit dans des entreprises de courtage d’assurance spécialisées, très souvent familiales, à fort potentiel de croissance.
Inès Capital se distingue par une culture d’entrepreneurs, une grande réactivité liée à son circuit de décision et une forte implication en tant qu’actionnaire, au sein d’un portefeuille clients.
Inès Capital a conclu 3 transactions au cours des deux derniers mois.

GGC has emerged as a powerhouse in various sectors, including Construction, Electricity, Dam Projects, Logistics Services, Mining, and the Gemstone trade. With a rich history spanning two decades, we have carved a distinctive reputation for innovation and excellence across the Middle East, Central Asia, and the Gulf region.

At GGC, we take great pride in our substantial contributions to the economic and commercial growth of our nation. We've successfully executed over 100 construction projects, including high-profile contracts from NATO and the US Federal government. Notably, we are known for our expertise in constructing military bases and airfields, solidifying our status as one of Afghanistan's foremost construction companies. With more than two decades of experience, our reach extends to over 20 countries, particularly in the energy and electricity projects sector. Our commitment to quality and precision is unwavering.

In the realm of Mining and Gemstones, GGC stands as a stalwart, with over 19 years of international experience. Our portfolio encompasses Gemstone extraction, processing, and the creation of decorative items, ornamental objects, and exquisite jewelry adorned with precious stones. Additionally, we excel in producing and processing authentic hand-woven carpets, including the renowned Afghani carpets.

Our diversification extends to exclusive sectors, such as the Golden Star restaurant and five-star hotel services, investments in 77 company (Vehicle’s Oil), the construction of Ajman Gas in the United Arab Emirates, and the establishment of the Gharany Charity Foundation.

GGC is synonymous with reliability and innovation, underpinned by a rich history of over 19 years of international experience across various sectors.

We passionately ready to deliver exceptional services and look forward to building a brighter future together with our partners.

Name: SEBA Başaran Kurumsal
Description:
SEBA BAŞARAN Kurumsal, 50 yıla yaklaşan yolculuğunda faaliyetlerini uluslararası standartlarda yönetim, müşteri memnuniyeti, sürdürülebilirlik ve toplumsal sorumluluk anlayışı ile yürütmektedir. 
1975 yılında, Bayramiç’te yedek parça ticareti ve nakliyat işleri ile 80 m2 işyerinde serüvenimiz başlamıştır.
1985 yılında Türk – Fiat Traktör bayiliğini alarak otomotiv sektörüne adım atmıştır. Bu dönemde Bayramiç ilçesi ile başlayıp, Çanakkale Merkez ve ardından Lapseki ilçesi ile hinterlandını genişletmiştir. Bununla birlikte 11 yıl BMC ve 9 yıl IVECO bayiliği ile bölgede öncü firma olmuştur.
Kuruluşumuz - 2007 yılında 6S plaza olarak - Türkiye’de ilk Çanakkale’de hizmete girmiştir. Satış, servis, yedek parça, ikinci el araç, ekipman ve iş makineleri hizmetlerini bünyesine katmıştır.
2012 yılında, Peugeot Türkiye yetkili bayiliği ve 11.000 m2 alana sahip plazasıyla SE-BA BAŞARAN Otomotiv faaliyete başlamıştır. 
Çan, Biga, Yenice şubelerimize Ezine’yi de katarak, bölgenin 2. tarım ekipmanları yatırımımız 2016 yılında faaliyete geçmiştir. 
Kaz Dağları Bölgesi’nde tescilli marka değerine sahip Çetmihan Otel, 2017 yılında SEBA BAŞARAN Kurumsal bünyesine dahil edilmiştir. Tesis, 19 oda, restoran, toplantı salonu, seyir terası ve bahçesi ile faaliyetini sürdürmektedir. 
2019 yılında Opel markasını da bünyesine katarak Türkiye’de ilk multi brand bayii olmuştur.
SEBA Çiftlik, süregelen zeytinyağı üretimi ardından 2023 yılında karakılçık ve sarı buğday üretimine başlanmıştır.
2024 yılında Citroen ile otomotiv sürecine üçüncü markasını katmıştır.
Aynı yıl Çanakkale Güzelyalı da 2. otel projemizin hazırlıkları başlamıştır.
Sektörde doğru zamanda doğru ihtiyaç analizlerimizin yanında kalite standartlarımız başarımıza yön vermektedir. 
Günümüzde Çanakkale’nin en köklü kuruluşları arasında yer alan SEBA BAŞARAN Kurumsal bünyesindeki Başaran Traktör, SE-BA BAŞARAN Otomotiv, SEBA Çiftlik ve SEBA Başaran Turizm, gelecekte de tüm paydaşları için değer yaratmaya devam edecek.

To stand by your word.

Name: OSTREUM | Family Equity for Business Succession
Description:
OSTREUM acquires medium-sized, owner-run companies to actively manage and develop them. We are a long-term investor, deploying our entrepreneurial capital into healthy businesses with ample room for further growth. We focus on management buy-in (MBI) and management buy-out (MBO).

As per our experience, the entrepreneur at the helm is the most important driver of a company’s long-term success. Therefore we contribute our own entrepreneurial experience by assuming management roles within the companies that we hold in Bavaria, Baden-Württemberg and Tyrol. Beyond these regions and beyond our focus sectors, we selectively sponsor entrepreneurs as search fund investor..

We invest in family businesses that have
- a B2B business model with a defensible unique selling proposition
- a sustainable business model and limited “cluster risk”
- additional growth potential in selected focus sectors

When it comes to company succession, we do not rely on external investors but invest our own entrepreneurial capital as family equity.

Visit www.ostreum.com for more information on our investment focus and criteria.

E’ per noi una priorità contribuire alla creazione di valore nella realizzazione e nello sviluppo di piani industriali, di due diligence industriali e nella definizione delle scelte organizzative e di processo per favorire aggregazioni e dotarsi di risorse fondamentali per lo sviluppo d’impresa.
Riteniamo necessario l’apporto del nostro team in ambito associativo e istituzionale per aumentare la consapevolezza e la cultura delle PMI su temi quali crescita, management, internazionalizzazione, industrializzazione, finanza alternativa e M&A.
Ci poniamo come acceleratore e punto di riferimento delle PMI per servizi di consulenza direzionale di alto profilo su temi finanziari, organizzativi e industriali. Lo facciamo anche tramite la creazione di Advisory Board, con manager C-level nostri partner, con lo scopo di conferire seniority alle aziende e progettare con l’imprenditore e/o con il fondo di investimento, una crescita strutturata e di lungo periodo.
Ci poniamo come partner per la creazione di piattaforme buy-and-build con possibile co-investimento.'

Name: Plus vivant que jamais
Description:
Historical landmarks have always been living spaces! Throughout the centuries, they have fostered exchanges, innovations, the spread of knowledge and the discovery of art... In short, their purpose is to bring people together to shape the future.

However, adapting them to the contemporary world is complex. Too often, these places tend to close in on themselves and become isolated, at the risk of disappearing. While the idea of protecting old buildings may seem reassuring at first glance, it carries a real threat of turning them into museums, thus limiting their ability to respond to modern-day challenges.  It is with this in mind that Plus vivant que jamais initiates and develops projects in heritage venues.  Through a variety of projects, we put all our energy into breathing new life into historic and more modest places, transforming them into dynamic spaces for exchange that provide solutions to current societal challenges.

Convinced that entrepreneurship is the best way to bring people together around a project, we design initiatives with a strong local impact, in harmony with the ‘spirit of the place’. As a mission-driven company, we are committed to four principles:

1. Support the community of monument owners in developing their professionalism.
2. Raise public awareness of the essential role of our heritage.
3. Turn the historical sites in our network into examples of monuments that integrate societal issues (economic, social, environmental).
4. Support initiatives that create value for heritage and savoir-faire.

Our approach therefore simply aims to make these places more alive than ever! Our approach is therefore quite simply to make these sites more vibrant than ever!

Discover our projects:
- BLANC BLANC BLANC: 18th-century laundry renovated into a centre for seminars and courses.
- Châteaux des Langues: language immersion and training centre for over 40 years.
- Châteaux Vivants: non-profit franchisor.

Name: Drive Phase Holding Co
Description:
Usain Bolt was almost never the fastest out of the blocks in his world record or championship races.

But his disciplined, powerful drive phase, the deliberate acceleration just after the start, allowed him to take control of the race and win in the final stretch.

“Just like with the start, you must stay focused and not think about the person next to you. They may have gotten a fast start and be out in front of you, but you can’t panic and pop out of your drive phase. If you do, you’ll lose your whole race plan, and the race is pretty much over,” Bolt said.

Inspired by that, the Drive Phase Holding Company operates with the same conviction: how you build early defines how you win later.

We are a privately held, permanent-capital platform that is building, owning, & scaling businesses across four sectors with clearly defined execution points in each: Business, Media, Aviation, & Impact.

Our focus in business spans logistics, real estate, and financial infrastructure; in media, it encompasses talent management, content production, IP, marketing, and live events. In aviation, it's venture investment, workforce platforms, & operational services. Finally, philanthropy focuses on education, accessibility, and healthcare. 

If, as Warren Buffett said, you only needed a punch card with 20 punches for the truly worthwhile investments in your entire life, these platforms are the ones we’re willing to build, own, & compound for decades.

We plan to create high-conviction ventures internally, accelerate them through shared infrastructure and operational discipline, and pursue strategic bolt-on acquisitions that enhance momentum. 

As General Partners, we offer aligned capital access at the HoldCo, platform, and SPV levels, preserving long-term alignment and strategic agility.

Each Drive Phase company is designed to compound over time, structured for ecosystem returns, and supported by integrated services that enable scale without sacrificing control.

Name: vezzgroup GmbH
Description:
Die vezzgroup wurde 2020 von den praktizierenden Tierärzten Dr. Matthias Krebs und Dr. Guido von Plato ins Leben gerufen. Das Ziel: dem Verkauf deutscher Tierpraxen und -kliniken an anonyme Investoren eine tierärztliche Initiative entgegensetzen. Die beiden Gründer haben es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, die Zukunft von Praxen und Kliniken in Deutschland und den Nachbarländern langfristig zu sichern. Hinter der vezzgroup stehen keine Investmentgesellschaften oder Fonds, sondern zwei Tierärzte.

Matthias Krebs und Guido von Plato sind die Gründer der Pferdeklinik Leichlingen, die sich über die letzten Jahre zu einer der größten Pferdekliniken Deutschlands mit 150 Mitarbeitenden entwickelt hat. Die Unternehmensgründer wirken bis heute aktiv am Tagesgeschäft mit.

Zukunft gemeinsam gestalten 
Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam herausfinden, wie wir das Fortbestehen und die Weiterentwicklung Ihrer Tierpraxis sichern können. Wir bringen unsere langjährige Erfahrung in der Führung, Leitung und Weiterentwicklung von Praxen und Kliniken ein. Sie wissen am besten, was Ihre Patienten, deren Besitzer:innen und Ihre Mitarbeitenden sich wünschen und was man im Rahmen der Übergabe beachten muss.

Einen vorgefertigten Fahrplan gibt es dafür nicht – wir reden mit den Menschen und finden gemeinsam die beste Lösung. Mehr noch: Wir bleiben immer in Kontakt, tauschen Informationen aus, teilen neue Erkenntnisse und integrieren so jeden einzelnen Standort in unser vezzgroup-Netzwerk.

Wir bieten:
* Kommunikation auf Augenhöhe
* Eine Zukunft im Sinne der Tiermedizin
* Sicherer Generationenübergang
* Kollegialer Austausch
* Übernahme administrativer Aufgaben

Main business areas are medical imaging, crystal manufacturing, radiation detection and renewable energy.
https://youtu.be/CkdxVqXKbns?si=uNiw0
Rotem Industries' Medical Imaging business is a world leader in consumables for PET imaging. Rotem develops, manufactures and supplies complete packages for the production of radiotracers: oxygen-18 enriched water, plastic cassettes, precursors and complete reagent kits for a range of synthesis modules.
Rotem serves its customers through a global distribution network, and Rotem excels in uncompromising product quality coupled with a deep understanding of customer needs to ensure uniformly high production yields and unsurpassed quality. The passion for quality is driven by a team of highly skilled and dedicated professionals who recognize the critical role their products play in the PET radiotracer production chain.

The Radiation Detection Division,  specializes in the development, production and marketing of radiation detection equipment and systems for Nuclear Power Plants, Nuclear Medicine departments and the Homeland Security market .
Rotem’s equipment is CE certified and meeting the highest relevant standard
in the industry.

Our Crystals Division has been a leading developer and supplier of high-quality sapphire windows and domes for the most demanding optical applications since 1969. We specialize in product development and configuration from the early prototype stage in collaboration with our customers. Utilizing state-of-the-art processes with more than 50 years of experience in production, processing, polishing and high polishing under one roof, using advanced MRF capabilities and a comprehensive certified QA/QC system, Rotem offers unique customized solutions that meet customers' specifications and requirements.

Name: LGL Group, Inc.
Description:
The LGL Group, Inc. is a holding company engaged in services, merchant investment and manufacturing business activities. Precise Time and Frequency, LLC ("PTF") is a globally positioned producer of industrial Electronic Instruments and commercial products and services. Founded in 2002, PTF operates from our design and manufacturing facility in Wakefield, Massachusetts. Lynch Capital International LLC is focused on the development of value through investments.
 
LGL’s business strategy is primarily focused on growth through expanding new and existing operations across diversified industries. The LGL Group Inc.'s engineering and design origins date back to the early part of the last century. In 1917, Lynch Glass Machinery Company, the predecessor of LGL, was formed, and emerged in the late twenties as a successful manufacturer of glass-forming machinery. The company was then renamed Lynch Corporation and was incorporated in 1928 under the laws of the State of Indiana. In 1946, Lynch was listed on the “New York Curb Exchange,” the predecessor to the NYSE American. The company has had a long history of owning and operating various businesses in the precision engineering, manufacturing and services sectors.

TTORG olarak kendimize güvenimizin en güçlü kaynağı; gelişen, farklılık yaratan, dinamik, yaratıcı ve uyumlu bir çalışma atmosferi yakalamış profesyonel bir ekibe sahip olmakta gizlidir. Grup bünyesinde Ömer Aybak Çiğ Köfte, Ömer Aybak Beach Hotel ve çeşitli restoran markaları yer almakta; her biri kendi alanında kalite, güven ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı hizmet sunmaktadır.
Türkiye genelinde 2000’e yakın şubesiyle büyümeye devam eden Ömer Aybak Çiğ Köfte, geleneksel lezzeti modern üretim standartlarıyla buluşturarak gıda sektöründe öncü konumunu sürdürmektedir.
Turizm ve konaklama alanında öne çıkan Ömer Aybak Beach Hotel, Bodrum’un eşsiz sahilinde misafirlerine lüks, konfor ve unutulmaz tatil deneyimleri sunmaktadır.
Grup ayrıca restoran yatırımlarıyla gastronomi dünyasına yenilikçi ve özgün konseptler kazandırmayı hedeflemektedir.
ÖMER AYBAK GRUP, kurulduğu günden bu yana dürüstlük, kalite, müşteri memnuniyeti ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkelerini merkezine alarak faaliyet göstermektedir.
Marka çeşitliliğini artırarak ulusal ve uluslararası arenada büyümeyi amaçlayan grup, her yeni yatırımıyla sektöre değer katmayı sürdürmektedir.
Misyonumuz, faaliyet gösterdiğimiz tüm alanlarda topluma fayda sağlamak, güvenilir markalarla sürdürülebilir başarı yaratmaktır.
Vizyonumuz, Türkiye’nin lider markalarından biri olarak global ölçekte gıda, turizm ve hizmet sektöründe öncü bir konuma ulaşmaktır.

Name: מבטח שמיר | Mivtach Shamir
Description:
Mivtach Shamir is one of Israel’s leading holding companies for the past 30 years and one of the country’s most reputable public companies. 
Operating in four investment sectors, Mivtach Shamir owns value-creating assets and companies in real estate, energy, financing, and technology, in which it is invested for the long term. The company’s growth strategy is based on a conservative investment portfolio and on targeted asset liquidation moves. 
Mivtach Shamir is led by Founder and CEO Meir Shamir who holds ~40% of its capital. The company’s growth over the years leans on its commitment to unparallel business excellence, trustful long-term relationships, and significant community contribution.
Throughout the years, Mivtach Shamir has presented many impressive exits, including selling Tnuva to Brightfood, Lipman to Verifon, and Solbar to CHS.
Mivtach Shamir's stock (TLV: MISH) is traded on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange and is included in 6 TASE indexes.

===

מבטח שמיר היא אחת מחברות האחזקות המובילות בשוק ההון הישראלי ב-30 השנים אחרונות. 
החברה פועלת בארבעה מגזרי השקעה, בהם היא מחזיקה בנכסים וחברות משיאי ערך: נדל"ן, אנרגיה, מימון וטכנולוגיה. אסטרטגיית הצמיחה שלה מבוססת על איתור הזדמנויות השקעה שמרניות לטווח ארוך בעלות מינוף נמוך, ועל מהלכי אקזיט ממוקדים, תחום בו הציגה הישגים מרשימים הכוללים בין היתר את מכירת תנובה לברייטפוד, מכירת ליפמן לווריפון, ומכירת סולבר ל-CHS. 
מבטח שמיר מנוהלת על ידי מייסדה – מאיר שמיר, אשר מחזיק בה כ-40%. צמיחתה של החברה לאורך השנים נשענת על מחויבות הנהגתה למצוינות עסקית, מערכות יחסים ארוכות-טווח, ותרומה משמעותית לקהילה.
מניית מבטח שמיר (ת"א: מבשמ) נסחרת בבורסה לניירות ערך בתל אביב ונכללת ב-6 מדדי בורסה שונים.

Il Gruppo Barbarano nasce come holding su iniziativa dell’imprenditore Gaetano Barbarano e si sviluppa all’interno della zona industriale di Marcianise (CASERTA).

La fondazione di questo gruppo segna l’unione di due aziende: General Service e Loba Costruzioni.

Nel corso del tempo questa preziosa unione si è basata sulla ricerca continua dell’innovazione e dello studio del mercato e ha reso Gruppo Barbarano un operatore economico, punto di riferimento e simbolo di qualità, eccellenza e professionalità nella progettazione e manutenzione di impianti di sicurezza, impianti di depurazione, impianti elettrici, idraulici, di condizionamento e di aria compressa, pulizie civili ed industriali, imballaggio, opere di regimazione, bonifica, irrigazione ed evacuazione idraulica, logistica industriale, senza tralasciare il settore dell’edilizia e delle opere stradali.

Lo scopo perseguito dall’azienda è volto ad offrire ai propri clienti un operato, in termini di opere e servizi, che assolva le necessità della funzionalità, sicurezza, assistenza, consulenza ed elevata competenza, ottimizzando sempre i costi.

Name: Vaat Holding
Description:
Vaat Holding olarak adım attığımız inşaat sektöründeki başarılarımızın ardından, günümüzde turizm ve sanayi sektörlerinde de faaliyet gösteriyoruz. İstanbul, Trabzon, Samsun ve Alanya’da konut, otel ve fabrika projelerimizle adımızı her geçen gün daha yükseklere taşımayı hedefliyoruz! Vaat Holding’in lokomotif şirketi Vaat Yapı bünyesinde gerçekleşen bu projeler, ülkemizdeki başarısının yanı sıra uluslararası alanda da talep görüyor.

İnşaat, turizm ve sanayi sektörlerinde faaliyet gösteriyoruz.

Tamamladığımız konut projelerimizle, bireylerin yaşam alanı ihtiyacını üstün bir konforla karşılıyoruz. Otellerimizle ise konuklarımıza konfor hissini incelikli bir tasarım anlayışıyla sunuyoruz.

Vaat Holding’in sanayi yatırımlarının ilki olan “Smogmoon Tütün Fabrikası” ile aromalı nargile tütünleri üreterek ülkemizin ihracat gücüne de katkıda bulunuyoruz. 2022 yılında inşaatına başladığımız “Süt Fabrikası” ise gıda sektöründe atacağımız büyük adımların henüz ilkini oluşturuyor.

Duraklarımız: Trabzon, Samsun, Alanya, İstanbul ve Türkiye!

Vaat ismini ilk kez duyurduğumuz Trabzon’dan sonra, büyüme hedeflerimizin şirketimizi getirdiği durak İstanbul oldu. İstanbul Güneşli’de hayata geçirilecek olan “Vaat Center” projesi otel, AVM ve rezidans karma projesi olarak İstanbul’un önemli yapılarından biri olarak yükseliyor.

2015 yılında çıktığımız bu yolda, şirketimizin vizyoner bakış açısı ve cesaret dolu atılımlarıyla uluslararası bir şirket haline gelmenin hedefiyle her geçen gün daha çok çalışıyoruz!

Vaat Holding olarak kaliteli ve birbirinden güçlü projelerle varlık gösterdiğimiz tüm sektörlerde adımızdan söz ettirmeye devam edeceğiz!

#Formation #Services #Beauté #Nettoyage #Mayotte #Excellence

Name: Röhrdanz Unternehmensgruppe
Description:
Seit unserer Gründung 1998 sind wir auf Wachstumskurs. Heute arbeiten wir mit 350 Mitarbeitern in vier Unternehmensbereichen.

Grundlage dieses Erfolgs sind vier Kernwerte, die uns strategisch leiten und die wir Tag für Tag leben: Mut & Leistung, Menschlichkeit & Loyalität.

 ------

Der Mut, Neues zu wagen, ist der Motor unseres unternehmerischen Handelns.

Wir wollen neue Märkte erobern, suchen neue Chancen für Investments und ergreifen diese entschlossen. Wir wachsen mit jeder neuen Herausforderung – als Unternehmen wie auch als Mitarbeiter, weil wir uns alle ständig weiterentwickeln.

Leistung ist unsere Leidenschaft.

Mit unserer Leistung begeistern wir Kunden und sorgen dafür, dass sie ihre Ziele zuverlässig erreichen. Leistung bedeutet, dass wir lösungsorientiert und pragmatisch vorgehen und schnell und unkompliziert handeln. Wir sind keine Zögerer und Zauderer, sondern packen an.

Menschlichkeit ist das Maß.

Nicht nur unsere Ziele sind wichtig, sondern auch die Art und Weise, wie wir sie erreichen. Wir sind stolz auf unsere Kultur, die durch Respekt, Fairness und Offenheit geprägt ist – im Umgang mit unseren Kunden und auch im täglichen Miteinander bei der Arbeit. Viele nennen das Klima bei uns familiär, vielleicht spürt man einfach, dass wir ein Familien-Unternehmen mit gesundem Menschenverstand sind.

Loyalität schafft Vertrauen.

Wir halten unsere Versprechen – gegenüber Kunden genauso wie gegenüber Mitarbeitern. Wir glauben an langfristige und persönliche Beziehungen, deshalb kümmern wir uns intensiv darum. Wir helfen unseren Partnern und fördern unsere Mitarbeiter.

Name: The OIG Consortium
Description:
The OIG Consortium is more than a collection of companies—it is a carefully constructed network of industry specialists, each chosen for their expertise, integrity, and capacity to deliver exceptional outcomes. We are strategists orchestrating long-term positioning, leveraging market intelligence, capital flows, and procurement networks to achieve what others consider impossible or improbable.

We operate at the intersection of infrastructure development, international trade, and structured finance, where success is not measured by fleeting transactions but by the lasting impact of strategically executed ventures. Our portfolio companies—crafted through targeted acquisitions and seamless integrations—each stand as a preeminent leader within their niche, contributing to the broader vision of OIG as a trusted global partner.

Our strategic footprint spans five continents, with physical presence in key global hubs. This geographical reach, however, is not for the sake of size; it is for proximity to opportunity—ensuring that our partners and clients benefit from local insight with global execution. We do not merely observe markets; we shape them through timely, data-driven decisions that optimise outcomes across borders.

We hold a genuine commitment to every client and partner, prioritizing the cultivation of long-term relationships over the superficial accumulation of contacts. In doing so, we ensure that every deal, every partnership, and every venture carries not only commercial success but strategic significance.

We empower today's businesses, nurture tomorrow's leaders, and transform aspirations into tangible realities—epitomizing the essence of bankable.

OIG – Where Strategy Meets Execution.

Description:
umdasch Industrial Solutions was formed to meet the unique demands of industrial sectors, offering specialized scaffolding, safety, and maintenance solutions designed to enhance operational efficiency and ensure worker safety. 

With extensive expertise in scaffolding, we provide integrated solutions for complex industrial environments. Our portfolio includes patented scaffolding systems, engineering services, project design, estimating, training, EPCM support, and digital solutions for asset management. Each solution is developed with safety, efficiency, and precision in mind, supporting projects from design to completion. 

We work with scaffolding contractors, industrial maintenance service providers, and asset owners across industries such as oil and gas, manufacturing, power generation, mining, maritime, shipbuilding, and pulp and paper processing. By combining global expertise with innovation, we deliver scalable and dependable solutions for complex industrial projects worldwide. 

Our scaffolding solutions serve applications ranging from routine maintenance to critical shutdowns, turnarounds, facility expansions, and decarbonization projects. In each setting, we are a key enabler of safe and efficient work environments, providing access, structural stability, and operational flexibility.

umdasch Industrial Solutions is a company of the Umdasch Group and operates as holding entity, while AT-PAC, our dedicated scaffolding brand, leads the market in providing high-quality scaffolding systems and services to industrial customers and scaffolding contractors worldwide

Description:

At its core, Innovators Colorado houses a fully codified business model: part community, part advisory network, and part IP engine. Its strength lies in its clear product-market fit, brand credibility, and operational efficiency making it uniquely positioned for acquisition, licensing, co-venturing, or integration into an existing advisory, education, or media platform.

Through a curated blend of collaborative working sessions, peer benchmarking, light-touch advisory, and a steady cadence of content and connection, the CoLab supports executives as they navigate the complexity of innovation in modern enterprises. It's not just a network—it's a platform for transformation.

Structured as an annual membership, the CoLab generates predictable recurring revenue while creating long-term relationships with senior executives in innovation, R&D, strategy, and growth. This relationship infrastructure is the foundation upon which a range of services and opportunities can be scaled, licensed, or reimagined.

Notre ambition : bâtir un modèle d’entreprise durable, inclusif et tourné vers l’avenir.

 Notre mission
Offrir des solutions performantes et responsables pour améliorer la qualité de vie, soutenir la croissance locale et favoriser un avenir plus humain et équitable.

 Notre vision
Devenir un acteur de référence en Afrique et au-delà, reconnu pour son innovation, son éthique et son impact positif sur la société.

 Nos valeurs

Intégrité : agir avec transparence et respect.

Innovation : créer des solutions modernes au service des besoins humains.

Solidarité : grandir ensemble, avec et pour les autres.

Con una visione imprenditoriale solida e orientata al lungo termine, MarFin Holding punta a generare valore sostenibile per il Gruppo e i territori in cui opera, attraverso una governance trasparente, investimenti diversificati e un forte orientamento all’innovazione.

Name: Lamsan Holdings Corporation
Description:
Lamsan Holdings Corporation is the parent company of the Lamsan Group of Companies. The primary area of operations of its business units lies within Maguindanao, which is at the heart of the Bangsamoro Region. It has interests in food and feeds manufacturing (Lamsan Inc.), renewable power generation (Lamsan Power Corp.), energy crop farming (Maguindanao Energy Farms Inc.), and port services (Bangsamoro Terminal Services Inc.). It traces its roots to Lamsan Trading Inc., a corn and rice trading firm, established in 1965.

For the past half-century, the Lamsan Group is driven by its continuing commitment and belief in the potential of the Bangsamoro Region and its people. Hence, it continues to invest and give back to the community by providing stable and gainful employment to its direct employees as well as its numerous contractors. It also provides livelihood and business opportunities to the local business community, farmers, traders, and countless other suppliers in the surrounding provinces. Various infrastructure programs such as roads, mosques, and educational centers, have also been undertaken to improve the facilities for the use of the local community

Koncentrujemy się na budowaniu silnych, zróżnicowanych spółek, które łączy wspólna filozofia: wysoka jakość, transparentność i odpowiedzialność biznesowa.

Działamy w modelu aktywnego właściciela – wspieramy spółki portfelowe strategicznie i operacyjnie, jednocześnie pozwalając im na autonomię i rozwój w ich specjalizacjach. Inwestujemy w branże, które dobrze znamy – m.in. nieruchomości, usługi profesjonalne i medyczne – i wybieramy projekty z realnym potencjałem wzrostu.

TLS Capital to nie tylko inwestycje kapitałowe. To również rozwijanie kompetencji, standaryzowanie procesów, profesjonalizacja struktur i tworzenie synergii między podmiotami. Jesteśmy obecni tam, gdzie zaangażowanie właścicieli i przemyślana strategia robią różnicę.

Wierzymy, że wartość buduje się konsekwentnie – poprzez dobre decyzje, długoterminowe relacje i rzetelną pracę każdego dnia. Dlatego skupiamy się na spółkach, które chcą rosnąć mądrze – z jasną wizją i odpowiedzialnym zarządzaniem.

Name: MBG samen ondernemen
Description:
MBG is de holding achter een groep ambitieuze bedrijven die talent en organisaties met elkaar verbindt. Van detachering en uitzenden tot executive search en interim management, onze bedrijven kennen de markt, begrijpen de mensen en koppelen professionals aan mooie opdrachten. In 2024 realiseerden we een gezamenlijke omzet van €120 miljoen. 

Onze reis begon in 1998 met een focus op bouw, infra, techniek en vastgoedontwikkeling – sectoren waarin we nog altijd toonaangevend zijn. Door strategische overnames en startups zijn we inmiddels ook actief in energie, industrie, overheid, finance en IT. Onze groep bestaat uit gespecialiseerde bedrijven met elk hun expertisegebied. CodeCareer, InterStep, Multiselect Bouw en Infra, Multiselect Publiek, Multiselect Techniek, RSC, Tecson, Vitec en Vize – experts in detachering. Novesta en VIGR richten zich op executive search en interim-management. BVB Bouwsupport en Kuipers Uitzendbureau hebben uitzenden in hun DNA. Flinter is onze partner voor brokerdiensten. 

Wat ons bindt? Niet alleen zakelijk succes, maar ook goed werkgeverschap, maatschappelijke betrokkenheid en de wil om te blijven vernieuwen.

Onze bedrijven opereren vanuit 25 vestigingen. Bij MBG geloven we niet in top-down, maar in samenwerking en vooruitgang. We bieden een solide financiële basis, kennisdeling en groeikansen – zonder rigide structuren. MBG is een netwerk waarin we elkaar versterken, uitdagen en laten excelleren.

Onze kracht zit in gedreven mensen binnen onze bedrijven. Je krijgt de ruimte om jezelf te zijn. Geen opgeklopte cultuur of opgelegde KPI’s maar een werkomgeving waarin je groeit op basis van talent en inzet. We waarderen onze mensen en laten dat merken. Goede voorwaarden, ontwikkelkansen en een open cultuur zorgen voor een fijne sfeer. Veel kracht, weinig poeha – dát is werken bij MBG.

Op zoek naar een nieuwe uitdaging of heb je als ondernemer een goed idee? Neem contact op met Ineke Maasakkers: 06-28652454 of stuur een LinkedIn-bericht.

Name: VF PAR
Description:
Somos um dos maiores grupos privados do Brasil
com mais de 1.000 colaboradores sob a mesma Cultura, Valores e um Modelo de Gestão único, que produz resultados sustentáveis e alinhados às melhores práticas de ESG.

Uma holding que tem a responsabilidade de cuidar de 7 negócios com operações independentes e complementares nos segmentos de logística, infraestrutura, agropecuária e energia renovável.

Em 2011, na cidade de Itaituba (PA), os comerciantes e migrantes de família Mineira Vanderlei Francisco Gomes e Simone Marques Lopes, deram início a uma história de muito trabalho que resultou em um dos maiores grupos empresariais do Brasil.

Os anos seguintes foram marcados por crescimento, resultado da execução do planejamento estratégico
e forte disciplina financeira, fatores que proporcionaram desenvolvimento e expansão dos negócios.

Em 2022, foi lançada a marca VF PAR, fruto da reorganização societária que simplificou a estrutura do Grupo, com o objetivo de potencializar o desenvolvimento dos negócios.

Cultura e Valores, Modelo de Gestão único e compromisso com práticas de Governança promovem geração de valor de forma sustentável aos acionistas, colaboradores, fornecedores e todos públicos de relacionamento da Companhia.

Para isso, a VF PAR direciona a execução dos planos de negócio de suas empresas: VF GOMES CONSTRUTORA, VF GOMES LOCAÇÕES, VF GOMES AGROPECUÁRIA e ENERGIZE – C USINAS FOTOVOLTAICAS, ENERGIZE-C ELETROPOSTOS, MOBILIZE-C MOBILIDADE URBANA E MEDALHA NUTRIÇÃO ANIMAL.

Para a geração de retornos compatíveis com cada negócio, desde sua origem, a atuação empresarial é marcada por relações comerciais justas e absoluto foco no atendimento às necessidades expectativas dos clientes de cada negócio.

Desde el año 2014, somos los distribuidores autorizados de bombas y equipos Graco, ofreciendo además un servicio técnico autorizado, con años de experiencia y un compromiso inquebrantable con la calidad, garantizamos soluciones excepcionales y soporte confiable para todas sus necesidades.

Nos empeñamos en desarrollar, aplicar y hacer propias las políticas de calidad, seguridad y salud ocupacional y medio ambiente, correspondientes a su sistema de gestión integrado, así como también asume el deber de hacer respetar toda la legislación vigente, para así garantizar buenas condiciones a sus trabajadores, a la comunidad y excelencia en los productos y servicios a sus clientes.

Name: HAEGER Holding GmbH
Description:
Seit mehr als 12 Jahren deutschlandweit mit einem breiten Portfolio im An- und Verkauf von Edelmetallen, Diamanten, Münzen 
und Barren – doch auch im Sekundärmarkt von „Certified Pre Owned“ Premiumschmuck und Luxusuhren etabliert – vereint die HAEGER Holding GmbH mit ihren Vertriebsmarken Rheinische Scheidestätte GmbH und Haeger GmbH zwei servicestarke Marken unter einem Dach. Zusammen bilden wir das Herz und Fundament für unsere und Ihre Zukunft. Die HAEGER Holding versteht sich 
als Wertegemeinschaft. Wir sind ein Team mit einer gemeinsamen Vision: Kompetent. Präzise. Transparent. 

Edelmetalle, moderne Kunst oder Antiquitäten – seit Generationen liegt der Wert unserer Arbeit darin, die Bedeutung besonderer Gegenstände zu erkennen, zu bewahren und weiterzugeben. Dafür sind nicht nur Erfahrung und Expertise, sondern auch Haltung gefragt. Auf den An- und Verkauf dieser „Werte“ spezialisiert, setzt die HAEGER Holding mit ihren Vertriebsmarken auf Qualität, Traditionsbewusstsein und Fachkompetenz. Wir setzen immer wieder neue Standards für unsere Kunden. Vor allem jedoch auf Verantwortung gegenüber allen Beteiligten. Wer mit Edelmetallen handelt, hat eine besondere Verpflichtung.

Name: Quantrium Holdings Limited
Description:
Quantrium Holdings Limited

 "Where Vision Meets Scale"

Brand Story

Quantrium Holdings Limited was founded on the principle that scale, intelligence, and innovation must work in harmony to build enduring value. The name itself—derived from quantum (the measure of potential) and the suffix -rium (a realm or domain)—reflects a company engineered to explore, invest, and build across sectors that shape the future.

From sustainable infrastructure to digital transformation, from strategic finance to breakthrough technologies, Quantrium is not merely a holding company; it is an engine of visionary capital—transforming today’s possibilities into tomorrow’s prosperity.

 Mission
To empower the rise of a new industrial and economic order by investing in scalable, sustainable, and strategic ventures across critical sectors.

Vision
To be a globally recognized holding group synonymous with intelligent capital, transformative growth, and futuristic ventures.

Core Values
Foresight – We anticipate the future and prepare for it.

Integrity – Ethical leadership in every investment.

Innovation – Bold thinking, cutting-edge solutions.

Scale – We build for impact, not just returns.

Stewardship – Long-term value over short-term gain.

 Logo Meaning – Quantrium Holdings Limited

The Quantrium Holdings Limited logo is a symbol of continental pride and global ambition. The gold silhouette of Africa at its center represents the company’s core identity as an African-focused conglomerate with global reach. The 54 stars encircling the emblem stand for the 54 nations of Africa, emphasizing unity, inclusiveness, and a pan-African vision.

At the heart of the map, the letter “Q” is placed over Nigeria, the birthplace and headquarters of Quantrium Holdings Limited. This not only marks the company’s origin but also anchors its purpose—to elevate African enterprise and innovation onto the world stage.

Name: Organized Chaos
Description:
In 2018, Organized Chaos Holding (OC) was born, to support rapid technological advancements and a burgeoning spirit of innovation.

The brainchild of visionary leaders who recognized the untapped potential within Saudi Arabia, OC was created with a singular purpose: to transform unconventional ideas into thriving business opportunities.

The name "Organized Chaos" reflects the essence of our approach. We believe that true innovation often emerges from the chaotic clash of ideas, perspectives, and experiences. Our role is to bring order to this chaos, structuring and refining these raw concepts into practical, impactful solutions.

From our inception, OC was envisioned as more than just a holding company. It was designed to be a dynamic hub of creativity and strategic thinking, a place where the boundaries of what is possible are constantly being pushed.

Our founders understood that in a rapidly changing world, the ability to adapt and innovate is paramount. This belief is woven into the very fabric of our organization.

Our journey began in the heart of Saudi Arabia, Riyadh, Here, a team of passionate innovators, strategists, and industry experts came together with a common goal: to drive transformative change within the region and beyond. Our early days were characterized by relentless research, bold experimentation, and a steadfast commitment to excellence.

OC's initial projects were diverse, spanning various industries and sectors. From technology and healthcare to renewable resources, augmentation services and education, we sought out opportunities where our unique blend of creativity and strategic vision could make the most significant impact. Each venture was approached with a meticulous attention to detail and an unwavering dedication to quality.

Driven by Vision. Powered by Innovation.

Founded by Yuvraj Sharma, VRAJHNA is rooted in values of leadership, integrity, and innovation — drawing inspiration from generational legacy and shaped by today’s entrepreneurial spirit.

 Who We Are
VRAJHNA Group functions as a parent company, enabling the creation and growth of strategically structured, independently run ventures across industries. Each of our subsidiaries is born from real needs, shaped for real impact, and led by execution-first thinking.

 Our Group Structure
We currently manage and develop four powerful subsidiaries under the VRAJHNA umbrella:
VRAJHNA FASHION:
Affordable luxury & trend-focused fashion for India's youth.
VRAJHNA PHARMA EXPORTS:
Certified pharmaceutical exports, domestic distribution, and global licensing support.
VRAJHNA TECHNOLOGIES & DIGITAL PVT LTD:
SaaS solutions, media services, and automation tools tailored for India’s MSMEs.
VRAJHNA RETAIL & CONSUMER PRODUCTS:
Mass-market FMCG and D2C products for Tier 2/3 cities and rural India.

 Our Mission
To build a legacy of trust-driven, purpose-led brands that deliver meaningful change and scale sustainably across India and beyond.
We believe that the future belongs to multi-disciplinary companies capable of adapting, growing, and serving across industries — and VRAJHNA is being built to do just that.

 From Legacy to Leadership
Our journey is guided by the wisdom of the past and shaped by the will to create.
Founder Yuvraj Sharma leads VRAJHNA Group with a vision to honor his father's legacy of values, ethics, and enterprise — while building a new-age business engine for tomorrow's India.

 Let’s Build Together
Whether you're a founder, investor, vendor, distributor, or startup enthusiast — we invite you to be a part of the VRAJHNA ecosystem.

We believe that promoting such enterprises is not only financially sound but also a fundamental step towards building a better future.

Community Engagement: We believe that true sustainability requires the active participation of all stakeholders. We are dedicated to fostering collaboration and partnerships with local communities, non-profits, and other organisations to drive collective action towards a sustainable future.
Education and Advocacy: We are passionate about raising awareness about sustainable development and advocating for policies that promote environmental protection, social equity, and economic viability.

Name: The Escapee Collective Community
Description:
Helping Create the Next Generation(X) of Solo Business Owners

The Escapee Collective is more than a community—it’s a movement.

We’re here to guide GenXers as they escape corporate life and build a better future: one of freedom, flexibility, and fulfillment.

Our mission is simple:
To help GenXers turn decades of corporate experience into thriving solo businesses that are impactful, flexible, and designed to fit their lives—not the other way around.

What We Believe:
	•	Freedom Comes First: Solo businesses are about reclaiming your time, control, and purpose.
	•	Solo is Smart: You don’t need a big team, endless complexity, or massive risk to build something meaningful.
	•	Leverage What You’ve Built: Your corporate experience is your biggest asset—use it to create value on your terms.
	•	Support Matters: No one should have to navigate this journey alone.

What We Do:
	•	Provide education, tools, and resources to help you build a solo business.
	•	Offer a community of like-minded escapees who understand your goals.
	•	Reduce the risk of going solo by teaching you how to work smarter, not harder.
	•	Help you connect with others building businesses that support small businesses, non-profits, and startups.

Whether you’re just curious about leaving corporate or already planning your next steps, The Escapee Collective is here to support you.

The Future is Solo
We’re building the next Generation(X) of solo business owners. It’s not about chasing corporate promotions or building someone else’s dream. It’s about creating a life on your terms.

Join us and make your escape.

Gli anni '80 e '90 segnano a livello globale un cambiamento epocale sia per quanto riguarda la finanza che l'informatica. Le due «rivoluzioni» hanno segnato la nostra contemporaneità e il nostro progresso come società in tutto il suo insieme. ADB con il tempo si trasforma e dal suo DNA nascono FIDA, ADB Corporate Advisory e Alfa SCF.

Nel 2025 ADB Holding partecipa come socio fondatore in Newmo, una startup innovativa che sviluppa e detiene una tecnologia proprietaria avanzata per il trattamento e la gestione di dati su blockchain, in particolare nel settore finanziario e assicurativo.

Description:
Confluent Holdings is a St. Louis–based holding company dedicated to acquiring and building leading businesses across manufacturing, distribution, and value-add service industries. We invest with an indefinite horizon, preserving legacies and bringing businesses together to empower long-term growth.

What sets us apart:
• Long-term commitment – We invest patiently for growth, even if it takes decades to realize.
• Flexibility – We adapt our approach to fit any situation and we act efficiently.
• Care for our businesses – We don’t buy to sell; we instead invest to benefit all constituents, including our customers and associates.
• Shared strength – Our companies collaborate and support one another to achieve their goals.
• Reinvestment – Every available dollar goes back into our businesses.

Since our founding in 2015, we’ve:
• Completed 22+ acquisitions nationwide
• Grown to 900+ associates across 40+ locations
• Shipped 600M+ products to 13,500+ customers
• Enabled 35+ owners to retire with confidence

Our values guide us every day: Do the right thing, Listen first, Be entrepreneurial, One team committed to our customers, and Excellence in all we do. Our North Star is enabling every individual to be their best every day.

We typically invest in businesses with up to $50M in revenue and $1M+ in earnings, favoring market leaders with long-term growth potential. At Confluent Holdings, we don’t acquire businesses with the intent of selling them; rather, we partner with our businesses to preserve stability and invest in growth for the future.
