Jayshar Holdings is a dynamic and innovative business conglomerate with a strong focus on Advertising, Luxury, and Information Technology. As a newly established entity, Jayshar Holdings is committed to driving excellence and fostering growth across its diverse portfolio of businesses.

Under the Jayshar family, we proudly operate two key ventures:

Pintharu Advertising: A cutting-edge advertising agency dedicated to delivering creative and impactful marketing solutions.
Jindex Digital Solutions: A premier digital solutions provider specializing in innovative IT services.
In addition to our core business interests, Jayshar Holdings is an authorized seller for Dynace Global food supplement products.

At Jayshar Holdings, we are passionate about creating value and opportunities. Our mission is to lead the way in our industries by embracing innovation, nurturing talent, and maintaining a relentless focus on customer satisfaction.

Name: Joossoor Holding
Description:
Le Groupe
Créé en 1995, le Groupe JOOSSOOR a débuté dans le secteur industriel par la production et la vente de profils en acier utilisés en couverture sèche et bardage pour les bâtiments industriels.
Au fil des années, le Groupe a diversifié ses produits et s’est déployé pour devenir le premier producteur en Afrique et au Moyen-Orient.

Leader dans le secteur de l’industrie métallique, le Groupe a parallèlement diversifié ses activités en investissant dans plusieurs autres secteurs clés tels que la distribution, le tourisme, l’immobilier, l’agriculture et les services.

Avec 16 sociétés à son actif, Joossoor a lançé en 2015 un projet de transformation qui a permis de centraliser le Groupe autour de six métiers décisifs pour en faciliter la gestion et le suivi de la performance.

A l’échelle internationale, le Groupe exporte aujourd’hui dans plus de 35 pays et dispose de 2 filiales à l’étranger :

1 filiale au Maroc
1 filiale aux Emirats Arabes Unis

Name: TaPro
Description:
TaPro is a dynamic holding company dedicated to excellence in the fields of real estate, social media advertising, contracting, and furniture. With a vision to create innovative and sustainable living environments, we strive to provide top-quality solutions to our clients.

Our Real Estate Division focuses on developing residential, commercial, and industrial projects designed to meet the needs of modern society. We take pride in building comfortable homes and dynamic business environments in prime locations.

Our Social Media Advertising Agency connects businesses with their target audiences through creative and effective digital marketing strategies. Our team of experts is dedicated to delivering seamless and satisfying advertising experiences, with a deep understanding of the ever-evolving social media landscape.

Our Property Sales Agency bridges buyers and sellers with professional and trustworthy services. Our agents are committed to providing smooth and satisfying transaction experiences, leveraging their extensive knowledge of the real estate market.

Our Contracting Division comprises experienced professionals in construction and renovation. With a commitment to excellence and innovation, we ensure every project is completed on time and meets the highest quality standards.

Our Furniture Division offers a wide range of elegant and functional furniture products. We believe every space deserves a touch of stunning design and unparalleled comfort.

At TaPro, we understand that our success is the result of hard work, dedication, and the extraordinary collaboration of our team. We are committed to continuous innovation and adding value to our customers and stakeholders.

Join us on our journey towards a brighter and more successful future!

Name: Shamrock Group
Description:
For over three decades, we have been committed to sustainable innovation in medical device manufacturing, specializing in high-quality medical gloves and healthcare solutions. 

Our mission is to create safe, reliable, and eco-conscious products that improve lives while minimizing environmental impact.

Beyond medical manufacturing, we are dedicated to advancing sustainable agriculture, agri-tech, herbal manufacturing, and health product development. 

By integrating green technology, responsible sourcing, and ethical production, we strive to create a healthier planet and a better future for all.


Our Core Focus:
 Sustainable Medical Glove & Device Manufacturing
 Eco-Friendly Agriculture & Agri-Tech Solutions
 Natural & Herbal-Based Health Product Development

Through continuous innovation and a deep commitment to sustainability, circular economy practices, and social responsibility, we are shaping industries that prioritize both human health and environmental well-being.

 Join us in building a healthier, more sustainable world!
